```typescript
        const srcX = x + dx
        const srcY = y + dy
        const srcIdx = (srcY * this.width + srcX) * 4
        const dstIdx = (dy * width + dx) * 4
        const maskIdx = srcY * this.width + srcX

        if (this.currentMask[maskIdx] > 0) {
          const alpha = this.currentMask[maskIdx] / 255

          resultImageData.data[dstIdx] = sourceImageData.data[srcIdx]
          resultImageData.data[dstIdx + 1] = sourceImageData.data[srcIdx + 1]
          resultImageData.data[dstIdx + 2] = sourceImageData.data[srcIdx + 2]
          resultImageData.data[dstIdx + 3] = Math.round(sourceImageData.data[srcIdx + 3] * alpha)

          if (operation === 'cut' || operation === 'delete') {
            sourceImageData.data[srcIdx + 3] = Math.round(
              sourceImageData.data[srcIdx + 3] * (1 - alpha)
            )
          }
        }
      }
    }

    return operation === 'delete' ? null : resultImageData
  }

  fillSelection(
    targetImageData: ImageData,
    color: { r: number; g: number; b: number; a: number }
  ): void {
    if (!this.currentMask) return

    for (let i = 0; i < this.currentMask.length; i++) {
      if (this.currentMask[i] > 0) {
        const alpha = this.currentMask[i] / 255
        const idx = i * 4

        targetImageData.data[idx] = Math.round(
          color.r * alpha + targetImageData.data[idx] * (1 - alpha)
        )
        targetImageData.data[idx + 1] = Math.round(
          color.g * alpha + targetImageData.data[idx + 1] * (1 - alpha)
        )
        targetImageData.data[idx + 2] = Math.round(
          color.b * alpha + targetImageData.data[idx + 2] * (1 - alpha)
        )
        targetImageData.data[idx + 3] = Math.round(
          color.a * alpha + targetImageData.data[idx + 3] * (1 - alpha)
        )
      }
    }
  }
}

```


## Transform Tools

### Crop Engine

**Category:** Transform  
**Version:** Chronicle

*Crop tool with aspect ratio constraints and preview*

**File:** `CropEngine.ts`

```typescript
import type { Point, Rect } from '@/types/editor'

export interface CropState {
  isActive: boolean
  bounds: Rect | null
  handles: CropHandle[]
  isDragging: boolean
  dragHandle: CropHandle | null
  dragStart: Point | null
}

export interface CropHandle {
  id: string
  position: Point
  type: 'corner' | 'edge' | 'center'
  cursor: string
  bounds: Rect
}

export class CropEngine {
  private state: CropState = {
    isActive: false,
    bounds: null,
    handles: [],
    isDragging: false,
    dragHandle: null,
    dragStart: null,
  }

  private imageWidth = 0
  private imageHeight = 0
  private handleSize = 8

  setImageDimensions(width: number, height: number): void {
    this.imageWidth = width
    this.imageHeight = height
  }

  startCrop(bounds?: Rect): void {
    this.state.isActive = true
    this.state.bounds = bounds || {
      x: this.imageWidth * 0.1,
      y: this.imageHeight * 0.1,
      width: this.imageWidth * 0.8,
      height: this.imageHeight * 0.8,
    }
    this.updateHandles()
  }

  endCrop(): Rect | null {
    const bounds = this.state.bounds
    this.reset()
    return bounds
  }

  reset(): void {
    this.state = {
      isActive: false,
      bounds: null,
      handles: [],
      isDragging: false,
      dragHandle: null,
      dragStart: null,
    }
  }

  getState(): CropState {
    return { ...this.state }
  }

  handlePointerDown(point: Point): boolean {
    if (!this.state.isActive || !this.state.bounds) return false

    const handle = this.getHandleAtPoint(point)
    if (handle) {
      this.state.isDragging = true
      this.state.dragHandle = handle
      this.state.dragStart = { ...point }
      return true
    }

    // Check if clicking inside crop area to move it
    if (this.isPointInCropArea(point)) {
      this.state.isDragging = true
      this.state.dragHandle = {
        id: 'move',
        position: point,
        type: 'center',
        cursor: 'move',
        bounds: this.state.bounds,
      }
      this.state.dragStart = { ...point }
      return true
    }

    return false
  }

  handlePointerMove(point: Point): void {
    if (!this.state.isActive || !this.state.bounds) return

    if (this.state.isDragging && this.state.dragHandle && this.state.dragStart) {
      const dx = point.x - this.state.dragStart.x
      const dy = point.y - this.state.dragStart.y

      this.updateCropBounds(this.state.dragHandle, dx, dy)
      this.updateHandles()
    }
  }

  handlePointerUp(): void {
    this.state.isDragging = false
    this.state.dragHandle = null
    this.state.dragStart = null
  }

  getCursorForPoint(point: Point): string {
    if (!this.state.isActive || !this.state.bounds) return 'default'

    const handle = this.getHandleAtPoint(point)
    if (handle) return handle.cursor

    if (this.isPointInCropArea(point)) return 'move'

    return 'default'
  }

  private updateHandles(): void {
    if (!this.state.bounds) return

    const { x, y, width, height } = this.state.bounds
    const halfHandle = this.handleSize / 2

    this.state.handles = [
      // Corners
      {
        id: 'nw',
        position: { x: x - halfHandle, y: y - halfHandle },
        type: 'corner',
        cursor: 'nw-resize',
        bounds: { x: x - halfHandle, y: y - halfHandle, width: this.handleSize, height: this.handleSize },
      },
      {
        id: 'ne',
        position: { x: x + width - halfHandle, y: y - halfHandle },
        type: 'corner',
        cursor: 'ne-resize',
        bounds: { x: x + width - halfHandle, y: y - halfHandle, width: this.handleSize, height: this.handleSize },
      },
      {
        id: 'sw',
        position: { x: x - halfHandle, y: y + height - halfHandle },
        type: 'corner',
        cursor: 'sw-resize',
        bounds: { x: x - halfHandle, y: y + height - halfHandle, width: this.handleSize, height: this.handleSize },
      },
      {
        id: 'se',
        position: { x: x + width - halfHandle, y: y + height - halfHandle },
        type: 'corner',
        cursor: 'se-resize',
        bounds: { x: x + width - halfHandle, y: y + height - halfHandle, width: this.handleSize, height: this.handleSize },
      },
      // Edges
      {
        id: 'n',
        position: { x: x + width / 2 - halfHandle, y: y - halfHandle },
        type: 'edge',
        cursor: 'n-resize',
        bounds: { x: x + width / 2 - halfHandle, y: y - halfHandle, width: this.handleSize, height: this.handleSize },
      },
      {
        id: 's',
        position: { x: x + width / 2 - halfHandle, y: y + height - halfHandle },
        type: 'edge',
        cursor: 's-resize',
        bounds: { x: x + width / 2 - halfHandle, y: y + height - halfHandle, width: this.handleSize, height: this.handleSize },
      },
      {
        id: 'w',
        position: { x: x - halfHandle, y: y + height / 2 - halfHandle },
        type: 'edge',
        cursor: 'w-resize',
        bounds: { x: x - halfHandle, y: y + height / 2 - halfHandle, width: this.handleSize, height: this.handleSize },
      },
      {
        id: 'e',
        position: { x: x + width - halfHandle, y: y + height / 2 - halfHandle },
        type: 'edge',
        cursor: 'e-resize',
        bounds: { x: x + width - halfHandle, y: y + height / 2 - halfHandle, width: this.handleSize, height: this.handleSize },
      },
    ]
  }

  private getHandleAtPoint(point: Point): CropHandle | null {
    for (const handle of this.state.handles) {
      if (this.isPointInRect(point, handle.bounds)) {
        return handle
      }
    }
    return null
  }

  private isPointInRect(point: Point, rect: Rect): boolean {
    return (
      point.x >= rect.x &&
      point.x <= rect.x + rect.width &&
      point.y >= rect.y &&
      point.y <= rect.y + rect.height
    )
  }

  private isPointInCropArea(point: Point): boolean {
    if (!this.state.bounds) return false
    return this.isPointInRect(point, this.state.bounds)
  }

  private updateCropBounds(handle: CropHandle, dx: number, dy: number): void {
    if (!this.state.bounds) return

    const bounds = { ...this.state.bounds }

    switch (handle.id) {
      case 'move':
        bounds.x = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.imageWidth - bounds.width, bounds.x + dx))
        bounds.y = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.imageHeight - bounds.height, bounds.y + dy))
        break

      case 'nw':
        const newX = Math.max(0, Math.min(bounds.x + bounds.width - 10, bounds.x + dx))
        const newY = Math.max(0, Math.min(bounds.y + bounds.height - 10, bounds.y + dy))
        bounds.width += bounds.x - newX
        bounds.height += bounds.y - newY
        bounds.x = newX
        bounds.y = newY
        break

      case 'ne':
        bounds.width = Math.max(10, Math.min(this.imageWidth - bounds.x, bounds.width + dx))
        const newY2 = Math.max(0, Math.min(bounds.y + bounds.height - 10, bounds.y + dy))
        bounds.height += bounds.y - newY2
        bounds.y = newY2
        break

      case 'sw':
        const newX2 = Math.max(0, Math.min(bounds.x + bounds.width - 10, bounds.x + dx))
        bounds.width += bounds.x - newX2
        bounds.x = newX2
        bounds.height = Math.max(10, Math.min(this.imageHeight - bounds.y, bounds.height + dy))
        break

      case 'se':
        bounds.width = Math.max(10, Math.min(this.imageWidth - bounds.x, bounds.width + dx))
        bounds.height = Math.max(10, Math.min(this.imageHeight - bounds.y, bounds.height + dy))
        break

      case 'n':
        const newY3 = Math.max(0, Math.min(bounds.y + bounds.height - 10, bounds.y + dy))
        bounds.height += bounds.y - newY3
        bounds.y = newY3
        break

      case 's':
        bounds.height = Math.max(10, Math.min(this.imageHeight - bounds.y, bounds.height + dy))
        break

      case 'w':
        const newX3 = Math.max(0, Math.min(bounds.x + bounds.width - 10, bounds.x + dx))
        bounds.width += bounds.x - newX3
        bounds.x = newX3
        break

      case 'e':
        bounds.width = Math.max(10, Math.min(this.imageWidth - bounds.x, bounds.width + dx))
        break
    }

    this.state.bounds = bounds
  }

  applyCrop(sourceCanvas: HTMLCanvasElement): HTMLCanvasElement | null {
    if (!this.state.bounds) return null

    const { x, y, width, height } = this.state.bounds
    const croppedCanvas = document.createElement('canvas')
    croppedCanvas.width = width
    croppedCanvas.height = height

    const ctx = croppedCanvas.getContext('2d')!
    ctx.drawImage(
      sourceCanvas,
      x, y, width, height,
      0, 0, width, height
    )

    return croppedCanvas
  }

  renderCropOverlay(
    ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
    canvasWidth: number,
    canvasHeight: number
  ): void {
    if (!this.state.isActive || !this.state.bounds) return

    const { x, y, width, height } = this.state.bounds

    ctx.save()

    // Draw darkened overlay outside crop area
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)'
    
    // Top
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvasWidth, y)
    // Bottom
    ctx.fillRect(0, y + height, canvasWidth, canvasHeight - y - height)
    // Left
    ctx.fillRect(0, y, x, height)
    // Right
    ctx.fillRect(x + width, y, canvasWidth - x - width, height)

    // Draw crop border
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff'
    ctx.lineWidth = 1
    ctx.setLineDash([5, 5])
    ctx.strokeRect(x, y, width, height)
    ctx.setLineDash([])

    // Draw handles
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff'
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#000000'
    ctx.lineWidth = 1

    for (const handle of this.state.handles) {
      const { x: hx, y: hy } = handle.position
      ctx.fillRect(hx, hy, this.handleSize, this.handleSize)
      ctx.strokeRect(hx, hy, this.handleSize, this.handleSize)
    }

    ctx.restore()
  }
}

export const cropEngine = new CropEngine()
```


## Utility Tools

### Coordinate System

**Category:** Utility  
**Version:** Chronicle

*Coordinate transformation system (screen/world/image spaces)*

**File:** `CoordinateSystem.ts`

```typescript
import type { Point, Size } from '@/types/editor'
import { clamp } from '@/lib/utils'

export interface CoordinateSystemOptions {
  minZoom: number
  maxZoom: number
  zoomStep: number
}

const DEFAULT_OPTIONS: CoordinateSystemOptions = {
  minZoom: 0.1,
  maxZoom: 32,
  zoomStep: 0.1,
}

export class CoordinateSystem {
  private _pan: Point = { x: 0, y: 0 }
  private _zoom: number = 1
  private _rotation: number = 0
  private _canvasSize: Size = { width: 0, height: 0 }
  private _imageSize: Size = { width: 0, height: 0 }
  private _dpr: number = 1
  private _options: CoordinateSystemOptions

  constructor(options: Partial<CoordinateSystemOptions> = {}) {
    this._options = { ...DEFAULT_OPTIONS, ...options }
    this._dpr = typeof window !== 'undefined' ? window.devicePixelRatio || 1 : 1
  }

  get pan(): Point {
    return { ...this._pan }
  }

  set pan(value: Point) {
    this._pan = { ...value }
  }

  get zoom(): number {
    return this._zoom
  }

  set zoom(value: number) {
    this._zoom = clamp(value, this._options.minZoom, this._options.maxZoom)
  }

  get rotation(): number {
    return this._rotation
  }

  set rotation(value: number) {
    this._rotation = value % 360
  }

  get canvasSize(): Size {
    return { ...this._canvasSize }
  }

  set canvasSize(value: Size) {
    this._canvasSize = { ...value }
  }

  get imageSize(): Size {
    return { ...this._imageSize }
  }

  set imageSize(value: Size) {
    this._imageSize = { ...value }
  }

  get dpr(): number {
    return this._dpr
  }

  set dpr(value: number) {
    this._dpr = value
  }

  screenToCanvas(screenPoint: Point): Point {
    return {
      x: screenPoint.x * this._dpr,
      y: screenPoint.y * this._dpr,
    }
  }

  canvasToScreen(canvasPoint: Point): Point {
    return {
      x: canvasPoint.x / this._dpr,
      y: canvasPoint.y / this._dpr,
    }
  }

  canvasToWorld(canvasPoint: Point): Point {
    const centerX = this._canvasSize.width / 2
    const centerY = this._canvasSize.height / 2
    return {
      x: (canvasPoint.x - centerX - this._pan.x) / this._zoom,
      y: (canvasPoint.y - centerY - this._pan.y) / this._zoom,
    }
  }

  worldToCanvas(worldPoint: Point): Point {
    const centerX = this._canvasSize.width / 2
    const centerY = this._canvasSize.height / 2
    return {
      x: worldPoint.x * this._zoom + centerX + this._pan.x,
      y: worldPoint.y * this._zoom + centerY + this._pan.y,
    }
  }

  screenToWorld(screenPoint: Point): Point {
    const canvasPoint = this.screenToCanvas(screenPoint)
    return this.canvasToWorld(canvasPoint)
  }

  worldToScreen(worldPoint: Point): Point {
    const canvasPoint = this.worldToCanvas(worldPoint)
    return this.canvasToScreen(canvasPoint)
  }

  worldToImage(worldPoint: Point): Point {
    return {
      x: worldPoint.x + this._imageSize.width / 2,
      y: worldPoint.y + this._imageSize.height / 2,
    }
  }

  imageToWorld(imagePoint: Point): Point {
    return {
      x: imagePoint.x - this._imageSize.width / 2,
      y: imagePoint.y - this._imageSize.height / 2,
    }
  }

  screenToImage(screenPoint: Point): Point {
    const worldPoint = this.screenToWorld(screenPoint)
    return this.worldToImage(worldPoint)
  }

  imageToScreen(imagePoint: Point): Point {
    const worldPoint = this.imageToWorld(imagePoint)
    return this.worldToScreen(worldPoint)
  }

  applyTransform(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D): void {
    const centerX = this._canvasSize.width / 2
    const centerY = this._canvasSize.height / 2

    ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0)
    ctx.translate(centerX + this._pan.x, centerY + this._pan.y)
    ctx.scale(this._zoom, this._zoom)

    if (this._rotation !== 0) {
      ctx.rotate((this._rotation * Math.PI) / 180)
    }
  }

  resetTransform(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D): void {
    ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0)
  }

  fitToView(padding = 20): void {
    const paddingScaled = padding * this._dpr
    const availableWidth = this._canvasSize.width - paddingScaled * 2
    const availableHeight = this._canvasSize.height - paddingScaled * 2

    const scaleX = availableWidth / (this._imageSize.width * this._dpr)
    const scaleY = availableHeight / (this._imageSize.height * this._dpr)
    const scale = Math.min(scaleX, scaleY, 1) * this._dpr

    this._zoom = clamp(scale, this._options.minZoom, this._options.maxZoom)
    this._pan = { x: 0, y: 0 }
    this._rotation = 0
  }

  zoomToPoint(screenPoint: Point, newZoom: number): void {
    const canvasPoint = this.screenToCanvas(screenPoint)
    const centerX = this._canvasSize.width / 2
    const centerY = this._canvasSize.height / 2

    const worldX = (canvasPoint.x - centerX - this._pan.x) / this._zoom
    const worldY = (canvasPoint.y - centerY - this._pan.y) / this._zoom

    this._zoom = clamp(newZoom, this._options.minZoom, this._options.maxZoom)

    this._pan.x = canvasPoint.x - centerX - worldX * this._zoom
    this._pan.y = canvasPoint.y - centerY - worldY * this._zoom
  }

  zoomIn(screenPoint?: Point): void {
    const newZoom = this._zoom * (1 + this._options.zoomStep)
    if (screenPoint) {
      this.zoomToPoint(screenPoint, newZoom)
    } else {
      this._zoom = clamp(newZoom, this._options.minZoom, this._options.maxZoom)
    }
  }

  zoomOut(screenPoint?: Point): void {
    const newZoom = this._zoom * (1 - this._options.zoomStep)
    if (screenPoint) {
      this.zoomToPoint(screenPoint, newZoom)
    } else {
      this._zoom = clamp(newZoom, this._options.minZoom, this._options.maxZoom)
    }
  }

  centerOn(worldPoint: Point): void {
    this._pan = {
      x: -worldPoint.x * this._zoom,
      y: -worldPoint.y * this._zoom,
    }
  }

  getVisibleWorldBounds(): { minX: number; minY: number; maxX: number; maxY: number } {
    const topLeft = this.canvasToWorld({ x: 0, y: 0 })
    const bottomRight = this.canvasToWorld({
      x: this._canvasSize.width,
      y: this._canvasSize.height,
    })
    return {
      minX: topLeft.x,
      minY: topLeft.y,
      maxX: bottomRight.x,
      maxY: bottomRight.y,
    }
  }

  getVisibleImageBounds(): { minX: number; minY: number; maxX: number; maxY: number } {
    const worldBounds = this.getVisibleWorldBounds()
    return {
      minX: Math.max(0, worldBounds.minX + this._imageSize.width / 2),
      minY: Math.max(0, worldBounds.minY + this._imageSize.height / 2),
      maxX: Math.min(this._imageSize.width, worldBounds.maxX + this._imageSize.width / 2),
      maxY: Math.min(this._imageSize.height, worldBounds.maxY + this._imageSize.height / 2),
    }
  }

  isPointInImage(screenPoint: Point): boolean {
    const imagePoint = this.screenToImage(screenPoint)
    return (
      imagePoint.x >= 0 &&
      imagePoint.x < this._imageSize.width &&
      imagePoint.y >= 0 &&
      imagePoint.y < this._imageSize.height
    )
  }

  clampToImage(imagePoint: Point): Point {
    return {
      x: clamp(imagePoint.x, 0, this._imageSize.width - 1),
      y: clamp(imagePoint.y, 0, this._imageSize.height - 1),
    }
  }

  getState(): { pan: Point; zoom: number; rotation: number } {
    return {
      pan: { ...this._pan },
      zoom: this._zoom,
      rotation: this._rotation,
    }
  }

  setState(state: { pan?: Point; zoom?: number; rotation?: number }): void {
    if (state.pan) this._pan = { ...state.pan }
    if (state.zoom !== undefined) {
      this._zoom = clamp(state.zoom, this._options.minZoom, this._options.maxZoom)
    }
    if (state.rotation !== undefined) this._rotation = state.rotation % 360
  }

  clone(): CoordinateSystem {
    const copy = new CoordinateSystem(this._options)
    copy._pan = { ...this._pan }
    copy._zoom = this._zoom
    copy._rotation = this._rotation
    copy._canvasSize = { ...this._canvasSize }
    copy._imageSize = { ...this._imageSize }
    copy._dpr = this._dpr
    return copy
  }
}

```

### Render Pipeline

**Category:** Utility  
**Version:** Chronicle

*Canvas rendering pipeline with layer compositing*

**File:** `RenderPipeline.ts`

```typescript
import type { Layer, Selection, Point } from '@/types/editor'
import { CoordinateSystem } from './CoordinateSystem'
import type { MagneticLassoState, Anchor } from './MagneticLasso'
import type { CropState } from './CropEngine'

export type RenderMode = 'full' | 'fast' | 'interaction'

export interface RenderOptions {
  showGrid: boolean
  showSelection: boolean
  showHoverPreview: boolean
  showCursor: boolean
  gridThreshold: number
  selectionColor: string
  previewColor: string
}

export interface CursorInfo {
  position: Point
  tool: string
  brushSize?: number
  brushColor?: { r: number; g: number; b: number }
}

const DEFAULT_OPTIONS: RenderOptions = {
  showGrid: true,
  showSelection: true,
  showHoverPreview: true,
  showCursor: true,
  gridThreshold: 8,
  selectionColor: 'rgba(0, 200, 255, 0.5)',
  previewColor: 'rgba(0, 200, 255, 0.3)',
}

export class RenderPipeline {
  private ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D
  private coordSystem: CoordinateSystem
  private options: RenderOptions
  private cachedComposite: HTMLCanvasElement | null = null
  private compositeValid = false
  private lastFrameTime = 0
  private frameCount = 0

  constructor(
    ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
    coordSystem: CoordinateSystem,
    options: Partial<RenderOptions> = {}
  ) {
    this.ctx = ctx
    this.coordSystem = coordSystem
    this.options = { ...DEFAULT_OPTIONS, ...options }
  }

  setContext(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D): void {
    this.ctx = ctx
  }

  setCoordinateSystem(coordSystem: CoordinateSystem): void {
    this.coordSystem = coordSystem
  }

  setOptions(options: Partial<RenderOptions>): void {
    this.options = { ...this.options, ...options }
  }

  invalidateComposite(): void {
    this.compositeValid = false
  }

  render(
    layers: Layer[],
    selection: Selection | null,
    previewMask: Uint8ClampedArray | null,
    cursorInfo: CursorInfo | null,
    mode: RenderMode = 'full',
    magneticLassoState?: MagneticLassoState | null
  ): void {
    const startTime = performance.now()

    this.coordSystem.resetTransform(this.ctx)
    this.clearCanvas()

    if (mode === 'interaction' && this.cachedComposite && this.compositeValid) {
      this.renderFast()
    } else {
      this.renderFull(layers, selection, previewMask, cursorInfo, magneticLassoState)
    }

    const elapsed = performance.now() - startTime
    this.frameCount++

    if (elapsed > 16.67) {
      console.warn(`Slow frame: ${elapsed.toFixed(2)}ms`)
    }

    this.lastFrameTime = elapsed
  }

  private clearCanvas(): void {
    const { width, height } = this.coordSystem.canvasSize
    this.ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height)
  }

  private renderFast(): void {
    this.coordSystem.applyTransform(this.ctx)
    this.drawBackground()

    if (this.cachedComposite) {
      const { width, height } = this.coordSystem.imageSize
      this.ctx.drawImage(
        this.cachedComposite,
        -width / 2,
        -height / 2,
        width,
        height
      )
    }

    this.coordSystem.resetTransform(this.ctx)
  }

  private renderFull(
    layers: Layer[],
    selection: Selection | null,
    previewMask: Uint8ClampedArray | null,
    cursorInfo: CursorInfo | null,
    magneticLassoState?: MagneticLassoState | null
  ): void {
    this.coordSystem.applyTransform(this.ctx)
    this.drawBackground()
    this.drawLayers(layers)
    this.updateCompositeCache(layers)

    if (this.options.showSelection && selection?.active && selection.mask) {
      this.drawSelectionOverlay(selection)
    }

    if (this.options.showHoverPreview && previewMask) {
      this.drawPreviewOverlay(previewMask)
    }

    if (magneticLassoState && (magneticLassoState.isActive || magneticLassoState.isClosed)) {
      this.drawMagneticLasso(magneticLassoState)
    }

    this.coordSystem.resetTransform(this.ctx)

    if (this.options.showGrid && this.coordSystem.zoom >= this.options.gridThreshold) {
      this.drawPixelGrid()
    }

    if (this.options.showCursor && cursorInfo) {
      this.drawCursor(cursorInfo)
    }
  }

  private drawBackground(): void {
    const { width, height } = this.coordSystem.imageSize
    const halfWidth = width / 2
    const halfHeight = height / 2
    const gridSize = 8

    this.ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
    this.ctx.fillRect(-halfWidth, -halfHeight, width, height)

    this.ctx.fillStyle = '#2a2a2a'
    for (let y = 0; y < height; y += gridSize * 2) {
      for (let x = 0; x < width; x += gridSize * 2) {
        this.ctx.fillRect(
          -halfWidth + x,
          -halfHeight + y,
          gridSize,
          gridSize
        )
        this.ctx.fillRect(
          -halfWidth + x + gridSize,
          -halfHeight + y + gridSize,
          gridSize,
          gridSize
        )
      }
    }
  }

  private drawLayers(layers: Layer[]): void {
    const { width, height } = this.coordSystem.imageSize
    const halfWidth = width / 2
    const halfHeight = height / 2

    for (const layer of layers) {
      if (!layer.visible || !layer.canvas) continue

      this.ctx.globalAlpha = layer.opacity / 100
      this.ctx.globalCompositeOperation = this.blendModeToComposite(layer.blendMode)

      this.ctx.drawImage(
        layer.canvas,
        -halfWidth + layer.position.x,
        -halfHeight + layer.position.y
      )
    }

    this.ctx.globalAlpha = 1
    this.ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over'
  }

  private blendModeToComposite(blendMode: string): GlobalCompositeOperation {
    const mapping: Record<string, GlobalCompositeOperation> = {
      'normal': 'source-over',
      'multiply': 'multiply',
      'screen': 'screen',
      'overlay': 'overlay',
      'darken': 'darken',
      'lighten': 'lighten',
      'color-dodge': 'color-dodge',
      'color-burn': 'color-burn',
      'hard-light': 'hard-light',
      'soft-light': 'soft-light',
      'difference': 'difference',
      'exclusion': 'exclusion',
      'hue': 'hue',
      'saturation': 'saturation',
      'color': 'color',
      'luminosity': 'luminosity',
    }
    return mapping[blendMode] || 'source-over'
  }

  private updateCompositeCache(layers: Layer[]): void {
    const { width, height } = this.coordSystem.imageSize
    if (width === 0 || height === 0) return

    if (!this.cachedComposite) {
      this.cachedComposite = document.createElement('canvas')
    }

    this.cachedComposite.width = width
    this.cachedComposite.height = height

    const ctx = this.cachedComposite.getContext('2d')!
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height)

    for (const layer of layers) {
      if (!layer.visible || !layer.canvas) continue

      ctx.globalAlpha = layer.opacity / 100
      ctx.globalCompositeOperation = this.blendModeToComposite(layer.blendMode)
      ctx.drawImage(layer.canvas, layer.position.x, layer.position.y)
    }

    ctx.globalAlpha = 1
    ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over'
    this.compositeValid = true
  }

  private drawSelectionOverlay(selection: Selection): void {
    if (!selection.mask || !selection.bounds) return

    const { width, height } = this.coordSystem.imageSize
    const halfWidth = width / 2
    const halfHeight = height / 2

    const imageData = new ImageData(width, height)
    for (let i = 0; i < selection.mask.length; i++) {
      if (selection.mask[i] > 0) {
        imageData.data[i * 4] = 0
        imageData.data[i * 4 + 1] = 200
        imageData.data[i * 4 + 2] = 255
        imageData.data[i * 4 + 3] = 100
      }
    }

    const tempCanvas = document.createElement('canvas')
    tempCanvas.width = width
    tempCanvas.height = height
    const tempCtx = tempCanvas.getContext('2d')!
    tempCtx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0)

    this.ctx.drawImage(tempCanvas, -halfWidth, -halfHeight)
  }

  private drawPreviewOverlay(previewMask: Uint8ClampedArray): void {
    const { width, height } = this.coordSystem.imageSize
    const halfWidth = width / 2
    const halfHeight = height / 2

    const imageData = new ImageData(width, height)
    for (let i = 0; i < previewMask.length; i++) {
      if (previewMask[i] > 0) {
        imageData.data[i * 4] = 0
        imageData.data[i * 4 + 1] = 200
        imageData.data[i * 4 + 2] = 255
        imageData.data[i * 4 + 3] = Math.floor(previewMask[i] * 0.4)
      }
    }

    const tempCanvas = document.createElement('canvas')
    tempCanvas.width = width
    tempCanvas.height = height
    const tempCtx = tempCanvas.getContext('2d')!
    tempCtx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0)

    this.ctx.drawImage(tempCanvas, -halfWidth, -halfHeight)
  }

  private drawPixelGrid(): void {
    const zoom = this.coordSystem.zoom
    const { width, height } = this.coordSystem.imageSize
    const visible = this.coordSystem.getVisibleImageBounds()

    const startX = Math.max(0, Math.floor(visible.minX))
    const endX = Math.min(width, Math.ceil(visible.maxX))
    const startY = Math.max(0, Math.floor(visible.minY))
    const endY = Math.min(height, Math.ceil(visible.maxY))

    this.ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)'
    this.ctx.lineWidth = 1 / zoom

    this.ctx.beginPath()

    for (let x = startX; x <= endX; x++) {
      const worldX = x - width / 2
      const screenPos = this.coordSystem.worldToCanvas({ x: worldX, y: 0 })
      this.ctx.moveTo(screenPos.x, 0)
      this.ctx.lineTo(screenPos.x, this.coordSystem.canvasSize.height)
    }

    for (let y = startY; y <= endY; y++) {
      const worldY = y - height / 2
      const screenPos = this.coordSystem.worldToCanvas({ x: 0, y: worldY })
      this.ctx.moveTo(0, screenPos.y)
      this.ctx.lineTo(this.coordSystem.canvasSize.width, screenPos.y)
    }

    this.ctx.stroke()
  }

  private drawCursor(cursorInfo: CursorInfo): void {
    const canvasPos = this.coordSystem.worldToCanvas(cursorInfo.position)
    const dpr = this.coordSystem.dpr
    const zoom = this.coordSystem.zoom

    if (
      (cursorInfo.tool === 'brush' || cursorInfo.tool === 'eraser') &&
      cursorInfo.brushSize
    ) {
      const brushRadius = (cursorInfo.brushSize / 2) * zoom * dpr

      this.ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)'
      this.ctx.lineWidth = dpr
      this.ctx.beginPath()
      this.ctx.arc(canvasPos.x, canvasPos.y, brushRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      this.ctx.stroke()

      this.ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)'
      this.ctx.lineWidth = dpr
      this.ctx.setLineDash([4 * dpr, 4 * dpr])
      this.ctx.beginPath()
      this.ctx.arc(canvasPos.x, canvasPos.y, brushRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      this.ctx.stroke()
      this.ctx.setLineDash([])

      this.ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)'
      this.ctx.beginPath()
      this.ctx.arc(canvasPos.x, canvasPos.y, 2 * dpr, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      this.ctx.fill()
    } else {
      const size = 10 * dpr

      this.ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff'
      this.ctx.lineWidth = dpr
      this.ctx.beginPath()
      this.ctx.moveTo(canvasPos.x - size, canvasPos.y)
      this.ctx.lineTo(canvasPos.x + size, canvasPos.y)
      this.ctx.moveTo(canvasPos.x, canvasPos.y - size)
      this.ctx.lineTo(canvasPos.x, canvasPos.y + size)
      this.ctx.stroke()

      this.ctx.strokeStyle = '#000000'
      this.ctx.lineWidth = dpr
      this.ctx.beginPath()
      this.ctx.arc(canvasPos.x, canvasPos.y, 2 * dpr, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      this.ctx.stroke()
    }
  }

  private drawMagneticLasso(state: MagneticLassoState): void {
    const { width, height } = this.coordSystem.imageSize
    const halfWidth = width / 2
    const halfHeight = height / 2

    const allPoints: Point[] = []

    for (const anchor of state.anchors) {
      if (anchor.pathToNext.length > 0) {
        for (const pt of anchor.pathToNext) {
          allPoints.push(pt)
        }
      } else {
        allPoints.push({ x: anchor.x, y: anchor.y })
      }
    }

    if (!state.isClosed && state.currentPath.length > 0) {
      for (const pt of state.currentPath) {
        allPoints.push(pt)
      }
    }

    if (allPoints.length < 2) return

    this.ctx.strokeStyle = '#00c8ff'
    this.ctx.lineWidth = 2 / this.coordSystem.zoom
    this.ctx.lineCap = 'round'
    this.ctx.lineJoin = 'round'

    this.ctx.beginPath()
    const firstPt = allPoints[0]
    this.ctx.moveTo(firstPt.x - halfWidth, firstPt.y - halfHeight)

    for (let i = 1; i < allPoints.length; i++) {
      const pt = allPoints[i]
      this.ctx.lineTo(pt.x - halfWidth, pt.y - halfHeight)
    }

    if (state.isClosed && allPoints.length > 2) {
      this.ctx.closePath()
    }

    this.ctx.stroke()

    this.ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)'
    this.ctx.lineWidth = 1 / this.coordSystem.zoom
    this.ctx.setLineDash([4 / this.coordSystem.zoom, 4 / this.coordSystem.zoom])

    this.ctx.beginPath()
    this.ctx.moveTo(firstPt.x - halfWidth, firstPt.y - halfHeight)

    for (let i = 1; i < allPoints.length; i++) {
      const pt = allPoints[i]
      this.ctx.lineTo(pt.x - halfWidth, pt.y - halfHeight)
    }

    if (state.isClosed && allPoints.length > 2) {
      this.ctx.closePath()
    }

    this.ctx.stroke()
    this.ctx.setLineDash([])

    const anchorRadius = 4 / this.coordSystem.zoom

    for (let i = 0; i < state.anchors.length; i++) {
      const anchor = state.anchors[i]
      const isFirst = i === 0
      const isLast = i === state.anchors.length - 1

      this.ctx.fillStyle = isFirst ? '#ff6b00' : '#00c8ff'
      this.ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff'
      this.ctx.lineWidth = 1 / this.coordSystem.zoom

      this.ctx.beginPath()
      this.ctx.arc(
        anchor.x - halfWidth,
        anchor.y - halfHeight,
        isFirst ? anchorRadius * 1.5 : anchorRadius,
        0,
        Math.PI * 2
      )
      this.ctx.fill()
      this.ctx.stroke()
    }
  }

  private drawCropOverlay(cropState: CropState): void {
    if (!cropState.bounds) return

    const { width, height } = this.coordSystem.canvasSize
    const { bounds, handles } = cropState

    // Transform crop bounds to canvas coordinates
    const topLeft = this.coordSystem.worldToCanvas(
      this.coordSystem.imageToWorld({ x: bounds.x, y: bounds.y })
    )
    const bottomRight = this.coordSystem.worldToCanvas(
      this.coordSystem.imageToWorld({ x: bounds.x + bounds.width, y: bounds.y + bounds.height })
    )

    const cropX = topLeft.x
    const cropY = topLeft.y
    const cropWidth = bottomRight.x - topLeft.x
    const cropHeight = bottomRight.y - topLeft.y

    // Draw darkened overlay outside crop area
    this.ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)'
    
    // Top
    this.ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, cropY)
    // Bottom
    this.ctx.fillRect(0, cropY + cropHeight, width, height - cropY - cropHeight)
    // Left
    this.ctx.fillRect(0, cropY, cropX, cropHeight)
    // Right
    this.ctx.fillRect(cropX + cropWidth, cropY, width - cropX - cropWidth, cropHeight)

    // Draw crop border
    this.ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff'
    this.ctx.lineWidth = 2
    this.ctx.setLineDash([5, 5])
    this.ctx.strokeRect(cropX, cropY, cropWidth, cropHeight)
    this.ctx.setLineDash([])

    // Draw handles
    const handleSize = 8
    this.ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff'
    this.ctx.strokeStyle = '#000000'
    this.ctx.lineWidth = 1

    for (const handle of handles) {
      const handlePos = this.coordSystem.worldToCanvas(
        this.coordSystem.imageToWorld(handle.position)
      )
      this.ctx.fillRect(handlePos.x, handlePos.y, handleSize, handleSize)
      this.ctx.strokeRect(handlePos.x, handlePos.y, handleSize, handleSize)
    }
  }

  getLastFrameTime(): number {
    return this.lastFrameTime
  }

  getFrameCount(): number {
    return this.frameCount
  }

  getCompositeImageData(): ImageData | null {
    if (!this.cachedComposite) return null
    const ctx = this.cachedComposite.getContext('2d')!
    return ctx.getImageData(
      0,
      0,
      this.cachedComposite.width,
      this.cachedComposite.height
    )
  }
}
```

### Renderer Factory

**Category:** Utility  
**Version:** Chronicle

*Renderer factory for Canvas2D/WebGL2/WebGPU backends*

**File:** `RendererFactory.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * Renderer Factory
 * 
 * Creates renderer instances with runtime selection between Canvas2D (RenderPipeline)
 * and WebGL2 (VPRO WebGL2 Compositor). Supports automatic fallback.
 * 
 * @module lib/chronicle/RendererFactory
 */

import { RenderPipeline } from './RenderPipeline'
import { CoordinateSystem } from './CoordinateSystem'
import type { Layer, Selection, Point } from '@/types/editor'

// VPRO Renderer types (defined locally to avoid complex path issues)
interface VPRORenderer {
  readonly kind: 'canvas2d' | 'webgl2' | 'webgpu'
  init(opts: VPRORendererInitOptions): Promise<void>
  resize(width: number, height: number, dpr: number): void
  renderFrame(args: VPRORenderFrameArgs): void
  destroy(): void
  getCapabilities(): VPRORendererCapabilities
  markAllDirty?(): void  // Optional for dirty rect tracking
}

interface VPRORendererInitOptions {
  width: number
  height: number
  dpr: number
  container: HTMLElement
  canvas?: HTMLCanvasElement
}

interface VPRORenderFrameArgs {
  camera: { x: number; y: number; zoom: number; rotation?: number }
  layers: Array<{ id: string; canvas: HTMLCanvasElement; opacity: number; blendMode: string; visible: boolean }>
  selection?: { active: boolean; mask: Uint8ClampedArray; bounds?: { x: number; y: number; width: number; height: number } }
  previewMask?: Uint8ClampedArray
  toolOverlay?: { type: string; position: Point; size?: number; color?: { r: number; g: number; b: number; a?: number } }
  quality: 'interactive' | 'final'
}

interface VPRORendererCapabilities {
  maxTextureSize: number
  supportsCompute: boolean
  supportsStorageTextures: boolean
  supportsBlendModes: string[]
  maxLayers: number
}

export type RendererType = 'auto' | 'canvas2d' | 'webgl2'

/**
 * Adapter that wraps a VPRO Renderer to match RenderPipeline interface
 */
class RendererAdapter {
  private renderer: VPRORenderer
  private coordSystem: CoordinateSystem

  constructor(renderer: VPRORenderer, coordSystem: CoordinateSystem) {
    this.renderer = renderer
    this.coordSystem = coordSystem
  }

  /**
   * Render method matching RenderPipeline interface
   */
  render(
    layers: Layer[],
    selection: Selection | null,
    previewMask: Uint8ClampedArray | null,
    cursorInfo: { position: Point; tool?: string; brushSize?: number; brushColor?: { r: number; g: number; b: number } } | null,
    mode: 'full' | 'fast' | 'interaction' = 'full',
    magneticLassoState?: any
  ): void {
    // Update camera from coordinate system
    const camera = {
      x: this.coordSystem.pan.x,
      y: this.coordSystem.pan.y,
      zoom: this.coordSystem.zoom,
      rotation: this.coordSystem.rotation,
    }

    // Convert render mode to quality
    const quality: 'interactive' | 'final' = mode === 'interaction' || mode === 'fast' ? 'interactive' : 'final'

    // Prepare tool overlay if cursor info provided
    const toolOverlay = cursorInfo ? {
      type: (cursorInfo.tool === 'brush' ? 'brush' : 'cursor') as string,
      position: cursorInfo.position,
      size: cursorInfo.brushSize,
      color: cursorInfo.brushColor ? {
        r: cursorInfo.brushColor.r,
        g: cursorInfo.brushColor.g,
        b: cursorInfo.brushColor.b,
        a: 255,
      } : undefined,
    } : undefined

    // Convert layers to VPRO format
    const vproLayers = layers
      .filter(layer => layer.visible && layer.canvas)
      .map(layer => ({
        id: layer.id,
        canvas: layer.canvas!,
        opacity: layer.opacity,
        blendMode: layer.blendMode,
        visible: layer.visible,
      }))

    // Call renderer's renderFrame method
    this.renderer.renderFrame({
      camera,
      layers: vproLayers,
      selection: selection?.active && selection.mask ? {
        active: true,
        mask: selection.mask,
        bounds: selection.bounds || undefined,
      } : undefined,
      previewMask: previewMask || undefined,
      toolOverlay,
      quality,
    })
  }

  /**
   * Invalidate composite (for compatibility with RenderPipeline)
   */
  invalidateComposite(): void {
    // WebGL2 renderer handles this internally via dirty rect tracking
    if (this.renderer.markAllDirty) {
      this.renderer.markAllDirty()
    }
  }

  /**
   * Set context (no-op for VPRO renderer, kept for compatibility)
   */
  setContext(_ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D): void {
    // No-op: VPRO renderer manages its own context
  }

  /**
   * Set coordinate system
   */
  setCoordinateSystem(coordSystem: CoordinateSystem): void {
    this.coordSystem = coordSystem
  }

  /**
   * Get the underlying renderer
   */
  getRenderer(): VPRORenderer {
    return this.renderer
  }

  /**
   * Destroy the renderer
   */
  destroy(): void {
    this.renderer.destroy()
  }
}

/**
 * Renderer Factory
 * 
 * Creates renderer instances with automatic backend selection.
 */
export class RendererFactory {
  /**
   * Create a renderer instance
   * 
   * @param type - Renderer type ('auto' selects best available)
   * @param canvas - Canvas element
   * @param container - Container element
   * @param coordSystem - Coordinate system
   * @param width - Canvas width
   * @param height - Canvas height
   * @param dpr - Device pixel ratio
   * @returns Renderer instance (RenderPipeline or RendererAdapter wrapping VPRO Renderer)
   */
  static async create(
    type: RendererType,
    canvas: HTMLCanvasElement,
    container: HTMLElement,
    coordSystem: CoordinateSystem,
    width: number,
    height: number,
    dpr: number
  ): Promise<RenderPipeline | RendererAdapter> {
    // WebGL2 renderer integration is disabled for now due to import path issues
    // TODO: Copy VPRO systems into project or configure Vite alias
    // For now, always use Canvas2D
    type = 'canvas2d'

    // Canvas2D (RenderPipeline) - always available
    // Note: Canvas context should be requested with alpha: false for performance
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { alpha: false })
    if (!ctx) {
      throw new Error('Failed to get 2D context - canvas may not be ready or already has a different context type')
    }
    return new RenderPipeline(ctx, coordSystem)
    
    // WebGL2 integration (disabled - uncomment when VPRO systems are accessible):
    // if (type === 'auto' || type === 'webgl2') {
    //   try {
    //     const { WebGL2Renderer } = await import('@/vpro/vpro-webgl2-compositor/src/renderer/WebGL2Renderer')
    //     const renderer = new WebGL2Renderer() as VPRORenderer
    //     await renderer.init({ canvas, container, width, height, dpr })
    //     return new RendererAdapter(renderer, coordSystem)
    //   } catch (error) {
    //     console.warn('WebGL2 renderer failed, falling back to Canvas2D:', error)
    //     type = 'canvas2d'
    //   }
    // }
  }

  /**
   * Check if WebGL2 is supported
   */
  static isWebGL2Supported(): boolean {
    if (typeof document === 'undefined') {
      return false
    }
    try {
      const canvas = document.createElement('canvas')
      const gl = canvas.getContext('webgl2')
      return gl !== null
    } catch {
      return false
    }
  }

  /**
   * Get available renderer types
   */
  static getAvailableRenderers(): Array<'canvas2d' | 'webgl2'> {
    const available: Array<'canvas2d' | 'webgl2'> = ['canvas2d'] // Always available

    if (this.isWebGL2Supported()) {
      available.push('webgl2')
    }

    return available
  }
}

```

### Tool Manager

**Category:** Utility  
**Version:** Chronicle

*Central tool orchestration and event handling*

**File:** `ToolManager.ts`

```typescript
import type { Point, Layer, ToolType, ToolSettings, Selection } from '@/types/editor'
import type { CropState } from './CropEngine'
import { BrushEngine, brushEngine } from './BrushEngine'
import { FastFloodFill } from './FastFloodFill'
import { SelectionManager, type SelectionMode } from './SelectionManager'
import { CoordinateSystem } from './CoordinateSystem'
import { MagneticLasso, magneticLasso, type MagneticLassoState } from './MagneticLasso'
import { ShapeEngine, shapeEngine } from './ShapeEngine'
import { TextEngine, textEngine, type TextObject } from './TextEngine'
import { CropEngine, cropEngine } from './CropEngine'

export interface ToolContext {
  activeLayer: Layer | null
  compositeImageData: ImageData | null
  toolSettings: ToolSettings
  selection: Selection
  coordSystem: CoordinateSystem
}

export interface ToolEvent {
  screenPoint: Point
  imagePoint: Point
  worldPoint: Point
  pressure: number
  shiftKey: boolean
  ctrlKey: boolean
  altKey: boolean
  button: number
}

export type ToolEventHandler = (event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext) => void
export type PreviewCallback = (mask: Uint8ClampedArray | null) => void
export type SelectionCallback = (selection: Selection) => void
export type LayerUpdateCallback = (layer: Layer) => void
export type HistoryCallback = (description: string) => void
export type ColorPickCallback = (color: { r: number; g: number; b: number; a: number }) => void
export type MagneticLassoCallback = (state: MagneticLassoState) => void

export class ToolManager {
  private brushEngine: BrushEngine
  private selectionManager: SelectionManager
  private magneticLasso: MagneticLasso
  private shapeEngine: ShapeEngine
  private textEngine: TextEngine
  private cropEngine: CropEngine
  private activeTool: ToolType = 'pan'
  private isDrawing = false
  private lastPreviewPoint: Point | null = null
  private magneticLassoInitialized = false
  private activeTexts: TextObject[] = []

  private onPreviewUpdate: PreviewCallback | null = null
  private onSelectionUpdate: SelectionCallback | null = null
  private onLayerUpdate: LayerUpdateCallback | null = null
  private onHistoryPush: HistoryCallback | null = null
  private onColorPick: ColorPickCallback | null = null
  private onMagneticLassoUpdate: MagneticLassoCallback | null = null

  constructor(width: number, height: number) {
    this.brushEngine = brushEngine
    this.selectionManager = new SelectionManager(width, height)
    this.magneticLasso = magneticLasso
    this.shapeEngine = shapeEngine
    this.textEngine = textEngine
    this.cropEngine = cropEngine
    this.cropEngine.setImageDimensions(width, height)
  }

  setDimensions(width: number, height: number): void {
    this.selectionManager.setDimensions(width, height)
    this.cropEngine.setImageDimensions(width, height)
  }

  setTool(tool: ToolType): void {
    if (this.isDrawing) {
      this.cancelCurrentAction()
    }
    this.activeTool = tool
    this.lastPreviewPoint = null
  }

  setCallbacks(callbacks: {
    onPreviewUpdate?: PreviewCallback
    onSelectionUpdate?: SelectionCallback
    onLayerUpdate?: LayerUpdateCallback
    onHistoryPush?: HistoryCallback
    onColorPick?: ColorPickCallback
    onMagneticLassoUpdate?: MagneticLassoCallback
  }): void {
    this.onPreviewUpdate = callbacks.onPreviewUpdate || null
    this.onSelectionUpdate = callbacks.onSelectionUpdate || null
    this.onLayerUpdate = callbacks.onLayerUpdate || null
    this.onHistoryPush = callbacks.onHistoryPush || null
    this.onColorPick = callbacks.onColorPick || null
    this.onMagneticLassoUpdate = callbacks.onMagneticLassoUpdate || null
  }

  handlePointerDown(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    this.storeContext(context)
    switch (this.activeTool) {
      case 'brush':
        this.startBrushStroke(event, context, false)
        break
      case 'eraser':
        this.startBrushStroke(event, context, true)
        break
      case 'magic-wand':
        this.performMagicWand(event, context)
        break
      case 'paint-bucket':
        this.performPaintBucket(event, context)
        break
      case 'eyedropper':
        this.performEyedropper(event, context)
        break
      case 'rectangular-marquee':
        this.startMarqueeSelection(event, context)
        break
      case 'magnetic-lasso':
        this.handleMagneticLassoClick(event, context)
        break
      case 'line':
      case 'rectangle':
      case 'ellipse':
        this.startShapeDrawing(event, context)
        break
      case 'text':
        this.handleTextClick(event, context)
        break
      case 'crop':
        this.handleCropClick(event, context)
        break
    }
  }

  handlePointerMove(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    switch (this.activeTool) {
      case 'brush':
      case 'eraser':
        if (this.isDrawing) {
          this.continueBrushStroke(event, context)
        }
        break
      case 'magic-wand':
        this.updateMagicWandPreview(event, context)
        break
      case 'rectangular-marquee':
        if (this.isDrawing) {
          this.updateMarqueeSelection(event, context)
        }
        break
      case 'magnetic-lasso':
        this.handleMagneticLassoMove(event, context)
        break
      case 'line':
      case 'rectangle':
      case 'ellipse':
        if (this.isDrawing) {
          this.updateShapeDrawing(event, context)
        }
        break
      case 'crop':
        this.handleCropMove(event, context)
        break
    }
  }

  handlePointerUp(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    switch (this.activeTool) {
      case 'brush':
      case 'eraser':
        this.endBrushStroke(event, context)
        break
      case 'rectangular-marquee':
        this.endMarqueeSelection(event, context)
        break
      case 'line':
      case 'rectangle':
      case 'ellipse':
        this.endShapeDrawing(event, context)
        break
      case 'crop':
        this.handleCropUp(event, context)
        break
    }
  }

  handlePointerLeave(): void {
    if (this.onPreviewUpdate) {
      this.onPreviewUpdate(null)
    }
    this.lastPreviewPoint = null
  }

  cancelCurrentAction(): void {
    this.isDrawing = false
    this.brushEngine.endStroke()
    if (this.onPreviewUpdate) {
      this.onPreviewUpdate(null)
    }
  }

  private startBrushStroke(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext, isEraser: boolean): void {
    const { activeLayer, toolSettings } = context
    if (!activeLayer || !activeLayer.canvas || activeLayer.locked) return

    const settings = isEraser ? toolSettings.eraser : toolSettings.brush
    this.brushEngine.beginStroke(event.imagePoint, settings, isEraser)
    this.brushEngine.renderSinglePoint(
      activeLayer.canvas,
      event.imagePoint,
      settings,
      isEraser,
      event.pressure
    )

    this.isDrawing = true

    if (this.onLayerUpdate) {
      this.onLayerUpdate(activeLayer)
    }
  }

  private continueBrushStroke(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    const { activeLayer, toolSettings } = context
    if (!activeLayer || !activeLayer.canvas) return

    const isEraser = this.activeTool === 'eraser'
    const settings = isEraser ? toolSettings.eraser : toolSettings.brush

    const points = this.brushEngine.continueStroke(event.imagePoint, event.pressure)
    if (points.length > 0) {
      this.brushEngine.renderStrokeToCanvas(
        activeLayer.canvas,
        points,
        settings,
        isEraser,
        event.pressure
      )

      if (this.onLayerUpdate) {
        this.onLayerUpdate(activeLayer)
      }
    }
  }

  private endBrushStroke(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    if (!this.isDrawing) return

    const stroke = this.brushEngine.endStroke()
    this.isDrawing = false

    if (stroke && stroke.points.length > 0) {
      const action = stroke.isEraser ? 'Eraser stroke' : 'Brush stroke'
      if (this.onHistoryPush) {
        this.onHistoryPush(action)
      }
    }
  }

  private performMagicWand(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    const { compositeImageData, toolSettings } = context
    if (!compositeImageData) return

    const x = Math.floor(event.imagePoint.x)
    const y = Math.floor(event.imagePoint.y)

    if (x < 0 || x >= compositeImageData.width || y < 0 || y >= compositeImageData.height) {
      return
    }

    const filler = new FastFloodFill(compositeImageData, toolSettings.magicWand)
    const result = filler.fill(x, y)

    const mode: SelectionMode = event.shiftKey
      ? 'add'
      : event.altKey
        ? 'subtract'
        : 'new'

    this.selectionManager.applyMask(result.mask, result.bounds, mode)

    if (this.onSelectionUpdate) {
      this.onSelectionUpdate(this.selectionManager.getSelection())
    }

    if (this.onPreviewUpdate) {
      this.onPreviewUpdate(null)
    }
  }

  private updateMagicWandPreview(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    const { compositeImageData, toolSettings } = context
    if (!compositeImageData) return

    if (toolSettings.magicWand.previewMode === 'off') {
      if (this.onPreviewUpdate) {
        this.onPreviewUpdate(null)
      }
      return
    }

    const x = Math.floor(event.imagePoint.x)
    const y = Math.floor(event.imagePoint.y)

    if (x < 0 || x >= compositeImageData.width || y < 0 || y >= compositeImageData.height) {
      if (this.onPreviewUpdate) {
        this.onPreviewUpdate(null)
      }
      return
    }

    if (
      this.lastPreviewPoint &&
      Math.abs(this.lastPreviewPoint.x - x) < 2 &&
      Math.abs(this.lastPreviewPoint.y - y) < 2
    ) {
      return
    }

    this.lastPreviewPoint = { x, y }

    const previewSettings = {
      ...toolSettings.magicWand,
      maxPixels: Math.min(toolSettings.magicWand.maxPixels, 100000),
    }

    const filler = new FastFloodFill(compositeImageData, previewSettings)
    const result = filler.fill(x, y)

    if (this.onPreviewUpdate) {
      this.onPreviewUpdate(result.mask)
    }
  }

  private performPaintBucket(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    const { activeLayer, toolSettings, selection } = context
    if (!activeLayer || !activeLayer.canvas || activeLayer.locked) return

    const ctx = activeLayer.canvas.getContext('2d')!
    const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, activeLayer.canvas.width, activeLayer.canvas.height)

    const x = Math.floor(event.imagePoint.x)
    const y = Math.floor(event.imagePoint.y)

    if (x < 0 || x >= imageData.width || y < 0 || y >= imageData.height) return

    const fillSettings = {
      ...toolSettings.magicWand,
      contiguous: true,
    }

    const filler = new FastFloodFill(imageData, fillSettings)
    const result = filler.fill(x, y)

    const color = toolSettings.brush.color

    for (let i = 0; i < result.mask.length; i++) {
      if (result.mask[i] > 0) {
        if (selection.active && selection.mask && selection.mask[i] === 0) {
          continue
        }

        const idx = i * 4
        const alpha = result.mask[i] / 255
        imageData.data[idx] = Math.round(color.r * alpha + imageData.data[idx] * (1 - alpha))
        imageData.data[idx + 1] = Math.round(color.g * alpha + imageData.data[idx + 1] * (1 - alpha))
        imageData.data[idx + 2] = Math.round(color.b * alpha + imageData.data[idx + 2] * (1 - alpha))
        imageData.data[idx + 3] = Math.round(255 * alpha + imageData.data[idx + 3] * (1 - alpha))
      }
    }

    ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0)

    if (this.onLayerUpdate) {
      this.onLayerUpdate(activeLayer)
    }

    if (this.onHistoryPush) {
      this.onHistoryPush('Paint bucket fill')
    }
  }

  private performEyedropper(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    const { compositeImageData } = context
    if (!compositeImageData) return

    const x = Math.floor(event.imagePoint.x)
    const y = Math.floor(event.imagePoint.y)

    if (x < 0 || x >= compositeImageData.width || y < 0 || y >= compositeImageData.height) return

    const idx = (y * compositeImageData.width + x) * 4
    const color = {
      r: compositeImageData.data[idx],
      g: compositeImageData.data[idx + 1],
      b: compositeImageData.data[idx + 2],
      a: compositeImageData.data[idx + 3],
    }

    if (this.onColorPick) {
      this.onColorPick(color)
    }
  }

  private marqueeStart: Point | null = null
  private marqueeEnd: Point | null = null

  private startMarqueeSelection(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    this.marqueeStart = { ...event.imagePoint }
    this.marqueeEnd = { ...event.imagePoint }
    this.isDrawing = true
  }

  private updateMarqueeSelection(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    if (!this.marqueeStart) return
    this.marqueeEnd = { ...event.imagePoint }
  }

  private endMarqueeSelection(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    if (!this.marqueeStart || !this.marqueeEnd) return

    const { compositeImageData } = context
    if (!compositeImageData) return

    const x1 = Math.max(0, Math.min(Math.floor(this.marqueeStart.x), Math.floor(this.marqueeEnd.x)))
    const y1 = Math.max(0, Math.min(Math.floor(this.marqueeStart.y), Math.floor(this.marqueeEnd.y)))
    const x2 = Math.min(
      compositeImageData.width - 1,
      Math.max(Math.floor(this.marqueeStart.x), Math.floor(this.marqueeEnd.x))
    )
    const y2 = Math.min(
      compositeImageData.height - 1,
      Math.max(Math.floor(this.marqueeStart.y), Math.floor(this.marqueeEnd.y))
    )

    const width = x2 - x1 + 1
    const height = y2 - y1 + 1

    if (width > 1 && height > 1) {
      const mask = new Uint8ClampedArray(compositeImageData.width * compositeImageData.height)

      for (let y = y1; y <= y2; y++) {
        for (let x = x1; x <= x2; x++) {
          mask[y * compositeImageData.width + x] = 255
        }
      }

      const mode: SelectionMode = event.shiftKey
        ? 'add'
        : event.altKey
          ? 'subtract'
          : 'new'

      this.selectionManager.applyMask(mask, { x: x1, y: y1, width, height }, mode)

      if (this.onSelectionUpdate) {
        this.onSelectionUpdate(this.selectionManager.getSelection())
      }
    }

    this.marqueeStart = null
    this.marqueeEnd = null
    this.isDrawing = false
  }

  getSelectionManager(): SelectionManager {
    return this.selectionManager
  }

  clearSelection(): void {
    this.selectionManager.clearSelection()
    if (this.onSelectionUpdate) {
      this.onSelectionUpdate(this.selectionManager.getSelection())
    }
  }

  selectAll(): void {
    this.selectionManager.selectAll()
    if (this.onSelectionUpdate) {
      this.onSelectionUpdate(this.selectionManager.getSelection())
    }
  }

  invertSelection(): void {
    this.selectionManager.invert()
    if (this.onSelectionUpdate) {
      this.onSelectionUpdate(this.selectionManager.getSelection())
    }
  }

  initializeMagneticLasso(imageData: ImageData): void {
    this.magneticLasso.initialize(imageData)
    this.magneticLassoInitialized = true
  }

  private handleMagneticLassoClick(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    const { compositeImageData, toolSettings } = context
    if (!compositeImageData) return

    if (!this.magneticLassoInitialized) {
      this.magneticLasso.initialize(compositeImageData)
      this.magneticLassoInitialized = true
    }

    this.magneticLasso.setSettings({
      frequency: toolSettings.magneticLasso?.frequency ?? 50,
      width: toolSettings.magneticLasso?.width ?? 10,
      contrast: toolSettings.magneticLasso?.contrast ?? 10,
    })

    const x = event.imagePoint.x
    const y = event.imagePoint.y

    const state = this.magneticLasso.getState()

    if (state.isClosed) {
      const mask = this.magneticLasso.generateSelectionMask()
      if (mask) {
        const mode: SelectionMode = event.shiftKey
          ? 'add'
          : event.altKey
            ? 'subtract'
            : 'new'

        this.selectionManager.applyMask(
          mask,
          { x: 0, y: 0, width: compositeImageData.width, height: compositeImageData.height },
          mode
        )

        if (this.onSelectionUpdate) {
          this.onSelectionUpdate(this.selectionManager.getSelection())
        }
      }

      this.magneticLasso.reset()
      this.magneticLasso.initialize(compositeImageData)
      this.magneticLasso.startPath(x, y)
    } else if (!state.isActive) {
      this.magneticLasso.startPath(x, y)
    } else if (this.magneticLasso.isNearFirstAnchor(x, y)) {
      if (this.magneticLasso.closePath()) {
        const mask = this.magneticLasso.generateSelectionMask()
        if (mask) {
          const mode: SelectionMode = event.shiftKey
            ? 'add'
            : event.altKey
              ? 'subtract'
              : 'new'

          this.selectionManager.applyMask(
            mask,
            { x: 0, y: 0, width: compositeImageData.width, height: compositeImageData.height },
            mode
          )

          if (this.onSelectionUpdate) {
            this.onSelectionUpdate(this.selectionManager.getSelection())
          }
        }
      }
    } else {
      this.magneticLasso.addAnchor(x, y)
    }

    if (this.onMagneticLassoUpdate) {
      this.onMagneticLassoUpdate(this.magneticLasso.getState())
    }
  }

  private handleMagneticLassoMove(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    const state = this.magneticLasso.getState()
    if (!state.isActive || state.isClosed) return

    this.magneticLasso.updateCursor(event.imagePoint.x, event.imagePoint.y)

    if (this.onMagneticLassoUpdate) {
      this.onMagneticLassoUpdate(this.magneticLasso.getState())
    }
  }

  handleMagneticLassoDoubleClick(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    const { compositeImageData } = context
    if (!compositeImageData) return

    if (this.magneticLasso.closePath()) {
      const mask = this.magneticLasso.generateSelectionMask()
      if (mask) {
        const mode: SelectionMode = event.shiftKey
          ? 'add'
          : event.altKey
            ? 'subtract'
            : 'new'

        this.selectionManager.applyMask(
          mask,
          { x: 0, y: 0, width: compositeImageData.width, height: compositeImageData.height },
          mode
        )

        if (this.onSelectionUpdate) {
          this.onSelectionUpdate(this.selectionManager.getSelection())
        }
      }

      if (this.onMagneticLassoUpdate) {
        this.onMagneticLassoUpdate(this.magneticLasso.getState())
      }
    }
  }

  undoMagneticLassoAnchor(): boolean {
    const result = this.magneticLasso.removeLastAnchor()
    if (result && this.onMagneticLassoUpdate) {
      this.onMagneticLassoUpdate(this.magneticLasso.getState())
    }
    return result
  }

  cancelMagneticLasso(): void {
    this.magneticLasso.reset()
    if (this.onMagneticLassoUpdate) {
      this.onMagneticLassoUpdate(this.magneticLasso.getState())
    }
  }

  getMagneticLassoState(): MagneticLassoState {
    return this.magneticLasso.getState()
  }

  resetMagneticLassoCache(): void {
    this.magneticLassoInitialized = false
  }

  private startShapeDrawing(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    const { toolSettings } = context
    const shapeType = this.activeTool as 'line' | 'rectangle' | 'ellipse'
    
    this.shapeEngine.beginShape(event.imagePoint, shapeType, toolSettings.shape)
    this.isDrawing = true
  }

  private updateShapeDrawing(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    this.shapeEngine.updateShape(event.imagePoint)
  }

  private endShapeDrawing(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    if (!this.isDrawing) return

    const { activeLayer } = context
    if (!activeLayer || !activeLayer.canvas || activeLayer.locked) return

    const shape = this.shapeEngine.endShape()
    if (shape && shape.points.length > 0) {
      this.shapeEngine.renderShapeToCanvas(activeLayer.canvas, shape)

      if (this.onLayerUpdate) {
        this.onLayerUpdate(activeLayer)
      }

      if (this.onHistoryPush) {
        this.onHistoryPush(`Draw ${shape.shapeType}`)
      }
    }

    this.isDrawing = false
  }

  private handleTextClick(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    const { toolSettings } = context
    
    // Check if clicking on existing text
    const existingText = this.textEngine.getTextAtPosition(this.activeTexts, event.imagePoint)
    if (existingText) {
      this.textEngine.startEditing(existingText)
      return
    }

    // Create new text
    const textSettings = {
      fontFamily: 'Arial, sans-serif',
      fontSize: 24,
      fontWeight: 'normal' as const,
      fontStyle: 'normal' as const,
      color: toolSettings.brush.color,
      align: 'left' as const,
      lineHeight: 1.2,
      letterSpacing: 0,
      strokeWidth: 0,
      strokeColor: { r: 0, g: 0, b: 0, a: 255 },
      hasStroke: false,
    }

    const textObject = this.textEngine.createText(event.imagePoint, textSettings)
    this.activeTexts.push(textObject)
  }

  private handleCropClick(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): boolean {
    return this.cropEngine.handlePointerDown(event.imagePoint)
  }

  private handleCropMove(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    this.cropEngine.handlePointerMove(event.imagePoint)
  }

  private handleCropUp(event: ToolEvent, context: ToolContext): void {
    this.cropEngine.handlePointerUp()
  }

  getCropState() {
    return this.cropEngine.getState()
  }

  startCrop(): void {
    this.cropEngine.startCrop()
  }

  applyCrop(): HTMLCanvasElement | null {
    const { activeLayer } = this.getLastContext()
    if (!activeLayer?.canvas) return null
    
    return this.cropEngine.applyCrop(activeLayer.canvas)
  }

  cancelCrop(): void {
    this.cropEngine.reset()
  }

  private lastContext: ToolContext | null = null

  private getLastContext(): ToolContext {
    return this.lastContext || {
      activeLayer: null,
      compositeImageData: null,
      toolSettings: {} as any,
      selection: { mask: null, bounds: null, active: false },
      coordSystem: {} as any,
    }
  }

  // Store context for later use
  private storeContext(context: ToolContext): void {
    this.lastContext = context
  }
}
```


## Vector Tools

### Shape Engine

**Category:** Vector  
**Version:** Chronicle

*Shape drawing engine for rectangles, ellipses, lines*

**File:** `ShapeEngine.ts`

```typescript
import type { Point, Color, ShapeSettings } from '@/types/editor'
import { distance, lerp } from '@/lib/utils'

export interface ShapeStroke {
  points: Point[]
  settings: ShapeSettings
  shapeType: 'line' | 'rectangle' | 'ellipse'
  startPoint: Point
  endPoint: Point
}

export class ShapeEngine {
  private currentShape: ShapeStroke | null = null
  private previewCanvas: HTMLCanvasElement
  private previewCtx: CanvasRenderingContext2D

  constructor() {
    this.previewCanvas = document.createElement('canvas')
    this.previewCtx = this.previewCanvas.getContext('2d')!
  }

  beginShape(
    startPoint: Point,
    shapeType: 'line' | 'rectangle' | 'ellipse',
    settings: ShapeSettings
  ): void {
    this.currentShape = {
      points: [startPoint],
      settings: { ...settings },
      shapeType,
      startPoint: { ...startPoint },
      endPoint: { ...startPoint },
    }
  }

  updateShape(endPoint: Point): void {
    if (!this.currentShape) return
    
    this.currentShape.endPoint = { ...endPoint }
    this.currentShape.points = this.generateShapePoints(
      this.currentShape.startPoint,
      endPoint,
      this.currentShape.shapeType
    )
  }

  endShape(): ShapeStroke | null {
    const shape = this.currentShape
    this.currentShape = null
    return shape
  }

  private generateShapePoints(
    start: Point,
    end: Point,
    shapeType: 'line' | 'rectangle' | 'ellipse'
  ): Point[] {
    switch (shapeType) {
      case 'line':
        return this.generateLinePoints(start, end)
      case 'rectangle':
        return this.generateRectanglePoints(start, end)
      case 'ellipse':
        return this.generateEllipsePoints(start, end)
      default:
        return [start, end]
    }
  }

  private generateLinePoints(start: Point, end: Point): Point[] {
    const points: Point[] = []
    const dist = distance(start, end)
    const steps = Math.max(1, Math.floor(dist))

    for (let i = 0; i <= steps; i++) {
      const t = i / steps
      points.push({
        x: lerp(start.x, end.x, t),
        y: lerp(start.y, end.y, t),
      })
    }

    return points
  }

  private generateRectanglePoints(start: Point, end: Point): Point[] {
    const points: Point[] = []
    const minX = Math.min(start.x, end.x)
    const maxX = Math.max(start.x, end.x)
    const minY = Math.min(start.y, end.y)
    const maxY = Math.max(start.y, end.y)

    // Top edge
    for (let x = minX; x <= maxX; x++) {
      points.push({ x, y: minY })
    }
    // Right edge
    for (let y = minY + 1; y <= maxY; y++) {
      points.push({ x: maxX, y })
    }
    // Bottom edge
    for (let x = maxX - 1; x >= minX; x--) {
      points.push({ x, y: maxY })
    }
    // Left edge
    for (let y = maxY - 1; y > minY; y--) {
      points.push({ x: minX, y })
    }

    return points
  }

  private generateEllipsePoints(start: Point, end: Point): Point[] {
    const points: Point[] = []
    const centerX = (start.x + end.x) / 2
    const centerY = (start.y + end.y) / 2
    const radiusX = Math.abs(end.x - start.x) / 2
    const radiusY = Math.abs(end.y - start.y) / 2

    const circumference = Math.PI * (3 * (radiusX + radiusY) - Math.sqrt((3 * radiusX + radiusY) * (radiusX + 3 * radiusY)))
    const steps = Math.max(8, Math.floor(circumference / 2))

    for (let i = 0; i <= steps; i++) {
      const angle = (i / steps) * Math.PI * 2
      points.push({
        x: centerX + radiusX * Math.cos(angle),
        y: centerY + radiusY * Math.sin(angle),
      })
    }

    return points
  }

  renderShapeToCanvas(
    targetCanvas: HTMLCanvasElement,
    shape: ShapeStroke
  ): void {
    const ctx = targetCanvas.getContext('2d')!
    const { settings, shapeType, startPoint, endPoint } = shape

    ctx.save()

    if (settings.fill) {
      this.renderFill(ctx, shapeType, startPoint, endPoint, settings)
    }

    if (settings.stroke) {
      this.renderStroke(ctx, shapeType, startPoint, endPoint, settings)
    }

    ctx.restore()
  }

  private renderFill(
    ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
    shapeType: 'line' | 'rectangle' | 'ellipse',
    start: Point,
    end: Point,
    settings: ShapeSettings
  ): void {
    const { fillColor } = settings
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${fillColor.r}, ${fillColor.g}, ${fillColor.b}, ${fillColor.a / 255})`

    switch (shapeType) {
      case 'rectangle':
        const width = end.x - start.x
        const height = end.y - start.y
        if (settings.cornerRadius > 0) {
          this.roundRect(ctx, start.x, start.y, width, height, settings.cornerRadius)
          ctx.fill()
        } else {
          ctx.fillRect(start.x, start.y, width, height)
        }
        break
      case 'ellipse':
        const centerX = (start.x + end.x) / 2
        const centerY = (start.y + end.y) / 2
        const radiusX = Math.abs(end.x - start.x) / 2
        const radiusY = Math.abs(end.y - start.y) / 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.ellipse(centerX, centerY, radiusX, radiusY, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
        break
    }
  }

  private renderStroke(
    ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
    shapeType: 'line' | 'rectangle' | 'ellipse',
    start: Point,
    end: Point,
    settings: ShapeSettings
  ): void {
    const { strokeColor, strokeWidth } = settings
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${strokeColor.r}, ${strokeColor.g}, ${strokeColor.b}, ${strokeColor.a / 255})`
    ctx.lineWidth = strokeWidth
    ctx.lineCap = 'round'
    ctx.lineJoin = 'round'

    ctx.beginPath()

    switch (shapeType) {
      case 'line':
        ctx.moveTo(start.x, start.y)
        ctx.lineTo(end.x, end.y)
        break
      case 'rectangle':
        const width = end.x - start.x
        const height = end.y - start.y
        if (settings.cornerRadius > 0) {
          this.roundRect(ctx, start.x, start.y, width, height, settings.cornerRadius)
        } else {
          ctx.rect(start.x, start.y, width, height)
        }
        break
      case 'ellipse':
        const centerX = (start.x + end.x) / 2
        const centerY = (start.y + end.y) / 2
        const radiusX = Math.abs(end.x - start.x) / 2
        const radiusY = Math.abs(end.y - start.y) / 2
        ctx.ellipse(centerX, centerY, radiusX, radiusY, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        break
    }

    ctx.stroke()
  }

  private roundRect(
    ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
    x: number,
    y: number,
    width: number,
    height: number,
    radius: number
  ): void {
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(x + radius, y)
    ctx.lineTo(x + width - radius, y)
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + width, y, x + width, y + radius)
    ctx.lineTo(x + width, y + height - radius)
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + width, y + height, x + width - radius, y + height)
    ctx.lineTo(x + radius, y + height)
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y + height, x, y + height - radius)
    ctx.lineTo(x, y + radius)
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y, x + radius, y)
    ctx.closePath()
  }

  getShapePreview(
    shapeType: 'line' | 'rectangle' | 'ellipse',
    start: Point,
    end: Point,
    settings: ShapeSettings
  ): HTMLCanvasElement {
    const width = Math.abs(end.x - start.x) + settings.strokeWidth * 2
    const height = Math.abs(end.y - start.y) + settings.strokeWidth * 2

    this.previewCanvas.width = width
    this.previewCanvas.height = height

    this.previewCtx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height)

    const offsetStart = {
      x: settings.strokeWidth,
      y: settings.strokeWidth,
    }
    const offsetEnd = {
      x: width - settings.strokeWidth,
      y: height - settings.strokeWidth,
    }

    if (settings.fill) {
      this.renderFill(this.previewCtx, shapeType, offsetStart, offsetEnd, settings)
    }

    if (settings.stroke) {
      this.renderStroke(this.previewCtx, shapeType, offsetStart, offsetEnd, settings)
    }

    return this.previewCanvas
  }
}

export const shapeEngine = new ShapeEngine()
```

### Text Engine

**Category:** Vector  
**Version:** Chronicle

*Text tool with font rendering and editing*

**File:** `TextEngine.ts`

```typescript
import type { Point, Color } from '@/types/editor'

export interface TextSettings {
  fontFamily: string
  fontSize: number
  fontWeight: 'normal' | 'bold' | '100' | '200' | '300' | '400' | '500' | '600' | '700' | '800' | '900'
  fontStyle: 'normal' | 'italic'
  color: Color
  align: 'left' | 'center' | 'right'
  lineHeight: number
  letterSpacing: number
  strokeWidth: number
  strokeColor: Color
  hasStroke: boolean
}

export interface TextObject {
  id: string
  text: string
  position: Point
  settings: TextSettings
  bounds: { width: number; height: number }
  isEditing: boolean
}

export const DEFAULT_TEXT_SETTINGS: TextSettings = {
  fontFamily: 'Arial, sans-serif',
  fontSize: 24,
  fontWeight: 'normal',
  fontStyle: 'normal',
  color: { r: 255, g: 255, b: 255, a: 255 },
  align: 'left',
  lineHeight: 1.2,
  letterSpacing: 0,
  strokeWidth: 0,
  strokeColor: { r: 0, g: 0, b: 0, a: 255 },
  hasStroke: false,
}

export class TextEngine {
  private activeText: TextObject | null = null
  private measureCanvas: HTMLCanvasElement
  private measureCtx: CanvasRenderingContext2D

  constructor() {
    this.measureCanvas = document.createElement('canvas')
    this.measureCtx = this.measureCanvas.getContext('2d')!
  }

  createText(position: Point, settings: TextSettings = DEFAULT_TEXT_SETTINGS): TextObject {
    const textObject: TextObject = {
      id: `text-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`,
      text: '',
      position: { ...position },
      settings: { ...settings },
      bounds: { width: 0, height: 0 },
      isEditing: true,
    }

    this.activeText = textObject
    return textObject
  }

  updateText(textObject: TextObject, text: string): void {
    textObject.text = text
    textObject.bounds = this.measureText(text, textObject.settings)
  }

  updateSettings(textObject: TextObject, settings: Partial<TextSettings>): void {
    textObject.settings = { ...textObject.settings, ...settings }
    textObject.bounds = this.measureText(textObject.text, textObject.settings)
  }

  finishEditing(textObject: TextObject): void {
    textObject.isEditing = false
    if (this.activeText === textObject) {
      this.activeText = null
    }
  }

  startEditing(textObject: TextObject): void {
    textObject.isEditing = true
    this.activeText = textObject
  }

  getActiveText(): TextObject | null {
    return this.activeText
  }

  private measureText(text: string, settings: TextSettings): { width: number; height: number } {
    if (!text) return { width: 0, height: 0 }

    this.applyTextStyle(this.measureCtx, settings)

    const lines = text.split('\n')
    let maxWidth = 0
    let totalHeight = 0

    for (const line of lines) {
      const metrics = this.measureCtx.measureText(line)
      maxWidth = Math.max(maxWidth, metrics.width)
    }

    const lineHeight = settings.fontSize * settings.lineHeight
    totalHeight = lines.length * lineHeight

    return {
      width: maxWidth + (settings.hasStroke ? settings.strokeWidth * 2 : 0),
      height: totalHeight + (settings.hasStroke ? settings.strokeWidth * 2 : 0),
    }
  }

  private applyTextStyle(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, settings: TextSettings): void {
    const { fontFamily, fontSize, fontWeight, fontStyle, letterSpacing } = settings
    
    ctx.font = `${fontStyle} ${fontWeight} ${fontSize}px ${fontFamily}`
```
