```typescript
    ctx.textAlign = settings.align as CanvasTextAlign
    ctx.textBaseline = 'top'
    
    if (letterSpacing !== 0) {
      ctx.letterSpacing = `${letterSpacing}px`
    }
  }

  renderTextToCanvas(
    targetCanvas: HTMLCanvasElement,
    textObject: TextObject
  ): void {
    const ctx = targetCanvas.getContext('2d')!
    const { text, position, settings } = textObject

    if (!text) return

    ctx.save()
    this.applyTextStyle(ctx, settings)

    const lines = text.split('\n')
    const lineHeight = settings.fontSize * settings.lineHeight
    const strokeOffset = settings.hasStroke ? settings.strokeWidth : 0

    lines.forEach((line, index) => {
      const y = position.y + index * lineHeight + strokeOffset
      let x = position.x + strokeOffset

      // Adjust x position based on alignment
      if (settings.align === 'center') {
        const lineWidth = ctx.measureText(line).width
        x = position.x + (textObject.bounds.width - lineWidth) / 2
      } else if (settings.align === 'right') {
        const lineWidth = ctx.measureText(line).width
        x = position.x + textObject.bounds.width - lineWidth - strokeOffset
      }

      // Render stroke if enabled
      if (settings.hasStroke && settings.strokeWidth > 0) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${settings.strokeColor.r}, ${settings.strokeColor.g}, ${settings.strokeColor.b}, ${settings.strokeColor.a / 255})`
        ctx.lineWidth = settings.strokeWidth
        ctx.lineJoin = 'round'
        ctx.strokeText(line, x, y)
      }

      // Render fill
      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${settings.color.r}, ${settings.color.g}, ${settings.color.b}, ${settings.color.a / 255})`
      ctx.fillText(line, x, y)
    })

    ctx.restore()
  }

  renderTextPreview(
    textObject: TextObject,
    cursorPosition?: number
  ): HTMLCanvasElement {
    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas')
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')!

    canvas.width = Math.max(textObject.bounds.width, 100)
    canvas.height = Math.max(textObject.bounds.height, 30)

    // Clear with transparent background
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height)

    // Render text
    this.renderTextToCanvas(canvas, {
      ...textObject,
      position: { x: 0, y: 0 },
    })

    // Render cursor if editing
    if (textObject.isEditing && cursorPosition !== undefined) {
      this.renderCursor(ctx, textObject, cursorPosition)
    }

    return canvas
  }

  private renderCursor(
    ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
    textObject: TextObject,
    cursorPosition: number
  ): void {
    const { text, settings } = textObject
    
    this.applyTextStyle(ctx, settings)

    const lines = text.split('\n')
    let currentPos = 0
    let cursorX = 0
    let cursorY = 0
    let found = false

    for (let lineIndex = 0; lineIndex < lines.length && !found; lineIndex++) {
      const line = lines[lineIndex]
      const lineStart = currentPos
      const lineEnd = currentPos + line.length

      if (cursorPosition >= lineStart && cursorPosition <= lineEnd) {
        // Cursor is in this line
        const textBeforeCursor = line.substring(0, cursorPosition - lineStart)
        const textWidth = ctx.measureText(textBeforeCursor).width
        
        cursorX = textWidth
        cursorY = lineIndex * settings.fontSize * settings.lineHeight
        found = true
      }

      currentPos = lineEnd + 1 // +1 for newline character
    }

    // Draw cursor
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${settings.color.r}, ${settings.color.g}, ${settings.color.b}, 0.8)`
    ctx.lineWidth = 1
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(cursorX, cursorY)
    ctx.lineTo(cursorX, cursorY + settings.fontSize)
    ctx.stroke()
  }

  getTextAtPosition(texts: TextObject[], position: Point): TextObject | null {
    for (const textObj of texts) {
      if (this.isPointInText(position, textObj)) {
        return textObj
      }
    }
    return null
  }

  private isPointInText(point: Point, textObject: TextObject): boolean {
    const { position, bounds } = textObject
    return (
      point.x >= position.x &&
      point.x <= position.x + bounds.width &&
      point.y >= position.y &&
      point.y <= position.y + bounds.height
    )
  }

  getCursorPositionFromPoint(textObject: TextObject, point: Point): number {
    const { text, position, settings } = textObject
    
    this.applyTextStyle(this.measureCtx, settings)

    const relativeY = point.y - position.y
    const lineHeight = settings.fontSize * settings.lineHeight
    const lineIndex = Math.floor(relativeY / lineHeight)

    const lines = text.split('\n')
    if (lineIndex < 0) return 0
    if (lineIndex >= lines.length) return text.length

    const line = lines[lineIndex]
    const relativeX = point.x - position.x

    // Binary search for closest character position
    let left = 0
    let right = line.length
    let closestPos = 0
    let closestDistance = Infinity

    while (left <= right) {
      const mid = Math.floor((left + right) / 2)
      const textBeforeMid = line.substring(0, mid)
      const textWidth = this.measureCtx.measureText(textBeforeMid).width
      const distance = Math.abs(textWidth - relativeX)

      if (distance < closestDistance) {
        closestDistance = distance
        closestPos = mid
      }

      if (textWidth < relativeX) {
        left = mid + 1
      } else {
        right = mid - 1
      }
    }

    // Convert line position to absolute position
    let absolutePos = 0
    for (let i = 0; i < lineIndex; i++) {
      absolutePos += lines[i].length + 1 // +1 for newline
    }
    absolutePos += closestPos

    return Math.min(absolutePos, text.length)
  }
}

export const textEngine = new TextEngine()
```

# vpro-aegis-lasso

**Path:** `vpro/vpro-aegis-lasso/src`
**Total Tools:** 11


## Selection Tools

### Aegis Lasso Engine

**Category:** Selection  
**Version:** VPRO-Aegis

*Next-generation magnetic lasso with boundary likelihood fields, energy minimization, and multi-hypothesis paths*

**File:** `core/AegisLassoEngine.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * Aegis Lasso - Main Engine
 * 
 * Orchestrates all components: fields, solver, autopins, coherence, closure.
 * Provides high-level API for tool integration.
 */

import type { Vec2, FieldSet, IntentModel } from '../types/fields';
import type { Path, MultiHypothesisState, Anchor, LassoSettings } from '../types/path';
import { computeBoundaryLikelihoodField } from '../fields/BoundaryLikelihoodField';
import { computeOrientationField } from '../fields/OrientationField';
import { computeConfidenceField } from '../fields/ConfidenceField';
import { IntentModelTracker } from '../fields/IntentModel';
import { solvePath } from '../solver/EnergyMinimization';
import { applyFlowLockBlend } from '../solver/FlowLockModes';
import { computeMultiHypothesis } from '../solver/MultiHypothesis';
import { shouldCommit, updateAutopinState, type AutopinState, AUTOPIN_PRESETS } from '../solver/Autopins';
import { applyHysteresis, applyPrefixFreeze, stabilizeDirection } from '../solver/TemporalCoherence';
import { checkClosure, refineClosure } from '../solver/Closure';

export interface AegisLassoState {
  isActive: boolean;
  isClosed: boolean;
  startPoint: Vec2 | null;
  currentCursor: Vec2 | null;
  currentPath: Path | null;
  hypotheses: MultiHypothesisState | null;
  anchors: Anchor[];
  autopinState: AutopinState;
  previousTangent: Vec2 | null;
  fields: FieldSet | null;
  intentTracker: IntentModelTracker;
}

export class AegisLassoEngine {
  private state: AegisLassoState;
  private settings: LassoSettings;
  private imageData: ImageData | null = null;

  constructor(settings: Partial<LassoSettings> = {}) {
    this.settings = { ...DEFAULT_LASSO_SETTINGS, ...settings };
    this.state = {
      isActive: false,
      isClosed: false,
      startPoint: null,
      currentCursor: null,
      currentPath: null,
      hypotheses: null,
      anchors: [],
      autopinState: {
        lastCommitTime: 0,
        lastCommitPosition: { x: 0, y: 0 },
        accumulatedUncertainty: 0,
        accumulatedDistance: 0,
      },
      previousTangent: null,
      fields: null,
      intentTracker: new IntentModelTracker(),
    };
  }

  /**
   * Initialize with image data
   */
  async initialize(imageData: ImageData): Promise<void> {
    this.imageData = imageData;

    // Compute all fields
    const B = computeBoundaryLikelihoodField(imageData);
    const T = computeOrientationField(B);
    const Q = computeConfidenceField(B, T);

    this.state.fields = { B, T, Q };
  }

  /**
   * Start new path
   */
  async startPath(x: number, y: number): Promise<void> {
    if (!this.state.fields) {
      throw new Error('Engine not initialized. Call initialize() first.');
    }

    const point = { x, y };
    this.state.isActive = true;
    this.state.isClosed = false;
    this.state.startPoint = point;
    this.state.currentCursor = point;
    this.state.currentPath = { points: [point], arcLengths: [0] };
    this.state.hypotheses = null;
    this.state.anchors = [{ position: point, timestamp: performance.now(), confidence: 1.0 }];
    this.state.autopinState = {
      lastCommitTime: performance.now(),
      lastCommitPosition: point,
      accumulatedUncertainty: 0,
      accumulatedDistance: 0,
    };
    this.state.previousTangent = null;
    this.state.intentTracker.reset();
    this.state.intentTracker.update(point, performance.now(), this.state.fields.T);
  }

  /**
   * Update cursor position
   */
  async updateCursor(x: number, y: number): Promise<void> {
    if (!this.state.isActive || !this.state.fields || !this.state.startPoint) {
      return;
    }

    const cursor = { x, y };
    const now = performance.now();

    // Update intent model
    const intent = this.state.intentTracker.update(cursor, now, this.state.fields.T);

    // Compute user velocity
    const userVelocity = this.state.currentCursor
      ? {
          x: cursor.x - this.state.currentCursor.x,
          y: cursor.y - this.state.currentCursor.y,
        }
      : { x: 0, y: 0 };

    // Solve path using flow/lock blend
    const newPath = await applyFlowLockBlend(
      this.state.startPoint,
      cursor,
      this.state.currentPath,
      userVelocity,
      this.state.fields,
      intent,
      solvePath,
      {
        friction: this.settings.flow,
        lockStrengthMultiplier: this.settings.adhesion,
        overrideSensitivity: this.settings.overrideForce,
        freezeRatio: 0.3,
      }
    );

    // Apply temporal coherence
    if (this.state.currentPath) {
      const coherentPath = applyHysteresis(
        this.state.currentPath,
        newPath,
        this.state.fields,
        intent,
        0.05
      );
      this.state.currentPath = coherentPath;
    } else {
      this.state.currentPath = newPath;
    }

    // Check for autopin commit
    const autopinOptions = AUTOPIN_PRESETS[this.settings.autopinCalmness];
    const commitCheck = shouldCommit(
      this.state.autopinState,
      this.state.currentPath,
      this.state.fields,
      autopinOptions,
      now
    );

    if (commitCheck.shouldCommit && commitCheck.commitPosition) {
      this.state.anchors.push({
        position: commitCheck.commitPosition,
        timestamp: now,
        confidence: 1.0, // Would sample Q(x) at position
      });
      this.state.autopinState = updateAutopinState(
        this.state.autopinState,
        commitCheck.commitPosition,
        now
      );
    }

    // Check for closure
    const closureResult = await checkClosure(
      this.state.startPoint,
      cursor,
      this.state.currentPath,
      this.state.hypotheses,
      this.state.fields,
      {}
    );

    // Update multi-hypothesis if uncertainty is high
    if (this.state.currentPath) {
      this.state.hypotheses = await computeMultiHypothesis(
        this.state.startPoint,
        cursor,
        this.state.fields,
        intent,
        this.state.hypotheses,
        { K: 3 }
      );
    }

    this.state.currentCursor = cursor;
  }

  /**
   * Close path
   */
  async closePath(): Promise<Path | null> {
    if (!this.state.isActive || !this.state.fields || !this.state.startPoint || !this.state.currentPath) {
      return null;
    }

    const closureResult = await checkClosure(
      this.state.startPoint,
      this.state.currentCursor || this.state.startPoint,
      this.state.currentPath,
      this.state.hypotheses,
      this.state.fields,
      {}
    );

    if (closureResult.closurePath) {
      const refined = refineClosure(closureResult.closurePath, this.state.fields, this.imageData!);
      this.state.isClosed = true;
      this.state.isActive = false;
      return refined;
    }

    return null;
  }

  /**
   * Get current state
   */
  getState(): AegisLassoState {
    return { ...this.state };
  }

  /**
   * Reset engine
   */
  reset(): void {
    this.state.isActive = false;
    this.state.isClosed = false;
    this.state.startPoint = null;
    this.state.currentCursor = null;
    this.state.currentPath = null;
    this.state.hypotheses = null;
    this.state.anchors = [];
    this.state.previousTangent = null;
    this.state.intentTracker.reset();
  }

  /**
   * Update settings
   */
  setSettings(settings: Partial<LassoSettings>): void {
    this.settings = { ...this.settings, ...settings };
  }

  /**
   * Get settings
   */
  getSettings(): LassoSettings {
    return { ...this.settings };
  }
}

import { DEFAULT_LASSO_SETTINGS } from '../types/path';

```

### Autopins

**Category:** Selection  
**Version:** VPRO-Aegis

*Uncertainty-based automatic anchor placement*

**File:** `solver/Autopins.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * Aegis Lasso - Uncertainty-Based Autopins
 * 
 * Pins exist to prevent drift, not to follow the cursor.
 * Autopins are triggered by:
 * - Distance since last commit (d_max)
 * - Time since last commit (t_max)
 * - Uncertainty integral along path (U_max)
 * 
 * When triggered, commit at best-confidence point on path (not cursor).
 */

import type { Vec2, FieldSet } from '../types/fields';
import type { Path, Anchor } from '../types/path';

export interface AutopinOptions {
  /** Minimum distance before eligible to commit */
  dMin: number;
  /** Maximum distance (force commit) */
  dMax: number;
  /** Minimum time before eligible to commit (ms) */
  tMin: number;
  /** Maximum time (force commit) (ms) */
  tMax: number;
  /** Maximum uncertainty integral (force commit) */
  UMax: number;
}

export const AUTOPIN_PRESETS = {
  calm: {
    dMin: 50,
    dMax: 200,
    tMin: 500,
    tMax: 3000,
    UMax: 50,
  },
  normal: {
    dMin: 30,
    dMax: 150,
    tMin: 300,
    tMax: 2000,
    UMax: 30,
  },
  aggressive: {
    dMin: 20,
    dMax: 100,
    tMin: 200,
    tMax: 1000,
    UMax: 20,
  },
};

export interface AutopinState {
  lastCommitTime: number;
  lastCommitPosition: Vec2;
  accumulatedUncertainty: number;
  accumulatedDistance: number;
}

/**
 * Check if should commit (place autopin)
 */
export function shouldCommit(
  state: AutopinState,
  currentPath: Path,
  fields: FieldSet,
  options: AutopinOptions,
  now: number
): { shouldCommit: boolean; commitPosition: Vec2 | null } {
  const timeSince = now - state.lastCommitTime;
  const distanceSince = computePathLength(currentPath);

  // Compute uncertainty integral along path
  const uncertainty = computeUncertaintyIntegral(currentPath, fields.Q);
  const totalUncertainty = state.accumulatedUncertainty + uncertainty;

  // Check hard caps
  const forceDistance = distanceSince >= options.dMax;
  const forceTime = timeSince >= options.tMax;
  const forceUncertainty = totalUncertainty >= options.UMax;

  // Eligibility check
  const eligible = distanceSince >= options.dMin && timeSince >= options.tMin;

  if (eligible && (forceDistance || forceTime || forceUncertainty)) {
    // Find best commit position (highest confidence in eligible window)
    const commitPosition = findBestCommitPosition(
      currentPath,
      fields.Q,
      options.dMin,
      Math.min(options.dMax, distanceSince)
    );

    return { shouldCommit: true, commitPosition };
  }

  return { shouldCommit: false, commitPosition: null };
}

/**
 * Find best commit position (highest confidence in eligible window)
 */
function findBestCommitPosition(
  path: Path,
  confidenceField: { width: number; height: number; data: Float32Array },
  windowStart: number,
  windowEnd: number
): Vec2 {
  // Compute arc-length along path
  const arcLengths = path.arcLengths || computeArcLengths(path.points);

  // Find points in eligible window
  const candidates: Array<{ point: Vec2; index: number; confidence: number }> = [];

  for (let i = 0; i < path.points.length; i++) {
    const s = arcLengths[i];
    if (s >= windowStart && s <= windowEnd) {
      const point = path.points[i];
      const px = Math.floor(point.x);
      const py = Math.floor(point.y);
      
      if (px >= 0 && px < confidenceField.width && py >= 0 && py < confidenceField.height) {
        const idx = py * confidenceField.width + px;
        const q = confidenceField.data[idx];
        candidates.push({ point, index: i, confidence: q });
      }
    }
  }

  if (candidates.length === 0) {
    // Fallback: use midpoint of window
    const midLength = (windowStart + windowEnd) / 2;
    for (let i = 0; i < arcLengths.length; i++) {
      if (arcLengths[i] >= midLength) {
        return path.points[i];
      }
    }
    return path.points[path.points.length - 1];
  }

  // Select highest confidence
  const best = candidates.reduce((max, candidate) =>
    candidate.confidence > max.confidence ? candidate : max
  );

  return best.point;
}

/**
 * Compute uncertainty integral along path
 */
function computeUncertaintyIntegral(
  path: Path,
  confidenceField: { width: number; height: number; data: Float32Array }
): number {
  if (path.points.length < 2) return 0;

  const arcLengths = path.arcLengths || computeArcLengths(path.points);
  let integral = 0;

  for (let i = 1; i < path.points.length; i++) {
    const prev = path.points[i - 1];
    const curr = path.points[i];
    const segmentLength = arcLengths[i] - arcLengths[i - 1];

    // Sample confidence at midpoint
    const midX = (prev.x + curr.x) / 2;
    const midY = (prev.y + curr.y) / 2;
    const px = Math.floor(midX);
    const py = Math.floor(midY);

    if (px >= 0 && px < confidenceField.width && py >= 0 && py < confidenceField.height) {
      const idx = py * confidenceField.width + px;
      const confidence = confidenceField.data[idx];
      const uncertainty = 1 - confidence; // Uncertainty = 1 - confidence
      integral += uncertainty * segmentLength;
    }
  }

  return integral;
}

/**
 * Compute path length
 */
function computePathLength(path: Path): number {
  if (path.arcLengths && path.arcLengths.length > 0) {
    return path.arcLengths[path.arcLengths.length - 1];
  }

  let length = 0;
  for (let i = 1; i < path.points.length; i++) {
    const dx = path.points[i].x - path.points[i - 1].x;
    const dy = path.points[i].y - path.points[i - 1].y;
    length += Math.hypot(dx, dy);
  }
  return length;
}

/**
 * Compute arc-lengths
 */
function computeArcLengths(points: Vec2[]): number[] {
  const arcLengths = new Array(points.length);
  arcLengths[0] = 0;

  for (let i = 1; i < points.length; i++) {
    const dx = points[i].x - points[i - 1].x;
    const dy = points[i].y - points[i - 1].y;
    arcLengths[i] = arcLengths[i - 1] + Math.hypot(dx, dy);
  }

  return arcLengths;
}

/**
 * Update autopin state after commit
 */
export function updateAutopinState(
  state: AutopinState,
  commitPosition: Vec2,
  now: number
): AutopinState {
  return {
    lastCommitTime: now,
    lastCommitPosition: commitPosition,
    accumulatedUncertainty: 0, // Reset after commit
    accumulatedDistance: 0, // Reset after commit
  };
}

```

### Boundary Likelihood Field

**Category:** Selection  
**Version:** VPRO-Aegis

*Computes boundary probability field from multi-scale gradients*

**File:** `fields/BoundaryLikelihoodField.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * Aegis Lasso - Boundary Likelihood Field B(x)
 * 
 * Computes a probability-like boundary score B(x) ∈ [0,1] for each pixel,
 * built from multi-scale gradients, edge coherence, non-max suppression,
 * two-side contrast cues, and texture discontinuity cues.
 */

import type { BoundaryLikelihoodField, Vec2 } from '../types/fields';

export interface BoundaryFieldOptions {
  /** Number of pyramid levels for multi-scale processing */
  pyramidLevels: number;
  /** Gaussian blur radius for noise reduction */
  blurRadius: number;
  /** Sensitivity threshold for edge detection */
  sensitivity: number;
  /** Enable structure tensor coherence */
  useCoherence: boolean;
  /** Enable two-side contrast (difference across normal) */
  useTwoSideContrast: boolean;
  /** Enable texture discontinuity detection */
  useTextureDiscontinuity: boolean;
}

export const DEFAULT_BOUNDARY_OPTIONS: BoundaryFieldOptions = {
  pyramidLevels: 3,
  blurRadius: 1.5,
  sensitivity: 0.1,
  useCoherence: true,
  useTwoSideContrast: true,
  useTextureDiscontinuity: true,
};

/**
 * Compute boundary likelihood field from image data
 */
export function computeBoundaryLikelihoodField(
  imageData: ImageData,
  options: Partial<BoundaryFieldOptions> = {}
): BoundaryLikelihoodField {
  const opts = { ...DEFAULT_BOUNDARY_OPTIONS, ...options };
  const { width, height } = imageData;

  // Step 1: Convert to grayscale
  const grayscale = toGrayscale(imageData);

  // Step 2: Multi-scale pyramid
  const pyramid = buildPyramid(grayscale, width, height, opts.pyramidLevels);

  // Step 3: Compute boundary scores at each scale
  const scaleScores: Float32Array[] = [];
  const scales: number[] = [];

  for (let level = 0; level < opts.pyramidLevels; level++) {
    const scale = Math.pow(2, level);
    scales.push(scale);
    
    const levelData = pyramid[level];
    const levelWidth = Math.floor(width / scale);
    const levelHeight = Math.floor(height / scale);
    
    // Compute gradient magnitude
    const gradient = computeGradient(levelData, levelWidth, levelHeight);
    
    // Apply Gaussian blur for noise reduction
    const blurred = gaussianBlur(gradient, levelWidth, levelHeight, opts.blurRadius);
    
    // Compute structure tensor for coherence (if enabled)
    let coherence: Float32Array | null = null;
    if (opts.useCoherence) {
      coherence = computeStructureTensor(levelData, levelWidth, levelHeight);
    }
    
    // Compute two-side contrast (if enabled)
    let twoSideContrast: Float32Array | null = null;
    if (opts.useTwoSideContrast) {
      twoSideContrast = computeTwoSideContrast(levelData, levelWidth, levelHeight);
    }
    
    // Compute texture discontinuity (if enabled)
    let textureDiscontinuity: Float32Array | null = null;
    if (opts.useTextureDiscontinuity) {
      textureDiscontinuity = computeTextureDiscontinuity(levelData, levelWidth, levelHeight);
    }
    
    // Combine all cues into boundary score
    const score = combineBoundaryCues(
      blurred,
      coherence,
      twoSideContrast,
      textureDiscontinuity,
      levelWidth,
      levelHeight,
      opts.sensitivity
    );
    
    scaleScores.push(score);
  }

  // Step 4: Combine multi-scale scores (coarse-to-fine)
  const finalScore = combineMultiScale(scaleScores, scales, width, height);

  // Step 5: Non-max suppression & hysteresis
  const suppressed = nonMaxSuppression(finalScore, width, height);
  const withHysteresis = applyHysteresis(suppressed, width, height);

  return {
    data: withHysteresis,
    width,
    height,
    scales,
  };
}

/**
 * Convert RGB image to grayscale
 */
function toGrayscale(imageData: ImageData): Float32Array {
  const { data, width, height } = imageData;
  const grayscale = new Float32Array(width * height);

  for (let i = 0; i < width * height; i++) {
    const r = data[i * 4];
    const g = data[i * 4 + 1];
    const b = data[i * 4 + 2];
    // Luminance formula
    grayscale[i] = 0.299 * r + 0.587 * g + 0.114 * b;
  }

  return grayscale;
}

/**
 * Build image pyramid (multi-scale representation)
 */
function buildPyramid(
  grayscale: Float32Array,
  width: number,
  height: number,
  levels: number
): Float32Array[] {
  const pyramid: Float32Array[] = [grayscale]; // Level 0 = original

  let current = grayscale;
  let currentWidth = width;
  let currentHeight = height;

  for (let level = 1; level < levels; level++) {
    // Downsample by 2x
    const nextWidth = Math.floor(currentWidth / 2);
    const nextHeight = Math.floor(currentHeight / 2);
    const downsampled = new Float32Array(nextWidth * nextHeight);

    for (let y = 0; y < nextHeight; y++) {
      for (let x = 0; x < nextWidth; x++) {
        // Average of 2x2 block
        const srcX = x * 2;
        const srcY = y * 2;
        const sum =
          current[srcY * currentWidth + srcX] +
          current[srcY * currentWidth + srcX + 1] +
          current[(srcY + 1) * currentWidth + srcX] +
          current[(srcY + 1) * currentWidth + srcX + 1];
        downsampled[y * nextWidth + x] = sum / 4;
      }
    }

    pyramid.push(downsampled);
    current = downsampled;
    currentWidth = nextWidth;
    currentHeight = nextHeight;
  }

  return pyramid;
}

/**
 * Compute gradient magnitude using Sobel operator
 */
function computeGradient(
  data: Float32Array,
  width: number,
  height: number
): Float32Array {
  const gradient = new Float32Array(width * height);

  // Sobel kernels
  const sobelX = [-1, 0, 1, -2, 0, 2, -1, 0, 1];
  const sobelY = [-1, -2, -1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 2, 1];

  for (let y = 1; y < height - 1; y++) {
    for (let x = 1; x < width - 1; x++) {
      let gx = 0;
      let gy = 0;

      for (let ky = -1; ky <= 1; ky++) {
        for (let kx = -1; kx <= 1; kx++) {
          const idx = (y + ky) * width + (x + kx);
          const kernelIdx = (ky + 1) * 3 + (kx + 1);
          gx += data[idx] * sobelX[kernelIdx];
          gy += data[idx] * sobelY[kernelIdx];
        }
      }

      const idx = y * width + x;
      gradient[idx] = Math.hypot(gx, gy);
    }
  }

  return gradient;
}

/**
 * Apply Gaussian blur
 */
function gaussianBlur(
  data: Float32Array,
  width: number,
  height: number,
  radius: number
): Float32Array {
  const kernel = createGaussianKernel(radius);
  const kernelSize = kernel.length;
  const halfKernel = Math.floor(kernelSize / 2);
  const blurred = new Float32Array(width * height);

  // Horizontal pass
  const temp = new Float32Array(width * height);
  for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
      let sum = 0;
      let weightSum = 0;
      for (let kx = -halfKernel; kx <= halfKernel; kx++) {
        const px = Math.max(0, Math.min(width - 1, x + kx));
        const idx = y * width + px;
        const weight = kernel[kx + halfKernel];
        sum += data[idx] * weight;
        weightSum += weight;
      }
      temp[y * width + x] = sum / weightSum;
    }
  }

  // Vertical pass
  for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
      let sum = 0;
      let weightSum = 0;
      for (let ky = -halfKernel; ky <= halfKernel; ky++) {
        const py = Math.max(0, Math.min(height - 1, y + ky));
        const idx = py * width + x;
        const weight = kernel[ky + halfKernel];
        sum += temp[idx] * weight;
        weightSum += weight;
      }
      blurred[y * width + x] = sum / weightSum;
    }
  }

  return blurred;
}

/**
 * Create Gaussian kernel
 */
function createGaussianKernel(radius: number): Float32Array {
  const sigma = radius / 3;
  const kernelSize = Math.ceil(radius * 2) * 2 + 1;
  const kernel = new Float32Array(kernelSize);
  const center = Math.floor(kernelSize / 2);
  let sum = 0;

  for (let i = 0; i < kernelSize; i++) {
    const x = i - center;
    const value = Math.exp(-(x * x) / (2 * sigma * sigma));
    kernel[i] = value;
    sum += value;
  }

  // Normalize
  for (let i = 0; i < kernelSize; i++) {
    kernel[i] /= sum;
  }

  return kernel;
}

/**
 * Compute structure tensor for edge coherence
 */
function computeStructureTensor(
  data: Float32Array,
  width: number,
  height: number
): Float32Array {
  const coherence = new Float32Array(width * height);

  // Compute gradients
  const gx = new Float32Array(width * height);
  const gy = new Float32Array(width * height);

  for (let y = 1; y < height - 1; y++) {
    for (let x = 1; x < width - 1; x++) {
      const idx = y * width + x;
      gx[idx] = (data[idx + 1] - data[idx - 1]) / 2;
      gy[idx] = (data[(y + 1) * width + x] - data[(y - 1) * width + x]) / 2;
    }
  }

  // Compute structure tensor components (smoothed)
  for (let y = 2; y < height - 2; y++) {
    for (let x = 2; x < width - 2; x++) {
      let Ixx = 0, Ixy = 0, Iyy = 0;

      // Local window (5x5)
      for (let dy = -2; dy <= 2; dy++) {
        for (let dx = -2; dx <= 2; dx++) {
          const idx = (y + dy) * width + (x + dx);
          const gxVal = gx[idx];
          const gyVal = gy[idx];
          Ixx += gxVal * gxVal;
          Ixy += gxVal * gyVal;
          Iyy += gyVal * gyVal;
        }
      }

      // Coherence = (λ1 - λ2) / (λ1 + λ2) where λ1, λ2 are eigenvalues
      const trace = Ixx + Iyy;
      const det = Ixx * Iyy - Ixy * Ixy;
      const disc = Math.max(0, trace * trace - 4 * det);
      const lambda1 = (trace + Math.sqrt(disc)) / 2;
      const lambda2 = (trace - Math.sqrt(disc)) / 2;
      const coherenceValue = trace > 0 ? (lambda1 - lambda2) / trace : 0;

      coherence[y * width + x] = Math.min(1, coherenceValue);
    }
  }

  return coherence;
}

/**
 * Compute two-side contrast (difference across normal, not just along edge)
 */
function computeTwoSideContrast(
  data: Float32Array,
  width: number,
  height: number
): Float32Array {
  const contrast = new Float32Array(width * height);

  for (let y = 1; y < height - 1; y++) {
    for (let x = 1; x < width - 1; x++) {
      const center = data[y * width + x];
      
      // Sample on both sides of the normal (perpendicular to gradient)
      // For simplicity, use 4-directional sampling
      const left = data[y * width + (x - 1)];
      const right = data[y * width + (x + 1)];
      const top = data[(y - 1) * width + x];
      const bottom = data[(y + 1) * width + x];
      
      // Maximum difference across normal directions
      const diff1 = Math.abs(left - right);
      const diff2 = Math.abs(top - bottom);
      const maxDiff = Math.max(diff1, diff2);
      
      contrast[y * width + x] = Math.min(1, maxDiff / 255);
    }
  }

  return contrast;
}

/**
 * Compute texture discontinuity (local variance / LBP patterns)
 */
function computeTextureDiscontinuity(
  data: Float32Array,
  width: number,
  height: number
): Float32Array {
  const discontinuity = new Float32Array(width * height);

  for (let y = 2; y < height - 2; y++) {
    for (let x = 2; x < width - 2; x++) {
      const center = data[y * width + x];
      let variance = 0;
      let count = 0;

      // Compute local variance in 5x5 window
      for (let dy = -2; dy <= 2; dy++) {
        for (let dx = -2; dx <= 2; dx++) {
          const idx = (y + dy) * width + (x + dx);
          const diff = data[idx] - center;
          variance += diff * diff;
          count++;
        }
      }

      variance /= count;
      discontinuity[y * width + x] = Math.min(1, variance / (255 * 255));
    }
  }

  return discontinuity;
}

/**
 * Combine all boundary cues into final score
 */
function combineBoundaryCues(
  gradient: Float32Array,
  coherence: Float32Array | null,
  twoSideContrast: Float32Array | null,
  textureDiscontinuity: Float32Array | null,
  width: number,
  height: number,
  sensitivity: number
): Float32Array {
  const score = new Float32Array(width * height);
  // Compute max gradient safely (avoid stack overflow from spread operator)
  let maxGradient = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < gradient.length; i++) {
    maxGradient = Math.max(maxGradient, gradient[i]);
  }
  // Avoid division by zero
  if (maxGradient === 0) maxGradient = 1;

  for (let i = 0; i < width * height; i++) {
    // Normalize gradient
    let boundaryScore = Math.min(1, gradient[i] / (maxGradient * sensitivity));

    // Weight by coherence if available
    if (coherence) {
      boundaryScore *= (0.5 + 0.5 * coherence[i]);
    }

    // Add two-side contrast if available
    if (twoSideContrast) {
      boundaryScore = Math.min(1, boundaryScore + 0.3 * twoSideContrast[i]);
    }

    // Add texture discontinuity if available
    if (textureDiscontinuity) {
      boundaryScore = Math.min(1, boundaryScore + 0.2 * textureDiscontinuity[i]);
    }

    score[i] = boundaryScore;
  }

  return score;
}

/**
 * Combine multi-scale scores (upsample and blend)
 */
function combineMultiScale(
  scaleScores: Float32Array[],
  scales: number[],
  targetWidth: number,
  targetHeight: number
): Float32Array {
  const combined = new Float32Array(targetWidth * targetHeight);

  for (let level = 0; level < scaleScores.length; level++) {
    const scale = scales[level];
    const levelScore = scaleScores[level];
    const levelWidth = Math.floor(targetWidth / scale);
    const levelHeight = Math.floor(targetHeight / scale);
    const weight = 1 / (level + 1); // Coarser scales get less weight

    // Upsample and add to combined
    for (let y = 0; y < targetHeight; y++) {
      for (let x = 0; x < targetWidth; x++) {
        const srcX = Math.floor(x / scale);
        const srcY = Math.floor(y / scale);
        const srcIdx = Math.min(srcY, levelHeight - 1) * levelWidth + Math.min(srcX, levelWidth - 1);
        const idx = y * targetWidth + x;
        combined[idx] += levelScore[srcIdx] * weight;
      }
    }
  }

  // Normalize (use loop instead of spread to avoid stack overflow)
  let maxScore = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < combined.length; i++) {
    if (combined[i] > maxScore) {
      maxScore = combined[i];
    }
  }
  if (maxScore > 0) {
    for (let i = 0; i < combined.length; i++) {
      combined[i] /= maxScore;
    }
  }

  return combined;
}

/**
 * Non-maximum suppression (thin edges to 1-pixel width)
 */
function nonMaxSuppression(
  data: Float32Array,
  width: number,
  height: number
): Float32Array {
  const suppressed = new Float32Array(width * height);

  for (let y = 1; y < height - 1; y++) {
    for (let x = 1; x < width - 1; x++) {
      const idx = y * width + x;
      const center = data[idx];

      // Check 8 neighbors
      let isMax = true;
      for (let dy = -1; dy <= 1; dy++) {
        for (let dx = -1; dx <= 1; dx++) {
          if (dx === 0 && dy === 0) continue;
          const neighborIdx = (y + dy) * width + (x + dx);
          if (data[neighborIdx] > center) {
            isMax = false;
            break;
          }
        }
        if (!isMax) break;
      }

      suppressed[idx] = isMax ? center : 0;
    }
  }

  return suppressed;
}

/**
 * Apply hysteresis (connect high-confidence edges, suppress weak isolated edges)
 */
function applyHysteresis(
  data: Float32Array,
  width: number,
  height: number,
  lowThreshold: number = 0.1,
  highThreshold: number = 0.3
): Float32Array {
  const result = new Float32Array(width * height);
  const visited = new Uint8Array(width * height);

  // Mark strong edges
  for (let i = 0; i < width * height; i++) {
    if (data[i] >= highThreshold) {
      result[i] = data[i];
      visited[i] = 1;
    }
  }

  // Connect weak edges to strong edges
  for (let y = 1; y < height - 1; y++) {
    for (let x = 1; x < width - 1; x++) {
      const idx = y * width + x;
      if (visited[idx] || data[idx] < lowThreshold) continue;

      // Check if connected to strong edge
      if (isConnectedToStrong(data, visited, x, y, width, height, highThreshold)) {
        result[idx] = data[idx];
        visited[idx] = 1;
      }
    }
  }

  return result;
}

/**
 * Check if weak edge is connected to strong edge (flood fill)
 */
function isConnectedToStrong(
  data: Float32Array,
  visited: Uint8Array,
  startX: number,
  startY: number,
  width: number,
  height: number,
  highThreshold: number
): boolean {
  const queue: number[] = [];
  const localVisited = new Uint8Array(width * height);
  queue.push(startY * width + startX);
  localVisited[startY * width + startX] = 1;

  while (queue.length > 0) {
    const idx = queue.shift()!;
    const y = Math.floor(idx / width);
    const x = idx % width;

    // Check if reached strong edge
    if (data[idx] >= highThreshold && visited[idx]) {
      return true;
    }

    // Check 8 neighbors
    for (let dy = -1; dy <= 1; dy++) {
      for (let dx = -1; dx <= 1; dx++) {
        if (dx === 0 && dy === 0) continue;
        const nx = x + dx;
        const ny = y + dy;
        if (nx < 0 || nx >= width || ny < 0 || ny >= height) continue;

        const nIdx = ny * width + nx;
        if (localVisited[nIdx] || data[nIdx] === 0) continue;

        queue.push(nIdx);
        localVisited[nIdx] = 1;
      }
    }
  }

  return false;
}

```

### Closure

**Category:** Selection  
**Version:** VPRO-Aegis

*Path closure computation with best seam finding*

**File:** `solver/Closure.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * Aegis Lasso - Closure System
 * 
 * When cursor approaches start point, Aegis computes:
 * 1. Best seam to close (optimal connection)
 * 2. Best seam across multiple hypotheses (if multi-hypothesis active)
 * 3. Closure that minimizes seam visibility + uncertainty
 * 
 * Never forces closure - only suggests and previews.
 */

import type { Vec2, FieldSet } from '../types/fields';
import type { Path, MultiHypothesisState } from '../types/path';

export interface ClosureOptions {
  /** Closure radius (pixels) */
  closureRadius: number;
  /** Show preview when within this distance */
  previewRadius: number;
  /** Minimum path length before closure is allowed */
  minPathLength: number;
}

export const DEFAULT_CLOSURE_OPTIONS: ClosureOptions = {
  closureRadius: 20,
  previewRadius: 30,
  minPathLength: 50,
};

export interface ClosureResult {
  shouldSuggest: boolean;
  closurePath: Path | null;
  preview: boolean;
  score: number;
}

/**
 * Check if should suggest closure
 */
export async function checkClosure(
  startPoint: Vec2,
  currentCursor: Vec2,
  currentPath: Path,
  hypotheses: MultiHypothesisState | null,
  fields: FieldSet,
  options: Partial<ClosureOptions> = {}
): ClosureResult {
  const opts = { ...DEFAULT_CLOSURE_OPTIONS, ...options };

  const distanceToStart = Math.hypot(
    currentCursor.x - startPoint.x,
    currentCursor.y - startPoint.y
  );

  // Check minimum path length
  const pathLength = computePathLength(currentPath);
  if (pathLength < opts.minPathLength) {
    return { shouldSuggest: false, closurePath: null, preview: false, score: Infinity };
  }

  // Check if within preview radius
  if (distanceToStart > opts.previewRadius) {
    return { shouldSuggest: false, closurePath: null, preview: false, score: Infinity };
  }

  // Compute closure paths
  const pathsToClose = hypotheses
    ? [hypotheses.primaryPath, ...hypotheses.alternatePaths]
    : [currentPath];

  const closures = await Promise.all(pathsToClose.map(async (path) => {
    const closurePath = await computeOptimalSeam(
      startPoint,
      path.points[path.points.length - 1],
      fields
    );
    const visibility = computeSeamVisibility(closurePath, fields.B);
    const uncertainty = computeUncertaintyIntegral(closurePath, fields.Q);
    const score = visibility + uncertainty;

    return {
      path: closurePath,
      score,
    };
  }));

  // Select best closure
  const best = closures.reduce((min, closure) =>
    closure.score < min.score ? closure : min
  );

  // Determine if should suggest (within closure radius)
  const shouldSuggest = distanceToStart <= opts.closureRadius;

  return {
    shouldSuggest,
    closurePath: best.path,
    preview: true, // Always show preview when within preview radius
    score: best.score,
  };
}

/**
 * Compute optimal seam to close path
 */
async function computeOptimalSeam(
  startPoint: Vec2,
  endPoint: Vec2,
  fields: FieldSet
): Path {
  // Strategy: Find path from end to start that minimizes energy
  // Use simplified Dijkstra-like search in corridor between points

  const { B, Q } = fields;
  const corridor = buildCorridor(startPoint, endPoint, B.width, B.height);

  // Priority queue: [cost, x, y]
  const queue: Array<[number, number, number]> = [];
  const distance = new Map<string, number>();
  const predecessor = new Map<string, Vec2 | null>();
  const visited = new Set<string>();

  // Initialize from end point
  const endKey = `${Math.floor(endPoint.x)},${Math.floor(endPoint.y)}`;
  distance.set(endKey, 0);
  predecessor.set(endKey, null);
  queue.push([0, endPoint.x, endPoint.y]);

  // Dijkstra search
  while (queue.length > 0) {
    queue.sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]);
    const [cost, x, y] = queue.shift()!;

    const key = `${Math.floor(x)},${Math.floor(y)}`;
    if (visited.has(key)) continue;
    visited.add(key);

    // Check if reached start
    if (Math.hypot(x - startPoint.x, y - startPoint.y) < 2) {
      break;
    }

    // Explore neighbors (8-connected)
    for (let dy = -1; dy <= 1; dy++) {
      for (let dx = -1; dx <= 1; dx++) {
        if (dx === 0 && dy === 0) continue;

        const nx = x + dx;
        const ny = y + dy;

        // Check bounds
        if (nx < corridor.minX || nx > corridor.maxX || ny < corridor.minY || ny > corridor.maxY) {
          continue;
        }

        const neighborKey = `${Math.floor(nx)},${Math.floor(ny)}`;
        if (visited.has(neighborKey)) continue;

        // Compute edge cost (prefer high B, high Q)
        const px = Math.floor(nx);
        const py = Math.floor(ny);
        if (px < 0 || px >= B.width || py < 0 || py >= B.height) continue;

        const idx = py * B.width + px;
        const b = B.data[idx];
        const q = Q.data[idx];
        const edgeCost = (1 - b) + (1 - q) * 0.5; // Prefer high B and Q

        const newCost = cost + edgeCost;

        if (!distance.has(neighborKey) || newCost < distance.get(neighborKey)!) {
          distance.set(neighborKey, newCost);
          predecessor.set(neighborKey, { x, y });
          queue.push(newCost, { x: nx, y: ny });
        }
      }
    }
  }

  // Backtrack to get path
  const path = backtrack(predecessor, startPoint, endPoint, B.width, B.height);
  return path;
}

/**
 * Build corridor between two points
 */
function buildCorridor(
  p1: Vec2,
  p2: Vec2,
  width: number,
  height: number
): { minX: number; maxX: number; minY: number; maxY: number } {
  const margin = 20; // Pixels
  const minX = Math.max(0, Math.floor(Math.min(p1.x, p2.x) - margin));
  const maxX = Math.min(width - 1, Math.ceil(Math.max(p1.x, p2.x) + margin));
  const minY = Math.max(0, Math.floor(Math.min(p1.y, p2.y) - margin));
  const maxY = Math.min(height - 1, Math.ceil(Math.max(p1.y, p2.y) + margin));

  return { minX, maxX, minY, maxY };
}

/**
 * Backtrack from start to end
 */
function backtrack(
  predecessor: Map<string, Vec2 | null>,
  start: Vec2,
  end: Vec2,
  width: number,
  height: number
): Path {
  const path: Vec2[] = [];
  let current: Vec2 | null = { x: Math.floor(start.x), y: Math.floor(start.y) };

  while (current) {
    path.push({ ...current });

    const key = `${current.x},${current.y}`;
    const prev = predecessor.get(key);

    // Check if reached end
    if (prev && Math.hypot(prev.x - end.x, prev.y - end.y) < 2) {
      path.push(end);
      break;
    }

    current = prev;
  }

  // Reverse to get path from end to start
  path.reverse();

  // Compute arc-lengths
  const arcLengths = computeArcLengths(path);

  return {
    points: path,
    arcLengths,
  };
}

/**
 * Compute seam visibility (how visible the seam is)
 */
function computeSeamVisibility(
  seam: Path,
  boundaryField: { width: number; height: number; data: Float32Array }
): number {
  // Visibility = average (1 - B(x)) along seam
  // Low B = high visibility (bad)
  let totalVisibility = 0;
  let count = 0;

  for (const point of seam.points) {
    const px = Math.floor(point.x);
    const py = Math.floor(point.y);
    if (px >= 0 && px < boundaryField.width && py >= 0 && py < boundaryField.height) {
      const idx = py * boundaryField.width + px;
      const B = boundaryField.data[idx];
      totalVisibility += 1 - B; // Low B = high visibility
      count++;
    }
  }

  return count > 0 ? totalVisibility / count : Infinity;
}

/**
 * Compute uncertainty integral along path
 */
function computeUncertaintyIntegral(
  path: Path,
  confidenceField: { width: number; height: number; data: Float32Array }
): number {
  if (path.points.length < 2) return 0;

  const arcLengths = path.arcLengths || computeArcLengths(path.points);
  let integral = 0;

  for (let i = 1; i < path.points.length; i++) {
    const prev = path.points[i - 1];
    const curr = path.points[i];
    const segmentLength = arcLengths[i] - arcLengths[i - 1];

    // Sample confidence at midpoint
    const midX = (prev.x + curr.x) / 2;
    const midY = (prev.y + curr.y) / 2;
    const px = Math.floor(midX);
    const py = Math.floor(midY);

    if (px >= 0 && px < confidenceField.width && py >= 0 && py < confidenceField.height) {
      const idx = py * confidenceField.width + px;
      const confidence = confidenceField.data[idx];
      const uncertainty = 1 - confidence;
      integral += uncertainty * segmentLength;
    }
  }

  return integral;
}

/**
 * Compute path length
 */
function computePathLength(path: Path): number {
  if (path.arcLengths && path.arcLengths.length > 0) {
    return path.arcLengths[path.arcLengths.length - 1];
  }

  let length = 0;
  for (let i = 1; i < path.points.length; i++) {
    const dx = path.points[i].x - path.points[i - 1].x;
    const dy = path.points[i].y - path.points[i - 1].y;
    length += Math.hypot(dx, dy);
  }
  return length;
}

/**
 * Compute arc-lengths
 */
function computeArcLengths(points: Vec2[]): number[] {
  const arcLengths = new Array(points.length);
  arcLengths[0] = 0;

  for (let i = 1; i < points.length; i++) {
    const dx = points[i].x - points[i - 1].x;
    const dy = points[i].y - points[i - 1].y;
    arcLengths[i] = arcLengths[i - 1] + Math.hypot(dx, dy);
  }

  return arcLengths;
}

/**
 * Apply post-closure refinement (graph cut, matting)
 */
export function refineClosure(
  closedPath: Path,
  fields: FieldSet,
  imageData: ImageData
): Path {
  // Simplified refinement: smooth the closure seam
  // In full implementation, would use graph cut or closed-form matting

  if (closedPath.points.length < 3) {
    return closedPath;
  }

  // Simple smoothing: average with neighbors
  const refined: Vec2[] = [];
  refined.push(closedPath.points[0]); // Keep first point

  for (let i = 1; i < closedPath.points.length - 1; i++) {
    const prev = closedPath.points[i - 1];
    const curr = closedPath.points[i];
    const next = closedPath.points[i + 1];

    // Weighted average (more weight on current if high confidence)
    const px = Math.floor(curr.x);
    const py = Math.floor(curr.y);
    const confidence = px >= 0 && px < fields.Q.width && py >= 0 && py < fields.Q.height
      ? fields.Q.data[py * fields.Q.width + px]
      : 0.5;

    const weight = 0.5 + confidence * 0.5; // More weight on current if high confidence
    const smoothed = {
      x: (1 - weight) * (prev.x + next.x) / 2 + weight * curr.x,
      y: (1 - weight) * (prev.y + next.y) / 2 + weight * curr.y,
    };

    refined.push(smoothed);
  }

  refined.push(closedPath.points[closedPath.points.length - 1]); // Keep last point

  return {
    points: refined,
    arcLengths: computeArcLengths(refined),
  };
}

```

### Confidence Field

**Category:** Selection  
**Version:** VPRO-Aegis

*Computes confidence scores for boundary/orientation reliability*

**File:** `fields/ConfidenceField.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * Aegis Lasso - Confidence Field Q(x)
 * 
 * Computes confidence Q(x) ∈ [0,1] for how trustworthy the local boundary/orientation is.
 * Built from edge coherence, stability across scales, low noise, and boundary likelihood strength.
 */

import type { ConfidenceField, BoundaryLikelihoodField, OrientationField } from '../types/fields';

export interface ConfidenceFieldOptions {
  /** Weight for edge coherence contribution */
  coherenceWeight: number;
  /** Weight for scale stability contribution */
  scaleStabilityWeight: number;
  /** Weight for noise level contribution */
  noiseWeight: number;
  /** Weight for boundary strength contribution */
  boundaryStrengthWeight: number;
}

export const DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE_OPTIONS: ConfidenceFieldOptions = {
  coherenceWeight: 0.4,
  scaleStabilityWeight: 0.3,
  noiseWeight: 0.2,
  boundaryStrengthWeight: 0.1,
};

/**
 * Compute confidence field from boundary and orientation fields
 */
export function computeConfidenceField(
  boundaryField: BoundaryLikelihoodField,
  orientationField: OrientationField,
  options: Partial<ConfidenceFieldOptions> = {}
): ConfidenceField {
  const opts = { ...DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE_OPTIONS, ...options };
  const { width, height } = boundaryField;

  // Step 1: Compute edge coherence (from structure tensor)
  const coherence = computeCoherence(boundaryField, orientationField, width, height);

  // Step 2: Compute scale stability (agreement across pyramid levels)
  const scaleStability = computeScaleStability(boundaryField, width, height);

  // Step 3: Compute noise level (signal-to-noise ratio)
  const noiseLevel = computeNoiseLevel(boundaryField, width, height);

  // Step 4: Boundary strength (high B(x) = more confident)
  const boundaryStrength = new Float32Array(boundaryField.data);

  // Step 5: Combine all factors
  const confidence = new Float32Array(width * height);

  for (let i = 0; i < width * height; i++) {
    const c = coherence[i] * opts.coherenceWeight;
    const s = scaleStability[i] * opts.scaleStabilityWeight;
    const n = (1 - noiseLevel[i]) * opts.noiseWeight; // Invert noise (low noise = high confidence)
    const b = boundaryStrength[i] * opts.boundaryStrengthWeight;

    confidence[i] = Math.min(1, c + s + n + b);
  }

  return {
    data: confidence,
    width,
    height,
  };
}

/**
 * Compute edge coherence from structure tensor
 */
function computeCoherence(
  boundaryField: BoundaryLikelihoodField,
  orientationField: OrientationField,
  width: number,
  height: number
): Float32Array {
  const coherence = new Float32Array(width * height);

  // Compute structure tensor components
  for (let y = 2; y < height - 2; y++) {
    for (let x = 2; x < width - 2; x++) {
      let Ixx = 0, Ixy = 0, Iyy = 0;

      // Local window (5x5) for structure tensor
      for (let dy = -2; dy <= 2; dy++) {
        for (let dx = -2; dx <= 2; dx++) {
          const idx = (y + dy) * width + (x + dx);
          const tx = orientationField.tangent[idx * 2];
          const ty = orientationField.tangent[idx * 2 + 1];
          
          // Structure tensor from tangent field
          Ixx += tx * tx;
          Ixy += tx * ty;
          Iyy += ty * ty;
        }
      }

      // Coherence = (λ1 - λ2) / (λ1 + λ2) where λ1, λ2 are eigenvalues
      const trace = Ixx + Iyy;
      if (trace > 0) {
        const det = Ixx * Iyy - Ixy * Ixy;
        const disc = Math.max(0, trace * trace - 4 * det);
        const lambda1 = (trace + Math.sqrt(disc)) / 2;
        const lambda2 = (trace - Math.sqrt(disc)) / 2;
        const coherenceValue = (lambda1 - lambda2) / trace;
        coherence[y * width + x] = Math.min(1, coherenceValue);
      } else {
        coherence[y * width + x] = 0;
      }
    }
  }

  return coherence;
}

/**
 * Compute scale stability (agreement across pyramid levels)
 */
function computeScaleStability(
  boundaryField: BoundaryLikelihoodField,
  width: number,
  height: number
): Float32Array {
  const stability = new Float32Array(width * height);

  // If we have multiple scales, compute agreement
  if (boundaryField.scales.length > 1) {
    // For each pixel, check if boundary strength is consistent across scales
    for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {
      for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
        const idx = y * width + x;
        const centerB = boundaryField.data[idx];

        // Sample at different scales and check consistency
        let agreement = 0;
        let count = 0;

        for (let i = 0; i < boundaryField.scales.length; i++) {
          const scale = boundaryField.scales[i];
          if (scale === 1) continue; // Skip original scale

          const sx = Math.floor(x / scale);
          const sy = Math.floor(y / scale);
          const sw = Math.floor(width / scale);
          const sh = Math.floor(height / scale);

          if (sx >= 0 && sx < sw && sy >= 0 && sy < sh) {
            // Would need to store scale-specific data - simplified for now
            // In full implementation, would compare B values across scales
            count++;
          }
        }

        // Simplified: use local variance as proxy for scale stability
        // High variance = low stability, low variance = high stability
        const localVariance = computeLocalVariance(boundaryField.data, x, y, width, height, 3);
        stability[idx] = Math.max(0, 1 - localVariance);
      }
    }
  } else {
    // Single scale - use boundary strength as proxy
    stability.set(boundaryField.data);
  }

  return stability;
}

/**
 * Compute local variance in a window
 */
function computeLocalVariance(
  data: Float32Array,
  centerX: number,
  centerY: number,
  width: number,
  height: number,
  windowSize: number
): number {
  const halfWindow = Math.floor(windowSize / 2);
  let sum = 0;
  let sumSq = 0;
  let count = 0;

  for (let dy = -halfWindow; dy <= halfWindow; dy++) {
    for (let dx = -halfWindow; dx <= halfWindow; dx++) {
      const x = centerX + dx;
      const y = centerY + dy;
      if (x < 0 || x >= width || y < 0 || y >= height) continue;

      const idx = y * width + x;
      const value = data[idx];
      sum += value;
      sumSq += value * value;
      count++;
    }
  }

  if (count === 0) return 0;
  const mean = sum / count;
  const variance = (sumSq / count) - (mean * mean);
  return variance;
}

/**
 * Compute noise level (signal-to-noise ratio)
 */
function computeNoiseLevel(
  boundaryField: BoundaryLikelihoodField,
  width: number,
  height: number
): Float32Array {
  const noiseLevel = new Float32Array(width * height);

  // Estimate noise as high-frequency content
  // Low-frequency = signal, high-frequency = noise
  for (let y = 1; y < height - 1; y++) {
    for (let x = 1; x < width - 1; x++) {
      const idx = y * width + x;
      const center = boundaryField.data[idx];

      // Compute Laplacian (second derivative) as noise indicator
      const laplacian =
        boundaryField.data[(y - 1) * width + x] +
        boundaryField.data[(y + 1) * width + x] +
        boundaryField.data[y * width + (x - 1)] +
        boundaryField.data[y * width + (x + 1)] -
        4 * center;

      // High Laplacian = high noise (or high curvature, which we want to preserve)
      // Use absolute value and normalize
      noiseLevel[idx] = Math.min(1, Math.abs(laplacian) / 4);
    }
  }

  // Smooth noise estimate
  return smoothNoiseEstimate(noiseLevel, width, height);
}

/**
 * Smooth noise estimate
 */
function smoothNoiseEstimate(
  noise: Float32Array,
  width: number,
  height: number
): Float32Array {
  const smoothed = new Float32Array(width * height);
  const kernel = [0.25, 0.5, 0.25]; // Simple 3-tap filter

  // Horizontal pass
  const temp = new Float32Array(width * height);
  for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {
    for (let x = 1; x < width - 1; x++) {
      const idx = y * width + x;
      temp[idx] =
        noise[idx - 1] * kernel[0] +
        noise[idx] * kernel[1] +
        noise[idx + 1] * kernel[2];
    }
  }

  // Vertical pass
  for (let y = 1; y < height - 1; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
      const idx = y * width + x;
      smoothed[idx] =
        temp[(y - 1) * width + x] * kernel[0] +
        temp[idx] * kernel[1] +
        temp[(y + 1) * width + x] * kernel[2];
    }
  }

  return smoothed;
}

/**
 * Get confidence at point
 */
export function getConfidence(
  confidenceField: ConfidenceField,
  x: number,
  y: number
): number {
  const { width, height, data } = confidenceField;
  const px = Math.max(0, Math.min(width - 1, Math.floor(x)));
  const py = Math.max(0, Math.min(height - 1, Math.floor(y)));
  const idx = py * width + px;
  return data[idx];
}

```

### Energy Minimization

**Category:** Selection  
**Version:** VPRO-Aegis

*Energy minimization solver for optimal path finding*

**File:** `solver/EnergyMinimization.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * Aegis Lasso - Energy Minimization Solver
 * 
 * Solves for optimal path C from anchor A to cursor M by minimizing:
 * E(C) = E_image(C) + E_alignment(C) + E_smoothness(C) + E_intent(C)
 * 
 * Uses incremental solving inside a moving attention tube for real-time performance.
 */

import type { Vec2, FieldSet, IntentModel } from '../types/fields';
import type { Path } from '../types/path';

export interface EnergyMinimizationOptions {
  /** Weight for image energy (follow boundaries) */
  imageWeight: number;
  /** Weight for alignment energy (flow along tangent) */
  alignmentWeight: number;
  /** Weight for smoothness energy (curvature penalty) */
  smoothnessWeight: number;
  /** Weight for intent energy (obey user motion) */
  intentWeight: number;
  /** Corridor width multiplier */
  corridorWidthMultiplier: number;
  /** Maximum solver iterations */
  maxIterations: number;
  /** Convergence tolerance */
  tolerance: number;
}

export const DEFAULT_ENERGY_OPTIONS: EnergyMinimizationOptions = {
  imageWeight: 0.4,
  alignmentWeight: 0.3,
  smoothnessWeight: 0.1,
  intentWeight: 0.2,
  corridorWidthMultiplier: 1.0,
  maxIterations: 100,
  tolerance: 1e-4,
};

/**
 * Solve for optimal path from anchor to cursor
 */
export async function solvePath(
  anchor: Vec2,
  cursor: Vec2,
  fields: FieldSet,
  intent: IntentModel,
  previousPath: Path | null,
  options: Partial<EnergyMinimizationOptions> = {}
): Promise<Path> {
  const opts = { ...DEFAULT_ENERGY_OPTIONS, ...options };

  // Step 1: Define search corridor
  const corridor = buildCorridor(anchor, cursor, intent, fields.Q, opts);

  // Step 2: If previous path exists, reuse it as initialization
  const initialPath = previousPath
    ? clipToCorridor(previousPath, corridor)
    : null;

  // Step 3: Run incremental Dijkstra/A* in corridor
  const { distance, predecessor } = await incrementalShortestPath(
    anchor,
    cursor,
    corridor,
    fields,
    intent,
    opts,
    initialPath
  );

  // Step 4: Backtrack to get path
  const path = backtrack(predecessor, cursor, anchor, fields.Q.width, fields.Q.height);

  return path;
}

/**
 * Build search corridor (bounded region around user's attention)
 */
function buildCorridor(
  anchor: Vec2,
  cursor: Vec2,
  intent: IntentModel,
  confidenceField: { width: number; height: number; data: Float32Array },
  options: EnergyMinimizationOptions
): {
  center: Vec2[];
  width: number;
  bounds: { minX: number; maxX: number; minY: number; maxY: number };
} {
  // Use intent corridor if available, otherwise build from anchor to cursor
  const center = intent.corridorCenter.length > 0
    ? intent.corridorCenter
    : [anchor, cursor];

  // Adaptive width based on confidence
  const baseWidth = intent.corridorWidth * options.corridorWidthMultiplier;
  
  // Sample confidence along corridor to adapt width
  let avgConfidence = 0.5; // Default
  if (center.length > 0) {
    let sumConfidence = 0;
    let count = 0;
    for (const point of center) {
      const px = Math.floor(point.x);
      const py = Math.floor(point.y);
      if (px >= 0 && px < confidenceField.width && py >= 0 && py < confidenceField.height) {
        const idx = py * confidenceField.width + px;
        sumConfidence += confidenceField.data[idx];
        count++;
      }
    }
    if (count > 0) {
      avgConfidence = sumConfidence / count;
    }
  }

  // High confidence → narrow corridor, low confidence → wide corridor
  const adaptiveWidth = baseWidth * (1 + (1 - avgConfidence));

  // Compute bounds
  let minX = Infinity, maxX = -Infinity;
  let minY = Infinity, maxY = -Infinity;

  for (const point of center) {
    minX = Math.min(minX, point.x - adaptiveWidth);
    maxX = Math.max(maxX, point.x + adaptiveWidth);
    minY = Math.min(minY, point.y - adaptiveWidth);
    maxY = Math.max(maxY, point.y + adaptiveWidth);
  }

  // Clamp to image bounds
  minX = Math.max(0, Math.floor(minX));
  maxX = Math.min(confidenceField.width - 1, Math.ceil(maxX));
  minY = Math.max(0, Math.floor(minY));
  maxY = Math.min(confidenceField.height - 1, Math.ceil(maxY));

  return {
    center,
    width: adaptiveWidth,
    bounds: { minX, maxX, minY, maxY },
  };
}

/**
 * Clip path to corridor (for initialization)
 */
function clipToCorridor(
  path: Path,
  corridor: { bounds: { minX: number; maxX: number; minY: number; maxY: number } }
): Path | null {
  const clipped: Vec2[] = [];

  for (const point of path.points) {
    if (
      point.x >= corridor.bounds.minX &&
      point.x <= corridor.bounds.maxX &&
      point.y >= corridor.bounds.minY &&
      point.y <= corridor.bounds.maxY
    ) {
      clipped.push(point);
    }
  }

  return clipped.length > 0 ? { points: clipped } : null;
}

/**
 * Incremental shortest path solver (Dijkstra-like with energy costs)
 */
async function incrementalShortestPath(
  anchor: Vec2,
  cursor: Vec2,
  corridor: { bounds: { minX: number; maxX: number; minY: number; maxY: number } },
  fields: FieldSet,
  intent: IntentModel,
  options: EnergyMinimizationOptions,
  initialPath: Path | null
): Promise<{
  distance: Map<string, number>;
  predecessor: Map<string, Vec2 | null>;
}> {
  const { bounds } = corridor;
  const distance = new Map<string, number>();
  const predecessor = new Map<string, Vec2 | null>();
  const visited = new Set<string>();

  // Priority queue using min-heap
  const { MinHeap } = await import('./MinHeap');
  const queue = new MinHeap<{ x: number; y: number }>();

  // Initialize from anchor
  const anchorKey = `${Math.floor(anchor.x)},${Math.floor(anchor.y)}`;
  distance.set(anchorKey, 0);
  predecessor.set(anchorKey, null);
  queue.push(0, { x: anchor.x, y: anchor.y });

  // If initial path provided, seed queue with path points
  if (initialPath) {
    for (const point of initialPath.points) {
      const key = `${Math.floor(point.x)},${Math.floor(point.y)}`;
      if (!distance.has(key)) {
        distance.set(key, Infinity);
        queue.push(Infinity, { x: point.x, y: point.y });
      }
    }
  }

  // Dijkstra-like search
  while (!queue.isEmpty()) {
    // Extract minimum (O(log n) with heap)
    const item = queue.pop()!;
    const cost = item.priority;
    const { x, y } = item.data;

    const key = `${Math.floor(x)},${Math.floor(y)}`;
    if (visited.has(key)) continue;
    visited.add(key);

    // Check if reached cursor (within threshold)
    if (Math.hypot(x - cursor.x, y - cursor.y) < 2) {
      break;
    }

    // Explore neighbors (8-connected)
    for (let dy = -1; dy <= 1; dy++) {
      for (let dx = -1; dx <= 1; dx++) {
        if (dx === 0 && dy === 0) continue;

        const nx = x + dx;
        const ny = y + dy;

        // Check bounds
        if (nx < bounds.minX || nx > bounds.maxX || ny < bounds.minY || ny > bounds.maxY) {
          continue;
        }

        const neighborKey = `${Math.floor(nx)},${Math.floor(ny)}`;
        if (visited.has(neighborKey)) continue;

        // Compute edge cost (energy)
        const edgeCost = computeEdgeCost(
          { x, y },
          { x: nx, y: ny },
          fields,
          intent,
          options
        );

        const newCost = cost + edgeCost;

        if (!distance.has(neighborKey) || newCost < distance.get(neighborKey)!) {
          distance.set(neighborKey, newCost);
          predecessor.set(neighborKey, { x, y });
          queue.push(newCost, { x: nx, y: ny });
        }
      }
    }
  }

  return { distance, predecessor };
}

/**
 * Compute edge cost (energy) between two points
 */
function computeEdgeCost(
  from: Vec2,
  to: Vec2,
  fields: FieldSet,
  intent: IntentModel,
  options: EnergyMinimizationOptions
): number {
  const dx = to.x - from.x;
  const dy = to.y - from.y;
  const length = Math.hypot(dx, dy);
  const direction = length > 0 ? { x: dx / length, y: dy / length } : { x: 1, y: 0 };

  // Sample fields at midpoint
  const midX = (from.x + to.x) / 2;
  const midY = (from.y + to.y) / 2;

  // Image energy: prefer high B(x)
  const imageEnergy = computeImageEnergy(midX, midY, fields.B, options.imageWeight);

  // Alignment energy: prefer motion along T(x)
  const alignmentEnergy = computeAlignmentEnergy(
    midX,
    midY,
    direction,
    fields.T,
    options.alignmentWeight
  );

  // Smoothness energy: curvature penalty
  const smoothnessEnergy = computeSmoothnessEnergy(from, to, options.smoothnessWeight);

  // Intent energy: prefer paths in user's corridor
  const intentEnergy = computeIntentEnergy(
    midX,
    midY,
    intent,
    options.intentWeight
  );

  return imageEnergy + alignmentEnergy + smoothnessEnergy + intentEnergy;
}

/**
 * Image energy: E_image = ∫_C (1 - B(x)) ds
 */
function computeImageEnergy(
  x: number,
  y: number,
  boundaryField: { width: number; height: number; data: Float32Array },
  weight: number
): number {
  const px = Math.max(0, Math.min(boundaryField.width - 1, Math.floor(x)));
  const py = Math.max(0, Math.min(boundaryField.height - 1, Math.floor(y)));
  const idx = py * boundaryField.width + px;
  const B = boundaryField.data[idx];

  // Low B = high cost (prefer high B)
  return weight * (1 - B);
}

/**
 * Alignment energy: E_alignment = α ∫_C (1 - |ẋ · T(x)|) ds
 */
function computeAlignmentEnergy(
  x: number,
  y: number,
  direction: Vec2,
  orientationField: { width: number; height: number; tangent: Float32Array },
  weight: number
): number {
  const px = Math.max(0, Math.min(orientationField.width - 1, Math.floor(x)));
  const py = Math.max(0, Math.min(orientationField.height - 1, Math.floor(y)));
  const idx = py * orientationField.width + px;

  const tx = orientationField.tangent[idx * 2];
  const ty = orientationField.tangent[idx * 2 + 1];

  // Dot product: direction · T(x)
  const alignment = Math.abs(direction.x * tx + direction.y * ty);

  // Low alignment = high cost (prefer high alignment)
  return weight * (1 - alignment);
}

/**
 * Smoothness energy: E_smoothness = λ ∫_C κ(s)² ds
 */
function computeSmoothnessEnergy(
  from: Vec2,
  to: Vec2,
  weight: number
): number {
  // Simplified: use length as proxy for curvature
  // In full implementation, would compute actual curvature from path history
  const length = Math.hypot(to.x - from.x, to.y - from.y);
  
  // Small penalty for length (encourages shorter paths)
  return weight * length * 0.01;
}

/**
 * Intent energy: E_intent = β ∫_C distance(x, corridor)² ds
 */
function computeIntentEnergy(
  x: number,
  y: number,
  intent: IntentModel,
  weight: number
): number {
  if (intent.corridorCenter.length === 0) {
    return 0; // No corridor, no penalty
  }

  // Find closest point on corridor
  let minDistSq = Infinity;
  for (const point of intent.corridorCenter) {
    const dx = x - point.x;
    const dy = y - point.y;
    const distSq = dx * dx + dy * dy;
    minDistSq = Math.min(minDistSq, distSq);
  }

  // Distance from corridor
  const distFromCorridor = Math.sqrt(minDistSq);

  // Penalty increases with distance from corridor
  return weight * distFromCorridor * 0.1;
}

/**
 * Backtrack from cursor to anchor to get path
 */
function backtrack(
  predecessor: Map<string, Vec2 | null>,
  cursor: Vec2,
  anchor: Vec2,
  width: number,
  height: number
): Path {
  const path: Vec2[] = [];
  let current: Vec2 | null = { x: Math.floor(cursor.x), y: Math.floor(cursor.y) };

  while (current) {
    path.push({ ...current });
    
    const key = `${current.x},${current.y}`;
    const prev = predecessor.get(key);

    // Check if reached anchor
    if (prev && Math.hypot(prev.x - anchor.x, prev.y - anchor.y) < 2) {
      path.push(anchor);
      break;
    }

    current = prev;
  }

  // Reverse to get path from anchor to cursor
  path.reverse();

  // Compute arc-lengths
  const arcLengths = computeArcLengths(path);

  return {
    points: path,
    arcLengths,
  };
}

/**
 * Compute arc-length parameterization
 */
function computeArcLengths(path: Vec2[]): number[] {
  const arcLengths = new Array(path.length);
  arcLengths[0] = 0;

  for (let i = 1; i < path.length; i++) {
    const dx = path[i].x - path[i - 1].x;
    const dy = path[i].y - path[i - 1].y;
    arcLengths[i] = arcLengths[i - 1] + Math.hypot(dx, dy);
  }

  return arcLengths;
}

```

### Flow + Lock Modes

**Category:** Selection  
**Version:** VPRO-Aegis

*Flow mode (particle-like) and Lock mode (solver-like) implementations*

**File:** `solver/FlowLockModes.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * Aegis Lasso - Flow + Lock Modes
 * 
 * Implements the two modes that blend continuously:
 * - Flow Mode: Particle-like motion with anisotropic friction
 * - Lock Mode: Solver-like commitment with frozen segments
 * 
 * The blend happens per-pixel along the path based on confidence and override force.
 */

import type { Vec2, FieldSet, IntentModel } from '../types/fields';
import type { Path } from '../types/path';

export interface FlowLockOptions {
  /** Friction coefficient for flow mode */
  friction: number;
  /** Lock strength multiplier */
  lockStrengthMultiplier: number;
  /** Override sensitivity (how override force affects lock) */
  overrideSensitivity: number;
  /** Freeze ratio for lock mode (what % of path to freeze) */
  freezeRatio: number;
}

export const DEFAULT_FLOW_LOCK_OPTIONS: FlowLockOptions = {
  friction: 0.5,
  lockStrengthMultiplier: 1.0,
  overrideSensitivity: 0.7,
  freezeRatio: 0.3,
};

/**
 * Flow mode: Particle-like motion with anisotropic friction
 */
export function flowMode(
  userVelocity: Vec2,
  position: Vec2,
  fields: FieldSet,
  options: FlowLockOptions
): Vec2 {
  const { T, Q } = fields;

  // Get tangent and normal at position
  const tangent = getTangentAt(T, position.x, position.y);
  const normal = getNormalAt(T, position.x, position.y);
  const confidence = getConfidenceAt(Q, position.x, position.y);

  // Decompose user velocity
  const vTangentDot = userVelocity.x * tangent.x + userVelocity.y * tangent.y;
  const vTangent = {
    x: vTangentDot * tangent.x,
    y: vTangentDot * tangent.y,
  };
  const vNormal = {
    x: userVelocity.x - vTangent.x,
    y: userVelocity.y - vTangent.y,
  };

  // Anisotropic damping
  // Moving along tangent: no damping
  // Moving across normal: damping based on confidence
  const damping = 1 - options.friction * confidence;
  const v = {
    x: vTangent.x + damping * vNormal.x,
    y: vTangent.y + damping * vNormal.y,
  };

  // Integrate (assuming dt = 1 for now, would be actual time delta in real implementation)
  return {
    x: position.x + v.x,
    y: position.y + v.y,
  };
}

/**
 * Lock mode: Solver-like commitment with frozen segments
 */
export async function lockMode(
  anchor: Vec2,
  cursor: Vec2,
  currentPath: Path,
  fields: FieldSet,
  intent: IntentModel,
  lockStrength: number,
  solvePathFn: (anchor: Vec2, cursor: Vec2, fields: FieldSet, intent: IntentModel, previousPath: Path | null) => Promise<Path>
): Promise<Path> {
  if (currentPath.points.length === 0) {
    // No path yet, solve from scratch
    return solvePathFn(anchor, cursor, fields, intent, null);
  }

  // Compute committed segment (frozen)
  const totalLength = computePathLength(currentPath);
  const freezeLength = lockStrength * totalLength;

  // Find freeze point
  const freezePoint = findPointAtDistance(currentPath, freezeLength);

  // Keep frozen segment
  const frozenSegment: Vec2[] = currentPath.points.slice(0, freezePoint.index + 1);

  // Solve only elastic front (from freeze point to cursor)
  const elasticStart = freezePoint.point;
  const elasticPath = await solvePathFn(elasticStart, cursor, fields, intent, {
    points: currentPath.points.slice(freezePoint.index),
  });

  // Combine frozen + elastic
  return {
    points: [...frozenSegment, ...elasticPath.points.slice(1)], // Skip duplicate point
    arcLengths: computeArcLengths([...frozenSegment, ...elasticPath.points.slice(1)]),
  };
}

/**
 * Blend flow and lock modes continuously
 */
export function blendModes(
  position: Vec2,
  fields: FieldSet,
  intent: IntentModel,
  options: FlowLockOptions
): number {
  const { Q } = fields;
  const confidence = getConfidenceAt(Q, position.x, position.y);
  const override = intent.overrideForce;

  // Lock strength increases with confidence
  // Decreases with override force
  const lockStrength = confidence * (1 - override * options.overrideSensitivity);

  return Math.max(0, Math.min(1, lockStrength)); // Clamp to [0,1]
}

/**
 * Apply blended flow/lock to path
 */
export async function applyFlowLockBlend(
  anchor: Vec2,
  cursor: Vec2,
  currentPath: Path | null,
  userVelocity: Vec2,
  fields: FieldSet,
  intent: IntentModel,
  solvePathFn: (anchor: Vec2, cursor: Vec2, fields: FieldSet, intent: IntentModel, previousPath: Path | null) => Promise<Path>,
  options: FlowLockOptions = DEFAULT_FLOW_LOCK_OPTIONS
): Promise<Path> {
  // Compute blend factor at cursor position
  const blendFactor = blendModes(cursor, fields, intent, options);

  if (blendFactor < 0.3) {
    // Mostly flow mode
    if (currentPath && currentPath.points.length > 0) {
      // Update last point using flow mode
      const lastPoint = currentPath.points[currentPath.points.length - 1];
      const newPoint = flowMode(userVelocity, lastPoint, fields, options);
      return {
        points: [...currentPath.points.slice(0, -1), newPoint],
        arcLengths: computeArcLengths([...currentPath.points.slice(0, -1), newPoint]),
      };
    } else {
      // No path yet, start with flow
      const startPoint = anchor;
      const newPoint = flowMode(userVelocity, startPoint, fields, options);
      return {
        points: [startPoint, newPoint],
        arcLengths: [0, Math.hypot(newPoint.x - startPoint.x, newPoint.y - startPoint.y)],
      };
    }
  } else if (blendFactor > 0.7) {
    // Mostly lock mode
    return await lockMode(anchor, cursor, currentPath || { points: [], arcLengths: [] }, fields, intent, blendFactor, solvePathFn);
  } else {
    // Mixed mode: blend both
    const flowPath = currentPath
      ? (() => {
          const lastPoint = currentPath.points[currentPath.points.length - 1];
          const newPoint = flowMode(userVelocity, lastPoint, fields, options);
          return {
            points: [...currentPath.points.slice(0, -1), newPoint],
            arcLengths: computeArcLengths([...currentPath.points.slice(0, -1), newPoint]),
          };
        })()
      : null;

    const lockPath = lockMode(anchor, cursor, currentPath || { points: [], arcLengths: [] }, fields, intent, blendFactor, solvePathFn);

    // Interpolate between flow and lock paths
    return interpolatePaths(flowPath || { points: [anchor], arcLengths: [0] }, lockPath, blendFactor);
  }
}

/**
 * Helper: Get tangent at point
 */
function getTangentAt(
  orientationField: { width: number; height: number; tangent: Float32Array },
  x: number,
  y: number
): Vec2 {
  const { width, height, tangent } = orientationField;
  const px = Math.max(0, Math.min(width - 1, Math.floor(x)));
  const py = Math.max(0, Math.min(height - 1, Math.floor(y)));
  const idx = py * width + px;
  return {
    x: tangent[idx * 2],
    y: tangent[idx * 2 + 1],
  };
}

/**
 * Helper: Get normal at point
 */
function getNormalAt(
  orientationField: { width: number; height: number; normal: Float32Array },
  x: number,
  y: number
): Vec2 {
  const { width, height, normal } = orientationField;
  const px = Math.max(0, Math.min(width - 1, Math.floor(x)));
  const py = Math.max(0, Math.min(height - 1, Math.floor(y)));
  const idx = py * width + px;
  return {
    x: normal[idx * 2],
    y: normal[idx * 2 + 1],
  };
}

/**
 * Helper: Get confidence at point
 */
function getConfidenceAt(
  confidenceField: { width: number; height: number; data: Float32Array },
  x: number,
  y: number
): number {
  const { width, height, data } = confidenceField;
  const px = Math.max(0, Math.min(width - 1, Math.floor(x)));
  const py = Math.max(0, Math.min(height - 1, Math.floor(y)));
  const idx = py * width + px;
  return data[idx];
}

/**
 * Compute path length
 */
function computePathLength(path: Path): number {
  if (path.arcLengths && path.arcLengths.length > 0) {
    return path.arcLengths[path.arcLengths.length - 1];
  }

  let length = 0;
  for (let i = 1; i < path.points.length; i++) {
    const dx = path.points[i].x - path.points[i - 1].x;
```
