# Lucid Image V2 - Complete System

**Purpose:** Complete documentation of the ENTIRE Lucid Image V2 system including all UI, tools, panels, drawers, and supporting systems.

**Version:** V2  
**Status:** Complete System  
**Date:** 2025-01-27

---

## Overview

This section contains the COMPLETE Lucid Image V2 system:
- **Main Page:** ImagesPageV2.tsx with Director layout
- **UI System:** Drawer system, panels, toolbars
- **Tools:** All tools including clone/stamp, zoom/microscope, assets
- **Supporting Systems:** Canvas, Chronicle editor, asset management

---



## AI Components


### AIToolsPanel


**Category:** AI  
**File:** `components/panels/AIToolsPanel.tsx`


*AI tools panel for AI-powered features*


```typescript
import { Wand2, Sparkles, Lightbulb, Image as ImageIcon, Loader2, AlertCircle, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import { useState } from 'react';
import { geminiClient } from '../../lib/ai/GeminiClient';
import { PromptHelper } from '../../lib/ai/PromptHelper';
import { useProject } from '../../contexts/ProjectContext';
import { ImageExporter } from '../../lib/image/ImageExporter';

type AIPage = 'instruct' | 'generate' | 'enhance' | 'inpaint';

export function AIToolsPanel() {
  const { layers, setLayers, selectedLayer } = useProject();
  const [activePage, setActivePage] = useState<AIPage>('generate');
  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState('');
  const [negativePrompt, setNegativePrompt] = useState('');
  const [style, setStyle] = useState('photorealistic');
  const [lighting, setLighting] = useState('natural lighting');
  const [numberOfImages, setNumberOfImages] = useState(1);
  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [success, setSuccess] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const exporter = new ImageExporter();

  const pages: Array<{ id: AIPage; label: string; icon: React.ComponentType<any> }> = [
    { id: 'instruct', label: 'Instruct', icon: Wand2 },
    { id: 'generate', label: 'Generate', icon: Sparkles },
    { id: 'enhance', label: 'Enhance', icon: ImageIcon },
    { id: 'inpaint', label: 'Inpaint', icon: Wand2 },
  ];

  const handleGenerate = async () => {
    if (!prompt.trim()) {
      setError('Please enter a prompt');
      return;
    }

    if (!geminiClient.validateApiKey()) {
      setError('Gemini API key not configured. Please add VITE_GEMINI_API_KEY to your .env file.');
      return;
    }

    setIsGenerating(true);
    setError(null);
    setSuccess(null);

    try {
      const structuredPrompt = PromptHelper.buildPrompt({
        subject: prompt,
        style,
        lighting,
        quality: 'high quality, detailed, 4K',
        negativePrompt: negativePrompt || undefined,
      });

      const result = await geminiClient.generate({
        prompt: structuredPrompt.prompt,
        negativePrompt: structuredPrompt.negativePrompt,
        numberOfImages,
      });

      for (let i = 0; i < result.images.length; i++) {
        const img = result.images[i];

        const newLayer = {
          id: crypto.randomUUID(),
          projectId: 'default',
          name: `Generated: ${prompt.substring(0, 30)}${i > 0 ? ` (${i + 1})` : ''}`,
          type: 'raster' as const,
          visible: true,
          locked: false,
          opacity: 1,
          blendMode: 'normal',
          position: layers.length + i,
          bounds: {
            x: -img.width / 2,
            y: -img.height / 2,
            width: img.width,
            height: img.height,
          },
          transform: { rotation: 0, scaleX: 1, scaleY: 1 },
          modifierStack: [],
          dataUrl: img.dataUrl,
        };

        setLayers([...layers, newLayer]);
      }

      setSuccess(`Generated ${result.images.length} image(s) in ${(result.metadata.executionTime / 1000).toFixed(1)}s`);
      setPrompt('');
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to generate image');
    } finally {
      setIsGenerating(false);
    }
  };

  const handleEnhance = async () => {
    if (!selectedLayer || !selectedLayer.dataUrl) {
      setError('Please select a layer with an image');
      return;
    }

    if (!geminiClient.validateApiKey()) {
      setError('Gemini API key not configured');
      return;
    }

    setIsGenerating(true);
    setError(null);
    setSuccess(null);

    try {
      const result = await geminiClient.upscale(selectedLayer.dataUrl);

      const newLayer = {
        id: crypto.randomUUID(),
        projectId: 'default',
        name: `${selectedLayer.name} (Enhanced)`,
        type: 'raster' as const,
        visible: true,
        locked: false,
        opacity: 1,
        blendMode: 'normal',
        position: layers.length,
        bounds: {
          x: selectedLayer.bounds.x,
          y: selectedLayer.bounds.y,
          width: result.width,
          height: result.height,
        },
        transform: { ...selectedLayer.transform },
        modifierStack: [],
        dataUrl: result.dataUrl,
      };

      setLayers([...layers, newLayer]);
      setSuccess('Layer enhanced successfully');
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to enhance layer');
    } finally {
      setIsGenerating(false);
    }
  };

  const handleQuickAction = async (action: string) => {
    if (!selectedLayer || !selectedLayer.dataUrl) {
      setError('Please select a layer with an image');
      return;
    }

    if (!geminiClient.validateApiKey()) {
      setError('Gemini API key not configured');
      return;
    }

    setIsGenerating(true);
    setError(null);
    setSuccess(null);

    try {
      let actionPrompt = '';

      switch (action) {
        case 'remove-bg':
          actionPrompt = 'Remove the background and keep only the main subject on a transparent background';
          break;
        case 'enhance':
          actionPrompt = 'Enhance details, sharpness, and overall quality of the image';
          break;
        case 'fix-blemishes':
          actionPrompt = 'Remove blemishes, spots, and imperfections while maintaining natural appearance';
          break;
        case 'color-correct':
          actionPrompt = 'Correct colors, white balance, and overall tone for natural appearance';
          break;
        default:
          throw new Error('Unknown action');
      }

      const result = await geminiClient.edit({
        prompt: actionPrompt,
        image: selectedLayer.dataUrl,
        numberOfImages: 1,
      });

      if (result.images.length > 0) {
        const img = result.images[0];

        const newLayer = {
          id: crypto.randomUUID(),
          projectId: 'default',
          name: `${selectedLayer.name} (${action})`,
          type: 'raster' as const,
          visible: true,
          locked: false,
          opacity: 1,
          blendMode: 'normal',
          position: layers.length,
          bounds: {
            x: selectedLayer.bounds.x,
            y: selectedLayer.bounds.y,
            width: img.width,
            height: img.height,
          },
          transform: { ...selectedLayer.transform },
          modifierStack: [],
          dataUrl: img.dataUrl,
        };

        setLayers([...layers, newLayer]);
        setSuccess(`Applied ${action} successfully`);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : `Failed to apply ${action}`);
    } finally {
      setIsGenerating(false);
    }
  };

  const suggestions = prompt ? PromptHelper.suggestImprovements(prompt) : [];

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-[#1a1a1a] border-l border-gray-800">
      <div className="h-12 flex items-center justify-between px-4 border-b border-gray-800">
        <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4 text-[#673AB7]" />
        {!geminiClient.validateApiKey() && (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-yellow-500">
            <AlertCircle className="w-3 h-3" />
            <span>No API Key</span>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      <div className="flex border-b border-gray-800">
        {pages.map(({ id, label, icon: Icon }) => (
          <button
            key={id}
            onClick={() => setActivePage(id)}
            className={`flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-1 px-3 py-2 text-xs transition-colors ${
              activePage === id
                ? 'bg-[#673AB7] text-white'
                : 'text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-800'
            }`}
          >
            <Icon className="w-3 h-3" />
            {label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {error && (
        <div className="mx-4 mt-4 p-3 bg-red-900/20 border border-red-800 rounded text-red-400 text-xs flex items-start gap-2">
          <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
          <span>{error}</span>
        </div>
      )}

      {success && (
        <div className="mx-4 mt-4 p-3 bg-green-900/20 border border-green-800 rounded text-green-400 text-xs flex items-start gap-2">
          <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
          <span>{success}</span>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4">
        {activePage === 'instruct' && (
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white">Quick AI Actions</h3>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">Select a layer and apply instant AI improvements</p>

            <button
              onClick={() => handleQuickAction('remove-bg')}
              disabled={isGenerating || !selectedLayer}
              className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 disabled:bg-gray-900 disabled:text-gray-600 text-left rounded transition-colors"
            >
              <div className="text-sm text-white font-medium">Remove Background</div>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">Instantly isolate subject</div>
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={() => handleQuickAction('enhance')}
              disabled={isGenerating || !selectedLayer}
              className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 disabled:bg-gray-900 disabled:text-gray-600 text-left rounded transition-colors"
            >
              <div className="text-sm text-white font-medium">Enhance Details</div>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">AI sharpening & clarity</div>
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={() => handleQuickAction('fix-blemishes')}
              disabled={isGenerating || !selectedLayer}
              className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 disabled:bg-gray-900 disabled:text-gray-600 text-left rounded transition-colors"
            >
              <div className="text-sm text-white font-medium">Fix Blemishes</div>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">Remove unwanted spots</div>
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={() => handleQuickAction('color-correct')}
              disabled={isGenerating || !selectedLayer}
              className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 disabled:bg-gray-900 disabled:text-gray-600 text-left rounded transition-colors"
            >
              <div className="text-sm text-white font-medium">Color Correction</div>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">Auto white balance & tone</div>
            </button>

            {!selectedLayer && (
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 text-center mt-4">
                Select a layer to use quick actions
              </p>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {activePage === 'generate' && (
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div>
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 block mb-2">Prompt *</label>
              <textarea
                value={prompt}
                onChange={(e) => setPrompt(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="A serene mountain landscape at sunset, photorealistic, highly detailed..."
                className="w-full h-32 bg-gray-800 text-white text-sm px-3 py-2 rounded border border-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#673AB7] resize-none"
              />
            </div>

            {suggestions.length > 0 && (
              <div className="space-y-1">
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Suggestions:</p>
                {suggestions.map((suggestion, idx) => (
                  <p key={idx} className="text-xs text-yellow-500">• {suggestion}</p>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}

            <div>
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 block mb-2">Style</label>
              <select
                value={style}
                onChange={(e) => setStyle(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full bg-gray-800 text-white text-sm px-3 py-2 rounded border border-gray-700"
              >
                {PromptHelper.STYLES.map(s => (
                  <option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 block mb-2">Lighting</label>
              <select
                value={lighting}
                onChange={(e) => setLighting(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full bg-gray-800 text-white text-sm px-3 py-2 rounded border border-gray-700"
              >
                {PromptHelper.LIGHTING.map(l => (
                  <option key={l} value={l}>{l}</option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 block mb-2">
                Number of Images: {numberOfImages}
              </label>
              <input
                type="range"
                min="1"
                max="4"
                value={numberOfImages}
                onChange={(e) => setNumberOfImages(parseInt(e.target.value))}
                className="w-full"
              />
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">
                Each image costs ~$0.04
              </p>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 block mb-2">Negative Prompt (Optional)</label>
              <input
                type="text"
                value={negativePrompt}
                onChange={(e) => setNegativePrompt(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="blurry, low quality, distorted..."
                className="w-full bg-gray-800 text-white text-sm px-3 py-2 rounded border border-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#673AB7]"
              />
            </div>

            <button
              onClick={handleGenerate}
              disabled={isGenerating || !prompt.trim()}
              className="w-full py-3 bg-[#673AB7] hover:bg-[#7E57C2] disabled:bg-gray-700 disabled:text-gray-500 text-white rounded transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
            >
              {isGenerating ? (
                <>
                  <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
                  Generating...
                </>
              ) : (
                'Generate Image'
              )}
            </button>
          </div>
        )}

        {activePage === 'enhance' && (
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">
              Select a layer to enhance with AI-powered improvements
            </p>

            {selectedLayer ? (
              <>
                <div className="p-3 bg-gray-800 rounded">
                  <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">Selected Layer:</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-white font-medium">{selectedLayer.name}</p>
                </div>

                <button
                  onClick={handleEnhance}
                  disabled={isGenerating}
                  className="w-full py-3 bg-[#673AB7] hover:bg-[#7E57C2] disabled:bg-gray-700 disabled:text-gray-500 text-white rounded transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
                >
                  {isGenerating ? (
                    <>
                      <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
                      Enhancing...
                    </>
                  ) : (
                    'Enhance Layer'
                  )}
                </button>

                <div className="pt-4 border-t border-gray-800">
                  <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mb-3">Enhancement includes:</p>
                  <ul className="space-y-2">
                    <li className="text-sm text-gray-300 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-500" />
                      Sharpen Details
                    </li>
                    <li className="text-sm text-gray-300 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-500" />
                      Reduce Noise
                    </li>
                    <li className="text-sm text-gray-300 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-500" />
                      Improve Quality
                    </li>
                    <li className="text-sm text-gray-300 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-500" />
                      Preserve Details
                    </li>
                  </ul>
                </div>
              </>
            ) : (
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 text-center">
                No layer selected
              </p>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {activePage === 'inpaint' && (
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">
              Use the Magic Wand tool to select an area, then describe what should fill it
            </p>

            <div className="p-3 bg-yellow-900/20 border border-yellow-800 rounded text-yellow-400 text-xs">
              <p className="font-medium">Coming Soon</p>
              <p className="mt-1">Inpainting with mask support will be available in the next update</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```


### ICEPanel


**Category:** AI  
**File:** `components/panels/ICEPanel.tsx`


*Instructional Composition Environment panel*


```typescript
import { Wand2, Plus, Trash2, AlertCircle, Sparkles, Brain, Download } from 'lucide-react';
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import type { PromptLayer, MarkupLayer, CognitiveLoad } from '../../types/ice';
import { useProject } from '../../contexts/ProjectContext';
import { useSegmentation } from '../../contexts/SegmentationContext';

export function ICEPanel() {
  const { layers, selectedLayerId: projectSelectedLayerId } = useProject();
  const { selectionState } = useSegmentation();
  const [promptLayers, setPromptLayers] = useState<PromptLayer[]>([]);
  const [selectedPromptLayerId, setSelectedPromptLayerId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [markupLayers, setMarkupLayers] = useState<MarkupLayer[]>([]);
  const [globalPrompt, setGlobalPrompt] = useState('');
  const [cognitiveLoad, setCognitiveLoad] = useState<CognitiveLoad>({
    score: 0,
    factors: { layerCount: 0, markupCount: 0, promptLength: 0, complexity: 0 },
    warnings: [],
    suggestions: [],
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    if (layers.length > promptLayers.length) {
      const newLayers = layers
        .filter(l => !promptLayers.some(pl => pl.imageUrl === l.dataUrl) && l.dataUrl)
        .map((l, idx) => ({
          id: crypto.randomUUID(),
          title: l.name,
          imageUrl: l.dataUrl || '',
          prompt: '',
          negativePrompt: '',
          weight: 1,
          order: promptLayers.length + idx,
        }));
      if (newLayers.length > 0) {
        const updated = [...promptLayers, ...newLayers];
        setPromptLayers(updated);
        calculateCognitiveLoad(updated, markupLayers);
      }
    }
  }, [layers]);

  const addPromptLayer = () => {
    const selectedProjectLayer = layers.find(l => l.id === projectSelectedLayerId);
    const newLayer: PromptLayer = {
      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
      title: selectedProjectLayer?.name || `Layer ${promptLayers.length + 1}`,
      imageUrl: selectedProjectLayer?.dataUrl || '',
      prompt: '',
      negativePrompt: '',
      weight: 1,
      order: promptLayers.length,
    };
    const updated = [...promptLayers, newLayer];
    setPromptLayers(updated);
    calculateCognitiveLoad(updated, markupLayers);
  };

  const captureMarkup = () => {
    if (!selectedPromptLayerId || !selectionState.mask) return;

    const selectedPromptLayer = promptLayers.find(l => l.id === selectedPromptLayerId);
    if (!selectedPromptLayer) return;

    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    if (!ctx) return;

    canvas.width = selectionState.bounds?.width || 100;
    canvas.height = selectionState.bounds?.height || 100;

    const imageData = ctx.createImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);
    for (let i = 0; i < selectionState.mask.length; i++) {
      const idx = i * 4;
      imageData.data[idx] = 255;
      imageData.data[idx + 1] = 255;
      imageData.data[idx + 2] = 255;
      imageData.data[idx + 3] = selectionState.mask[i];
    }
    ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);

    const newMarkup: MarkupLayer = {
      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
      parentLayerId: selectedPromptLayerId,
      maskDataUrl: canvas.toDataURL(),
      prompt: '',
      color: `#${Math.floor(Math.random()*16777215).toString(16)}`,
      label: `Markup ${markupLayers.length + 1}`,
      tool: 'wand',
    };

    const updated = [...markupLayers, newMarkup];
    setMarkupLayers(updated);
    calculateCognitiveLoad(promptLayers, updated);
  };

  const removePromptLayer = (id: string) => {
    const updated = promptLayers.filter(l => l.id !== id);
    const updatedMarkups = markupLayers.filter(m => m.parentLayerId !== id);
    setPromptLayers(updated);
    setMarkupLayers(updatedMarkups);
    if (selectedPromptLayerId === id) setSelectedPromptLayerId(null);
    calculateCognitiveLoad(updated, updatedMarkups);
  };

  const updatePromptLayer = (id: string, updates: Partial<PromptLayer>) => {
    const updated = promptLayers.map(l => l.id === id ? { ...l, ...updates } : l);
    setPromptLayers(updated);
    calculateCognitiveLoad(updated, markupLayers);
  };

  const updateMarkup = (id: string, updates: Partial<MarkupLayer>) => {
    const updated = markupLayers.map(m => m.id === id ? { ...m, ...updates } : m);
    setMarkupLayers(updated);
    calculateCognitiveLoad(promptLayers, updated);
  };

  const removeMarkup = (id: string) => {
    const updated = markupLayers.filter(m => m.id !== id);
    setMarkupLayers(updated);
    calculateCognitiveLoad(promptLayers, updated);
  };

  const calculateCognitiveLoad = (layers: PromptLayer[], markups: MarkupLayer[]) => {
    const layerCount = layers.length;
    const markupCount = markups.length;
    const promptLength = layers.reduce((sum, l) => sum + l.prompt.length + l.negativePrompt.length, 0) +
                         markups.reduce((sum, m) => sum + m.prompt.length, 0) +
                         globalPrompt.length;
    const complexity = (layerCount * 10) + (markupCount * 15) + (promptLength / 100);

    const score = Math.min(100, (complexity / 150) * 100);

    const warnings: string[] = [];
    const suggestions: string[] = [];

    if (score > 75) {
      warnings.push('Cognitive load is very high');
      suggestions.push('Consider simplifying prompts or reducing layers');
    } else if (score > 50) {
      warnings.push('Cognitive load is moderate');
    }

    if (layerCount > 5) {
      suggestions.push('More than 5 layers may affect performance');
    }

    if (promptLength > 2000) {
      suggestions.push('Very long prompts may be truncated');
    }

    setCognitiveLoad({
      score: Math.round(score),
      factors: { layerCount, markupCount, promptLength, complexity: Math.round(complexity) },
      warnings,
      suggestions,
    });
  };

  const analyzePrompt = () => {
    console.log('Analyzing prompt composition...');
    console.log('Global:', globalPrompt);
    console.log('Layers:', promptLayers);
    console.log('Markups:', markupLayers);
  };

  const exportComposition = () => {
    const composition = {
      globalPrompt,
      promptLayers: promptLayers.map(l => ({
        title: l.title,
        prompt: l.prompt,
        negativePrompt: l.negativePrompt,
        weight: l.weight,
      })),
      markupLayers: markupLayers.map(m => ({
        label: m.label,
        prompt: m.prompt,
        parentLayer: promptLayers.find(l => l.id === m.parentLayerId)?.title,
      })),
      cognitiveLoad: cognitiveLoad.score,
    };

    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(composition, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = 'ice-composition.json';
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  };

  const generateImage = () => {
    console.log('Generating image with composed prompt...');
    console.log('This would send the composition to an AI image generation service');
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-[#1a1a1a] border-l border-gray-800">
      <div className="h-12 flex items-center justify-between px-4 border-b border-gray-800">
        <Wand2 className="w-4 h-4 text-[#03A9F4]" />
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
        <div className="p-4 space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 block mb-2">Global Prompt</label>
            <textarea
              value={globalPrompt}
              onChange={(e) => {
                setGlobalPrompt(e.target.value);
                calculateCognitiveLoad(promptLayers, markupLayers);
              }}
              placeholder="Overall description of what you want to generate..."
              className="w-full bg-gray-900 text-white text-sm px-3 py-2 rounded border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#03A9F4] focus:outline-none resize-none"
              rows={3}
            />
          </div>

          <div className="pt-4 border-t border-gray-800">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
              <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white">Prompt Layers ({promptLayers.length})</h3>
              <button
                onClick={addPromptLayer}
                className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded transition-colors"
                title="Add Layer"
              >
                <Plus className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
              </button>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-2">
              {promptLayers.map((layer) => (
                <div
                  key={layer.id}
                  className={`bg-gray-900 border rounded p-3 transition-colors ${
                    selectedPromptLayerId === layer.id
                      ? 'border-[#03A9F4]'
                      : 'border-gray-800 hover:border-gray-700'
                  }`}
                >
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      value={layer.title}
                      onChange={(e) => updatePromptLayer(layer.id, { title: e.target.value })}
                      className="flex-1 bg-transparent text-sm text-white font-semibold border-none outline-none"
                    />
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      <button
                        onClick={() => setSelectedPromptLayerId(layer.id)}
                        className={`p-1 rounded transition-colors ${
                          selectedPromptLayerId === layer.id
                            ? 'bg-[#03A9F4] text-white'
                            : 'hover:bg-gray-800 text-gray-400'
                        }`}
                        title="Select for markup"
                      >
                        <Sparkles className="w-3 h-3" />
                      </button>
                      <button
                        onClick={() => removePromptLayer(layer.id)}
                        className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded transition-colors"
                        title="Remove"
                      >
                        <Trash2 className="w-3 h-3 text-red-400" />
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    <textarea
                      value={layer.prompt}
                      onChange={(e) => updatePromptLayer(layer.id, { prompt: e.target.value })}
                      placeholder="Describe this layer..."
                      className="w-full bg-gray-800 text-white text-xs px-2 py-1.5 rounded border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#03A9F4] focus:outline-none resize-none"
                      rows={2}
                    />

                    <textarea
                      value={layer.negativePrompt}
                      onChange={(e) => updatePromptLayer(layer.id, { negativePrompt: e.target.value })}
                      placeholder="Negative prompt (what to avoid)..."
                      className="w-full bg-gray-800 text-white text-xs px-2 py-1.5 rounded border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#03A9F4] focus:outline-none resize-none"
                      rows={1}
                    />

                    <div>
                      <label className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 block mb-1">
                        Weight: {layer.weight.toFixed(1)}
                      </label>
                      <input
                        type="range"
                        min="0"
                        max="2"
                        step="0.1"
                        value={layer.weight}
                        onChange={(e) => updatePromptLayer(layer.id, { weight: parseFloat(e.target.value) })}
                        className="w-full"
                      />
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}

              {promptLayers.length === 0 && (
                <div className="text-center py-8 text-sm text-gray-500">
                  No prompt layers yet. Click + to add one.
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="pt-4 border-t border-gray-800">
            <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white mb-3">Markup Layers ({markupLayers.length})</h3>

            {selectedPromptLayerId && (
              <div className="mb-3 space-y-2">
                <div className="p-2 bg-[#03A9F4]/10 border border-[#03A9F4]/30 rounded text-xs text-gray-300">
                  <strong className="text-[#03A9F4]">Active:</strong> Use canvas tools to select area on{' '}
                  {promptLayers.find(l => l.id === selectedPromptLayerId)?.title}
                </div>
                {selectionState.mask && (
                  <button
                    onClick={captureMarkup}
                    className="w-full py-1.5 px-3 bg-[#03A9F4] hover:bg-[#0288D1] text-white text-xs rounded transition-colors"
                  >
                    Capture Current Selection as Markup
                  </button>
                )}
              </div>
            )}

            <div className="space-y-2">
              {markupLayers.map((markup) => (
                <div
                  key={markup.id}
                  className="bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 rounded p-2 space-y-2"
                >
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <div
                      className="w-6 h-6 rounded border-2 flex-shrink-0"
                      style={{ borderColor: markup.color, backgroundColor: `${markup.color}20` }}
                    />
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      value={markup.label}
                      onChange={(e) => updateMarkup(markup.id, { label: e.target.value })}
                      className="flex-1 bg-transparent text-xs text-white border-none outline-none"
                      placeholder="Label..."
                    />
                    <button
                      onClick={() => removeMarkup(markup.id)}
                      className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded transition-colors"
                    >
                      <Trash2 className="w-3 h-3 text-red-400" />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <textarea
                    value={markup.prompt}
                    onChange={(e) => updateMarkup(markup.id, { prompt: e.target.value })}
                    placeholder="Describe this marked area..."
                    className="w-full bg-gray-800 text-white text-xs px-2 py-1.5 rounded border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#03A9F4] focus:outline-none resize-none"
                    rows={2}
                  />
                </div>
              ))}

              {markupLayers.length === 0 && (
                <div className="text-center py-4 text-xs text-gray-500">
                  {selectedPromptLayerId
                    ? 'Use canvas tools to create a selection, then capture it'
                    : 'Select a prompt layer to add markups'}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="pt-4 border-t border-gray-800">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
              <Brain className="w-4 h-4 text-[#4CAF50]" />
              <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white">Cognitive Load</h3>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-3">
              <div>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">Complexity</span>
                  <span className={`text-xs font-semibold ${
                    cognitiveLoad.score > 75 ? 'text-red-400' :
                    cognitiveLoad.score > 50 ? 'text-yellow-400' :
                    'text-green-400'
                  }`}>
                    {cognitiveLoad.score}%
                  </span>
                </div>
                <div className="w-full bg-gray-800 rounded-full h-2 overflow-hidden">
                  <div
                    className={`h-full transition-all ${
                      cognitiveLoad.score > 75 ? 'bg-red-500' :
                      cognitiveLoad.score > 50 ? 'bg-yellow-500' :
                      'bg-green-500'
                    }`}
                    style={{ width: `${cognitiveLoad.score}%` }}
                  />
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-xs">
                <div className="bg-gray-900 p-2 rounded">
                  <div className="text-gray-500">Layers</div>
                  <div className="text-white font-semibold">{cognitiveLoad.factors.layerCount}</div>
                </div>
                <div className="bg-gray-900 p-2 rounded">
                  <div className="text-gray-500">Markups</div>
                  <div className="text-white font-semibold">{cognitiveLoad.factors.markupCount}</div>
                </div>
                <div className="bg-gray-900 p-2 rounded">
                  <div className="text-gray-500">Prompt Length</div>
                  <div className="text-white font-semibold">{cognitiveLoad.factors.promptLength}</div>
                </div>
                <div className="bg-gray-900 p-2 rounded">
                  <div className="text-gray-500">Complexity</div>
                  <div className="text-white font-semibold">{cognitiveLoad.factors.complexity}</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {cognitiveLoad.warnings.length > 0 && (
                <div className="space-y-1">
                  {cognitiveLoad.warnings.map((warning, i) => (
                    <div key={i} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-xs text-yellow-400">
                      <AlertCircle className="w-3 h-3 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                      <span>{warning}</span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}

              {cognitiveLoad.suggestions.length > 0 && (
                <div className="space-y-1">
                  {cognitiveLoad.suggestions.map((suggestion, i) => (
                    <div key={i} className="text-xs text-gray-400">
                      • {suggestion}
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-800 space-y-2">
        <button
          onClick={analyzePrompt}
          className="w-full py-2 px-4 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 text-white text-sm rounded transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
        >
          <Brain className="w-4 h-4" />
          Analyze Prompt
        </button>

        <button
          onClick={exportComposition}
          className="w-full py-2 px-4 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 text-white text-sm rounded transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
        >
          <Download className="w-4 h-4" />
          Export Composition
        </button>

        <button
          onClick={generateImage}
          disabled={promptLayers.length === 0}
          className="w-full py-2 px-4 bg-[#03A9F4] hover:bg-[#0288D1] disabled:bg-gray-700 disabled:text-gray-500 text-white text-sm font-semibold rounded transition-colors"
        >
          Generate Image
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```



## Effects Components


### EffectsPanel


**Category:** Effects  
**File:** `components/panels/EffectsPanel.tsx`


*Effects panel for filters and adjustments*


```typescript
import { Sparkles, Search, Eye, EyeOff, Sliders, RotateCcw } from 'lucide-react';
import { useState } from 'react';
import { FilterEngine, FilterPreset } from '../../lib/effects/FilterEngine';
import { useProject } from '../../contexts/ProjectContext';

const filterCategories = [
  { id: 'all', label: 'All' },
  { id: 'blur', label: 'Blur' },
  { id: 'sharpen', label: 'Sharpen' },
  { id: 'noise', label: 'Noise' },
  { id: 'artistic', label: 'Artistic' },
  { id: 'stylize', label: 'Stylize' },
  { id: 'lighting', label: 'Lighting' },
];

export function EffectsPanel() {
  const { selectedLayerId, layers, setLayers } = useProject();
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState('all');
  const [selectedFilter, setSelectedFilter] = useState<FilterPreset | null>(null);
  const [filterParameters, setFilterParameters] = useState<Record<string, any>>({});
  const [previewEnabled, setPreviewEnabled] = useState(true);
  const [isApplying, setIsApplying] = useState(false);

  const filterEngine = new FilterEngine();
  const allPresets = FilterEngine.getDefaultPresets();

  const filteredPresets = allPresets.filter(preset => {
    const matchesCategory = selectedCategory === 'all' || preset.category === selectedCategory;
    const matchesSearch = preset.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());
    return matchesCategory && matchesSearch;
  });

  const selectedLayer = layers.find(l => l.id === selectedLayerId);

  const applyFilter = async () => {
    if (!selectedFilter || !selectedLayer || !selectedLayer.dataUrl) return;

    setIsApplying(true);

    try {
      // Convert dataUrl to ImageData
      const img = new Image();
      img.src = selectedLayer.dataUrl;
      
      await new Promise((resolve) => {
        img.onload = resolve;
      });

      const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
      canvas.width = img.width;
      canvas.height = img.height;
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      if (!ctx) return;

      ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
      const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, img.width, img.height);

      // Apply filter
      const filteredData = filterEngine.applyFilter(
        imageData,
        selectedFilter.type,
        { ...selectedFilter.parameters, ...filterParameters }
      );

      // Convert back to dataUrl
      ctx.putImageData(filteredData, 0, 0);
      const newDataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');

      // Create new layer with filtered result
      const newLayer = {
        ...selectedLayer,
        id: crypto.randomUUID(),
        name: `${selectedLayer.name} (${selectedFilter.name})`,
        position: layers.length,
        dataUrl: newDataUrl,
      };

      setLayers([...layers, newLayer]);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to apply filter:', error);
    } finally {
      setIsApplying(false);
    }
  };

  const resetParameters = () => {
    setFilterParameters({});
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-[#1a1a1a] border-l border-gray-800">
      <div className="h-12 flex items-center justify-between px-4 border-b border-gray-800">
        <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4 text-[#673AB7]" />
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
          <button
            onClick={() => setPreviewEnabled(!previewEnabled)}
            className={`p-1.5 rounded transition-colors ${
              previewEnabled ? 'bg-[#673AB7] text-white' : 'text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-800'
            }`}
            title="Toggle Preview"
          >
            {previewEnabled ? <Eye className="w-4 h-4" /> : <EyeOff className="w-4 h-4" />}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-800">
        <div className="relative mb-3">
          <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
          <input
            type="text"
            placeholder="Search effects..."
            value={searchQuery}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
            className="w-full bg-gray-900 text-white text-sm pl-10 pr-4 py-2 rounded border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#673AB7] focus:outline-none"
          />
        </div>

        <div className="flex gap-1 overflow-x-auto">
          {filterCategories.map((cat) => (
            <button
              key={cat.id}
              onClick={() => setSelectedCategory(cat.id)}
              className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded whitespace-nowrap transition-colors ${
                selectedCategory === cat.id
                  ? 'bg-[#673AB7] text-white'
                  : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700'
              }`}
            >
              {cat.label}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
        <div className="p-4 space-y-2">
          {filteredPresets.map((preset) => (
            <button
              key={preset.id}
              onClick={() => {
                setSelectedFilter(preset);
                setFilterParameters(preset.parameters);
              }}
              className={`w-full text-left p-3 rounded transition-colors ${
                selectedFilter?.id === preset.id
                  ? 'bg-[#673AB7] text-white'
                  : 'bg-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-800 text-gray-300'
              }`}
            >
              <div className="text-sm font-medium">{preset.name}</div>
              <div className="text-xs opacity-75 capitalize">{preset.category}</div>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {selectedFilter && (
        <div className="border-t border-gray-800 p-4 space-y-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white">{selectedFilter.name}</h3>
            <button
              onClick={resetParameters}
              className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded transition-colors"
              title="Reset Parameters"
            >
              <RotateCcw className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
            </button>
          </div>

          <div className="space-y-3">
            {Object.entries(selectedFilter.parameters).map(([key, defaultValue]) => (
              <div key={key}>
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 block mb-1 capitalize">
                  {key}: {filterParameters[key] ?? defaultValue}
                </label>
                <input
                  type="range"
                  min={key === 'radius' ? 0 : key === 'amount' ? 0 : -100}
                  max={key === 'radius' ? 20 : key === 'amount' ? 5 : 100}
                  step={key === 'amount' ? 0.1 : 1}
                  value={filterParameters[key] ?? defaultValue}
                  onChange={(e) => setFilterParameters({
                    ...filterParameters,
                    [key]: parseFloat(e.target.value)
                  })}
                  className="w-full"
                />
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          <button
            onClick={applyFilter}
            disabled={isApplying || !selectedLayer}
            className="w-full py-2 px-4 bg-[#673AB7] hover:bg-[#7E57C2] disabled:bg-gray-700 disabled:text-gray-500 text-white text-sm rounded transition-colors"
          >
            {isApplying ? 'Applying...' : 'Apply Effect'}
          </button>

          {!selectedLayer && (
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 text-center">
              Select a layer to apply effects
            </p>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```

### LassoSettingsPanel


**Category:** Selection  
**File:** `components/panels/LassoSettingsPanel.tsx`


*Lasso tool settings panel*


```typescript
/**
 * ULTIMATE LASSO - Comprehensive Settings Panel
 * Right drawer panel for all lasso settings
 * 
 * Features:
 * - System selector with visual cards
 * - Quick presets
 * - Detailed settings for edge detection, path, anchoring, visualization
 * - Real-time metrics display
 * - Keyboard shortcuts reference
 */

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import {
  Scissors,
  Magnet,
  Sparkles,
  Route,
  Wand2,
  Brain,
  Cpu,
  Zap,
  ChevronDown,
  ChevronRight,
  RotateCcw,
  Settings2,
  Target,
  Eye,
  Activity,
  Sliders,
  HelpCircle,
} from 'lucide-react';

// ============================================================================
// LASSO SYSTEM DEFINITIONS
// ============================================================================

const LASSO_SYSTEMS = [
  { id: 'classic', name: 'Classic', description: 'Pure Dijkstra, manual control', color: '#00d9ff', icon: Scissors },
  { id: 'photoshop', name: 'Photoshop', description: 'Auto-anchoring by frequency', color: '#ff6b6b', icon: Magnet },
  { id: 'elastic', name: 'Elastic', description: 'Progressive rubber-band ⭐', color: '#ffd700', icon: Sparkles },
  { id: 'edge-trail', name: 'Edge Trail', description: 'Quality-based golden nodes', color: '#00ff88', icon: Route },
  { id: 'predictive', name: 'Predictive', description: 'Direction-aware prediction', color: '#a855f7', icon: Wand2 },
  { id: 'adaptive', name: 'Adaptive', description: 'Content and speed-aware', color: '#f97316', icon: Brain },
  { id: 'ai-assisted', name: 'AI Assisted', description: 'LLM object detection', color: '#ec4899', icon: Cpu },
  { id: 'snake', name: 'Snake', description: 'Active contour energy', color: '#22d3ee', icon: Zap },
];

const PRESETS = [
  { id: 'sharp', name: 'Sharp Edges', sensitivity: 70, radius: 15, influence: 0.05 },
  { id: 'soft', name: 'Soft Edges', sensitivity: 30, radius: 15, influence: 0.20 },
  { id: 'fast', name: 'Fast Mode', sensitivity: 50, radius: 8, influence: 0.10 },
  { id: 'precise', name: 'Precise', sensitivity: 60, radius: 25, influence: 0.03 },
];

// ============================================================================
// TYPES
// ============================================================================

interface LassoSettingsPanelProps {
  variant: string;
  searchRadius: number;
  edgeSensitivity: number;
  cursorInfluence: number;
  autoAnchor: boolean;
  onVariantChange: (variant: string) => void;
  onSearchRadiusChange: (value: number) => void;
  onEdgeSensitivityChange: (value: number) => void;
  onCursorInfluenceChange: (value: number) => void;
  onAutoAnchorChange: (value: boolean) => void;
  metrics?: {
    pathComputeMs: number;
    totalNodes: number;
    edgeQuality: number;
    fps: number;
  };
}

// ============================================================================
// COLLAPSIBLE SECTION
// ============================================================================

function Section({ 
  title, 
  icon: Icon, 
  defaultOpen = true, 
  children 
}: { 
  title: string;
  icon: React.ComponentType<any>;
  defaultOpen?: boolean;
  children: React.ReactNode;
}) {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(defaultOpen);

  return (
    <div className="border-b border-gray-800">
      <button
        onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
        className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between text-sm font-medium text-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-800/50 transition-colors"
      >
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Icon className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-cyan-400" />
          {title}
        </div>
        {isOpen ? <ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4" /> : <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />}
      </button>
      {isOpen && <div className="px-4 pb-4 space-y-3">{children}</div>}
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// MAIN COMPONENT
// ============================================================================

export function LassoSettingsPanel({
  variant,
  searchRadius,
  edgeSensitivity,
  cursorInfluence,
  autoAnchor,
  onVariantChange,
  onSearchRadiusChange,
  onEdgeSensitivityChange,
  onCursorInfluenceChange,
  onAutoAnchorChange,
  metrics,
}: LassoSettingsPanelProps) {
  const currentSystem = LASSO_SYSTEMS.find(s => s.id === variant) || LASSO_SYSTEMS[2];

  return (
    <div className="h-full overflow-y-auto bg-[#1a1a1a]">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-800">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-200">Ultimate Lasso</h3>
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              onSearchRadiusChange(12);
              onEdgeSensitivityChange(55);
              onCursorInfluenceChange(0.10);
              onAutoAnchorChange(true);
            }}
            className="h-7 px-2 text-xs text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded transition-colors flex items-center gap-1"
          >
            <RotateCcw className="w-3 h-3" />
            Reset
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Current System Badge */}
        <div 
          className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border"
          style={{ 
            backgroundColor: `${currentSystem.color}10`,
            borderColor: `${currentSystem.color}30`,
          }}
        >
          <currentSystem.icon className="w-4 h-4" style={{ color: currentSystem.color }} />
          <div className="flex-1">
            <div className="text-sm font-medium text-white">{currentSystem.name}</div>
            <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">{currentSystem.description}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* System Selector */}
      <Section title="Lasso Variant" icon={Scissors} defaultOpen={true}>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
          {LASSO_SYSTEMS.map((system) => {
            const Icon = system.icon;
            const isActive = variant === system.id;
            
            return (
              <button
                key={system.id}
                onClick={() => onVariantChange(system.id)}
                className={`
                  relative p-3 rounded-lg border transition-all
                  ${isActive 
                    ? 'bg-gray-800 border-2' 
                    : 'bg-gray-900/50 border hover:bg-gray-800/70'}
                `}
                style={{
                  borderColor: isActive ? system.color : '#374151',
                }}
              >
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                  <Icon 
                    className="w-3.5 h-3.5" 
                    style={{ color: isActive ? system.color : '#9CA3AF' }}
                  />
                  <span className={`text-xs font-medium ${isActive ? 'text-white' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>
                    {system.name}
                  </span>
                </div>
                <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-500 leading-tight">{system.description}</p>
                {isActive && (
                  <div 
                    className="absolute top-1 right-1 w-2 h-2 rounded-full animate-pulse"
                    style={{ backgroundColor: system.color }}
                  />
                )}
              </button>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      </Section>

      {/* Quick Presets */}
      <Section title="Quick Presets" icon={Zap} defaultOpen={false}>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
          {PRESETS.map((preset) => (
            <button
              key={preset.id}
              onClick={() => {
                onSearchRadiusChange(preset.radius);
                onEdgeSensitivityChange(preset.sensitivity);
                onCursorInfluenceChange(preset.influence);
              }}
              className="px-3 py-2 bg-gray-900/50 hover:bg-gray-800 border border-gray-800 rounded-lg text-xs text-gray-300 hover:text-white transition-all"
            >
              {preset.name}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </Section>

      {/* Edge Detection */}
      <Section title="Edge Detection" icon={Settings2} defaultOpen={true}>
        {/* Search Radius */}
        <div className="space-y-1.5">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <span className="text-xs text-gray-300">Search Radius</span>
            <span className="text-xs text-cyan-400 font-mono">{searchRadius}px</span>
          </div>
          <input
            type="range"
            min={5}
            max={50}
            value={searchRadius}
            onChange={(e) => onSearchRadiusChange(Number(e.target.value))}
            className="w-full h-1.5 bg-gray-800 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer"
            style={{
              background: `linear-gradient(to right, #00d9ff 0%, #00d9ff ${((searchRadius - 5) / 45) * 100}%, #374151 ${((searchRadius - 5) / 45) * 100}%, #374151 100%)`,
            }}
          />
          <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">Detection area around cursor</p>
        </div>

        {/* Edge Sensitivity */}
        <div className="space-y-1.5">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <span className="text-xs text-gray-300">Edge Sensitivity</span>
            <span className="text-xs text-yellow-400 font-mono">{edgeSensitivity}%</span>
          </div>
          <input
            type="range"
            min={0}
            max={100}
            value={edgeSensitivity}
            onChange={(e) => onEdgeSensitivityChange(Number(e.target.value))}
            className="w-full h-1.5 bg-gray-800 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer"
            style={{
              background: `linear-gradient(to right, #ffd700 0%, #ffd700 ${edgeSensitivity}%, #374151 ${edgeSensitivity}%, #374151 100%)`,
            }}
          />
          <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">Higher = snaps to weaker edges</p>
        </div>

        {/* Cursor Influence */}
        <div className="space-y-1.5">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <span className="text-xs text-gray-300">Cursor Influence</span>
            <span className="text-xs text-purple-400 font-mono">{Math.round(cursorInfluence * 100)}%</span>
          </div>
          <input
            type="range"
            min={0}
            max={50}
            value={Math.round(cursorInfluence * 100)}
            onChange={(e) => onCursorInfluenceChange(Number(e.target.value) / 100)}
            className="w-full h-1.5 bg-gray-800 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer"
            style={{
              background: `linear-gradient(to right, #a855f7 0%, #a855f7 ${cursorInfluence * 200}%, #374151 ${cursorInfluence * 200}%, #374151 100%)`,
            }}
          />
          <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">Path direction toward cursor</p>
        </div>
      </Section>

      {/* Anchoring */}
      <Section title="Anchoring" icon={Target} defaultOpen={true}>
        {/* Auto-Anchor Toggle */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 bg-gray-900/50 rounded-lg">
          <span className="text-xs text-gray-300">Auto-Anchor</span>
          <button
            onClick={() => onAutoAnchorChange(!autoAnchor)}
            className={`
              relative w-10 h-5 rounded-full transition-colors
              ${autoAnchor ? 'bg-green-600' : 'bg-gray-700'}
            `}
          >
            <div 
              className={`
                absolute top-0.5 left-0.5 w-4 h-4 bg-white rounded-full transition-transform
                ${autoAnchor ? 'translate-x-5' : 'translate-x-0'}
              `}
            />
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Mode Description */}
        <div className="px-3 py-2 bg-gray-900/30 rounded-lg">
          <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 leading-relaxed">
            {variant === 'elastic' && 'Progressive rubber-band anchoring with visual gradient'}
            {variant === 'photoshop' && 'Automatic anchoring based on distance and time'}
            {variant === 'edge-trail' && 'Places anchors when edge quality degrades'}
            {variant === 'classic' && 'Manual anchoring only - full control'}
            {variant === 'predictive' && 'Predicts path direction from cursor movement'}
            {variant === 'adaptive' && 'Adapts to image content and cursor speed'}
            {variant === 'ai-assisted' && 'AI detects objects, lasso refines edges'}
            {variant === 'snake' && 'Energy-minimizing contour that evolves to edges'}
          </p>
        </div>
      </Section>

      {/* Performance Metrics */}
      {metrics && (
        <Section title="Performance" icon={Activity} defaultOpen={false}>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
            <div className="bg-black/30 rounded-lg p-3">
              <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mb-1">Path Compute</p>
              <p className="text-lg font-mono text-cyan-400">
                {metrics.pathComputeMs.toFixed(1)}<span className="text-xs text-gray-500">ms</span>
              </p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-black/30 rounded-lg p-3">
              <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mb-1">Total Nodes</p>
              <p className="text-lg font-mono text-purple-400">{metrics.totalNodes}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-black/30 rounded-lg p-3">
              <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mb-1">Edge Quality</p>
              <p className="text-lg font-mono text-green-400">
                {metrics.edgeQuality.toFixed(0)}<span className="text-xs text-gray-500">%</span>
              </p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-black/30 rounded-lg p-3">
              <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mb-1">FPS</p>
              <p className="text-lg font-mono text-yellow-400">{metrics.fps || 60}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </Section>
      )}

      {/* Help */}
      <Section title="Keyboard Shortcuts" icon={HelpCircle} defaultOpen={false}>
        <div className="space-y-2 text-[10px]">
          <div className="flex justify-between text-gray-400">
            <kbd className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-gray-800 rounded text-gray-300">Click</kbd>
            <span>Place anchor / Start</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex justify-between text-gray-400">
            <kbd className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-gray-800 rounded text-gray-300">Double-click</kbd>
            <span>Complete selection</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex justify-between text-gray-400">
            <kbd className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-gray-800 rounded text-gray-300">Backspace</kbd>
            <span>Undo anchor</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex justify-between text-gray-400">
            <kbd className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-gray-800 rounded text-gray-300">Escape</kbd>
            <span>Cancel selection</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex justify-between text-gray-400">
            <kbd className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-gray-800 rounded text-gray-300">Enter</kbd>
            <span>Complete selection</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-4 px-3 py-2 bg-cyan-500/10 border border-cyan-500/30 rounded-lg">
          <p className="text-[10px] text-cyan-400 leading-relaxed">
            <strong>Pro Tip:</strong> Use the <strong className="text-white">Elastic</strong> variant 
            for the best balance between control and automation. The golden gradient shows 
            progressive anchoring!
          </p>
        </div>
      </Section>

      {/* About */}
      <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-800">
        <div className="bg-purple-500/10 border border-purple-500/30 rounded-lg p-3">
          <h4 className="text-[10px] font-semibold text-purple-400 mb-1.5">Ultimate Lasso System</h4>
          <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-500 leading-relaxed">
            8 different magnetic lasso algorithms, each optimized for different use cases. 
            Based on Intelligent Scissors (Mortensen & Barrett, 1995) with modern enhancements.
          </p>
          <div className="mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-1">
            {LASSO_SYSTEMS.map(sys => (
              <div 
                key={sys.id}
                className="flex items-center gap-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-[8px]"
                style={{ 
                  backgroundColor: `${sys.color}20`,
                  color: sys.color,
                }}
              >
                <sys.icon className="w-2.5 h-2.5" />
                {sys.name}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


```


### MagicWandDeveloperConsole


**Category:** Selection  
**File:** `components/image/MagicWandDeveloperConsole.tsx`


*Magic wand developer console*


```typescript
/**
 * Magic Wand Developer Console
 * 
 * Comprehensive developer console for magic wand with:
 * - System selection and comparison
 * - Pipeline builder
 * - Hybrid builder
 * - Diagnostics and profiling
 * - Debug visualization
 * - Custom algorithms
 * - Presets management
 */

import React, { useState, useMemo, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';
import { 
  Settings, 
  Layers, 
  Zap, 
  BarChart3, 
  Eye, 
  GitCompare, 
  FileCode, 
  Save, 
  Download,
  ChevronRight,
  ChevronDown,
  Play,
  Pause,
  Plus,
  Trash2,
  RefreshCw,
  Activity,
  Cpu,
  Clock,
  Target,
  Upload,
  Copy,
  Check,
  AlertCircle,
  Info,
  GripVertical,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { useSegmentation } from '../../contexts/SegmentationContext';
import { systemRegistry, SEGMENTATION_SYSTEMS, type SystemMetadata } from '../../lib/segmentation/SystemRegistry';
import { HybridBlender, type BlendMode } from '../../lib/segmentation/SegmentationEngine';
import type { WandOptions } from '../../types/segmentation';

// ============================================================================
// TYPES
// ============================================================================

interface DeveloperConsoleProps {
  isOpen?: boolean; // Optional - defaults to true when used in drawer
  onClose?: () => void; // Optional - drawer handles closing
}

interface PipelineStage {
  id: string;
  systemId: string;
  parameters: Record<string, any>;
  enabled: boolean;
  operation: 'replace' | 'add' | 'subtract' | 'intersect';
}

interface HybridConfig {
  primarySystem: string;
  secondarySystem: string;
  blendMode: BlendMode;
  weight: number;
}

interface DiagnosticData {
  executionTime: number;
  memoryUsage: number;
  pixelCount: number;
  confidence: number;
  phases: Array<{ name: string; time: number; percentage: number }>;
  systemMetrics: Record<string, any>;
}

interface Preset {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  systemId: string;
  parameters: Record<string, any>;
  createdAt: number;
}

// ============================================================================
// MAIN COMPONENT
// ============================================================================

export function MagicWandDeveloperConsole({ isOpen = true, onClose }: DeveloperConsoleProps) {
  const { wandOptions, setWandOptions } = useSegmentation();
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<string>('system-selector');
  const [selectedSystem, setSelectedSystem] = useState<string>('ultra-fast-flood-fill');
  const [pipeline, setPipeline] = useState<PipelineStage[]>([
    { id: '1', systemId: 'ultra-fast-flood-fill', parameters: { tolerance: 32 }, enabled: true, operation: 'replace' },
  ]);
  const [hybridConfig, setHybridConfig] = useState<HybridConfig>({
    primarySystem: 'ultra-fast-flood-fill',
    secondarySystem: 'dual-zone-selection',
    blendMode: 'weighted',
    weight: 0.5,
  });
  const [diagnostics, setDiagnostics] = useState<DiagnosticData | null>(null);
  const [isProfiling, setIsProfiling] = useState(false);
  const [profilingHistory, setProfilingHistory] = useState<DiagnosticData[]>([]);
  const [presets, setPresets] = useState<Preset[]>([]);
  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [comparisonSystems, setComparisonSystems] = useState<string[]>([
    'ultra-fast-flood-fill',
    'variance-guided-seed-expansion',
  ]);

  // When used in drawer, always render (drawer manages visibility)
  // When used standalone, respect isOpen prop
  if (isOpen === false) return null;

  const tabs = [
    { id: 'system-selector', label: 'System Selector', icon: <Settings className="w-4 h-4" /> },
    { id: 'pipeline-builder', label: 'Pipeline Builder', icon: <Layers className="w-4 h-4" /> },
    { id: 'hybrid-builder', label: 'Hybrid Builder', icon: <Zap className="w-4 h-4" /> },
    { id: 'diagnostics', label: 'Diagnostics', icon: <Activity className="w-4 h-4" /> },
    { id: 'profiler', label: 'Performance Profiler', icon: <BarChart3 className="w-4 h-4" /> },
    { id: 'debug-visualizer', label: 'Debug Visualizer', icon: <Eye className="w-4 h-4" /> },
    { id: 'system-comparison', label: 'System Comparison', icon: <GitCompare className="w-4 h-4" /> },
    { id: 'presets', label: 'Presets Manager', icon: <Save className="w-4 h-4" /> },
    { id: 'export-import', label: 'Export/Import', icon: <Download className="w-4 h-4" /> },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-gray-900">
      {/* Compact Tabs - scrollable horizontally */}
      <div className="flex border-b border-gray-700 overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin shrink-0">
        {tabs.map((tab) => (
          <button
            key={tab.id}
            onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.id)}
            className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium transition-colors whitespace-nowrap ${
              activeTab === tab.id
                ? 'text-purple-400 border-b-2 border-purple-400 bg-purple-400/10'
                : 'text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-800/50'
            }`}
            title={tab.label}
          >
            {tab.icon}
            <span className="hidden sm:inline">{tab.label}</span>
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Content - scrollable */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-3">
          {activeTab === 'system-selector' && (
            <SystemSelectorTab
              selectedSystem={selectedSystem}
              onSelectSystem={setSelectedSystem}
              selectedCategory={selectedCategory}
              onSelectCategory={setSelectedCategory}
              wandOptions={wandOptions}
              onUpdateOptions={setWandOptions}
            />
          )}
          {activeTab === 'pipeline-builder' && (
            <PipelineBuilderTab
              pipeline={pipeline}
              onUpdatePipeline={setPipeline}
            />
          )}
          {activeTab === 'hybrid-builder' && (
            <HybridBuilderTab
              hybridConfig={hybridConfig}
              onUpdateConfig={setHybridConfig}
            />
          )}
          {activeTab === 'diagnostics' && (
            <DiagnosticsTab
              diagnostics={diagnostics}
            />
          )}
          {activeTab === 'profiler' && (
            <ProfilerTab
              isProfiling={isProfiling}
              onToggleProfiling={setIsProfiling}
              history={profilingHistory}
            />
          )}
          {activeTab === 'debug-visualizer' && (
            <DebugVisualizerTab />
          )}
          {activeTab === 'system-comparison' && (
            <SystemComparisonTab
              selectedSystems={comparisonSystems}
              onUpdateSystems={setComparisonSystems}
            />
          )}
          {activeTab === 'presets' && (
            <PresetsTab
              presets={presets}
              onUpdatePresets={setPresets}
              currentSystem={selectedSystem}
              currentOptions={wandOptions}
            />
          )}
          {activeTab === 'export-import' && (
            <ExportImportTab
              pipeline={pipeline}
              hybridConfig={hybridConfig}
              presets={presets}
            />
          )}
        </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// SYSTEM SELECTOR TAB
// ============================================================================

function SystemSelectorTab({
  selectedSystem,
  onSelectSystem,
  selectedCategory,
  onSelectCategory,
  wandOptions,
  onUpdateOptions,
}: {
  selectedSystem: string;
  onSelectSystem: (id: string) => void;
  selectedCategory: string | null;
  onSelectCategory: (cat: string | null) => void;
  wandOptions: WandOptions;
  onUpdateOptions: (options: Partial<WandOptions>) => void;
}) {
  const systems = useMemo(() => systemRegistry.getAllSystems(), []);
  const selectedSystemData = useMemo(() => 
    systems.find(s => s.id === selectedSystem), 
    [systems, selectedSystem]
  );

  const categories = useMemo(() => {
    const cats = new Set(systems.map(s => s.category));
    return Array.from(cats);
  }, [systems]);

  const filteredSystems = useMemo(() => {
    if (!selectedCategory) return systems;
    return systems.filter(s => s.category === selectedCategory);
  }, [systems, selectedCategory]);

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div>
        <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-4">Select Segmentation System</h3>
        
        {/* Category Filter */}
        <div className="flex gap-2 mb-4 flex-wrap">
          <button
            onClick={() => onSelectCategory(null)}
            className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs rounded-lg transition-colors ${
              !selectedCategory 
                ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white' 
                : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-700'
            }`}
          >
            All ({systems.length})
          </button>
          {categories.map(cat => (
            <button
              key={cat}
              onClick={() => onSelectCategory(cat)}
              className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs rounded-lg transition-colors ${
                selectedCategory === cat 
                  ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white' 
                  : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-700'
              }`}
            >
              {cat.replace('-', ' ').replace(/\b\w/g, l => l.toUpperCase())}
              {' '}({systems.filter(s => s.category === cat).length})
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* System Grid */}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6">
          {filteredSystems.map((system) => (
            <SystemCard
              key={system.id}
              system={system}
              isSelected={selectedSystem === system.id}
              onSelect={() => onSelectSystem(system.id)}
            />
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* System Details */}
      {selectedSystemData && (
        <div className="border border-gray-700 rounded-lg p-4 bg-gray-800/50">
          <SystemDetailsPanel
            system={selectedSystemData}
            wandOptions={wandOptions}
            onUpdateOptions={onUpdateOptions}
          />
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

function SystemCard({
  system,
  isSelected,
  onSelect,
}: {
  system: SystemMetadata;
  isSelected: boolean;
  onSelect: () => void;
}) {
  return (
    <button
      onClick={onSelect}
      className={`p-4 rounded-lg border-2 transition-all text-left ${
        isSelected
          ? 'border-purple-500 bg-purple-500/10'
          : 'border-gray-700 bg-gray-800/50 hover:border-gray-600'
      }`}
    >
      <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-2">
        <h4 className="font-semibold text-white text-sm">{system.name}</h4>
        <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${
          system.implementation === 'complete' ? 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400' :
          system.implementation === 'partial' ? 'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400' :
          'bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400'
        }`}>
          {system.implementation}
        </span>
      </div>
      <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mb-3 line-clamp-2">{system.description}</p>
      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs text-gray-500">
        <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
          <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
          {system.performance.avgTime}ms
        </span>
        <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
          <Target className="w-3 h-3" />
          {(system.performance.accuracy * 100).toFixed(0)}%
        </span>
        {system.performance.gpuAccelerated && (
          <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-purple-400">
            <Zap className="w-3 h-3" />
            GPU
          </span>
        )}
      </div>
    </button>
  );
}

function SystemDetailsPanel({
  system,
  wandOptions,
  onUpdateOptions,
}: {
  system: SystemMetadata;
  wandOptions: WandOptions;
  onUpdateOptions: (options: Partial<WandOptions>) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
      <div className="space-y-4">
        <div>
          <h4 className="font-semibold text-white mb-2">{system.name}</h4>
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">{system.description}</p>
        </div>

        {/* Performance Metrics */}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
          <MetricCard icon={<Clock className="w-4 h-4" />} label="Avg Time" value={`${system.performance.avgTime}ms`} />
          <MetricCard icon={<Target className="w-4 h-4" />} label="Accuracy" value={`${(system.performance.accuracy * 100).toFixed(1)}%`} />
          <MetricCard icon={<Cpu className="w-4 h-4" />} label="Memory" value={system.performance.memoryEfficient ? 'Efficient' : 'Standard'} />
          <MetricCard icon={<Zap className="w-4 h-4" />} label="GPU" value={system.performance.gpuAccelerated ? 'Yes' : 'No'} />
        </div>

        {/* Capabilities */}
        <div>
          <h5 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300 mb-2">Capabilities</h5>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
            {system.capabilities.colorSpaces.map(cs => (
              <span key={cs} className="px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400">
                {cs.toUpperCase()}
              </span>
            ))}
            {system.capabilities.varianceGuided && (
              <span className="px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-400">Variance-Guided</span>
            )}
            {system.capabilities.textureAware && (
              <span className="px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded bg-green-500/20 text-green-400">Texture-Aware</span>
            )}
            {system.capabilities.edgeRespecting && (
              <span className="px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded bg-orange-500/20 text-orange-400">Edge-Respecting</span>
            )}
            {system.capabilities.multiSeed && (
              <span className="px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded bg-cyan-500/20 text-cyan-400">Multi-Seed</span>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Parameters */}
      <div>
        <h5 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300 mb-3">Parameters</h5>
        <div className="space-y-4 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto pr-2">
          {Object.entries(system.parameters).map(([key, param]) => (
            <ParameterControl
              key={key}
              name={key}
              param={param}
              value={wandOptions[key as keyof WandOptions] ?? param.default}
