```typescript
              onChange={(value) => onUpdateOptions({ [key]: value } as Partial<WandOptions>)}
            />
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function MetricCard({ icon, label, value }: { icon: React.ReactNode; label: string; value: string }) {
  return (
    <div className="p-3 rounded-lg bg-gray-800/50 border border-gray-700">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
        <div className="text-gray-400">{icon}</div>
        <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{label}</span>
      </div>
      <div className="text-base font-semibold text-white">{value}</div>
    </div>
  );
}

function ParameterControl({
  name,
  param,
  value,
  onChange,
}: {
  name: string;
  param: SystemMetadata['parameters'][string];
  value: any;
  onChange: (value: any) => void;
}) {
  const displayName = name.replace(/([A-Z])/g, ' $1').replace(/^./, str => str.toUpperCase());
  
  return (
    <div>
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
        <label className="text-sm text-gray-300">{displayName}</label>
        {param.type === 'number' && (
          <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-mono">{value}</span>
        )}
      </div>
      <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">{param.description}</p>
      
      {param.type === 'number' && (
        <input
          type="range"
          min={param.min}
          max={param.max}
          step={param.step}
          value={value}
          onChange={(e) => onChange(parseFloat(e.target.value))}
          className="w-full accent-purple-500"
        />
      )}
      {param.type === 'enum' && (
        <select
          value={value}
          onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)}
          className="w-full bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded-lg p-2 text-sm text-white"
        >
          {param.options?.map(opt => (
            <option key={opt} value={opt}>{opt}</option>
          ))}
        </select>
      )}
      {param.type === 'boolean' && (
        <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
          <input
            type="checkbox"
            checked={value}
            onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.checked)}
            className="rounded accent-purple-500"
          />
          <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Enabled</span>
        </label>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// PIPELINE BUILDER TAB
// ============================================================================

function PipelineBuilderTab({ 
  pipeline, 
  onUpdatePipeline 
}: { 
  pipeline: PipelineStage[]; 
  onUpdatePipeline: (p: PipelineStage[]) => void;
}) {
  const systems = useMemo(() => systemRegistry.getAllSystems(), []);

  const addStage = () => {
    const newStage: PipelineStage = {
      id: Date.now().toString(),
      systemId: 'ultra-fast-flood-fill',
      parameters: { tolerance: 32 },
      enabled: true,
      operation: pipeline.length === 0 ? 'replace' : 'add',
    };
    onUpdatePipeline([...pipeline, newStage]);
  };

  const removeStage = (id: string) => {
    onUpdatePipeline(pipeline.filter(s => s.id !== id));
  };

  const updateStage = (id: string, updates: Partial<PipelineStage>) => {
    onUpdatePipeline(pipeline.map(s => s.id === id ? { ...s, ...updates } : s));
  };

  const moveStage = (id: string, direction: 'up' | 'down') => {
    const idx = pipeline.findIndex(s => s.id === id);
    if (idx < 0) return;
    
    const newIdx = direction === 'up' ? idx - 1 : idx + 1;
    if (newIdx < 0 || newIdx >= pipeline.length) return;
    
    const newPipeline = [...pipeline];
    [newPipeline[idx], newPipeline[newIdx]] = [newPipeline[newIdx], newPipeline[idx]];
    onUpdatePipeline(newPipeline);
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Pipeline Builder</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Chain multiple segmentation systems together</p>
        </div>
        <button
          onClick={addStage}
          className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-white transition-colors"
        >
          <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
          Add Stage
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Pipeline Visualization */}
      <div className="space-y-3">
        {pipeline.map((stage, idx) => (
          <div key={stage.id} className="relative">
            {idx > 0 && (
              <div className="absolute -top-3 left-8 w-0.5 h-3 bg-purple-500/50" />
            )}
            <div className={`p-4 rounded-lg border-2 ${
              stage.enabled ? 'border-gray-700 bg-gray-800/50' : 'border-gray-800 bg-gray-900/50 opacity-50'
            }`}>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <GripVertical className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
                  <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-purple-600/20 flex items-center justify-center text-purple-400 font-semibold text-sm">
                    {idx + 1}
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="flex-1 grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                  <select
                    value={stage.systemId}
                    onChange={(e) => updateStage(stage.id, { systemId: e.target.value })}
                    className="bg-gray-700 border border-gray-600 rounded-lg p-2 text-sm text-white"
                  >
                    {systems.map(sys => (
                      <option key={sys.id} value={sys.id}>{sys.name}</option>
                    ))}
                  </select>

                  {idx > 0 && (
                    <select
                      value={stage.operation}
                      onChange={(e) => updateStage(stage.id, { operation: e.target.value as any })}
                      className="bg-gray-700 border border-gray-600 rounded-lg p-2 text-sm text-white"
                    >
                      <option value="add">Add (Union)</option>
                      <option value="subtract">Subtract</option>
                      <option value="intersect">Intersect</option>
                      <option value="replace">Replace</option>
                    </select>
                  )}

                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                      <input
                        type="checkbox"
                        checked={stage.enabled}
                        onChange={(e) => updateStage(stage.id, { enabled: e.target.checked })}
                        className="rounded accent-purple-500"
                      />
                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Enabled</span>
                    </label>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => moveStage(stage.id, 'up')}
                    disabled={idx === 0}
                    className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-gray-400 hover:text-white disabled:opacity-30"
                  >
                    <ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4 rotate-180" />
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => moveStage(stage.id, 'down')}
                    disabled={idx === pipeline.length - 1}
                    className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-gray-400 hover:text-white disabled:opacity-30"
                  >
                    <ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4" />
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => removeStage(stage.id)}
                    className="p-1.5 hover:bg-red-500/20 rounded text-gray-400 hover:text-red-400"
                  >
                    <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}

        {pipeline.length === 0 && (
          <div className="text-center py-12 text-gray-500">
            <Layers className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-4 opacity-50" />
            <p>No stages in pipeline. Click "Add Stage" to begin.</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {pipeline.length > 0 && (
        <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3 pt-4 border-t border-gray-700">
          <button
            onClick={() => onUpdatePipeline([])}
            className="px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"
          >
            Clear All
          </button>
          <button className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-white transition-colors">
            <Play className="w-4 h-4" />
            Run Pipeline
          </button>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// HYBRID BUILDER TAB
// ============================================================================

function HybridBuilderTab({ 
  hybridConfig, 
  onUpdateConfig 
}: { 
  hybridConfig: HybridConfig; 
  onUpdateConfig: (c: HybridConfig) => void;
}) {
  const systems = useMemo(() => systemRegistry.getAllSystems(), []);
  
  const blendModes: { value: BlendMode; label: string; description: string }[] = [
    { value: 'add', label: 'Add (Union)', description: 'Combine both selections' },
    { value: 'subtract', label: 'Subtract', description: 'Remove secondary from primary' },
    { value: 'intersect', label: 'Intersect', description: 'Keep overlapping areas only' },
    { value: 'xor', label: 'Exclusive Or', description: 'Keep non-overlapping areas' },
    { value: 'weighted', label: 'Weighted Blend', description: 'Blend based on weight slider' },
    { value: 'max', label: 'Maximum', description: 'Take maximum at each pixel' },
    { value: 'min', label: 'Minimum', description: 'Take minimum at each pixel' },
    { value: 'multiply', label: 'Multiply', description: 'Multiplicative blend' },
    { value: 'screen', label: 'Screen', description: 'Screen blend mode' },
    { value: 'softLight', label: 'Soft Light', description: 'Soft light blend' },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div>
        <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Hybrid Builder</h3>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Combine two segmentation systems with custom blending</p>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
        {/* Primary System */}
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-purple-400 uppercase tracking-wide">Primary System</h4>
          <select
            value={hybridConfig.primarySystem}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateConfig({ ...hybridConfig, primarySystem: e.target.value })}
            className="w-full bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded-lg p-3 text-sm text-white"
          >
            {systems.map(sys => (
              <option key={sys.id} value={sys.id}>{sys.name}</option>
            ))}
          </select>
          <div className="p-3 rounded-lg bg-purple-500/10 border border-purple-500/30">
            <p className="text-xs text-purple-300">
              {systems.find(s => s.id === hybridConfig.primarySystem)?.description}
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Blend Mode */}
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-orange-400 uppercase tracking-wide">Blend Mode</h4>
          <select
            value={hybridConfig.blendMode}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateConfig({ ...hybridConfig, blendMode: e.target.value as BlendMode })}
            className="w-full bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded-lg p-3 text-sm text-white"
          >
            {blendModes.map(mode => (
              <option key={mode.value} value={mode.value}>{mode.label}</option>
            ))}
          </select>
          <div className="p-3 rounded-lg bg-orange-500/10 border border-orange-500/30">
            <p className="text-xs text-orange-300">
              {blendModes.find(m => m.value === hybridConfig.blendMode)?.description}
            </p>
          </div>

          {hybridConfig.blendMode === 'weighted' && (
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Weight</span>
                <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-mono">{(hybridConfig.weight * 100).toFixed(0)}%</span>
              </div>
              <input
                type="range"
                min="0"
                max="1"
                step="0.01"
                value={hybridConfig.weight}
                onChange={(e) => onUpdateConfig({ ...hybridConfig, weight: parseFloat(e.target.value) })}
                className="w-full accent-orange-500"
              />
              <div className="flex justify-between text-xs text-gray-500">
                <span>Primary</span>
                <span>Secondary</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Secondary System */}
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-cyan-400 uppercase tracking-wide">Secondary System</h4>
          <select
            value={hybridConfig.secondarySystem}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateConfig({ ...hybridConfig, secondarySystem: e.target.value })}
            className="w-full bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded-lg p-3 text-sm text-white"
          >
            {systems.map(sys => (
              <option key={sys.id} value={sys.id}>{sys.name}</option>
            ))}
          </select>
          <div className="p-3 rounded-lg bg-cyan-500/10 border border-cyan-500/30">
            <p className="text-xs text-cyan-300">
              {systems.find(s => s.id === hybridConfig.secondarySystem)?.description}
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Visual Preview */}
      <div className="mt-6 p-4 rounded-lg bg-gray-800/50 border border-gray-700">
        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300 mb-4">Blend Preview</h4>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
          <div className="w-24 h-24 rounded-lg bg-purple-500/30 flex items-center justify-center text-purple-400 text-xs font-medium">
            Primary
          </div>
          <div className="text-2xl text-gray-500">
            {hybridConfig.blendMode === 'add' ? '+' :
             hybridConfig.blendMode === 'subtract' ? '-' :
             hybridConfig.blendMode === 'intersect' ? '∩' :
             hybridConfig.blendMode === 'xor' ? '⊕' :
             hybridConfig.blendMode === 'weighted' ? `${(hybridConfig.weight * 100).toFixed(0)}%` :
             '→'}
          </div>
          <div className="w-24 h-24 rounded-lg bg-cyan-500/30 flex items-center justify-center text-cyan-400 text-xs font-medium">
            Secondary
          </div>
          <div className="text-2xl text-gray-500">=</div>
          <div className="w-24 h-24 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500/30 to-cyan-500/30 flex items-center justify-center text-white text-xs font-medium">
            Result
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3 pt-4 border-t border-gray-700">
        <button className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-white transition-colors">
          <Play className="w-4 h-4" />
          Run Hybrid
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// DIAGNOSTICS TAB
// ============================================================================

function DiagnosticsTab({ diagnostics }: { diagnostics: DiagnosticData | null }) {
  const mockDiagnostics: DiagnosticData = diagnostics || {
    executionTime: 23.5,
    memoryUsage: 2.4,
    pixelCount: 45672,
    confidence: 0.94,
    phases: [
      { name: 'Initialize', time: 0.5, percentage: 2 },
      { name: 'Flood Fill', time: 18.2, percentage: 77 },
      { name: 'Create Mask', time: 2.1, percentage: 9 },
      { name: 'Find Edges', time: 1.8, percentage: 8 },
      { name: 'Calculate Bounds', time: 0.9, percentage: 4 },
    ],
    systemMetrics: {
      queueOperations: 156234,
      colorComparisons: 342156,
      peakQueueSize: 4521,
    },
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div>
        <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Diagnostics</h3>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Real-time execution metrics and debug information</p>
      </div>

      {/* Key Metrics */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
        <MetricCard icon={<Clock className="w-4 h-4" />} label="Execution Time" value={`${mockDiagnostics.executionTime.toFixed(1)}ms`} />
        <MetricCard icon={<Cpu className="w-4 h-4" />} label="Memory Usage" value={`${mockDiagnostics.memoryUsage.toFixed(1)}MB`} />
        <MetricCard icon={<Target className="w-4 h-4" />} label="Pixels Selected" value={mockDiagnostics.pixelCount.toLocaleString()} />
        <MetricCard icon={<Activity className="w-4 h-4" />} label="Confidence" value={`${(mockDiagnostics.confidence * 100).toFixed(1)}%`} />
      </div>

      {/* Phase Breakdown */}
      <div className="p-4 rounded-lg bg-gray-800/50 border border-gray-700">
        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300 mb-4">Execution Phases</h4>
        <div className="space-y-3">
          {mockDiagnostics.phases.map((phase, idx) => (
            <div key={idx}>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">{phase.name}</span>
                <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">{phase.time.toFixed(1)}ms ({phase.percentage}%)</span>
              </div>
              <div className="h-2 bg-gray-700 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                <div 
                  className="h-full bg-purple-500 rounded-full transition-all"
                  style={{ width: `${phase.percentage}%` }}
                />
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* System Metrics */}
      <div className="p-4 rounded-lg bg-gray-800/50 border border-gray-700">
        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300 mb-4">Internal Metrics</h4>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
          {Object.entries(mockDiagnostics.systemMetrics).map(([key, value]) => (
            <div key={key} className="p-3 rounded-lg bg-gray-900/50">
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">
                {key.replace(/([A-Z])/g, ' $1').replace(/^./, s => s.toUpperCase())}
              </div>
              <div className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">
                {typeof value === 'number' ? value.toLocaleString() : value}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// PROFILER TAB
// ============================================================================

function ProfilerTab({ 
  isProfiling, 
  onToggleProfiling,
  history,
}: { 
  isProfiling: boolean; 
  onToggleProfiling: (p: boolean) => void;
  history: DiagnosticData[];
}) {
  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Performance Profiler</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Track and analyze segmentation performance over time</p>
        </div>
        <button
          onClick={() => onToggleProfiling(!isProfiling)}
          className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
            isProfiling 
              ? 'bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white' 
              : 'bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 text-white'
          }`}
        >
          {isProfiling ? <Pause className="w-4 h-4" /> : <Play className="w-4 h-4" />}
          {isProfiling ? 'Stop Profiling' : 'Start Profiling'}
        </button>
      </div>

      {isProfiling && (
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 p-3 rounded-lg bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/30">
          <Activity className="w-4 h-4 text-red-400 animate-pulse" />
          <span className="text-sm text-red-300">Profiling active - Performance may be affected</span>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Placeholder for chart */}
      <div className="h-64 rounded-lg bg-gray-800/50 border border-gray-700 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-center text-gray-500">
          <BarChart3 className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-4 opacity-50" />
          <p>Performance chart will appear here</p>
          <p className="text-xs mt-1">Start profiling to collect data</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* History Table */}
      <div className="p-4 rounded-lg bg-gray-800/50 border border-gray-700">
        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300 mb-4">Recent Sessions</h4>
        {history.length === 0 ? (
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 text-center py-4">No profiling history yet</p>
        ) : (
          <table className="w-full text-sm">
            <thead>
              <tr className="text-gray-400 text-left">
                <th className="pb-2">Time</th>
                <th className="pb-2">Duration</th>
                <th className="pb-2">Pixels</th>
                <th className="pb-2">Confidence</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody className="text-gray-300">
              {/* Placeholder rows */}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// DEBUG VISUALIZER TAB
// ============================================================================

function DebugVisualizerTab() {
  const [visualMode, setVisualMode] = useState<'mask' | 'edges' | 'gradient' | 'confidence'>('mask');
  const [showOverlay, setShowOverlay] = useState(true);

  const modes = [
    { value: 'mask', label: 'Selection Mask', color: 'purple' },
    { value: 'edges', label: 'Edge Pixels', color: 'cyan' },
    { value: 'gradient', label: 'Gradient Mask', color: 'orange' },
    { value: 'confidence', label: 'Confidence Map', color: 'green' },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Debug Visualizer</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Visualize internal segmentation data</p>
        </div>
        <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
          <input
            type="checkbox"
            checked={showOverlay}
            onChange={(e) => setShowOverlay(e.target.checked)}
            className="rounded accent-purple-500"
          />
          <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Show Overlay</span>
        </label>
      </div>

      {/* Mode Selector */}
      <div className="flex gap-2">
        {modes.map(mode => (
          <button
            key={mode.value}
            onClick={() => setVisualMode(mode.value as any)}
            className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
              visualMode === mode.value
                ? `bg-${mode.color}-600 text-white`
                : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700'
            }`}
            style={{
              backgroundColor: visualMode === mode.value 
                ? mode.color === 'purple' ? '#9333ea' 
                : mode.color === 'cyan' ? '#06b6d4'
                : mode.color === 'orange' ? '#f97316'
                : '#22c55e'
                : undefined
            }}
          >
            {mode.label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Visualization Area */}
      <div className="aspect-video rounded-lg bg-gray-800/50 border border-gray-700 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-center text-gray-500">
          <Eye className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-4 opacity-50" />
          <p>Debug visualization will appear here</p>
          <p className="text-xs mt-1">Make a selection to view debug data</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Legend */}
      <div className="p-4 rounded-lg bg-gray-800/50 border border-gray-700">
        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300 mb-3">Legend</h4>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <div className="w-4 h-4 rounded bg-purple-500" />
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Selected</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <div className="w-4 h-4 rounded bg-cyan-500" />
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Edges</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <div className="w-4 h-4 rounded bg-gradient-to-r from-red-500 to-green-500" />
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Gradient</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <div className="w-4 h-4 rounded bg-gray-600" />
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Unselected</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// SYSTEM COMPARISON TAB
// ============================================================================

function SystemComparisonTab({ 
  selectedSystems, 
  onUpdateSystems 
}: { 
  selectedSystems: string[]; 
  onUpdateSystems: (s: string[]) => void;
}) {
  const systems = useMemo(() => systemRegistry.getAllSystems(), []);

  const toggleSystem = (id: string) => {
    if (selectedSystems.includes(id)) {
      onUpdateSystems(selectedSystems.filter(s => s !== id));
    } else if (selectedSystems.length < 4) {
      onUpdateSystems([...selectedSystems, id]);
    }
  };

  const comparedSystems = useMemo(() => 
    systems.filter(s => selectedSystems.includes(s.id)),
    [systems, selectedSystems]
  );

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div>
        <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">System Comparison</h3>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Compare up to 4 systems side by side</p>
      </div>

      {/* System Selector */}
      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
        {systems.map(sys => (
          <button
            key={sys.id}
            onClick={() => toggleSystem(sys.id)}
            disabled={!selectedSystems.includes(sys.id) && selectedSystems.length >= 4}
            className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs rounded-lg transition-colors ${
              selectedSystems.includes(sys.id)
                ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white'
                : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700 disabled:opacity-30'
            }`}
          >
            {sys.name}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Comparison Table */}
      {comparedSystems.length > 0 && (
        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
          <table className="w-full text-sm">
            <thead>
              <tr className="border-b border-gray-700">
                <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 text-gray-400">Property</th>
                {comparedSystems.map(sys => (
                  <th key={sys.id} className="text-left py-3 px-4 text-purple-400">{sys.name}</th>
                ))}
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              <tr className="border-b border-gray-800">
                <td className="py-3 px-4 text-gray-300">Avg Time</td>
                {comparedSystems.map(sys => (
                  <td key={sys.id} className="py-3 px-4 text-white">{sys.performance.avgTime}ms</td>
                ))}
              </tr>
              <tr className="border-b border-gray-800">
                <td className="py-3 px-4 text-gray-300">Accuracy</td>
                {comparedSystems.map(sys => (
                  <td key={sys.id} className="py-3 px-4 text-white">{(sys.performance.accuracy * 100).toFixed(1)}%</td>
                ))}
              </tr>
              <tr className="border-b border-gray-800">
                <td className="py-3 px-4 text-gray-300">Memory Efficient</td>
                {comparedSystems.map(sys => (
                  <td key={sys.id} className="py-3 px-4">
                    {sys.performance.memoryEfficient 
                      ? <Check className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" />
                      : <XIcon className="w-4 h-4 text-red-400" />
                    }
                  </td>
                ))}
              </tr>
              <tr className="border-b border-gray-800">
                <td className="py-3 px-4 text-gray-300">GPU Accelerated</td>
                {comparedSystems.map(sys => (
                  <td key={sys.id} className="py-3 px-4">
                    {sys.performance.gpuAccelerated 
                      ? <Check className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" />
                      : <XIcon className="w-4 h-4 text-red-400" />
                    }
                  </td>
                ))}
              </tr>
              <tr className="border-b border-gray-800">
                <td className="py-3 px-4 text-gray-300">Color Spaces</td>
                {comparedSystems.map(sys => (
                  <td key={sys.id} className="py-3 px-4 text-white">
                    {sys.capabilities.colorSpaces.join(', ').toUpperCase()}
                  </td>
                ))}
              </tr>
              <tr className="border-b border-gray-800">
                <td className="py-3 px-4 text-gray-300">Implementation</td>
                {comparedSystems.map(sys => (
                  <td key={sys.id} className="py-3 px-4">
                    <span className={`px-2 py-0.5 text-xs rounded ${
                      sys.implementation === 'complete' ? 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400' :
                      sys.implementation === 'partial' ? 'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400' :
                      'bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400'
                    }`}>
                      {sys.implementation}
                    </span>
                  </td>
                ))}
              </tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// PRESETS TAB
// ============================================================================

function PresetsTab({ 
  presets, 
  onUpdatePresets,
  currentSystem,
  currentOptions,
}: { 
  presets: Preset[]; 
  onUpdatePresets: (p: Preset[]) => void;
  currentSystem: string;
  currentOptions: WandOptions;
}) {
  const [newPresetName, setNewPresetName] = useState('');

  const savePreset = () => {
    if (!newPresetName.trim()) return;
    
    const newPreset: Preset = {
      id: Date.now().toString(),
      name: newPresetName.trim(),
      description: `${currentSystem} preset`,
      systemId: currentSystem,
      parameters: { ...currentOptions },
      createdAt: Date.now(),
    };
    
    onUpdatePresets([...presets, newPreset]);
    setNewPresetName('');
  };

  const deletePreset = (id: string) => {
    onUpdatePresets(presets.filter(p => p.id !== id));
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div>
        <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Presets Manager</h3>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Save and manage your segmentation presets</p>
      </div>

      {/* Save New Preset */}
      <div className="flex gap-3">
        <input
          type="text"
          value={newPresetName}
          onChange={(e) => setNewPresetName(e.target.value)}
          placeholder="Enter preset name..."
          className="flex-1 bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-white placeholder-gray-500"
        />
        <button
          onClick={savePreset}
          disabled={!newPresetName.trim()}
          className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 disabled:opacity-50 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-white transition-colors"
        >
          <Save className="w-4 h-4" />
          Save Current
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Presets List */}
      <div className="space-y-3">
        {presets.map(preset => (
          <div key={preset.id} className="p-4 rounded-lg bg-gray-800/50 border border-gray-700 flex items-center justify-between">
            <div>
              <h4 className="font-medium text-white">{preset.name}</h4>
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">{preset.description}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">
                Created {new Date(preset.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}
              </p>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <button className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors">
                <RefreshCw className="w-4 h-4" />
              </button>
              <button 
                onClick={() => deletePreset(preset.id)}
                className="p-2 hover:bg-red-500/20 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-red-400 transition-colors"
              >
                <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}

        {presets.length === 0 && (
          <div className="text-center py-12 text-gray-500">
            <Save className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-4 opacity-50" />
            <p>No presets saved yet</p>
            <p className="text-xs mt-1">Save your current settings as a preset</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// EXPORT/IMPORT TAB
// ============================================================================

function ExportImportTab({ 
  pipeline, 
  hybridConfig, 
  presets 
}: { 
  pipeline: PipelineStage[]; 
  hybridConfig: HybridConfig; 
  presets: Preset[];
}) {
  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);

  const exportConfig = useMemo(() => ({
    version: '1.0',
    exportedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    pipeline,
    hybridConfig,
    presets,
  }), [pipeline, hybridConfig, presets]);

  const handleExport = () => {
    const json = JSON.stringify(exportConfig, null, 2);
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(json);
    setCopied(true);
    setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000);
  };

  const handleDownload = () => {
    const json = JSON.stringify(exportConfig, null, 2);
    const blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = `magic-wand-config-${Date.now()}.json`;
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div>
        <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Export / Import</h3>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Share or backup your configuration</p>
      </div>

      {/* Export Section */}
      <div className="p-4 rounded-lg bg-gray-800/50 border border-gray-700 space-y-4">
        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300">Export Configuration</h4>
        <div className="flex gap-3">
          <button
            onClick={handleExport}
            className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-600 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-white transition-colors"
          >
            {copied ? <Check className="w-4 h-4" /> : <Copy className="w-4 h-4" />}
            {copied ? 'Copied!' : 'Copy to Clipboard'}
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={handleDownload}
            className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-white transition-colors"
          >
            <Download className="w-4 h-4" />
            Download JSON
          </button>
        </div>
        <pre className="text-xs text-gray-400 bg-gray-900/50 p-4 rounded-lg overflow-auto max-h-48">
          {JSON.stringify(exportConfig, null, 2)}
        </pre>
      </div>

      {/* Import Section */}
      <div className="p-4 rounded-lg bg-gray-800/50 border border-gray-700 space-y-4">
        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300">Import Configuration</h4>
        <div className="flex gap-3">
          <button className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-600 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-white transition-colors">
            <Upload className="w-4 h-4" />
            Upload JSON
          </button>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 p-3 rounded-lg bg-blue-500/10 border border-blue-500/30">
          <Info className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400" />
          <span className="text-sm text-blue-300">Import will merge with existing configuration</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// ICONS
// ============================================================================

const XIcon = ({ className }: { className: string }) => (
  <svg className={className} fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" />
  </svg>
);

```



## UI Components


### AssetDragDrop


**Category:** UI  
**File:** `components/image/AssetDragDrop.tsx`


*Asset drag and drop system*


```typescript
import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useCallback, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useProject } from '../../contexts/ProjectContext';

// ============================================================================
// TYPES
// ============================================================================

export interface DraggingAsset {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  thumbnail: string;
  url: string;
  width?: number;
  height?: number;
}

export interface DragState {
  isDragging: boolean;
  asset: DraggingAsset | null;
  position: { x: number; y: number };
  targetLayerIndex: number; // Which position in layer stack (0 = bottom)
  dropZone: 'canvas' | 'layers-mini' | 'layers-drawer' | null;
}

interface AssetDragContextType {
  dragState: DragState;
  startDrag: (asset: DraggingAsset, e: React.MouseEvent) => void;
  updateDrag: (e: MouseEvent) => void;
  endDrag: (e: MouseEvent) => void;
  adjustLayerPosition: (delta: number) => void;
  setDropZone: (zone: 'canvas' | 'layers-mini' | 'layers-drawer' | null) => void;
}

// ============================================================================
// CONTEXT
// ============================================================================

const AssetDragContext = createContext<AssetDragContextType | null>(null);

export function useAssetDrag() {
  const context = useContext(AssetDragContext);
  if (!context) {
    throw new Error('useAssetDrag must be used within AssetDragProvider');
  }
  return context;
}

// ============================================================================
// PROVIDER
// ============================================================================

interface AssetDragProviderProps {
  children: React.ReactNode;
}

export function AssetDragProvider({ children }: AssetDragProviderProps) {
  const { layers, setLayers, addHistorySnapshot } = useProject();
  
  const [dragState, setDragState] = useState<DragState>({
    isDragging: false,
    asset: null,
    position: { x: 0, y: 0 },
    targetLayerIndex: 0,
    dropZone: null,
  });
  
  const dragRef = useRef(dragState);
  dragRef.current = dragState;

  // Start dragging an asset
  const startDrag = useCallback((asset: DraggingAsset, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    setDragState({
      isDragging: true,
      asset,
      position: { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY },
      targetLayerIndex: layers.length, // Default to top
      dropZone: null,
    });
  }, [layers.length]);

  // Update drag position
  const updateDrag = useCallback((e: MouseEvent) => {
    if (!dragRef.current.isDragging) return;
    
    setDragState(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      position: { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY },
    }));
  }, []);

  // Adjust layer position with scroll wheel
  const adjustLayerPosition = useCallback((delta: number) => {
    if (!dragRef.current.isDragging) return;
    
    setDragState(prev => {
      const maxIndex = layers.length;
      const newIndex = Math.max(0, Math.min(maxIndex, prev.targetLayerIndex + delta));
      return { ...prev, targetLayerIndex: newIndex };
    });
  }, [layers.length]);

  // Set which drop zone we're over
  const setDropZone = useCallback((zone: 'canvas' | 'layers-mini' | 'layers-drawer' | null) => {
    setDragState(prev => ({ ...prev, dropZone: zone }));
  }, []);

  // End drag and create layer
  const endDrag = useCallback((e: MouseEvent) => {
    const state = dragRef.current;
    if (!state.isDragging || !state.asset) {
      setDragState(prev => ({ ...prev, isDragging: false, asset: null, dropZone: null }));
      return;
    }

    const asset = state.asset;
    const targetIndex = state.targetLayerIndex;
    const dropZone = state.dropZone;

    // Only create layer if dropped on valid zone
    if (dropZone) {
      // Create new layer from asset
      const newLayer = {
        id: crypto.randomUUID(),
        projectId: 'default',
        name: asset.name,
        type: 'raster' as const,
        visible: true,
        locked: false,
        opacity: 1,
        blendMode: 'normal',
        position: targetIndex,
        bounds: {
          x: -(asset.width || 400) / 2,
          y: -(asset.height || 300) / 2,
          width: asset.width || 400,
          height: asset.height || 300,
        },
        transform: { rotation: 0, scaleX: 1, scaleY: 1 },
        modifierStack: [],
        thumbnailUrl: asset.thumbnail,
        dataUrl: asset.url,
      };

      // Insert layer at target position
      const newLayers = [...layers];
      newLayers.splice(targetIndex, 0, newLayer);
      
      // Update positions
      const updatedLayers = newLayers.map((l, idx) => ({ ...l, position: idx }));
      setLayers(updatedLayers);

      addHistorySnapshot({
        projectId: 'default',
        sequence: 0,
        actionType: 'import',
        actionLabel: `Add ${asset.name} as layer`,
        stateDelta: {},
      });
    }

    setDragState({
      isDragging: false,
      asset: null,
      position: { x: 0, y: 0 },
      targetLayerIndex: 0,
      dropZone: null,
    });
  }, [layers, setLayers, addHistorySnapshot]);

  // Global mouse event handlers
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!dragState.isDragging) return;

    const handleMouseMove = (e: MouseEvent) => updateDrag(e);
    const handleMouseUp = (e: MouseEvent) => endDrag(e);
    const handleWheel = (e: WheelEvent) => {
      if (dragState.isDragging) {
        e.preventDefault();
        adjustLayerPosition(e.deltaY > 0 ? -1 : 1);
      }
    };

    window.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
    window.addEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
    window.addEventListener('wheel', handleWheel, { passive: false });

    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
      window.removeEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
      window.removeEventListener('wheel', handleWheel);
    };
  }, [dragState.isDragging, updateDrag, endDrag, adjustLayerPosition]);

  return (
    <AssetDragContext.Provider value={{
      dragState,
      startDrag,
      updateDrag,
      endDrag,
      adjustLayerPosition,
      setDropZone,
    }}>
      {children}
      
      {/* Drag Preview Overlay */}
      {dragState.isDragging && dragState.asset && (
        <DragPreview
          asset={dragState.asset}
          position={dragState.position}
          targetIndex={dragState.targetLayerIndex}
          totalLayers={layers.length}
          dropZone={dragState.dropZone}
        />
      )}
    </AssetDragContext.Provider>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// DRAG PREVIEW COMPONENT
// ============================================================================

interface DragPreviewProps {
  asset: DraggingAsset;
  position: { x: number; y: number };
  targetIndex: number;
  totalLayers: number;
  dropZone: string | null;
}

function DragPreview({ asset, position, targetIndex, totalLayers, dropZone }: DragPreviewProps) {
  return (
    <div 
      className="fixed pointer-events-none z-[9999]"
      style={{
        left: position.x - 40,
        top: position.y - 40,
      }}
    >
      {/* Thumbnail */}
      <div className="relative">
        <img
          src={asset.thumbnail}
          alt={asset.name}
          className="w-20 h-20 object-cover rounded-lg shadow-2xl border-2 border-purple-500"
          style={{
            opacity: dropZone ? 1 : 0.7,
            transform: dropZone ? 'scale(1.1)' : 'scale(1)',
            transition: 'all 0.15s ease-out',
          }}
        />
        
        {/* Layer position indicator */}
        <div className="absolute -bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-black/90 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs text-white whitespace-nowrap flex items-center gap-2">
          <span className="text-purple-400">Layer</span>
          <span className="font-mono font-bold">{targetIndex + 1}</span>
          <span className="text-gray-500">of {totalLayers + 1}</span>
        </div>
        
        {/* Scroll hint */}
        <div className="absolute -top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 text-[10px] text-gray-400 whitespace-nowrap">
          Scroll to adjust layer ↕
        </div>
        
        {/* Drop zone indicator */}
        {dropZone && (
          <div className="absolute -right-2 -top-2 bg-green-500 rounded-full p-1">
            <svg className="w-3 h-3 text-white" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={3} d="M5 13l4 4L19 7" />
            </svg>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// DROP ZONE COMPONENTS
// ============================================================================

interface DropZoneProps {
  zone: 'canvas' | 'layers-mini' | 'layers-drawer';
  children: React.ReactNode;
  className?: string;
}

export function DropZone({ zone, children, className = '' }: DropZoneProps) {
  const { dragState, setDropZone } = useAssetDrag();
  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!dragState.isDragging) return;

    const element = ref.current;
    if (!element) return;

    const handleMouseEnter = () => setDropZone(zone);
    const handleMouseLeave = () => setDropZone(null);

    element.addEventListener('mouseenter', handleMouseEnter);
    element.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave);

    return () => {
      element.removeEventListener('mouseenter', handleMouseEnter);
      element.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave);
    };
  }, [dragState.isDragging, zone, setDropZone]);

  const isActive = dragState.isDragging && dragState.dropZone === zone;

  return (
    <div
      ref={ref}
      className={`${className} ${isActive ? 'ring-2 ring-purple-500 ring-inset' : ''}`}
      style={{
        transition: 'box-shadow 0.15s ease-out',
        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
      }}
    >
      {children}
      
      {/* Drop overlay */}
      {isActive && (
        <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-purple-500/10 pointer-events-none z-10 flex items-center justify-center">
          <div className="bg-purple-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-xl text-sm font-medium">
            Drop to add layer
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// LAYER INSERT INDICATOR
// ============================================================================

interface LayerInsertIndicatorProps {
  targetIndex: number;
  layerIndex: number;
  show: boolean;
}

export function LayerInsertIndicator({ targetIndex, layerIndex, show }: LayerInsertIndicatorProps) {
  if (!show) return null;
  
  const isAbove = targetIndex === layerIndex + 1;
  const isBelow = targetIndex === layerIndex;
  
  if (!isAbove && !isBelow) return null;

  return (
    <div
      className={`absolute left-0 right-0 h-1 bg-purple-500 rounded-full z-20 ${
        isAbove ? '-top-0.5' : '-bottom-0.5'
      }`}
      style={{
        boxShadow: '0 0 8px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.8)',
      }}
    >
      <div className="absolute left-0 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 top-1/2 w-3 h-3 bg-purple-500 rounded-full border-2 border-white" />
      <div className="absolute right-0 translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 top-1/2 w-3 h-3 bg-purple-500 rounded-full border-2 border-white" />
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// DRAGGABLE ASSET
// ============================================================================

interface DraggableAssetProps {
  asset: DraggingAsset;
  children: React.ReactNode;
  className?: string;
}

export function DraggableAsset({ asset, children, className = '' }: DraggableAssetProps) {
  const { startDrag, dragState } = useAssetDrag();
  
  const handleMouseDown = (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    if (e.button === 0) { // Left click only
      startDrag(asset, e);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div
      className={`cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing ${className} ${
        dragState.isDragging && dragState.asset?.id === asset.id ? 'opacity-50' : ''
      }`}
      onMouseDown={handleMouseDown}
    >
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}

export default AssetDragProvider;


```


### AssetsPanel


**Category:** UI  
**File:** `components/panels/AssetBrowserPanel.tsx`


*Asset browser panel for managing assets*


```typescript
import { Folder, Search, Upload, Grid3x3, List, Clock, Image as ImageIcon, Video, Music, Box, Trash2, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { assetService, type Asset as AssetType } from '@/lib/supabase/AssetService';

export function AssetBrowserPanel() {
  const [assets, setAssets] = useState<AssetType[]>([]);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<'grid' | 'list'>('grid');
  const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState<'all' | 'recent'>('all');
  const [selectedAsset, setSelectedAsset] = useState<AssetType | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [uploading, setUploading] = useState(false);
  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadAssets();
  }, [filterType]);

  async function loadAssets() {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      let loadedAssets: AssetType[];
      if (filterType === 'recent') {
        loadedAssets = await assetService.getRecentAssets(50);
      } else {
        loadedAssets = await assetService.getAssets({}, 50, 0);
      }
      setAssets(loadedAssets);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to load assets:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleFileUpload(event: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) {
    const files = event.target.files;
    if (!files || files.length === 0) return;

    setUploading(true);
    try {
      for (const file of Array.from(files)) {
        const fileName = file.name.replace(/\.[^/.]+$/, '');
        await assetService.uploadAsset({
          name: fileName,
          type: 'image',
          file: file,
          generateThumbnail: true,
          tags: [],
        });
      }
      await loadAssets();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to upload assets:', error);
    } finally {
      setUploading(false);
      if (fileInputRef.current) {
        fileInputRef.current.value = '';
      }
    }
  }

  async function handleDelete(assetId: string) {
    if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this asset?')) return;

    try {
      await assetService.deleteAsset(assetId);
      await loadAssets();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to delete asset:', error);
    }
  }

  const filteredAssets = assets.filter(asset => {
    if (!searchQuery) return true;
    const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();
    return (
      asset.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
      asset.tags.some(tag => tag.toLowerCase().includes(query))
    );
  });

  function formatFileSize(bytes?: number): string {
    if (!bytes) return 'Unknown';
    const mb = bytes / (1024 * 1024);
    return `${mb.toFixed(1)} MB`;
  }

  function formatDimensions(metadata: any): string {
    if (metadata.width && metadata.height) {
      return `${metadata.width}x${metadata.height}`;
    }
    return 'N/A';
  }

  function formatDate(dateString: string): string {
    const date = new Date(dateString);
    const now = new Date();
    const diffDays = Math.floor((now.getTime() - date.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));

    if (diffDays === 0) return 'Today';
    if (diffDays === 1) return 'Yesterday';
    if (diffDays < 7) return `${diffDays} days ago`;
    return date.toLocaleDateString();
  }

  const getAssetIcon = (type: string) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'image': return <ImageIcon className="w-4 h-4" />;
      case 'video': return <Video className="w-4 h-4" />;
      case 'audio': return <Music className="w-4 h-4" />;
      default: return <Box className="w-4 h-4" />;
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-neutral-900 text-neutral-100">
      <div className="flex-shrink-0 p-3 border-b border-neutral-700">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
          <Folder className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-400" />
          <span className="ml-auto text-xs text-neutral-400">
            {filteredAssets.length} {filteredAssets.length === 1 ? 'asset' : 'assets'}
          </span>
        </div>

        <div className="relative mb-3">
          <Search className="absolute left-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-neutral-400" />
          <input
            type="text"
            placeholder="Search assets..."
            value={searchQuery}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
            className="w-full pl-8 pr-3 py-1.5 bg-neutral-800 border border-neutral-700 rounded text-xs focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500"
          />
        </div>

        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
          <div className="flex gap-1">
            <button
              onClick={() => setFilterType('all')}
              className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded transition-colors ${
                filterType === 'all'
                  ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'
                  : 'bg-neutral-800 text-neutral-300 hover:bg-neutral-700'
              }`}
            >
              All
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => setFilterType('recent')}
              className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded transition-colors flex items-center gap-1 ${
                filterType === 'recent'
                  ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'
                  : 'bg-neutral-800 text-neutral-300 hover:bg-neutral-700'
              }`}
            >
              <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
              Recent
            </button>
          </div>

          <div className="flex gap-1">
            <button
              onClick={() => setViewMode('grid')}
              className={`p-1.5 rounded transition-colors ${
                viewMode === 'grid'
                  ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'
                  : 'bg-neutral-800 text-neutral-400 hover:bg-neutral-700'
              }`}
            >
              <Grid3x3 className="w-4 h-4" />
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => setViewMode('list')}
              className={`p-1.5 rounded transition-colors ${
                viewMode === 'list'
                  ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'
                  : 'bg-neutral-800 text-neutral-400 hover:bg-neutral-700'
              }`}
            >
              <List className="w-4 h-4" />
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()}
              disabled={uploading}
              className="p-1.5 rounded bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white transition-colors disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
              title="Upload Assets"
            >
              {uploading ? (
                <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
              ) : (
                <Upload className="w-4 h-4" />
              )}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <input
          ref={fileInputRef}
          type="file"
          accept="image/*"
          multiple
          onChange={handleFileUpload}
          className="hidden"
        />
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-3">
        {loading ? (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full">
            <Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-blue-400" />
          </div>
        ) : filteredAssets.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-neutral-500">
            <ImageIcon className="w-12 h-12 mb-2 opacity-30" />
            <p className="text-sm">No assets found</p>
            <button
              onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()}
              className="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white text-sm rounded transition-colors"
            >
              Upload Assets
            </button>
          </div>
        ) : viewMode === 'grid' ? (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
            {filteredAssets.map((asset) => (
              <div
                key={asset.id}
                className="group relative bg-neutral-800 rounded overflow-hidden hover:ring-2 hover:ring-blue-500 cursor-pointer transition-all"
                onClick={() => setSelectedAsset(asset)}
              >
                <div className="aspect-square bg-neutral-900 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
                  {asset.thumbnail_url || asset.file_url ? (
                    <img
                      src={asset.thumbnail_url || asset.file_url}
                      alt={asset.name}
                      className="w-full h-full object-cover"
                    />
                  ) : (
                    getAssetIcon(asset.type)
                  )}
                </div>
                <div className="p-2">
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-1">
                    <p className="text-xs font-medium truncate flex-1">{asset.name}</p>
                    <button
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        handleDelete(asset.id);
                      }}
                      className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 p-1 hover:bg-red-500 rounded transition-all"
                    >
                      <Trash2 className="w-3 h-3" />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-1 text-[10px] text-neutral-400">
                    {asset.metadata.size && <span>{formatFileSize(asset.metadata.size)}</span>}
                    {asset.metadata.size && asset.metadata.width && <span>•</span>}
                    {asset.metadata.width && <span>{formatDimensions(asset.metadata)}</span>}
                  </div>
                  {asset.tags.length > 0 && (
                    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1 mt-1">
                      {asset.tags.slice(0, 2).map((tag) => (
                        <span
                          key={tag}
                          className="px-1 py-0.5 bg-neutral-700 text-[10px] rounded"
                        >
                          {tag}
                        </span>
                      ))}
                      {asset.tags.length > 2 && (
                        <span className="px-1 py-0.5 bg-neutral-700 text-[10px] rounded">
                          +{asset.tags.length - 2}
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {filteredAssets.map((asset) => (
              <div
                key={asset.id}
                className="group flex items-center gap-3 p-2 bg-neutral-800 rounded hover:bg-neutral-700 cursor-pointer transition-colors"
                onClick={() => setSelectedAsset(asset)}
              >
                <div className="w-12 h-12 flex-shrink-0 bg-neutral-900 rounded overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center">
                  {asset.thumbnail_url || asset.file_url ? (
                    <img
                      src={asset.thumbnail_url || asset.file_url}
                      alt={asset.name}
                      className="w-full h-full object-cover"
                    />
                  ) : (
                    getAssetIcon(asset.type)
                  )}
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                  <p className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{asset.name}</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-neutral-400">
                    {asset.metadata.size && formatFileSize(asset.metadata.size)}
                    {asset.metadata.size && asset.metadata.width && ' • '}
                    {asset.metadata.width && formatDimensions(asset.metadata)}
                    {' • '}
                    {formatDate(asset.created_at)}
                  </p>
                </div>
                <button
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    handleDelete(asset.id);
                  }}
                  className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 p-2 hover:bg-red-500 rounded transition-all"
                >
                  <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                </button>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```


### Canvas


**Category:** UI  
**File:** `components/Canvas.tsx`


*Main canvas component*


```typescript
import { useRef, useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import { X, Check } from 'lucide-react';
import { useProject } from '../contexts/ProjectContext';
import { useSegmentation } from '../contexts/SegmentationContext';
import { useCanvasPixel } from '../contexts/CanvasPixelContext';
import { SelectionVisualizer } from './SelectionVisualizer';
import { ImageLoader } from '../lib/image/ImageLoader';
import { BrushEngine, StrokePoint } from '../lib/tools/BrushEngine';
import { WebGLRenderer } from '../lib/webgl/WebGLRenderer';
import { ModifierStack } from '../lib/modifiers/ModifierStack';
import { EnhancedRuler, GuideLinesOverlay, type SnapLine, type AlignmentLine } from './canvas/EnhancedRuler';
import { VideoFramePanel } from './canvas/VideoFramePanel';
import { useMagneticLasso } from '../hooks/useMagneticLasso';
import { useMagicWandWorkflow } from '../hooks/useMagicWandWorkflow';
import { HoverPreviewRenderer } from './image/HoverPreviewRenderer';
import { defaultMagicWandSettings } from '../lib/segmentation/types/MagicWandSettings';
import { ToleranceIndicator } from './image/ToleranceIndicator';
import { debugLog } from '../lib/debug';
import type { Point } from '../types/segmentation';

export function Canvas() {
  // Removed: console.log('[Canvas] Component rendering'); - excessive logging
  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const webglRendererRef = useRef<WebGLRenderer | null>(null);
  const brushEngineRef = useRef<BrushEngine | null>(null);
  const imageLoadCache = useRef<Map<string, HTMLImageElement>>(new Map());
  const { canvasState, updateCanvasState, layers, activeTool, setLayers, addHistorySnapshot } = useProject();
  const { performSegmentation, addToSelection, subtractFromSelection, selectionState, clearSelection, wandOptions, setWandOptions } = useSegmentation();
  const { setCursorPixelData } = useCanvasPixel();
  const [isPanning, setIsPanning] = useState(false);
  const [isDrawing, setIsDrawing] = useState(false);
  const [lastMousePos, setLastMousePos] = useState({ x: 0, y: 0 });
  const [dragStartPos, setDragStartPos] = useState({ x: 0, y: 0 });

  // Magic Wand Workflow Integration
  const handleMagicWandLayerCreate = useCallback((layer: any) => {
    setLayers(prev => [...prev, layer]);
    addHistorySnapshot({
      projectId: 'default',
      sequence: 0,
      actionType: 'create-layer',
      actionLabel: 'Magic Wand: Create Layer',
      stateDelta: { layerId: layer.id },
    });
  }, [setLayers, addHistorySnapshot]);

  const handleMagicWandLayerUpdate = useCallback((layer: any) => {
    setLayers(prev => prev.map(l => l.id === layer.id ? layer : l));
  }, [setLayers]);

  const handleMagicWandModifierCreate = useCallback((targetLayerId: string, modifierId: string, mask: Uint8ClampedArray) => {
    setLayers(prev => prev.map(l => {
      if (l.id === targetLayerId) {
        const newModifier = {
          id: modifierId,
          type: 'transparency-mask' as const,
          enabled: true,
          opacity: 0, // 0% = fully transparent (effect applied)
          blendMode: 'normal',
          parameters: {
            mask,
            bounds: { x: 0, y: 0, width: 800, height: 600 },
          },
          createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        };
        return {
          ...l,
          modifierStack: [...(l.modifierStack || []), newModifier],
        };
      }
      return l;
    }));
    addHistorySnapshot({
      projectId: 'default',
      sequence: 0,
      actionType: 'create-modifier',
      actionLabel: 'Magic Wand: Create Transparency Modifier',
      stateDelta: { targetLayerId, modifierId },
    });
  }, [setLayers, addHistorySnapshot]);

  const handleMagicWandModifierUpdate = useCallback((targetLayerId: string, modifierId: string, mask: Uint8ClampedArray) => {
    setLayers(prev => prev.map(l => {
      if (l.id === targetLayerId && l.modifierStack) {
        return {
          ...l,
          modifierStack: l.modifierStack.map((m: any) => 
            m.id === modifierId 
              ? { ...m, parameters: { ...m.parameters, mask } }
              : m
          ),
        };
      }
      return l;
    }));
  }, [setLayers]);

  // Magic Wand Workflow
  const [magicWandState, magicWandActions] = useMagicWandWorkflow(
    wandOptions || { tolerance: 32, colorSpace: 'rgb', connectivity: 4, antiAlias: true, feather: 0, contiguous: true },
    handleMagicWandLayerCreate,
    handleMagicWandLayerUpdate,
    handleMagicWandModifierCreate,
    handleMagicWandModifierUpdate
  );
  
  // Magnetic Lasso state
  const [lassoImageData, setLassoImageData] = useState<ImageData | null>(null);
  const lasso = useMagneticLasso(lassoImageData);
  
  // Ruler and guide lines state
  const [cursorWorldPos, setCursorWorldPos] = useState<{ x: number; y: number } | null>(null);
  const [snapLines, setSnapLines] = useState<SnapLine[]>([]);
  const [alignmentLines, setAlignmentLines] = useState<AlignmentLine[]>([
    // Default alignment lines at canvas edges (800x600 canvas)
    // Canvas is centered at origin: left edge = -400, right edge = 400, top edge = -300, bottom edge = 300
    { id: 'edge-left', type: 'alignment', axis: 'vertical', position: -400, color: '#03A9F480' }, // Ruler shows: 0
    { id: 'edge-right', type: 'alignment', axis: 'vertical', position: 400, color: '#03A9F480' }, // Ruler shows: 800
    { id: 'edge-top', type: 'alignment', axis: 'horizontal', position: -300, color: '#03A9F480' }, // Ruler shows: 0
    { id: 'edge-bottom', type: 'alignment', axis: 'horizontal', position: 300, color: '#03A9F480' }, // Ruler shows: 600
  ]);
  const [horizontalRulerHovered, setHorizontalRulerHovered] = useState(false);
  const [verticalRulerHovered, setVerticalRulerHovered] = useState(false);
  const isRulerHovered = horizontalRulerHovered || verticalRulerHovered;
  
  // Ruler position preference (can be configured)
  const [rulerPosition, setRulerPosition] = useState<{horizontal: 'top' | 'bottom', vertical: 'left' | 'right', showNumbers: boolean}>({
    horizontal: 'bottom', // Default to bottom
    vertical: 'right', // Default to right
    showNumbers: false, // Default to no numbers
  });
  
  // Video Frame Panel state
  const [showVideoFramePanel, setShowVideoFramePanel] = useState(false);
  const [videoFramePanelExpanded, setVideoFramePanelExpanded] = useState(false);

  // Emit line counts to window for TopBar context menu
  useEffect(() => {
    window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('rulerLineCounts', {
      detail: {
        snapLineCount: snapLines.length,
        alignmentLineCount: alignmentLines.length,
      }
    }));
  }, [snapLines.length, alignmentLines.length]);
  
  // Listen for video frame panel toggle
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleToggle = () => {
      setShowVideoFramePanel(prev => !prev);
    };
    window.addEventListener('toggleVideoFramePanel', handleToggle);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('toggleVideoFramePanel', handleToggle);
  }, []);

  // Removed: console.log('[Canvas] Current layers count:', layers.length); - excessive logging

  // Initialize WebGL renderer - DISABLED for now to allow 2D context
  // WebGL and 2D contexts cannot coexist on the same canvas
  useEffect(() => {
    // TODO: Implement dual-canvas system or migrate fully to WebGL
    debugLog.canvas('WebGL renderer disabled - using Canvas 2D');
  }, []);

  // Initialize brush engine
  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTool === 'brush') {
      brushEngineRef.current = new BrushEngine({
        size: 20,
        opacity: 1,
        flow: 1,
        hardness: 0.8,
        spacing: 25,
        pressureSensitive: true,
        color: '#000000',
      });
    } else if (activeTool === 'eraser') {
      brushEngineRef.current = new BrushEngine({
        size: 30,
        opacity: 1,
        flow: 1,
        hardness: 0.8,
        spacing: 25,
        pressureSensitive: true,
        color: '#000000', // Color doesn't matter for eraser
      });
    }
  }, [activeTool]);
  
  // Load ImageData for lasso edge detection - ONLY when lasso tool activates
  useEffect(() => {
    // Only load when switching TO lasso tool
    if (activeTool !== 'lasso') {
      return; // Don't clear, just don't reload
    }
    
    // Only compute if we don't have imageData yet
    if (lassoImageData) {
      debugLog.canvas('ImageData already loaded for lasso');
      return;
    }
    
    debugLog.canvas('Loading ImageData for lasso edge detection...');
    const start = performance.now();
    
    // Get all visible layers combined into one ImageData for edge detection
    const tempCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    tempCanvas.width = 800;
    tempCanvas.height = 600;
    const ctx = tempCanvas.getContext('2d');
    if (!ctx) return;
    
    // Draw all visible layers
    let hasContent = false;
    for (const layer of layers) {
      if (!layer.visible || !layer.dataUrl) continue;
      
      const img = imageLoadCache.current.get(layer.dataUrl);
      if (img && img.complete) {
        ctx.save();
        ctx.globalAlpha = layer.opacity;
        const { x, y, width, height } = layer.bounds;
        ctx.drawImage(img, x + 400, y + 300, width, height);
        ctx.restore();
        hasContent = true;
      }
    }
    
    if (!hasContent) {
      debugLog.canvas('No visible layers with images - lasso will not work');
      return;
    }
    
    // Get ImageData for edge detection
    const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, 800, 600);
    setLassoImageData(imageData);
    
    const duration = performance.now() - start;
    debugLog.canvas(`ImageData loaded for lasso in ${duration.toFixed(1)}ms`);
  }, [activeTool]); // Only when tool changes, NOT on layer changes!
  useEffect(() => {
    debugLog.canvas('Main effect triggered with', layers.length, 'layers');
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    const container = containerRef.current;
    if (!canvas || !container) {
      debugLog.canvas('Canvas or container not ready');
      return;
    }

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently: true });
    if (!ctx) {
      debugLog.canvas('Failed to get 2D context');
      return;
    }

    let animationFrameId: number | null = null;

    const drawCanvas = () => {
      debugLog.canvas('Drawing canvas with', layers.length, 'layers');
      // Outer canvas background (workspace) - silky dark grey
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2a2a2e';
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

      ctx.save();
      ctx.translate(canvasState.panX + canvas.width / 2, canvasState.panY + canvas.height / 2);
      ctx.scale(canvasState.zoom, canvasState.zoom);

      // Inner canvas background (image area) - slightly lighter grey
      ctx.fillStyle = '#353539';
      ctx.fillRect(-400, -300, 800, 600);

      // Subtle border around canvas (darker than inner, lighter than outer)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#454549';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1 / canvasState.zoom;
      ctx.strokeRect(-400, -300, 800, 600);

      for (const layer of layers) {
        if (!layer.visible) continue;
        debugLog.canvas('Rendering layer:', layer.name, 'bounds:', layer.bounds, 'hasDataUrl:', !!layer.dataUrl);

        ctx.save();
        ctx.globalAlpha = layer.opacity;
        ctx.globalCompositeOperation = getCompositeOperation(layer.blendMode);

        const { x, y, width, height } = layer.bounds;
        const { rotation, scaleX, scaleY } = layer.transform;

        ctx.translate(x + width / 2, y + height / 2);
        ctx.rotate((rotation * Math.PI) / 180);
        ctx.scale(scaleX, scaleY);
        ctx.translate(-(width / 2), -(height / 2));

        if (layer.dataUrl) {
          const img = imageLoadCache.current.get(layer.id);
          if (img && img.complete) {
            debugLog.canvas('Drawing image for layer:', layer.name, 'at', x, y, width, height);

            // Apply modifiers if the layer has any
            if (layer.modifierStack && layer.modifierStack.length > 0) {
              debugLog.canvas('Applying', layer.modifierStack.length, 'modifiers to layer:', layer.name);

              // Create a temporary canvas to apply modifiers
              const tempCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
              tempCanvas.width = width;
              tempCanvas.height = height;
              const tempCtx = tempCanvas.getContext('2d');

              if (tempCtx) {
                // Draw original image to temp canvas
                tempCtx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);

                // Get image data
                const imageData = tempCtx.getImageData(0, 0, width, height);

                // Apply modifier stack
                const modifierStack = new ModifierStack();
                modifierStack['stack'] = layer.modifierStack;
                const processedImageData = modifierStack.applyStack(imageData);

                // Put processed image data back
                tempCtx.putImageData(processedImageData, 0, 0);

                // Draw the processed image
                ctx.drawImage(tempCanvas, 0, 0, width, height);
              }
            } else {
              // No modifiers, draw directly
              ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
            }
          } else {
            debugLog.canvas('Image not ready for layer:', layer.name, 'loading...');
            if (!imageLoadCache.current.has(layer.id)) {
              loadLayerImage(layer.id, layer.dataUrl);
            }
            drawPlaceholder(ctx, layer, width, height);
          }
        } else {
          debugLog.canvas('No dataUrl for layer:', layer.name);
          drawPlaceholder(ctx, layer, width, height);
        }

        ctx.restore();
      }
      
      // DISABLED: Draw lasso paths - was causing crashes and lag
      // Draw lasso paths - re-enabled
      if (activeTool === 'lasso') {
        debugLog.canvas('About to call drawLasso - activeTool is lasso');
        drawLasso(ctx);
      } else {
        debugLog.canvas('NOT calling drawLasso - activeTool is:', activeTool);
      }

      ctx.restore();
    };

    const loadLayerImage = (layerId: string, dataUrl: string) => {
      debugLog.canvas('Loading image for layer:', layerId, 'dataUrl length:', dataUrl?.length);
      const img = new Image();
      // Set crossOrigin BEFORE setting src to prevent canvas tainting for external URLs
```
