    const eyedropperIndex = buttons.findIndex(b => b.id === 'eyedropper');
    if (eyedropperIndex !== -1) {
      buttons.splice(eyedropperIndex + 1, 0, {
        id: 'color-swatch',
        icon: <ToolbarColorSwatchButton 
          foreground={toolSettings.foreground}
          background={toolSettings.background}
          onSwap={handleColorSwap}
        />,
        label: 'Color Swatch',
        type: 'custom' as const,
        onClick: () => {},
      });
    }
    
    return buttons;
  }, [handleToolSelect, toolSettings, handleColorSwap]);
  
  // Bottom buttons for toolbar: only settings button (when mini closed)
  const leftBottomButtons = useMemo(() => {
    const buttons = [];
    
    // Show settings button when mini bar is closed
    if (toolSettingsState === 'closed') {
      buttons.push({
        id: 'open-settings',
        icon: <ToolbarSettingsButton onClick={() => setToolSettingsState('mini')} />,
        label: 'Open Tool Settings',
        type: 'custom' as const,
        onClick: () => setToolSettingsState('mini'),
      });
    }
    
    return buttons;
  }, [toolSettingsState]);

  // Right icon bar - all panels (11 total)
  const rightTopButtons = useMemo(() => [
    { id: 'ai-generate', icon: <Sparkles className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'AI Generate', drawerPosition: 'top' as const, tooltipContent: allPanelTooltips.aiTools },
    { id: 'assets', icon: <FolderOpen className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Assets', drawerPosition: 'top' as const, tooltipContent: allPanelTooltips.assets },
    { id: 'layers', icon: <Layers className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Layers', drawerPosition: 'top' as const, tooltipContent: allPanelTooltips.layers },
    { id: 'effects', icon: <Sparkles className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Effects', drawerPosition: 'top' as const, tooltipContent: allPanelTooltips.effects },
    { id: 'color', icon: <Palette className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Color', drawerPosition: 'top' as const, tooltipContent: allPanelTooltips.colorSphere },
    { id: 'lasso-settings', icon: <Scissors className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Lasso', drawerPosition: 'top' as const },
    { id: 'wand-developer', icon: <Wand2 className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Wand Dev', drawerPosition: 'top' as const },
    { id: 'ai-tools', icon: <Wand2 className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'AI Tools', drawerPosition: 'top' as const, tooltipContent: allPanelTooltips.aiTools },
    { id: 'presets', icon: <Star className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Presets', drawerPosition: 'top' as const, tooltipContent: allPanelTooltips.presets },
    { id: 'ice', icon: <Zap className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'ICE', drawerPosition: 'top' as const, tooltipContent: allPanelTooltips.ice },
  ], []);

  const rightBottomButtons = useMemo(() => [
    { id: 'ai-chat', icon: <MessageSquare className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'AI Chat', drawerPosition: 'bottom' as const, tooltipContent: allPanelTooltips.aiChat },
    { id: 'cursor-zoom', icon: <Eye className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Cursor Zoom', drawerPosition: 'bottom' as const },
    { id: 'microscope', icon: <Microscope className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Microscope', drawerPosition: 'bottom' as const, tooltipContent: allPanelTooltips.microscope },
    { id: 'motion-control', icon: <Waves className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Motion Control', drawerPosition: 'bottom' as const },
    { id: 'hand-gesture', icon: <Hand className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Hand Gestures', drawerPosition: 'bottom' as const },
    { id: 'settings', icon: <Settings className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Settings', drawerPosition: 'bottom' as const },
  ], []);

  // Mini bar for layers
  const layerMiniBarItems: MiniBarItem[] = useMemo(() => 
    layers.map(l => ({
      id: l.id,
      name: l.name,
      thumbnailUrl: l.thumbnailUrl,
      visible: l.visible,
      locked: l.locked,
    }))
  , [layers]);

  return (
    <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col bg-[#1e1e1e] min-h-0">
      {/* Main Content Area */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex overflow-hidden min-h-0">
        
        {/* LEFT SIDE: Mini Bar OR Full Drawer | Tool IconBar */}
        <div className="flex flex-shrink-0">
          {/* Tool Settings - Mini Bar (default) - LEFT of tool bar */}
          {toolSettingsState === 'mini' && (
            <ToolSettingsMiniBar
              tool={toolIdToType(activeTool as string)}
              settings={toolSettings}
              onSettingsChange={setToolSettings}
              onOpenFullSettings={() => setToolSettingsState('full')}
              onClose={() => setToolSettingsState('closed')}
            />
          )}
          
          {/* Tool Settings - Full Drawer - LEFT of tool bar */}
          {toolSettingsState === 'full' && FullToolSettingsDrawer}
          
          {/* Tool Icon Bar - with color swatch and settings button at bottom */}
          <IconBar
            topButtons={leftToolButtons}
            bottomButtons={leftBottomButtons}
            side="left"
            activeToolId={toolTypeToId(activeTool)}
          />
        </div>

        {/* CENTRAL AREA: Canvas + Timeline */}
        <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col min-h-0">
          {/* Canvas Area - using working V1 Canvas (handles its own drops) */}
          <Canvas />

          {/* Animation Timeline */}
          <ImageTimeline
            tracks={animationTracks}
            currentFrame={currentFrame}
            totalFrames={totalFrames}
            fps={fps}
            isPlaying={isPlaying}
            selectedKeyframeId={selectedKeyframeId}
            onPlayPause={() => setIsPlaying(!isPlaying)}
            onSeek={setCurrentFrame}
            onSelectKeyframe={setSelectedKeyframeId}
            onAddKeyframe={handleAddKeyframe}
            onDeleteKeyframe={handleDeleteKeyframe}
            onTrackToggle={handleTrackToggle}
          />
        </div>

        {/* RIGHT SIDE: MiniBar | Drawer | IconBar */}
        <div className="flex flex-shrink-0">
          {/* Layers Mini Bar - Drop Zone */}
          <DropZone zone="layers-mini" className="relative">
            <MiniBar
              type="layers"
              items={layerMiniBarItems}
              selectedId={selectedLayerId}
              onSelect={setSelectedLayerId}
              onVisibilityToggle={(id) => setLayers(prev => prev.map(l => l.id === id ? { ...l, visible: !l.visible } : l))}
              onLockToggle={(id) => setLayers(prev => prev.map(l => l.id === id ? { ...l, locked: !l.locked } : l))}
            />
          </DropZone>
          
          {/* Right Drawers */}
          <DrawerContainer drawers={rightDrawerConfigs} side="right" />
          
          {/* Right Icon Bar */}
          <IconBar
            topButtons={rightTopButtons}
            bottomButtons={rightBottomButtons}
            side="right"
          />
        </div>
        
      </div>

      {/* Magic Wand Developer Console */}
      <MagicWandDeveloperConsole
        isOpen={isDeveloperConsoleOpen}
        onClose={() => setIsDeveloperConsoleOpen(false)}
      />
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// MAIN EXPORT
// ============================================================================

export function ImagesPageV2() {
  return (
    <DrawerProvider>
      <AssetDragProvider>
        <ImagesPageV2Content />
      </AssetDragProvider>
    </DrawerProvider>
  );
}

```


### MicroscopePanel


**Category:** UI  
**File:** `components/panels/MicroscopePanel.tsx`


*Microscope panel for detailed inspection*


```typescript
import { Microscope, Info } from 'lucide-react';
import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useProject } from '../../contexts/ProjectContext';
import { useCanvasPixel } from '../../contexts/CanvasPixelContext';

export function MicroscopePanel() {
  const [zoom, setZoom] = useState(100);
  const [showGrid, setShowGrid] = useState(true);
  const [showValues, setShowValues] = useState(false);
  const [showDiagnostics, setShowDiagnostics] = useState(true);
  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
  const { activeTool } = useProject();
  const { cursorPixelData, getPixelDataAt } = useCanvasPixel();
  const mainCanvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('main-canvas') as HTMLCanvasElement;
    mainCanvasRef.current = canvas;
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas || !cursorPixelData || !mainCanvasRef.current) return;

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    if (!ctx) return;

    ctx.fillStyle = '#0a0a0a';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    const gridSize = 9;
    const pixelSize = canvas.width / gridSize;
    const radius = Math.floor(gridSize / 2);

    const pixelGrid = getPixelDataAt(mainCanvasRef.current, cursorPixelData.x, cursorPixelData.y, radius);

    if (!pixelGrid) {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#555';
      ctx.font = '12px monospace';
      ctx.textAlign = 'center';
      ctx.fillText('No image data', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
      return;
    }

    for (let y = 0; y < pixelGrid.length; y++) {
      for (let x = 0; x < pixelGrid[y].length; x++) {
        const pixel = pixelGrid[y][x];
        const px = x * pixelSize;
        const py = y * pixelSize;

        const color = `rgba(${pixel.r}, ${pixel.g}, ${pixel.b}, ${pixel.a / 255})`;
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.fillRect(px, py, pixelSize, pixelSize);

        if (showGrid) {
          ctx.strokeStyle = '#333';
          ctx.lineWidth = 1;
          ctx.strokeRect(px, py, pixelSize, pixelSize);
        }

        if (showValues && pixelSize > 30) {
          const avgBrightness = (pixel.r + pixel.g + pixel.b) / 3;
          ctx.fillStyle = avgBrightness > 128 ? '#000' : '#fff';
          ctx.font = '9px monospace';
          ctx.textAlign = 'center';
          ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
          ctx.fillText(
            `${pixel.r},${pixel.g},${pixel.b}`,
            px + pixelSize / 2,
            py + pixelSize / 2
          );
        }
      }
    }

    const centerX = Math.floor(gridSize / 2) * pixelSize;
    const centerY = Math.floor(gridSize / 2) * pixelSize;

    ctx.strokeStyle = '#03A9F4';
    ctx.lineWidth = 3;
    ctx.strokeRect(centerX, centerY, pixelSize, pixelSize);

    if (showDiagnostics && activeTool === 'wand') {
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#FF9800';
      ctx.lineWidth = 2;
      ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
      const searchRadius = pixelSize * 2.5;
      const centerPx = centerX + pixelSize / 2;
      const centerPy = centerY + pixelSize / 2;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(centerPx, centerPy, searchRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.stroke();
      ctx.setLineDash([]);

      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 152, 0, 0.2)';
      for (let y = 0; y < gridSize; y++) {
        for (let x = 0; x < gridSize; x++) {
          const distance = Math.sqrt(
            Math.pow(x - Math.floor(gridSize / 2), 2) +
            Math.pow(y - Math.floor(gridSize / 2), 2)
          );
          if (distance <= 2.5) {
            ctx.fillRect(x * pixelSize, y * pixelSize, pixelSize, pixelSize);
          }
        }
      }
    }

    if (showDiagnostics && activeTool === 'lasso') {
      const centerPx = centerX + pixelSize / 2;
      const centerPy = centerY + pixelSize / 2;

      const vectors = [
        { dx: -1, dy: 0, strength: 0.8 },
        { dx: 1, dy: -1, strength: 0.6 },
        { dx: 0, dy: 1, strength: 0.4 },
        { dx: 1, dy: 1, strength: 0.3 },
      ];

      vectors.forEach(v => {
        const startX = centerPx;
        const startY = centerPy;
        const endX = centerPx + v.dx * pixelSize * 1.5;
        const endY = centerPy + v.dy * pixelSize * 1.5;

        const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(startX, startY, endX, endY);
        gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(0, 255, 0, ${v.strength})`);
        gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 255, 0, 0)');

        ctx.strokeStyle = gradient;
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(startX, startY);
        ctx.lineTo(endX, endY);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.8)';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(endX, endY, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
      });
    }

    if (showDiagnostics && activeTool === 'brush') {
      const centerPx = centerX + pixelSize / 2;
      const centerPy = centerY + pixelSize / 2;
      const brushRadius = pixelSize * 1.8;

      for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
        const angle = (i / 8) * Math.PI * 2;
        const radius = brushRadius + (i % 2 === 0 ? 0 : pixelSize * 0.3);
        const x = centerPx + Math.cos(angle) * radius;
        const y = centerPy + Math.sin(angle) * radius;
        const alpha = 1 - (i / 8);

        ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 0, 255, ${alpha * 0.4})`;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(x, y, pixelSize * 0.4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
      }

      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 0, 255, 0.6)';
      ctx.lineWidth = 2;
      ctx.setLineDash([3, 3]);
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(centerPx, centerPy, brushRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.stroke();
      ctx.setLineDash([]);
    }

  }, [zoom, showGrid, showValues, showDiagnostics, activeTool, cursorPixelData, getPixelDataAt]);

  const getDiagnosticLabel = () => {
    switch (activeTool) {
      case 'wand':
        return 'Sampled pixels (orange) and search radius boundary';
      case 'lasso':
        return 'Magnetic force vectors pulling towards edges';
      case 'brush':
        return 'Anti-aliased edge pixels showing feathering';
      default:
        return 'No tool active - diagnostic overlays disabled';
    }
  };

  const [showSettings, setShowSettings] = useState(false);
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const container = containerRef.current;
    if (!container || !canvasRef.current) return;

    const updateSize = () => {
      const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
      const availableWidth = rect.width - 8;
      const availableHeight = rect.height - 8;
      const size = Math.min(availableWidth, availableHeight);

      canvasRef.current!.width = size;
      canvasRef.current!.height = size;
    };

    updateSize();
    const observer = new ResizeObserver(updateSize);
    observer.observe(container);
    return () => observer.disconnect();
  }, []);

  return (
    <div className="h-full w-full flex flex-col bg-black text-white">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-2 border-b border-gray-800 shrink-0">
        <Microscope className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />
        <button
          onClick={() => setShowSettings(!showSettings)}
          className={`p-1 rounded ${showSettings ? 'bg-purple-600' : 'hover:bg-gray-800'}`}
        >
          <Settings2 className="w-3 h-3" />
        </button>
      </div>

      {showSettings && (
        <div className="p-2 bg-gray-900 border-b border-gray-800 space-y-2 text-[10px] shrink-0">
          <div>
            <div className="flex justify-between mb-1">
              <span>Magnification</span>
              <span className="font-mono font-bold">{zoom}×</span>
            </div>
            <input
              type="range"
              min="100"
              max="1000"
              step="50"
              value={zoom}
              onChange={(e) => setZoom(parseInt(e.target.value))}
              className="w-full"
            />
          </div>

          <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer">
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              checked={showGrid}
              onChange={(e) => setShowGrid(e.target.checked)}
              className="w-3 h-3"
            />
            <span>Grid</span>
          </label>

          <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer">
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              checked={showValues}
              onChange={(e) => setShowValues(e.target.checked)}
              className="w-3 h-3"
            />
            <span>RGB Values</span>
          </label>

          <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer">
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              checked={showDiagnostics}
              onChange={(e) => setShowDiagnostics(e.target.checked)}
              className="w-3 h-3"
            />
            <span>Diagnostics</span>
          </label>
        </div>
      )}

      <div ref={containerRef} className="flex-1 bg-black min-h-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-1 relative">
        <canvas
          ref={canvasRef}
          className="cursor-crosshair"
          style={{ imageRendering: 'pixelated', display: 'block' }}
        />

        {cursorPixelData && (
          <div className="absolute top-2 left-2 right-2 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded p-2 text-[10px] font-mono space-y-1">
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-2">
              <span className="text-gray-400">R:</span>
              <span className="text-red-400">{cursorPixelData.r}</span>
              <span className="text-gray-400">G:</span>
              <span className="text-green-400">{cursorPixelData.g}</span>
              <span className="text-gray-400">B:</span>
              <span className="text-blue-400">{cursorPixelData.b}</span>
              <span className="text-gray-400">A:</span>
              <span className="text-purple-400">{cursorPixelData.a}</span>
              <span className="text-gray-400">HEX:</span>
              <span className="text-white">
                #{cursorPixelData.r.toString(16).padStart(2, '0').toUpperCase()}
                {cursorPixelData.g.toString(16).padStart(2, '0').toUpperCase()}
                {cursorPixelData.b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0').toUpperCase()}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```


### MiniBar


**Category:** UI  
**File:** `components/layout/drawer/MiniBar.tsx`


*Mini bar for compact tool access*


```typescript
import { ReactNode } from 'react';
import { Eye, EyeOff, Lock, Unlock } from 'lucide-react';

// ============================================================================
// TYPES
// ============================================================================

export interface MiniBarItem {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  thumbnailUrl?: string;
  thumbnailElement?: ReactNode;
  visible?: boolean;
  locked?: boolean;
  status?: 'draft' | 'in-progress' | 'complete';
}

export type MiniBarType = 
  | 'layers' 
  | 'characters' 
  | 'panels' 
  | 'clips' 
  | 'tracks' 
  | 'shots';

interface MiniBarProps {
  type: MiniBarType;
  items: MiniBarItem[];
  selectedId: string | null;
  onSelect: (id: string) => void;
  onVisibilityToggle?: (id: string) => void;
  onLockToggle?: (id: string) => void;
  onReorder?: (fromIndex: number, toIndex: number) => void;
  className?: string;
}

// ============================================================================
// MINI BAR ITEM
// ============================================================================

interface MiniBarItemProps {
  item: MiniBarItem;
  isSelected: boolean;
  showVisibility?: boolean;
  showLock?: boolean;
  onClick: () => void;
  onVisibilityToggle?: () => void;
  onLockToggle?: () => void;
}

function MiniBarItemComponent({
  item,
  isSelected,
  showVisibility,
  showLock,
  onClick,
  onVisibilityToggle,
  onLockToggle,
}: MiniBarItemProps) {
  const getStatusColor = () => {
    switch (item.status) {
      case 'complete': return 'border-green-500';
      case 'in-progress': return 'border-yellow-500';
      case 'draft': return 'border-gray-500';
      default: return 'border-gray-600';
    }
  };

  return (
    <div 
      className={`
        group relative w-full
        ${isSelected ? 'bg-purple-600/20' : 'hover:bg-gray-700/30'}
        transition-colors duration-150
      `}
    >
      {/* Selection Indicator */}
      {isSelected && (
        <div className="absolute left-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-0.5 bg-purple-500" />
      )}

      {/* Thumbnail */}
      <button
        onClick={onClick}
        className={`
          w-full aspect-square p-1
          flex items-center justify-center
        `}
      >
        {item.thumbnailUrl ? (
          <img
            src={item.thumbnailUrl}
            alt={item.name}
            className={`
              w-full h-full object-cover rounded
              border-2 ${getStatusColor()}
            `}
          />
        ) : item.thumbnailElement ? (
          <div className={`w-full h-full rounded border-2 ${getStatusColor()} overflow-hidden`}>
            {item.thumbnailElement}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div 
            className={`
              w-full h-full rounded bg-gray-700
              border-2 ${getStatusColor()}
              flex items-center justify-center
              text-xs text-gray-400 font-medium
            `}
          >
            {item.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
          </div>
        )}
      </button>

      {/* Hover Controls */}
      <div className="absolute inset-x-0 bottom-0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 to-transparent p-1">
        <div className="flex justify-center gap-0.5">
          {showVisibility && onVisibilityToggle && (
            <button
              onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); onVisibilityToggle(); }}
              className="p-0.5 hover:bg-white/10 rounded"
              title={item.visible ? 'Hide' : 'Show'}
            >
              {item.visible !== false ? (
                <Eye className="w-3 h-3 text-white" />
              ) : (
                <EyeOff className="w-3 h-3 text-gray-400" />
              )}
            </button>
          )}
          {showLock && onLockToggle && (
            <button
              onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); onLockToggle(); }}
              className="p-0.5 hover:bg-white/10 rounded"
              title={item.locked ? 'Unlock' : 'Lock'}
            >
              {item.locked ? (
                <Lock className="w-3 h-3 text-yellow-400" />
              ) : (
                <Unlock className="w-3 h-3 text-white" />
              )}
            </button>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Name Tooltip on Hover */}
      <div className="absolute left-full ml-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 pointer-events-none opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity z-50">
        <div className="bg-gray-800 text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded whitespace-nowrap shadow-lg">
          {item.name}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// MINI BAR
// ============================================================================

export function MiniBar({
  type,
  items,
  selectedId,
  onSelect,
  onVisibilityToggle,
  onLockToggle,
  onReorder,
  className = '',
}: MiniBarProps) {
  const showVisibility = type === 'layers';
  const showLock = type === 'layers';

  const getTypeLabel = () => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'layers': return 'Layers';
      case 'characters': return 'Characters';
      case 'panels': return 'Panels';
      case 'clips': return 'Clips';
      case 'tracks': return 'Tracks';
      case 'shots': return 'Shots';
      default: return 'Items';
    }
  };

  return (
    <div 
      className={`
        w-12 bg-[#1a1a1a] border-r border-gray-700/50
        flex flex-col
        ${className}
      `}
    >
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="py-2 text-center border-b border-gray-700/50">
        <span className="text-[10px] font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
          {getTypeLabel()}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* Items */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden py-1">
        {items.map((item) => (
          <MiniBarItemComponent
            key={item.id}
            item={item}
            isSelected={item.id === selectedId}
            showVisibility={showVisibility}
            showLock={showLock}
            onClick={() => onSelect(item.id)}
            onVisibilityToggle={onVisibilityToggle ? () => onVisibilityToggle(item.id) : undefined}
            onLockToggle={onLockToggle ? () => onLockToggle(item.id) : undefined}
          />
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Footer - Count */}
      <div className="py-1 text-center border-t border-gray-700/50">
        <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">
          {items.length}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


```


### PresetLibraryPanel


**Category:** UI  
**File:** `components/panels/PresetLibraryPanel.tsx`


*Preset library panel*


```typescript
import { Star, Search, Plus, Trash2, Edit, Copy } from 'lucide-react';
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { presetService } from '../../lib/ai/PresetService';
import type { AIPreset, PresetCategory } from '../../types/presets';

const categories: Array<{ id: PresetCategory; label: string }> = [
  { id: 'enhance', label: 'Enhance' },
  { id: 'generate', label: 'Generate' },
  { id: 'edit', label: 'Edit' },
  { id: 'style', label: 'Style' },
  { id: 'outpaint', label: 'Outpaint' },
  { id: 'morph', label: 'Morph' },
];

export function PresetLibraryPanel() {
  const [presets, setPresets] = useState<AIPreset[]>([]);
  const [filteredPresets, setFilteredPresets] = useState<AIPreset[]>([]);
  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState<PresetCategory | 'all'>('all');
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [tab, setTab] = useState<'default' | 'community' | 'my'>('default');

  useEffect(() => {
    loadPresets();
  }, [tab]);

  useEffect(() => {
    filterPresets();
  }, [presets, selectedCategory, searchQuery]);

  const loadPresets = async () => {
    let data: AIPreset[] = [];

    if (tab === 'default') {
      data = await presetService.getDefaultPresets();
    } else if (tab === 'community') {
      data = await presetService.getPublicPresets();
    } else if (tab === 'my') {
      data = await presetService.getUserPresets();
    }

    setPresets(data);
  };

  const filterPresets = () => {
    let filtered = presets;

    if (selectedCategory !== 'all') {
      filtered = filtered.filter(p => p.category === selectedCategory);
    }

    if (searchQuery) {
      filtered = filtered.filter(p =>
        p.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
        (p.description && p.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
      );
    }

    setFilteredPresets(filtered);
  };

  const applyPreset = async (preset: AIPreset) => {
    await presetService.incrementUsageCount(preset.id);
    console.log('Applying preset:', preset);
  };

  const duplicatePreset = async (preset: AIPreset) => {
    await presetService.createPreset({
      name: `${preset.name} (Copy)`,
      description: preset.description || undefined,
      category: preset.category,
      parameters: preset.parameters,
      is_public: false,
    });
    loadPresets();
  };

  const deletePreset = async (id: string) => {
    if (confirm('Delete this preset?')) {
      await presetService.deletePreset(id);
      loadPresets();
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-[#1a1a1a] border-l border-gray-800">
      <div className="h-12 flex items-center justify-between px-4 border-b border-gray-800">
        <Star className="w-4 h-4 text-[#673AB7]" />
        <button
          className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded transition-colors"
          title="Create Preset"
        >
          <Plus className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
        </button>
      </div>

      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-800">
        <button
          onClick={() => setTab('default')}
          className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs rounded transition-colors ${
            tab === 'default'
              ? 'bg-[#673AB7] text-white'
              : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700'
          }`}
        >
          Default
        </button>
        <button
          onClick={() => setTab('community')}
          className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs rounded transition-colors ${
            tab === 'community'
              ? 'bg-[#673AB7] text-white'
              : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700'
          }`}
        >
          Community
        </button>
        <button
          onClick={() => setTab('my')}
          className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs rounded transition-colors ${
            tab === 'my'
              ? 'bg-[#673AB7] text-white'
              : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700'
          }`}
        >
          My Presets
        </button>
      </div>

      <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-800">
        <div className="relative">
          <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
          <input
            type="text"
            placeholder="Search presets..."
            value={searchQuery}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
            className="w-full bg-gray-900 text-white text-sm pl-10 pr-4 py-2 rounded border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#673AB7] focus:outline-none"
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 border-b border-gray-800 overflow-x-auto">
        <button
          onClick={() => setSelectedCategory('all')}
          className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded whitespace-nowrap transition-colors ${
            selectedCategory === 'all'
              ? 'bg-[#673AB7] text-white'
              : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700'
          }`}
        >
          All
        </button>
        {categories.map((cat) => (
          <button
            key={cat.id}
            onClick={() => setSelectedCategory(cat.id)}
            className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded whitespace-nowrap transition-colors ${
              selectedCategory === cat.id
                ? 'bg-[#673AB7] text-white'
                : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700'
            }`}
          >
            {cat.label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-2">
        {filteredPresets.map((preset) => (
          <div
            key={preset.id}
            className="group bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 rounded-lg p-3 hover:border-[#673AB7] transition-colors"
          >
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-2">
              <div className="flex-1">
                <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white">{preset.name}</h3>
                {preset.description && (
                  <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">{preset.description}</p>
                )}
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                {!preset.is_default && (
                  <>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => duplicatePreset(preset)}
                      className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded transition-colors"
                      title="Duplicate"
                    >
                      <Copy className="w-3 h-3 text-gray-400" />
                    </button>
                    {tab === 'my' && (
                      <>
                        <button
                          className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded transition-colors"
                          title="Edit"
                        >
                          <Edit className="w-3 h-3 text-gray-400" />
                        </button>
                        <button
                          onClick={() => deletePreset(preset.id)}
                          className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded transition-colors"
                          title="Delete"
                        >
                          <Trash2 className="w-3 h-3 text-red-400" />
                        </button>
                      </>
                    )}
                  </>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-gray-800 text-[10px] text-gray-400 rounded capitalize">
                  {preset.category}
                </span>
                {preset.is_default && (
                  <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-[#673AB7]/20 text-[10px] text-[#673AB7] rounded">
                    Default
                  </span>
                )}
                <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">
                  {preset.usage_count} uses
                </span>
              </div>
              <button
                onClick={() => applyPreset(preset)}
                className="px-3 py-1 bg-[#673AB7] hover:bg-[#7E57C2] text-white text-xs rounded transition-colors"
              >
                Apply
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}

        {filteredPresets.length === 0 && (
          <div className="text-center py-12">
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">No presets found</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```


### ToolSettingsMiniBar


**Category:** UI  
**File:** `components/image/ToolSettingsMiniBar.tsx`


*Tool settings mini bar*


```typescript
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import {
  Droplet,
  Circle,
  Square,
  Minus,
  Plus,
  Lock,
  Unlock,
  Eye,
  EyeOff,
  RotateCcw,
  Feather,
  Zap,
  Target,
  Layers,
  Blend,
  Pipette,
  Palette,
  Contrast,
  Sun,
  Moon,
  Sparkles,
  Wand2,
  Move,
  PenTool,
  Eraser,
  Brush,
  Maximize2,
  X,
  Settings,
  ChevronUp,
  ChevronDown,
  Scissors,
} from 'lucide-react';

// ============================================================================
// TYPES
// ============================================================================

export type ToolType =
  | 'select'
  | 'magic-wand'
  | 'brush'
  | 'eraser'
  | 'pen'
  | 'move'
  | 'gradient'
  | 'fill'
  | 'clone'
  | 'heal'
  | 'lasso'
  | 'crop'
  | 'text'
  | 'shape'
  | 'eyedropper'
  | 'zoom';

export interface ToolSettings {
  // Common
  size: number;
  opacity: number;
  hardness: number;
  flow: number;
  spacing: number;
  
  // Selection (Magic Wand)
  tolerance: number;
  contiguous: boolean;
  antiAlias: boolean;
  sampleAllLayers: boolean;
  
  // Color mode for tolerance
  colorMode: 'rgb' | 'hsv' | 'lab';
  
  // Brush
  blendMode: string;
  pressure: boolean;
  smoothing: number;
  
  // Colors
  foreground: string;
  background: string;
  
  // Live Segmentation Settings
  livePreview: boolean;
  previewPattern: 'solid' | 'diagonal-lines' | 'crosshatch' | 'dots';
  previewLineAngle: number;
  previewLineSpacing: number;
  previewBorderWidth: number;
  
  // Lasso Settings (Ultimate Lasso System)
  lassoVariant: 'classic' | 'photoshop' | 'elastic' | 'edge-trail' | 'predictive' | 'adaptive' | 'ai-assisted' | 'snake';
  lassoSearchRadius: number;
  lassoEdgeSensitivity: number;
  lassoCursorInfluence: number;
  lassoAutoAnchor: boolean;
}

type MiniBarState = 'closed' | 'mini';

interface ToolSettingsMiniBarProps {
  tool: ToolType;
  settings: ToolSettings;
  onSettingsChange: (settings: ToolSettings) => void;
  onOpenFullSettings?: () => void;
  onClose?: () => void;
}

// ============================================================================
// MINI SLIDER COMPONENT
// ============================================================================

interface MiniSliderProps {
  value: number;
  min: number;
  max: number;
  label: string;
  color?: string;
  onChange: (value: number) => void;
  showValue?: boolean;
}

function MiniSlider({ 
  value, 
  min, 
  max, 
  label, 
  color = '#8B5CF6', 
  onChange,
  showValue = true,
}: MiniSliderProps) {
  const percentage = ((value - min) / (max - min)) * 100;
  
  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5 group">
      <span className="text-[7px] text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">{label}</span>
      <div 
        className="relative w-3 h-14 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden cursor-pointer"
        onClick={(e) => {
          const rect = e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
          const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
          const newValue = max - ((y / rect.height) * (max - min));
          onChange(Math.max(min, Math.min(max, Math.round(newValue))));
        }}
      >
        <div 
          className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 rounded-full transition-all"
          style={{ 
            height: `${percentage}%`,
            background: `linear-gradient(to top, ${color}99, ${color})`,
          }}
        />
        <div 
          className="absolute left-0 right-0 h-1 bg-white rounded-full shadow-lg transition-all"
          style={{ bottom: `calc(${percentage}% - 2px)` }}
        />
      </div>
      {showValue && (
        <span className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-mono">{value}</span>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// RGB/HSV/LAB COLOR BARS
// ============================================================================

interface ColorBarsProps {
  mode: 'rgb' | 'hsv' | 'lab';
  tolerance: number;
  onToleranceChange: (channel: string, value: number) => void;
}

function ColorBars({ mode, tolerance, onToleranceChange }: ColorBarsProps) {
  const [channels, setChannels] = useState({
    r: tolerance, g: tolerance, b: tolerance,
    h: tolerance, s: tolerance, v: tolerance,
    l: tolerance, a: tolerance, bb: tolerance,
  });

  const updateChannel = (channel: string, value: number) => {
    setChannels(prev => ({ ...prev, [channel]: value }));
    onToleranceChange(channel, value);
  };

  if (mode === 'rgb') {
    return (
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-1 py-2">
        <span className="text-[7px] text-gray-500 uppercase text-center">RGB Tolerance</span>
        <div className="flex justify-center gap-1">
          {[
            { key: 'r', label: 'R', color: '#FF0000', gradient: 'linear-gradient(to top, #1a0000, #FF0000)' },
            { key: 'g', label: 'G', color: '#00FF00', gradient: 'linear-gradient(to top, #001a00, #00FF00)' },
            { key: 'b', label: 'B', color: '#0000FF', gradient: 'linear-gradient(to top, #00001a, #0000FF)' },
          ].map(({ key, label, color, gradient }) => (
            <div key={key} className="flex flex-col items-center">
              <div 
                className="w-2.5 h-12 rounded-full overflow-hidden cursor-pointer relative"
                style={{ background: gradient }}
                onClick={(e) => {
                  const rect = e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
                  const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
                  updateChannel(key, Math.round((1 - y / rect.height) * 255));
                }}
              >
                <div 
                  className="absolute left-0 right-0 h-0.5 bg-white shadow-lg"
                  style={{ bottom: `${(channels[key as keyof typeof channels] as number / 255) * 100}%` }}
                />
              </div>
              <span className="text-[7px] mt-0.5" style={{ color }}>{label}</span>
              <span className="text-[8px] text-gray-400 font-mono">{channels[key as keyof typeof channels]}</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (mode === 'hsv') {
    return (
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-1 py-2">
        <span className="text-[7px] text-gray-500 uppercase text-center">HSV Tolerance</span>
        <div className="flex justify-center gap-1">
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center">
            <div 
              className="w-2.5 h-12 rounded-full overflow-hidden cursor-pointer relative"
              style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(to top, #FF0000, #FFFF00, #00FF00, #00FFFF, #0000FF, #FF00FF, #FF0000)' }}
              onClick={(e) => {
                const rect = e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
                const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
                updateChannel('h', Math.round((1 - y / rect.height) * 360));
              }}
            >
              <div 
                className="absolute left-0 right-0 h-0.5 bg-white shadow-lg"
                style={{ bottom: `${(channels.h / 360) * 100}%` }}
              />
            </div>
            <span className="text-[7px] text-orange-400 mt-0.5">H</span>
            <span className="text-[8px] text-gray-400 font-mono">{channels.h}°</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center">
            <div 
              className="w-2.5 h-12 rounded-full overflow-hidden cursor-pointer relative"
              style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(to top, #808080, #FF0000)' }}
              onClick={(e) => {
                const rect = e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
                const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
                updateChannel('s', Math.round((1 - y / rect.height) * 100));
              }}
            >
              <div 
                className="absolute left-0 right-0 h-0.5 bg-white shadow-lg"
                style={{ bottom: `${channels.s}%` }}
              />
            </div>
            <span className="text-[7px] text-pink-400 mt-0.5">S</span>
            <span className="text-[8px] text-gray-400 font-mono">{channels.s}%</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center">
            <div 
              className="w-2.5 h-12 rounded-full overflow-hidden cursor-pointer relative"
              style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(to top, #000000, #FFFFFF)' }}
              onClick={(e) => {
                const rect = e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
                const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
                updateChannel('v', Math.round((1 - y / rect.height) * 100));
              }}
            >
              <div 
                className="absolute left-0 right-0 h-0.5 bg-purple-500 shadow-lg"
                style={{ bottom: `${channels.v}%` }}
              />
            </div>
            <span className="text-[7px] text-yellow-400 mt-0.5">V</span>
            <span className="text-[8px] text-gray-400 font-mono">{channels.v}%</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // LAB
  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col gap-1 py-2">
      <span className="text-[7px] text-gray-500 uppercase text-center">LAB Tolerance</span>
      <div className="flex justify-center gap-1">
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center">
          <div 
            className="w-2.5 h-12 rounded-full overflow-hidden cursor-pointer relative"
            style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(to top, #000000, #FFFFFF)' }}
            onClick={(e) => {
              const rect = e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
              const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
              updateChannel('l', Math.round((1 - y / rect.height) * 100));
            }}
          >
            <div 
              className="absolute left-0 right-0 h-0.5 bg-purple-500 shadow-lg"
              style={{ bottom: `${channels.l}%` }}
            />
          </div>
          <span className="text-[7px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5">L</span>
          <span className="text-[8px] text-gray-400 font-mono">{channels.l}</span>
        </div>
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center">
          <div 
            className="w-2.5 h-12 rounded-full overflow-hidden cursor-pointer relative"
            style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(to top, #00FF00, #FF00FF)' }}
            onClick={(e) => {
              const rect = e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
              const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
              updateChannel('a', Math.round((1 - y / rect.height) * 256 - 128));
            }}
          >
            <div 
              className="absolute left-0 right-0 h-0.5 bg-white shadow-lg"
              style={{ bottom: `${((channels.a + 128) / 256) * 100}%` }}
            />
          </div>
          <span className="text-[7px] text-purple-400 mt-0.5">a</span>
          <span className="text-[8px] text-gray-400 font-mono">{channels.a}</span>
        </div>
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center">
          <div 
            className="w-2.5 h-12 rounded-full overflow-hidden cursor-pointer relative"
            style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(to top, #0000FF, #FFFF00)' }}
            onClick={(e) => {
              const rect = e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
              const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
              updateChannel('bb', Math.round((1 - y / rect.height) * 256 - 128));
            }}
          >
            <div 
              className="absolute left-0 right-0 h-0.5 bg-white shadow-lg"
              style={{ bottom: `${((channels.bb + 128) / 256) * 100}%` }}
            />
          </div>
          <span className="text-[7px] text-cyan-400 mt-0.5">b</span>
          <span className="text-[8px] text-gray-400 font-mono">{channels.bb}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// MINI TOGGLE BUTTON
// ============================================================================

interface MiniToggleProps {
  active: boolean;
  icon: React.ReactNode;
  label: string;
  onClick: () => void;
  color?: string;
}

function MiniToggle({ active, icon, label, onClick, color = '#8B5CF6' }: MiniToggleProps) {
  return (
    <button
      onClick={onClick}
      className={`
        w-6 h-6 rounded flex items-center justify-center transition-all
        ${active 
          ? 'text-white shadow-lg' 
          : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-800'
        }
      `}
      style={active ? { backgroundColor: color, boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${color}50` } : {}}
      title={label}
    >
      {icon}
    </button>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// TOOLBAR BUTTONS (for bottom of toolbar)
// ============================================================================

interface ToolbarButtonProps {
  icon: React.ReactNode;
  label: string;
  onClick: () => void;
  isActive?: boolean;
}

export function ToolbarSettingsButton({ onClick }: { onClick: () => void }) {
  return (
    <button
      onClick={onClick}
      className="w-10 h-8 flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-800/80 hover:bg-purple-600/80 rounded-lg transition-all text-gray-400 hover:text-white border border-gray-700/50 hover:border-purple-500/50"
      title="Open Tool Settings"
    >
      <Settings className="w-4 h-4" />
    </button>
  );
}

export function ToolbarColorSwatchButton({ 
  foreground, 
  background, 
  onSwap,
  onClick,
}: { 
  foreground: string; 
  background: string; 
  onSwap: () => void;
  onClick?: () => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1 py-1">
      <div className="relative w-10 h-10">
        {/* Background color (behind) */}
        <div 
          className="absolute right-0 bottom-0 w-6 h-6 rounded border border-white/20 cursor-pointer shadow-inner"
          style={{ backgroundColor: background }}
          title="Background Color"
          onClick={onClick}
          role="button"
          tabIndex={0}
          onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') { e.preventDefault(); onClick?.(); } }}
        />
        {/* Foreground color (front) */}
        <div 
          className="absolute left-0 top-0 w-6 h-6 rounded border-2 border-white/30 cursor-pointer shadow-lg"
          style={{ backgroundColor: foreground }}
          title="Foreground Color"
          onClick={onClick}
          role="button"
          tabIndex={0}
          onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') { e.preventDefault(); onClick?.(); } }}
        />
        {/* Swap button - using div to avoid button nesting */}
        <div 
          onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); onSwap(); }}
          className="absolute -right-1 -top-1 w-4 h-4 bg-gray-700 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-[8px] text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-gray-600 border border-gray-600 cursor-pointer"
          title="Swap Colors (X)"
          role="button"
          tabIndex={0}
          onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') { e.preventDefault(); onSwap(); } }}
        >
          ⇄
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// MAIN MINI BAR COMPONENT
// ============================================================================

export function ToolSettingsMiniBar({
  tool,
  settings,
  onSettingsChange,
  onOpenFullSettings,
  onClose,
}: ToolSettingsMiniBarProps) {
  
  const updateSetting = <K extends keyof ToolSettings>(key: K, value: ToolSettings[K]) => {
    onSettingsChange({ ...settings, [key]: value });
  };

  const getToolIcon = () => {
    switch (tool) {
      case 'magic-wand': return <Wand2 className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />;
      case 'brush': return <Brush className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />;
      case 'eraser': return <Eraser className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />;
      case 'pen': return <PenTool className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />;
      case 'move': return <Move className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />;
      case 'select': return <Target className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />;
      case 'lasso': return <Scissors className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />;
      case 'gradient': return <Droplet className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />;
      case 'eyedropper': return <Pipette className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />;
      default: return <Settings className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />;
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="w-12 bg-[#1a1a1a] border-r border-gray-700/50 flex flex-col items-center overflow-hidden">
      {/* MINI BAR CONTENT */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center py-2 gap-3 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar">
        {/* Tool Icon */}
        <div className="p-1.5 bg-purple-600/20 rounded-lg">
          {getToolIcon()}
        </div>

        {/* Divider */}
        <div className="w-8 h-px bg-gray-700" />

        {/* Common Settings */}
        <MiniSlider
          value={settings.size}
          min={1}
          max={500}
          label="Size"
          color="#3B82F6"
          onChange={(v) => updateSetting('size', v)}
        />

        <MiniSlider
          value={settings.opacity}
          min={0}
          max={100}
          label="Opac"
          color="#8B5CF6"
          onChange={(v) => updateSetting('opacity', v)}
        />

        {/* Tool-specific settings */}
        
        {/* BRUSH Tool */}
        {tool === 'brush' && (
          <>
            <div className="w-8 h-px bg-gray-700" />
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.hardness}
              min={0}
              max={100}
              label="Hard"
              color="#10B981"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('hardness', v)}
            />
            
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.flow}
              min={1}
              max={100}
              label="Flow"
              color="#F59E0B"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('flow', v)}
            />

            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.spacing}
              min={1}
              max={100}
              label="Spac"
              color="#06B6D4"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('spacing', v)}
            />

            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.smoothing}
              min={0}
              max={100}
              label="Smth"
              color="#EC4899"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('smoothing', v)}
            />

            <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
              <MiniToggle
                active={settings.pressure}
                icon={<Feather className="w-3 h-3" />}
                label="Pressure Sensitivity"
                onClick={() => updateSetting('pressure', !settings.pressure)}
                color="#14B8A6"
              />
            </div>
          </>
        )}

        {/* ERASER Tool */}
        {tool === 'eraser' && (
          <>
            <div className="w-8 h-px bg-gray-700" />
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.hardness}
              min={0}
              max={100}
              label="Hard"
              color="#10B981"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('hardness', v)}
            />
            
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.flow}
              min={1}
              max={100}
              label="Flow"
              color="#F59E0B"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('flow', v)}
            />

            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.smoothing}
              min={0}
              max={100}
              label="Smth"
              color="#EC4899"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('smoothing', v)}
            />

            <MiniToggle
              active={settings.pressure}
              icon={<Feather className="w-3 h-3" />}
              label="Pressure Sensitivity"
              onClick={() => updateSetting('pressure', !settings.pressure)}
              color="#14B8A6"
            />
          </>
        )}

        {/* PEN Tool (Vector) */}
        {tool === 'pen' && (
          <>
            <div className="w-8 h-px bg-gray-700" />
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.size}
              min={1}
              max={50}
              label="Weight"
              color="#10B981"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('size', v)}
            />
            
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.smoothing}
              min={0}
              max={100}
              label="Curve"
              color="#EC4899"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('smoothing', v)}
            />

            <MiniToggle
              active={settings.pressure}
              icon={<Feather className="w-3 h-3" />}
              label="Pressure Width"
              onClick={() => updateSetting('pressure', !settings.pressure)}
              color="#3B82F6"
            />
          </>
        )}

        {/* GRADIENT Tool */}
        {tool === 'gradient' && (
          <>
            <div className="w-8 h-px bg-gray-700" />
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.opacity}
              min={0}
              max={100}
              label="Opac"
              color="#8B5CF6"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('opacity', v)}
            />
            
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5">
              <span className="text-[7px] text-gray-500 uppercase">Type</span>
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-purple-600 rounded text-[8px] text-white">Linear</button>
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded text-[8px]">Radial</button>
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded text-[8px]">Angle</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </>
        )}

        {/* CLONE Tool */}
        {tool === 'clone' && (
          <>
            <div className="w-8 h-px bg-gray-700" />
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.hardness}
              min={0}
              max={100}
              label="Hard"
              color="#10B981"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('hardness', v)}
            />
            
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.flow}
              min={1}
              max={100}
              label="Flow"
              color="#F59E0B"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('flow', v)}
            />

            <MiniToggle
              active={settings.sampleAllLayers}
              icon={<Layers className="w-3 h-3" />}
              label="Sample All Layers"
              onClick={() => updateSetting('sampleAllLayers', !settings.sampleAllLayers)}
              color="#3B82F6"
            />
          </>
        )}

        {/* SELECT Tool (Rectangle/Ellipse) */}
        {tool === 'select' && (
          <>
            <div className="w-8 h-px bg-gray-700" />
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.size}
              min={0}
              max={100}
              label="Feath"
              color="#EC4899"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('size', v)}
            />

            <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
              <MiniToggle
                active={settings.antiAlias}
                icon={<Circle className="w-3 h-3" />}
                label="Anti-Alias"
                onClick={() => updateSetting('antiAlias', !settings.antiAlias)}
                color="#10B981"
              />
            </div>
          </>
        )}

        {/* LASSO Tool (Ultimate Lasso System - 8 Variants!) */}
        {tool === 'lasso' && (
          <>
            <div className="w-8 h-px bg-gray-700" />
            
            {/* Lasso Variant Selector */}
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5">
              <span className="text-[7px] text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Variant</span>
              <select
                value={settings.lassoVariant}
                onChange={(e) => updateSetting('lassoVariant', e.target.value as any)}
                className="w-10 px-1 py-0.5 bg-gray-800 text-[8px] text-gray-300 rounded border border-gray-700 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-700"
                style={{
                  fontSize: '8px',
                  padding: '2px 1px',
                }}
              >
                <option value="classic">Classic</option>
                <option value="photoshop">Photoshop</option>
                <option value="elastic">Elastic ⭐</option>
                <option value="edge-trail">Edge Trail</option>
                <option value="predictive">Predictive</option>
                <option value="adaptive">Adaptive</option>
                <option value="ai-assisted">AI</option>
                <option value="snake">Snake</option>
              </select>
              <div 
                className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full"
                style={{ 
                  backgroundColor: 
                    settings.lassoVariant === 'classic' ? '#00d9ff' :
                    settings.lassoVariant === 'photoshop' ? '#ff6b6b' :
                    settings.lassoVariant === 'elastic' ? '#ffd700' :
                    settings.lassoVariant === 'edge-trail' ? '#00ff88' :
                    settings.lassoVariant === 'predictive' ? '#a855f7' :
                    settings.lassoVariant === 'adaptive' ? '#f97316' :
                    settings.lassoVariant === 'ai-assisted' ? '#ec4899' : '#22d3ee'
                }}
              />
            </div>

            {/* Search Radius */}
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.lassoSearchRadius}
              min={5}
              max={50}
              label="Radius"
              color="#00d9ff"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('lassoSearchRadius', v)}
            />

            {/* Edge Sensitivity */}
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.lassoEdgeSensitivity}
              min={0}
              max={100}
              label="Edge"
              color="#ffd700"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('lassoEdgeSensitivity', v)}
            />

            {/* Cursor Influence */}
            <MiniSlider
              value={Math.round(settings.lassoCursorInfluence * 100)}
              min={0}
              max={50}
              label="Cursor"
              color="#a855f7"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('lassoCursorInfluence', v / 100)}
            />

            {/* Auto-Anchor Toggle */}
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
              <MiniToggle
                active={settings.lassoAutoAnchor}
                icon={<Target className="w-3 h-3" />}
                label="Auto-Anchor"
                onClick={() => updateSetting('lassoAutoAnchor', !settings.lassoAutoAnchor)}
                color="#00ff88"
              />
            </div>
          </>
        )}

        {/* CROP Tool */}
        {tool === 'crop' && (
          <>
            <div className="w-8 h-px bg-gray-700" />
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5">
              <span className="text-[7px] text-gray-500 uppercase">Ratio</span>
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-purple-600 rounded text-[8px] text-white">Free</button>
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded text-[8px]">1:1</button>
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded text-[8px]">16:9</button>
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded text-[8px]">4:3</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </>
        )}

        {/* TEXT Tool */}
        {tool === 'text' && (
          <>
            <div className="w-8 h-px bg-gray-700" />
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.size}
              min={8}
              max={200}
              label="Size"
              color="#3B82F6"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('size', v)}
            />
            
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.opacity}
              min={0}
              max={100}
              label="Opac"
              color="#8B5CF6"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('opacity', v)}
            />

            <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
              <MiniToggle
                active={settings.antiAlias}
                icon={<Circle className="w-3 h-3" />}
                label="Anti-Alias"
                onClick={() => updateSetting('antiAlias', !settings.antiAlias)}
                color="#10B981"
              />
            </div>
          </>
        )}

        {/* SHAPE Tool */}
        {tool === 'shape' && (
          <>
            <div className="w-8 h-px bg-gray-700" />
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.size}
              min={1}
              max={50}
              label="Stroke"
              color="#10B981"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('size', v)}
            />
            
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.opacity}
              min={0}
              max={100}
              label="Opac"
              color="#8B5CF6"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('opacity', v)}
            />

            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5">
              <span className="text-[7px] text-gray-500 uppercase">Type</span>
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-purple-600 rounded text-[8px] text-white">■</button>
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded text-[8px]">●</button>
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded text-[8px]">▲</button>
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded text-[8px]">★</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </>
        )}

        {/* EYEDROPPER Tool */}
        {tool === 'eyedropper' && (
          <>
            <div className="w-8 h-px bg-gray-700" />
            <MiniSlider
              value={settings.size}
              min={1}
              max={50}
              label="Sample"
              color="#3B82F6"
              onChange={(v) => updateSetting('size', v)}
            />

            <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
              <MiniToggle
                active={settings.sampleAllLayers}
                icon={<Layers className="w-3 h-3" />}
                label="All Layers"
                onClick={() => updateSetting('sampleAllLayers', !settings.sampleAllLayers)}
                color="#10B981"
              />
            </div>
          </>
        )}

        {/* ZOOM Tool */}
        {tool === 'zoom' && (
          <>
            <div className="w-8 h-px bg-gray-700" />
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5">
              <span className="text-[7px] text-gray-500 uppercase text-center">Zoom Level</span>
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded text-[8px]">25%</button>
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded text-[8px]">50%</button>
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-purple-600 rounded text-[8px] text-white">100%</button>
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded text-[8px]">200%</button>
                <button className="px-1.5 py-0.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded text-[8px]">Fit</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </>
        )}

        {/* MOVE Tool */}
        {tool === 'move' && (
          <>
            <div className="w-8 h-px bg-gray-700" />
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
              <MiniToggle
                active={true}
                icon={<Layers className="w-3 h-3" />}
                label="Show Bounds"
                onClick={() => {}}
                color="#3B82F6"
              />
              <MiniToggle
                active={false}
                icon={<Lock className="w-3 h-3" />}
                label="Auto-Select"
                onClick={() => {}}
                color="#10B981"
              />
            </div>
          </>
        )}

        {/* Magic Wand specific */}
        {tool === 'magic-wand' && (
          <>
            <div className="w-8 h-px bg-gray-700" />
            
            {/* Live Preview Toggle */}
            <MiniToggle
              active={settings.livePreview !== false}
              icon={<Eye className="w-3 h-3" />}
              label="Live Preview"
              onClick={() => updateSetting('livePreview', !settings.livePreview)}
              color="#10B981"
            />
            
            {/* Color Mode Selector */}
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5">
              <span className="text-[7px] text-gray-500 uppercase">Mode</span>
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
                {(['rgb', 'hsv', 'lab'] as const).map((mode) => (
                  <button
                    key={mode}
                    onClick={() => updateSetting('colorMode', mode)}
                    className={`
                      px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-[8px] uppercase font-bold transition-all
                      ${settings.colorMode === mode 
                        ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white' 
                        : 'text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-800'
                      }
                    `}
                  >
                    {mode}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Color Tolerance Bars */}
            <ColorBars
              mode={settings.colorMode}
              tolerance={settings.tolerance}
              onToleranceChange={(channel, value) => {
                updateSetting('tolerance', value);
              }}
            />

            {/* Options */}
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
              <MiniToggle
                active={settings.contiguous}
                icon={<Target className="w-3 h-3" />}
                label="Contiguous"
                onClick={() => updateSetting('contiguous', !settings.contiguous)}
                color="#3B82F6"
              />
              <MiniToggle
                active={settings.antiAlias}
                icon={<Circle className="w-3 h-3" />}
                label="Anti-Alias"
                onClick={() => updateSetting('antiAlias', !settings.antiAlias)}
                color="#10B981"
              />
              <MiniToggle
                active={settings.sampleAllLayers}
                icon={<Layers className="w-3 h-3" />}
                label="Sample All Layers"
                onClick={() => updateSetting('sampleAllLayers', !settings.sampleAllLayers)}
                color="#F59E0B"
              />
            </div>
          </>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* BOTTOM: Buttons */}
      <div className="border-t border-gray-700/50 flex flex-col">
        {/* Open full settings */}
        {onOpenFullSettings && (
          <button
            onClick={onOpenFullSettings}
            className="w-full h-8 flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-800/50 hover:bg-purple-600/50 transition-colors text-gray-400 hover:text-white"
            title="Open Full Settings"
          >
            <Maximize2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
          </button>
        )}
        {/* Close mini bar */}
        {onClose && (
          <button
            onClick={onClose}
            className="w-full h-8 flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-800/50 hover:bg-red-600/50 transition-colors text-gray-400 hover:text-white border-t border-gray-700/30"
            title="Close Tool Settings"
          >
            <X className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
          </button>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default ToolSettingsMiniBar;

```
