    tempCanvas.width = 800;
    tempCanvas.height = 600;
    const ctx = tempCanvas.getContext('2d');
    if (!ctx) return;
    
    // Draw all visible layers
    let hasContent = false;
    for (const layer of layers) {
      if (!layer.visible || !layer.dataUrl) continue;
      
      const img = imageLoadCache.current.get(layer.dataUrl);
      if (img && img.complete) {
        ctx.save();
        ctx.globalAlpha = layer.opacity;
        const { x, y, width, height } = layer.bounds;
        ctx.drawImage(img, x + 400, y + 300, width, height);
        ctx.restore();
        hasContent = true;
      }
    }
    
    if (!hasContent) {
      debugLog.canvas('No visible layers with images - lasso will not work');
      return;
    }
    
    // Get ImageData for edge detection
    const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, 800, 600);
    setLassoImageData(imageData);
    
    const duration = performance.now() - start;
    debugLog.canvas(`ImageData loaded for lasso in ${duration.toFixed(1)}ms`);
  }, [activeTool]); // Only when tool changes, NOT on layer changes!
  useEffect(() => {
    debugLog.canvas('Main effect triggered with', layers.length, 'layers');
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    const container = containerRef.current;
    if (!canvas || !container) {
      debugLog.canvas('Canvas or container not ready');
      return;
    }

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently: true });
    if (!ctx) {
      debugLog.canvas('Failed to get 2D context');
      return;
    }

    let animationFrameId: number | null = null;

    const drawCanvas = () => {
      debugLog.canvas('Drawing canvas with', layers.length, 'layers');
      // Outer canvas background (workspace) - silky dark grey
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2a2a2e';
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

      ctx.save();
      ctx.translate(canvasState.panX + canvas.width / 2, canvasState.panY + canvas.height / 2);
      ctx.scale(canvasState.zoom, canvasState.zoom);

      // Inner canvas background (image area) - slightly lighter grey
      ctx.fillStyle = '#353539';
      ctx.fillRect(-400, -300, 800, 600);

      // Subtle border around canvas (darker than inner, lighter than outer)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#454549';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1 / canvasState.zoom;
      ctx.strokeRect(-400, -300, 800, 600);

      for (const layer of layers) {
        if (!layer.visible) continue;
        debugLog.canvas('Rendering layer:', layer.name, 'bounds:', layer.bounds, 'hasDataUrl:', !!layer.dataUrl);

        ctx.save();
        ctx.globalAlpha = layer.opacity;
        ctx.globalCompositeOperation = getCompositeOperation(layer.blendMode);

        const { x, y, width, height } = layer.bounds;
        const { rotation, scaleX, scaleY } = layer.transform;

        ctx.translate(x + width / 2, y + height / 2);
        ctx.rotate((rotation * Math.PI) / 180);
        ctx.scale(scaleX, scaleY);
        ctx.translate(-(width / 2), -(height / 2));

        if (layer.dataUrl) {
          const img = imageLoadCache.current.get(layer.id);
          if (img && img.complete) {
            debugLog.canvas('Drawing image for layer:', layer.name, 'at', x, y, width, height);

            // Apply modifiers if the layer has any
            if (layer.modifierStack && layer.modifierStack.length > 0) {
              debugLog.canvas('Applying', layer.modifierStack.length, 'modifiers to layer:', layer.name);

              // Create a temporary canvas to apply modifiers
              const tempCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
              tempCanvas.width = width;
              tempCanvas.height = height;
              const tempCtx = tempCanvas.getContext('2d');

              if (tempCtx) {
                // Draw original image to temp canvas
                tempCtx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);

                // Get image data
                const imageData = tempCtx.getImageData(0, 0, width, height);

                // Apply modifier stack
                const modifierStack = new ModifierStack();
                modifierStack['stack'] = layer.modifierStack;
                const processedImageData = modifierStack.applyStack(imageData);

                // Put processed image data back
                tempCtx.putImageData(processedImageData, 0, 0);

                // Draw the processed image
                ctx.drawImage(tempCanvas, 0, 0, width, height);
              }
            } else {
              // No modifiers, draw directly
              ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
            }
          } else {
            debugLog.canvas('Image not ready for layer:', layer.name, 'loading...');
            if (!imageLoadCache.current.has(layer.id)) {
              loadLayerImage(layer.id, layer.dataUrl);
            }
            drawPlaceholder(ctx, layer, width, height);
          }
        } else {
          debugLog.canvas('No dataUrl for layer:', layer.name);
          drawPlaceholder(ctx, layer, width, height);
        }

        ctx.restore();
      }
      
      // DISABLED: Draw lasso paths - was causing crashes and lag
      // Draw lasso paths - re-enabled
      if (activeTool === 'lasso') {
        debugLog.canvas('About to call drawLasso - activeTool is lasso');
        drawLasso(ctx);
      } else {
        debugLog.canvas('NOT calling drawLasso - activeTool is:', activeTool);
      }

      ctx.restore();
    };

    const loadLayerImage = (layerId: string, dataUrl: string) => {
      debugLog.canvas('Loading image for layer:', layerId, 'dataUrl length:', dataUrl?.length);
      const img = new Image();
      // Set crossOrigin BEFORE setting src to prevent canvas tainting for external URLs
      // This is safe for data: URLs and required for http(s): URLs
      if (!dataUrl.startsWith('data:')) {
        img.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';
      }
      img.onload = () => {
        debugLog.canvas('Image loaded successfully for layer:', layerId);
        imageLoadCache.current.set(layerId, img);
        requestRedraw();
      };
      img.onerror = (e) => {
        console.error(`[Canvas] Failed to load image for layer ${layerId}`, e);
      };
      imageLoadCache.current.set(layerId, img);
      img.src = dataUrl;
    };

    const requestRedraw = () => {
      if (animationFrameId === null) {
        animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
          drawCanvas();
          animationFrameId = null;
        });
      }
    };

    const resizeCanvas = () => {
      canvas.width = container.clientWidth;
      canvas.height = container.clientHeight;
      drawCanvas();
    };

    const drawPlaceholder = (ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, layer: any, width: number, height: number) => {
      const hash = layer.id.split('').reduce((acc: number, char: string) => {
        return char.charCodeAt(0) + ((acc << 5) - acc);
      }, 0);
      const hue = Math.abs(hash) % 360;
      ctx.fillStyle = `hsl(${hue}, 70%, 60%)`;
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
    };

    const getCompositeOperation = (blendMode: string): GlobalCompositeOperation => {
      const modeMap: Record<string, GlobalCompositeOperation> = {
        'normal': 'source-over',
        'multiply': 'multiply',
        'screen': 'screen',
        'overlay': 'overlay',
        'darken': 'darken',
        'lighten': 'lighten',
        'color-dodge': 'color-dodge',
        'color-burn': 'color-burn',
        'hard-light': 'hard-light',
        'soft-light': 'soft-light',
        'difference': 'difference',
        'exclusion': 'exclusion',
        'hue': 'hue',
        'saturation': 'saturation',
        'color': 'color',
        'luminosity': 'luminosity',
      };
      return modeMap[blendMode] || 'source-over';
    };


    const drawSelection = (ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, mask: Uint8ClampedArray, width: number) => {
      ctx.save();
      ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);

      const imageData = ctx.createImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);
      for (let i = 0; i < mask.length; i++) {
        if (mask[i] > 0) {
          const idx = i * 4;
          imageData.data[idx] = 3;
          imageData.data[idx + 1] = 169;
          imageData.data[idx + 2] = 244;
          imageData.data[idx + 3] = 80;
        }
      }

      ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);

      ctx.strokeStyle = '#03A9F4';
      ctx.lineWidth = 2;
      ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);

      if (selectionState.bounds) {
        const bounds = selectionState.bounds;
        const screenX = (bounds.x * canvasState.zoom) + canvasState.panX + canvas.width / 2;
        const screenY = (bounds.y * canvasState.zoom) + canvasState.panY + canvas.height / 2;
        const screenW = bounds.width * canvasState.zoom;
        const screenH = bounds.height * canvasState.zoom;

        ctx.strokeRect(screenX, screenY, screenW, screenH);
      }

      ctx.restore();
    };
    
    // Draw lasso paths (Simplified Working System)
    const drawLasso = (ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D) => {
      debugLog.canvas('drawLasso called - isActive:', lasso.isActive, 'anchors:', lasso.state.anchors.length, 'livePath:', lasso.state.livePath.length);
      
      const { anchors, livePath } = lasso.state;
      
      if (!lasso.isActive) {
        debugLog.canvas('drawLasso skipped - lasso not active');
        return;
      }
      
      debugLog.canvas('drawLasso RENDERING - anchors:', anchors.length, 'livePath:', livePath.length);
      
      ctx.save();
      
      // Get variant color
      const variantColors: Record<string, string> = {
        'classic': '#00d9ff',
        'photoshop': '#ff6b6b',
        'elastic': '#ffd700',
        'edge-trail': '#00ff88',
        'predictive': '#a855f7',
        'adaptive': '#f97316',
        'ai-assisted': '#ec4899',
        'snake': '#22d3ee',
      };
      const systemColor = variantColors[toolSettings?.lassoVariant || 'elastic'] || '#ffd700';
      
      // 1. DRAW COMMITTED PATH (from all placed anchors)
      if (anchors.length > 0) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = systemColor;
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
        ctx.shadowColor = systemColor;
        ctx.shadowBlur = 8;
        
        ctx.beginPath();
        anchors.forEach((p, i) => {
          const x = p.x - 400; // Convert from top-left to center-based
          const y = p.y - 300;
          i === 0 ? ctx.moveTo(x, y) : ctx.lineTo(x, y);
        });
        ctx.stroke();
        
        // Draw anchor points
        ctx.fillStyle = systemColor;
        ctx.shadowBlur = 4;
        anchors.forEach((p) => {
          const x = p.x - 400;
          const y = p.y - 300;
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.arc(x, y, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
          ctx.fill();
        });
      }
      
      // 2. DRAW LIVE PREVIEW PATH (from last anchor to cursor)
      if (livePath.length > 1) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#ff9500';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
        ctx.setLineDash([8, 6]);
        ctx.shadowColor = '#ff9500';
        ctx.shadowBlur = 4;
        
        ctx.beginPath();
        livePath.forEach((p, i) => {
          const x = p.x - 400;
          const y = p.y - 300;
          i === 0 ? ctx.moveTo(x, y) : ctx.lineTo(x, y);
        });
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
      }
      
      // 3. DRAW SEARCH RADIUS CIRCLE (around cursor)
      const searchRadius = toolSettings?.lassoSearchRadius || 12;
      if (livePath.length > 0) {
        const lastPoint = livePath[livePath.length - 1];
        const x = lastPoint.x - 400;
        const y = lastPoint.y - 300;
        
        ctx.strokeStyle = systemColor;
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.5;
        ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
        ctx.setLineDash([4, 4]);
        
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(x, y, searchRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
      }
      
      ctx.restore();
    };

    resizeCanvas();
    window.addEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);

    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
      resizeCanvas();
    });
    resizeObserver.observe(container);

    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);
      resizeObserver.disconnect();
      if (animationFrameId !== null) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrameId);
      }
    };
  }, [canvasState, layers, selectionState]); // Removed lasso dependencies - lasso disabled

  const handleMouseDown = async (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;

    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    // screenX/screenY are in CSS pixels (canvas element display size)
    const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
    const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
    
    // CRITICAL: Account for CSS scaling - canvas element might be displayed at different size than internal resolution
    const scaleX = canvas.width / rect.width;
    const scaleY = canvas.height / rect.height;
    
    // Convert screen coordinates to canvas internal coordinates, then to center-based
    const canvasX = Math.floor(((screenX * scaleX) - canvasState.panX - canvas.width / 2) / canvasState.zoom);
    const canvasY = Math.floor(((screenY * scaleY) - canvasState.panY - canvas.height / 2) / canvasState.zoom);

    if (e.button === 2) {
      e.preventDefault();
      setIsPanning(true);
      setLastMousePos({ x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY });
      setDragStartPos({ x: canvasX, y: canvasY });
      return;
    }

    if (activeTool === 'magic-wand' && e.button === 0 && magicWandActions) {
      try {
        // Use safe ImageData getter (handles tainted canvas)
        const imageData = await getSafeImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);
        if (!imageData) {
          console.warn('Failed to get ImageData for magic wand click - canvas may contain cross-origin images');
          alert('Cannot segment: Image contains cross-origin content. Please use local images or ensure images have proper CORS headers.');
          return;
        }

        // CRITICAL: Validate ImageData dimensions match canvas
        if (imageData.width !== canvas.width || imageData.height !== canvas.height) {
          console.error('ImageData dimension mismatch!', {
            imageData: { width: imageData.width, height: imageData.height },
            canvas: { width: canvas.width, height: canvas.height },
            canvasX,
            canvasY
          });
          // Continue anyway (will cause misalignment, but won't crash)
        }

        // FIX: ImageData is WITHOUT transforms (raw canvas pixels)
        // Convert screen coords → canvas coords (center-based) → ImageData coords (top-left)
        const imageX = Math.floor(canvasX + imageData.width / 2);
        const imageY = Math.floor(canvasY + imageData.height / 2);

        // Validate coordinates
        if (imageX < 0 || imageX >= imageData.width || imageY < 0 || imageY >= imageData.height) {
          console.warn('Click outside image bounds');
          return;
      }

        // Use new workflow: Shift = accumulate, Alt = transparency modifier, Shift+Alt = accumulate transparency
        const result = await magicWandActions.handleClick(
          imageData,
          { x: imageX, y: imageY },
          layers,
          {
            shiftKey: e.shiftKey,
            altKey: e.altKey,
            canvasWidth: canvas.width,
            canvasHeight: canvas.height,
          }
        );

        if (result) {
          debugLog.canvas('Magic Wand action:', result.action);
        } else {
          console.warn('Magic wand click returned no result - segmentation may have failed');
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Magic wand click error:', error);
        alert(`Magic wand error: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error'}`);
      }
    }

    if ((activeTool === 'brush' || activeTool === 'eraser') && e.button === 0) {
      setIsDrawing(true);

      if (brushEngineRef.current) {
        const pressure = (e as any).pressure || 1.0;

        // Get the selected layer or create bounds for a new layer
        const selectedLayer = layers[layers.length - 1];
        const bounds = selectedLayer ? selectedLayer.bounds : { x: -400, y: -300, width: 800, height: 600 };

        // Set brush canvas to layer size
        brushEngineRef.current.setCanvasSize(bounds.width, bounds.height);

        // Convert world coordinates to layer-local coordinates
        const point: StrokePoint = {
          x: canvasX - bounds.x,
          y: canvasY - bounds.y,
          pressure,
          timestamp: Date.now(),
        };

        brushEngineRef.current.startStroke(point);
      }
    }

    // Lasso tool - Re-enabled with proper debugging
    if (activeTool === 'lasso' && e.button === 0) {
      // Get ImageData first to use actual dimensions (not hardcoded 400/300)
      const imageData = await getSafeImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);
      if (!imageData) {
        console.warn('Cannot start lasso: ImageData unavailable');
        return;
      }
      
      const lassoPoint: Point = { 
        x: canvasX + imageData.width / 2,
        y: canvasY + imageData.height / 2 
      };
      
      debugLog.canvas('Lasso tool clicked at', lassoPoint, 'lasso.isActive:', lasso.isActive);
      
      if (lasso.isActive) {
        lasso.addAnchor(lassoPoint);
        debugLog.canvas('Lasso anchor placed');
      } else {
        lasso.start(lassoPoint);
        debugLog.canvas('Lasso started');
      }
    }

    // Clone tool
    if (activeTool === 'clone' && e.button === 0) {
      debugLog.canvas('Clone tool clicked at', canvasX, canvasY);
      // TODO: Implement clone stamp
    }

    // Dodge/Burn tools
    if ((activeTool === 'dodge' || activeTool === 'burn') && e.button === 0) {
      debugLog.canvas(activeTool, 'tool clicked at', canvasX, canvasY);
      // TODO: Implement dodge/burn
    }

    // Blur/Sharpen tools
    if ((activeTool === 'blur' || activeTool === 'sharpen') && e.button === 0) {
      debugLog.canvas(activeTool, 'tool clicked at', canvasX, canvasY);
      // TODO: Implement blur/sharpen
    }

    // Gradient tool
    if (activeTool === 'gradient' && e.button === 0) {
      debugLog.canvas('Gradient tool clicked at', canvasX, canvasY);
      // TODO: Implement gradient
    }

    // Shape tool
    if (activeTool === 'shape' && e.button === 0) {
      debugLog.canvas('Shape tool clicked at', canvasX, canvasY);
      // TODO: Implement shape drawing
    }

    // Text tool
    if (activeTool === 'text' && e.button === 0) {
      debugLog.canvas('Text tool clicked at', canvasX, canvasY);
      // TODO: Implement text tool
    }

    // Pen tool
    if (activeTool === 'pen' && e.button === 0) {
      debugLog.canvas('Pen tool clicked at', canvasX, canvasY);
      // TODO: Implement pen/path tool
    }

    // Select tool
    if (activeTool === 'select' && e.button === 0) {
      debugLog.canvas('Select tool clicked at', canvasX, canvasY);
      // TODO: Implement selection transform
    }

    // Measure tool
    if (activeTool === 'measure' && e.button === 0) {
      debugLog.canvas('Measure tool clicked at', canvasX, canvasY);
      // TODO: Implement measurement
    }

    // Zoom tool
    if (activeTool === 'zoom' && e.button === 0) {
      const zoomFactor = e.shiftKey ? 0.8 : 1.2;
      updateCanvasState({
        zoom: canvasState.zoom * zoomFactor
      });
    }
  };

  // Helper function to safely get ImageData from canvas or composite from layers
  const getSafeImageData = useCallback(async (width: number, height: number): Promise<ImageData | null> => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return null;
    
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently: true });
    if (!ctx) return null;

    // Helper function for composite operation (same as getCompositeOperation)
    const getCompositeOp = (blendMode: string): GlobalCompositeOperation => {
      const modeMap: Record<string, GlobalCompositeOperation> = {
        'normal': 'source-over', 'multiply': 'multiply', 'screen': 'screen',
        'overlay': 'overlay', 'darken': 'darken', 'lighten': 'lighten',
        'color-dodge': 'color-dodge', 'color-burn': 'color-burn',
        'hard-light': 'hard-light', 'soft-light': 'soft-light',
        'difference': 'difference', 'exclusion': 'exclusion',
        'hue': 'hue', 'saturation': 'saturation', 'color': 'color', 'luminosity': 'luminosity',
      };
      return modeMap[blendMode] || 'source-over';
    };

    // FIX: Get ImageData WITHOUT transforms (raw canvas pixels)
    // We segment from raw pixels, then render mask WITH transforms to match canvas
    // Try to get from canvas first (fastest)
    try {
      return ctx.getImageData(0, 0, width, height);
    } catch (error) {
      // Canvas is tainted (cross-origin), composite from layers instead
      const errorName = error instanceof Error ? error.name : String(error);
      if (errorName === 'SecurityError') {
        
        // Create temporary canvas and composite layers WITHOUT transforms
        const tempCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        tempCanvas.width = width;
        tempCanvas.height = height;
        const tempCtx = tempCanvas.getContext('2d');
        if (!tempCtx) return null;

        // Fill background
        tempCtx.fillStyle = '#353539';
        tempCtx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);

        // Draw all visible layers WITHOUT transforms (raw positions)
        for (const layer of layers) {
          if (!layer.visible || !layer.dataUrl) continue;
          
          const img = imageLoadCache.current.get(layer.id);
          if (img && img.complete) {
            try {
              tempCtx.save();
              tempCtx.globalAlpha = layer.opacity;
              tempCtx.globalCompositeOperation = getCompositeOp(layer.blendMode);
              
              const { x, y, width: layerWidth, height: layerHeight } = layer.bounds;
              const { rotation, scaleX, scaleY } = layer.transform;

              // Apply layer transforms (but NOT canvas pan/zoom)
              tempCtx.translate(x + layerWidth / 2, y + layerHeight / 2);
              tempCtx.rotate((rotation * Math.PI) / 180);
              tempCtx.scale(scaleX, scaleY);
              tempCtx.translate(-(layerWidth / 2), -(layerHeight / 2));
              
              tempCtx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, layerWidth, layerHeight);
              tempCtx.restore();
            } catch (drawError) {
              tempCtx.restore();
              continue;
            }
          }
        }

        // Get ImageData from temp canvas
        try {
          return tempCtx.getImageData(0, 0, width, height);
        } catch (getDataError) {
          console.warn('Cannot read pixel data: canvas contains cross-origin images');
          return null;
        }
      }
      
      console.error('Failed to get ImageData:', error);
      return null;
    }
  }, [layers, canvasState.panX, canvasState.panY, canvasState.zoom]);

  const handleMouseMove = async (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;

    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    // screenX/screenY are in CSS pixels (canvas element display size)
    const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
    const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
    
    // CRITICAL: Account for CSS scaling - canvas element might be displayed at different size than internal resolution
    const scaleX = canvas.width / rect.width;
    const scaleY = canvas.height / rect.height;
    
    // Convert screen coordinates to canvas internal coordinates, then to center-based
    // MUST MATCH handleMouseDown formula exactly (line 589-590)
    const canvasX = Math.floor(((screenX * scaleX) - canvasState.panX - canvas.width / 2) / canvasState.zoom);
    const canvasY = Math.floor(((screenY * scaleY) - canvasState.panY - canvas.height / 2) / canvasState.zoom);

    // Update cursor position for rulers (convert center-based to top-left based)
    // Canvas is 800x600 centered at origin, so top-left is (-400, -300)
    const rulerX = canvasX + 400; // Convert to top-left based (0,0) at top-left
    const rulerY = canvasY + 300;
    setCursorWorldPos({ x: rulerX, y: rulerY });

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently: true });
    // Convert screen coordinates to canvas internal coordinates for pixel reading
    const pixelX = Math.floor(screenX * scaleX);
    const pixelY = Math.floor(screenY * scaleY);
    if (ctx && pixelX >= 0 && pixelY >= 0 && pixelX < canvas.width && pixelY < canvas.height) {
      try {
        // Try to read single pixel (for cursor pixel data)
        const pixel = ctx.getImageData(pixelX, pixelY, 1, 1).data;
        setCursorPixelData({
          r: pixel[0],
          g: pixel[1],
          b: pixel[2],
          a: pixel[3],
          h: 0,
          x: pixelX,
          y: pixelY,
        });
      } catch (error) {
        // If single pixel read fails, try to get from composite
        const errorName = error instanceof Error ? error.name : String(error);
        if (errorName !== 'SecurityError') {
          // Only log non-SecurityError errors
        console.error('Failed to read pixel data:', error);
        }
      }
      
      // Magic Wand: Update hover preview (use safe method)
      // Remove !isPanning check - preview should update even while panning
      if (activeTool === 'magic-wand' && magicWandActions) {
        try {
          const imageData = await getSafeImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);
          if (imageData && magicWandState.hoverPreview) {
            // CRITICAL: Validate ImageData dimensions match canvas
            if (imageData.width !== canvas.width || imageData.height !== canvas.height) {
              console.error('ImageData dimension mismatch in hover preview!', {
                imageData: { width: imageData.width, height: imageData.height },
                canvas: { width: canvas.width, height: canvas.height }
              });
              // Continue anyway
            }
            
            // FIX: ImageData is WITHOUT transforms (raw canvas pixels)
            // Convert screen coords → canvas coords (center-based) → ImageData coords (top-left)
            // screenX/screenY are already calculated above
            const scaleX = canvas.width / rect.width;
            const scaleY = canvas.height / rect.height;
            // MUST MATCH handleMouseDown formula exactly (line 589-590)
            const canvasX = Math.floor(((screenX * scaleX) - canvasState.panX - canvas.width / 2) / canvasState.zoom);
            const canvasY = Math.floor(((screenY * scaleY) - canvasState.panY - canvas.height / 2) / canvasState.zoom);
            const imageX = Math.floor(canvasX + imageData.width / 2);
            const imageY = Math.floor(canvasY + imageData.height / 2);
            
            // Validate coordinates are within ImageData bounds
            if (imageX >= 0 && imageX < imageData.width && imageY >= 0 && imageY < imageData.height) {
              magicWandActions.updateHoverPreview(imageData, { x: imageX, y: imageY });
            } else {
              // Debug: log when coordinates are out of bounds
              console.debug('Hover preview coordinates out of bounds:', { imageX, imageY, imageDataWidth: imageData.width, imageDataHeight: imageData.height, canvasX, canvasY });
            }
          }
        } catch (error) {
          // Silently fail - hover preview is optional
        }
      }
    }

    if (isPanning) {
      const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
      const scaleX = canvas.width / rect.width;
      const scaleY = canvas.height / rect.height;
      
      // Convert screen delta to canvas delta
      const dx = (e.clientX - lastMousePos.x) * scaleX;
      const dy = (e.clientY - lastMousePos.y) * scaleY;

      updateCanvasState({
        panX: canvasState.panX + dx,
        panY: canvasState.panY + dy,
      });

      setLastMousePos({ x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY });
    }

    if (isDrawing && (activeTool === 'brush' || activeTool === 'eraser') && brushEngineRef.current) {
      const pressure = (e as any).pressure || 1.0;

      // Get current layer bounds
      const selectedLayer = layers[layers.length - 1];
      const bounds = selectedLayer ? selectedLayer.bounds : { x: -400, y: -300, width: 800, height: 600 };

      // Convert to layer-local coordinates
      const point: StrokePoint = {
        x: canvasX - bounds.x,
        y: canvasY - bounds.y,
        pressure,
        timestamp: Date.now(),
      };

      brushEngineRef.current.continueStroke(point);
    }
    
    // Lasso tool - update live preview (throttled automatically by hook)
    if (activeTool === 'lasso' && lasso.isActive) {
      // Get ImageData first to use actual dimensions (not hardcoded 400/300)
      const imageData = await getSafeImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);
      if (imageData) {
        const lassoPoint: Point = { 
          x: canvasX + imageData.width / 2,
          y: canvasY + imageData.height / 2 
        };
        lasso.updatePreview(lassoPoint);
      }
    }
  };

  const handleMouseUp = () => {
    setIsPanning(false);

    if (isDrawing && (activeTool === 'brush' || activeTool === 'eraser') && brushEngineRef.current) {
      setIsDrawing(false);

      const strokeData = brushEngineRef.current.endStroke();

      // Get or create target layer
      let targetLayer = layers[layers.length - 1];

      if (!targetLayer) {
        // Create new layer if none exists
        const newLayer = {
          id: crypto.randomUUID(),
          projectId: 'default',
          name: `Layer ${layers.length + 1}`,
          type: 'raster' as const,
          visible: true,
          locked: false,
          opacity: 1,
          blendMode: 'normal',
          position: layers.length,
          bounds: { x: -400, y: -300, width: 800, height: 600 },
          transform: { rotation: 0, scaleX: 1, scaleY: 1 },
          modifierStack: [],
          dataUrl: '',
        };
        setLayers([newLayer]);
        targetLayer = newLayer;
      }

      const tempCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
      tempCanvas.width = targetLayer.bounds.width;
      tempCanvas.height = targetLayer.bounds.height;
      const tempCtx = tempCanvas.getContext('2d');

      if (tempCtx) {
        if (targetLayer.dataUrl) {
          const img = new Image();
          // Set crossOrigin BEFORE setting src to prevent canvas tainting
          if (!targetLayer.dataUrl.startsWith('data:')) {
            img.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';
          }
          img.onload = () => {
            tempCtx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, targetLayer.bounds.width, targetLayer.bounds.height);

            // For eraser, use destination-out
            if (activeTool === 'eraser') {
              tempCtx.globalCompositeOperation = 'destination-out';
            }

            tempCtx.putImageData(strokeData, 0, 0);

            const updatedDataUrl = tempCanvas.toDataURL('image/png');

            const updatedLayers = layers.map(l =>
              l.id === targetLayer.id
                ? { ...l, dataUrl: updatedDataUrl }
                : l
            );

            setLayers(updatedLayers);

            addHistorySnapshot({
              projectId: 'default',
              sequence: 0,
              actionType: activeTool === 'eraser' ? 'erase' : 'paint',
              actionLabel: activeTool === 'eraser' ? 'Eraser Stroke' : 'Brush Stroke',
              stateDelta: {},
            });
          };
          img.src = targetLayer.dataUrl;
        } else {
          // No existing image, just use the stroke
          if (activeTool === 'eraser') {
            tempCtx.globalCompositeOperation = 'destination-out';
          }

          tempCtx.putImageData(strokeData, 0, 0);
          const updatedDataUrl = tempCanvas.toDataURL('image/png');

          const updatedLayers = layers.map(l =>
            l.id === targetLayer.id
              ? { ...l, dataUrl: updatedDataUrl }
              : l
          );

          setLayers(updatedLayers);

          addHistorySnapshot({
            projectId: 'default',
            sequence: 0,
            actionType: activeTool === 'eraser' ? 'erase' : 'paint',
            actionLabel: activeTool === 'eraser' ? 'Eraser Stroke' : 'Brush Stroke',
            stateDelta: {},
          });
        }
      }

      brushEngineRef.current.clearCanvas();
    }
  };

  // Handle file drops
  const handleDrop = async (e: React.DragEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();

    const files = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files).filter(file => 
      file.type.startsWith('image/')
    );

    if (files.length === 0) return;

    const imageLoader = new ImageLoader();

    try {
      const loadedImages = await imageLoader.loadMultipleFiles(files);
      
      const newLayers = loadedImages.map((img, idx) => {
        const file = files[idx];
        const dataUrl = img.imageData ? imageDataToDataUrl(img.imageData) : '';
        const width = img.metadata.width;
        const height = img.metadata.height;

        return {
          id: crypto.randomUUID(),
          projectId: 'default',
          name: file.name.replace(/\.[^/.]+$/, ''),
          type: 'raster' as const,
          visible: true,
          locked: false,
          opacity: 1,
          blendMode: 'normal',
          position: layers.length + idx,
          bounds: {
            x: -width / 2,
            y: -height / 2,
            width: width,
            height: height,
          },
          transform: { rotation: 0, scaleX: 1, scaleY: 1 },
          modifierStack: [],
          thumbnailUrl: img.thumbnail,
          dataUrl,
        };
      });

      setLayers([...layers, ...newLayers]);
      
      addHistorySnapshot({
        projectId: 'default',
        sequence: 0,
        actionType: 'import',
        actionLabel: `Import ${files.length} image${files.length > 1 ? 's' : ''}`,
        stateDelta: {},
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to load dropped images:', error);
    } finally {
      imageLoader.dispose();
    }
  };

  const handleDragOver = (e: React.DragEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
  };

  const imageDataToDataUrl = (imageData: ImageData): string => {
    const tempCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    tempCanvas.width = imageData.width;
    tempCanvas.height = imageData.height;
    const tempCtx = tempCanvas.getContext('2d');
    if (!tempCtx) return '';
    tempCtx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
    return tempCanvas.toDataURL('image/png');
  };
  
  // Double-click handler for lasso completion
  const handleDoubleClick = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    if (activeTool !== 'lasso') return;
    
    e.preventDefault();
    const path = lasso.complete();
    
    if (path && path.length > 0) {
      debugLog.canvas('Lasso selection completed! Points:', path.length);
      
      addHistorySnapshot({
        projectId: 'default',
        sequence: 0,
        actionType: 'selection',
        actionLabel: 'Lasso Selection',
        stateDelta: {},
      });
    }
  }, [activeTool, lasso, addHistorySnapshot]);
  
  // Keyboard shortcuts for lasso
  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTool !== 'lasso') return;
    
    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if (e.key === 'Enter' && lasso.isActive) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const path = lasso.complete();
        if (path && path.length > 0) {
          debugLog.canvas('Lasso completed via Enter - points:', path.length);
        }
      } else if (e.key === 'Escape' && lasso.isActive) {
        e.preventDefault();
        lasso.cancel();
        debugLog.canvas('Lasso cancelled via Escape');
      } else if (e.key === 'Backspace' && lasso.isActive) {
        e.preventDefault();
        lasso.undo();
        debugLog.canvas('Lasso undo via Backspace');
      }
    };
    
    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
  }, [activeTool, lasso]);

  const handleWheel = async (e: React.WheelEvent) => {
    // Fix passive event listener warning
    if (e.cancelable) {
    e.preventDefault();
    }

    // Right-click + scroll = zoom (always) - RESTORED ORIGINAL BEHAVIOR
    if (e.buttons === 2 || (e as any).button === 2) {
    const delta = e.deltaY > 0 ? 0.9 : 1.1;
    const newZoom = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(5, canvasState.zoom * delta));
    updateCanvasState({ zoom: newZoom });
      return;
    }

    // Magic Wand: Normal scroll adjusts tolerance (only when wand is active)
    if (activeTool === 'magic-wand' && magicWandState && magicWandActions && !e.ctrlKey && !e.shiftKey) {
      try {
        const toleranceStep = magicWandState.settings?.tolerance?.scrollStep || 2;
        const delta = e.deltaY > 0 ? -toleranceStep : toleranceStep;
        
        // Get cursor position for indicator
        const canvas = canvasRef.current;
        if (canvas) {
          const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
          const cursorPos = { 
            x: e.clientX - rect.left, 
            y: e.clientY - rect.top 
          };
          magicWandActions.adjustTolerance(delta, cursorPos);
          
          // Also update wand options in context
          if (setWandOptions) {
            setWandOptions({ tolerance: magicWandState.tolerance + delta });
          }
          
          // Trigger hover preview update with new tolerance (use safe method)
          if (magicWandState.hoverPreview?.lastPosition) {
            const imageData = await getSafeImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);
            if (imageData) {
              magicWandActions.updateHoverPreview(imageData, magicWandState.hoverPreview.lastPosition);
            }
          }
        }
        return;
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Magic wand scroll error:', error);
        // Fall through to default zoom behavior
      }
    }

    // Default: Normal scroll zooms canvas - RESTORED ORIGINAL BEHAVIOR
    const delta = e.deltaY > 0 ? 0.9 : 1.1;
    const newZoom = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(5, canvasState.zoom * delta));
    updateCanvasState({ zoom: newZoom });
  };

  const handleContextMenu = (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
  };

  const getCursor = () => {
    if (isPanning) return 'grabbing';
    if (isDrawing) return 'crosshair';
    if (activeTool === 'brush') return 'crosshair';
    if (activeTool === 'magic-wand') return 'crosshair';
    if (activeTool === 'lasso') return 'crosshair';
    return 'default';
  };

  // ============================================================================
  // GUIDE LINE HANDLERS
  // ============================================================================

  const handleAddSnapLine = (axis: 'horizontal' | 'vertical', position: number) => {
    // Convert from top-left based (ruler coords) to center-based (canvas coords)
    const canvasPos = axis === 'vertical' ? position - 400 : position - 300;
    
    const newLine: SnapLine = {
      id: `snap-${Date.now()}`,
      type: 'snap',
      axis,
      position: Math.round(canvasPos),
      strength: 10, // 10px snap distance
    };
    setSnapLines(prev => [...prev, newLine]);
  };

  const handleAddAlignmentLine = (axis: 'horizontal' | 'vertical', position: number) => {
    // Convert from top-left based (ruler coords) to center-based (canvas coords)
    const canvasPos = axis === 'vertical' ? position - 400 : position - 300;
    
    const colors = ['#03A9F4', '#F59E0B', '#10B981', '#EC4899', '#8B5CF6'];
    const color = colors[alignmentLines.length % colors.length];
    
    const newLine: AlignmentLine = {
      id: `align-${Date.now()}`,
      type: 'alignment',
      axis,
      position: Math.round(canvasPos),
      color,
    };
    setAlignmentLines(prev => [...prev, newLine]);
  };

  const handleRemoveLine = (lineId: string) => {
    setSnapLines(prev => prev.filter(l => l.id !== lineId));
    setAlignmentLines(prev => prev.filter(l => l.id !== lineId));
  };

  const handleMoveLine = (lineId: string, newPosition: number) => {
    // Determine if this is a vertical or horizontal line to apply correct offset
    const line = [...snapLines, ...alignmentLines].find(l => l.id === lineId);
    if (!line) return;
    
    // Convert from top-left based (ruler coords) to center-based (canvas coords)
    const canvasPos = line.axis === 'vertical' ? newPosition - 400 : newPosition - 300;
    
    setSnapLines(prev => prev.map(l => 
      l.id === lineId ? { ...l, position: Math.round(canvasPos) } : l
    ));
    setAlignmentLines(prev => prev.map(l => 
      l.id === lineId ? { ...l, position: Math.round(canvasPos) } : l
    ));
  };

  const handleClearAllSnapLines = () => {
    setSnapLines([]);
  };

  const handleClearAllAlignmentLines = () => {
    setAlignmentLines([]);
  };

  const handleSaveRulerPositions = () => {
    const data = {
      snapLines: snapLines.map(l => ({ axis: l.axis, position: l.position, strength: l.strength })),
      alignmentLines: alignmentLines.map(l => ({ axis: l.axis, position: l.position, color: l.color })),
      savedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    };
    localStorage.setItem('lucid-ruler-positions', JSON.stringify(data));
    debugLog.canvas('Ruler positions saved:', data);
  };

  const handleLoadRulerPositions = () => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('lucid-ruler-positions');
    if (!saved) return;
    
    try {
      const data = JSON.parse(saved);
      
      if (data.snapLines) {
        const loadedSnapLines: SnapLine[] = data.snapLines.map((l: any, i: number) => ({
          id: `snap-loaded-${Date.now()}-${i}`,
          type: 'snap',
          axis: l.axis,
          position: l.position,
          strength: l.strength || 10,
        }));
        setSnapLines(loadedSnapLines);
      }
      
      if (data.alignmentLines) {
        const loadedAlignmentLines: AlignmentLine[] = data.alignmentLines.map((l: any, i: number) => ({
          id: `align-loaded-${Date.now()}-${i}`,
          type: 'alignment',
          axis: l.axis,
          position: l.position,
          color: l.color,
        }));
        setAlignmentLines(loadedAlignmentLines);
      }
      
      debugLog.canvas('Ruler positions loaded from:', data.savedAt);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to load ruler positions:', error);
    }
  };

  // Listen for custom events from TopBar
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleRulerPositionChange = (e: Event) => {
      const customEvent = e as CustomEvent;
      setRulerPosition(customEvent.detail);
    };
    
    window.addEventListener('clearAllSnapLines', handleClearAllSnapLines);
    window.addEventListener('clearAllAlignmentLines', handleClearAllAlignmentLines);
    window.addEventListener('saveRulerPositions', handleSaveRulerPositions);
    window.addEventListener('loadRulerPositions', handleLoadRulerPositions);
    window.addEventListener('rulerPositionChange', handleRulerPositionChange);
    
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('clearAllSnapLines', handleClearAllSnapLines);
      window.removeEventListener('clearAllAlignmentLines', handleClearAllAlignmentLines);
      window.removeEventListener('saveRulerPositions', handleSaveRulerPositions);
      window.removeEventListener('loadRulerPositions', handleLoadRulerPositions);
      window.removeEventListener('rulerPositionChange', handleRulerPositionChange);
    };
  }, [snapLines, alignmentLines]);

  // Keyboard handling for magic wand and selection
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if (e.key === 'Escape' && activeTool === 'magic-wand') {
        if (selectionState.active) {
        clearSelection();
        }
        // Also reset any accumulation
        magicWandActions.reset();
      }
    };

    const handleKeyUp = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      // Finalize accumulation when modifier keys are released
      if (activeTool === 'magic-wand') {
        if (e.key === 'Shift') {
          magicWandActions.handleShiftUp();
        }
        if (e.key === 'Alt') {
          magicWandActions.handleAltUp();
        }
      }
    };

    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
    window.addEventListener('keyup', handleKeyUp);
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
      window.removeEventListener('keyup', handleKeyUp);
    };
  }, [activeTool, selectionState.active, clearSelection, magicWandActions]);


  return (
    <div
      ref={containerRef}
      className="flex-1 relative overflow-hidden bg-[#2a2a2e] min-h-0"
      onMouseDown={handleMouseDown}
      onMouseMove={handleMouseMove}
      onDoubleClick={handleDoubleClick}
      onMouseUp={handleMouseUp}
      onMouseLeave={(e) => {
        handleMouseUp();
        setCursorWorldPos(null);
        // Clear magic wand hover preview on leave
        if (activeTool === 'magic-wand' && magicWandActions) {
          magicWandActions.clearHoverPreview();
        }
      }}
      onWheel={handleWheel}
      onContextMenu={handleContextMenu}
      onDrop={handleDrop}
      onDragOver={handleDragOver}
      style={{ cursor: getCursor() }}
    >
      <canvas ref={canvasRef} className="w-full h-full" id="main-canvas" />
      
      {/* Magic Wand Hover Preview Overlay */}
      {activeTool === 'magic-wand' && magicWandState?.hoverPreview && canvasRef.current && (
        <HoverPreviewRenderer
          mask={magicWandState.hoverPreview.mask}
          bounds={magicWandState.hoverPreview.bounds}
          width={magicWandState.hoverPreview.imageWidth || canvasRef.current.width}
          height={magicWandState.hoverPreview.imageHeight || canvasRef.current.height}
          canvasWidth={canvasRef.current.width}
          canvasHeight={canvasRef.current.height}
          settings={magicWandState.settings?.hoverPreview || defaultMagicWandSettings.hoverPreview}
          canvasTransform={{
            panX: canvasState.panX,
            panY: canvasState.panY,
            zoom: canvasState.zoom,
          }}
        />
      )}
      {/* Will re-enable once we have proper CORS handling */}
      
      {/* Tolerance Indicator */}
      {activeTool === 'magic-wand' && magicWandState && magicWandActions && (
        <ToleranceIndicator
          tolerance={magicWandState.tolerance}
          visible={magicWandState.toleranceIndicator.visible}
          position={magicWandState.toleranceIndicator.position}
          duration={magicWandState.settings.tolerance.indicatorDuration}
          onHide={magicWandActions.hideToleranceIndicator}
        />
      )}
      
      {/* Enhanced Rulers - render AFTER canvas */}
      {canvasState.showRulers && (
        <>
          <EnhancedRuler
            orientation="horizontal"
            position={rulerPosition.horizontal}
            canvasWidth={canvasRef.current?.width || 0}
            canvasHeight={canvasRef.current?.height || 0}
            zoom={canvasState.zoom}
            panX={canvasState.panX}
            panY={canvasState.panY}
            cursorX={cursorWorldPos?.x || null}
            cursorY={cursorWorldPos?.y || null}
            snapLines={snapLines}
            alignmentLines={alignmentLines}
            showNumbers={rulerPosition.showNumbers}
            onAddSnapLine={handleAddSnapLine}
            onAddAlignmentLine={handleAddAlignmentLine}
            onRemoveLine={handleRemoveLine}
            onMoveLine={handleMoveLine}
            onHoverChange={setHorizontalRulerHovered}
          />
          <EnhancedRuler
            orientation="vertical"
            position={rulerPosition.vertical}
            canvasWidth={canvasRef.current?.width || 0}
            canvasHeight={canvasRef.current?.height || 0}
            zoom={canvasState.zoom}
            panX={canvasState.panX}
            panY={canvasState.panY}
            cursorX={cursorWorldPos?.x || null}
            cursorY={cursorWorldPos?.y || null}
            snapLines={snapLines}
            alignmentLines={alignmentLines}
            showNumbers={rulerPosition.showNumbers}
            onAddSnapLine={handleAddSnapLine}
            onAddAlignmentLine={handleAddAlignmentLine}
            onRemoveLine={handleRemoveLine}
            onMoveLine={handleMoveLine}
            onHoverChange={setVerticalRulerHovered}
          />
          {/* Corner square - position based on ruler positions */}
          <div 
            className={`absolute bg-[#1a1a1a] border-gray-800/80 z-30 ${
              rulerPosition.showNumbers 
                ? (rulerPosition.horizontal === 'top' && rulerPosition.vertical === 'left' ? 'top-0 left-0 w-6 h-6 border-r border-b' :
                   rulerPosition.horizontal === 'top' && rulerPosition.vertical === 'right' ? 'top-0 right-0 w-6 h-6 border-l border-b' :
                   rulerPosition.horizontal === 'bottom' && rulerPosition.vertical === 'left' ? 'bottom-0 left-0 w-6 h-6 border-r border-t' :
                   'bottom-0 right-0 w-6 h-6 border-l border-t')
                : (rulerPosition.horizontal === 'top' && rulerPosition.vertical === 'left' ? 'top-0 left-0 w-3 h-3 border-r border-b' :
                   rulerPosition.horizontal === 'top' && rulerPosition.vertical === 'right' ? 'top-0 right-0 w-3 h-3 border-l border-b' :
                   rulerPosition.horizontal === 'bottom' && rulerPosition.vertical === 'left' ? 'bottom-0 left-0 w-3 h-3 border-r border-t' :
                   'bottom-0 right-0 w-3 h-3 border-l border-t')
            }`}
          />
        </>
      )}

      {/* Alignment Lines Overlay */}
      {canvasState.showGuides && (
        <GuideLinesOverlay
          alignmentLines={alignmentLines}
          width={canvasRef.current?.width || 0}
          height={canvasRef.current?.height || 0}
          zoom={canvasState.zoom}
          panX={canvasState.panX}
          panY={canvasState.panY}
        />
      )}

      {selectionState.active && selectionState.mask && (
        <SelectionVisualizer
          mask={selectionState.mask}
          width={canvasRef.current?.width || 0}
          height={canvasRef.current?.height || 0}
          zoom={canvasState.zoom}
          panX={canvasState.panX}
          panY={canvasState.panY}
        />
      )}

      {/* Lasso Controls - Show when lasso is active */}
      {activeTool === 'lasso' && lasso.isActive && (
        <div className="absolute bottom-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex items-center gap-2">
          {/* Help Text */}
          <div className="bg-[#1a1a1a] border border-gray-800 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs text-gray-400">
            Anchors: {lasso.state.anchors.length} • Click to place • Double-click/Enter to complete
          </div>
          
          {/* Cancel Button */}
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              lasso.cancel();
              debugLog.canvas('Lasso cancelled via Cancel button');
            }}
            className="bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 border border-red-500 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs text-white font-medium transition-colors flex items-center gap-1.5"
          >
            <X className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
            Cancel (Esc)
          </button>
          
          {/* Complete Button */}
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              const path = lasso.complete();
              if (path && path.length > 0) {
                debugLog.canvas('Lasso completed via button - points:', path.length);
              }
            }}
            className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 border border-green-500 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs text-white font-medium transition-colors flex items-center gap-1.5"
            disabled={!lasso.hasAnchors}
          >
            <Check className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
            Complete (Enter)
          </button>
        </div>
      )}
      
      {/* Tool Help Text - Show when lasso is NOT active or for other tools */}
      {(activeTool === 'wand' || activeTool === 'brush' || (activeTool === 'lasso' && !lasso.isActive)) && (
        <div className="absolute bottom-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-[#1a1a1a] border border-gray-800 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs text-gray-400">
          {activeTool === 'wand' 
            ? 'Click to select • Shift+Click to add • Alt+Click to subtract • Esc to clear'
            : activeTool === 'brush'
            ? 'Click+Drag to paint • [ ] to adjust size'
            : activeTool === 'lasso'
            ? 'Click to start lasso • Move mouse to follow edges • Click to place anchors'
            : 'Tool help'
          } • Right-click+drag to pan • Scroll to zoom
        </div>
      )}

      {layers.length === 0 && (
        <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
          <div className="text-center text-gray-500">
            <p className="text-lg mb-2">Drop images here to get started</p>
            <p className="text-sm">Or use the Upload button in the top bar</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
      
      {/* Video Frame Panel */}
      {showVideoFramePanel && (
        <div className={`absolute ${videoFramePanelExpanded ? 'inset-4' : 'top-4 right-4'} z-50 transition-all`}>
          <VideoFramePanel
            onExtractFrame={(imageData, frameIndex) => {
              // Create a new layer from the extracted frame
              const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
              canvas.width = imageData.width;
              canvas.height = imageData.height;
              const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
              if (ctx) {
                ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
                const dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                
                // Add as new layer
                const newLayer = {
                  id: `video-frame-${frameIndex}-${Date.now()}`,
                  name: `Video Frame ${frameIndex}`,
                  visible: true,
                  opacity: 1,
                  blendMode: 'normal' as const,
                  position: { x: 0, y: 0 },
                  scale: { x: 1, y: 1 },
                  rotation: 0,
                  imageUrl: dataUrl,
                  width: imageData.width,
                  height: imageData.height,
                };
                
                setLayers(prev => [...prev, newLayer]);
                addHistorySnapshot?.('Extract video frame');
              }
            }}
            isExpanded={videoFramePanelExpanded}
            onToggleExpand={() => setVideoFramePanelExpanded(!videoFramePanelExpanded)}
          />
        </div>
      )}
      
      {/* Ruler controls hint - only show when hovering rulers */}
      {canvasState.showRulers && isRulerHovered && (
        <div className="absolute top-8 left-8 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-sm px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-[10px] text-gray-300 pointer-events-none z-10 transition-opacity">
          <div className="space-y-0.5">
            <div><span className="text-green-400">🧲 Left-click ruler:</span> Add snap line</div>
            <div><span className="text-blue-400">━ Right-click ruler:</span> Add alignment line</div>
            <div><span className="text-gray-400">Double-click line:</span> Remove</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```


### CursorZoomPanel


**Category:** UI  
**File:** `components/panels/CursorZoomPanel.tsx`


*Cursor zoom panel for magnification*


```typescript
import { Eye, Settings2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useCanvasPixel } from '../../contexts/CanvasPixelContext';

export function CursorZoomPanel() {
  const [magnification, setMagnification] = useState(5);
  const [bufferSize, setBufferSize] = useState(5);
  const [showBufferZone, setShowBufferZone] = useState(false);
  const [showSettings, setShowSettings] = useState(false);
  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const { cursorPixelData } = useCanvasPixel();
  const mainCanvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement | null>(null);

  const [viewportCenter, setViewportCenter] = useState({ x: 0, y: 0 });
  const [damping] = useState(0.7);
  const [canvasSize, setCanvasSize] = useState({ width: 800, height: 800 });

  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('main-canvas') as HTMLCanvasElement;
    mainCanvasRef.current = canvas;
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const container = containerRef.current;
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!container || !canvas) return;

    const updateSize = () => {
      const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
      const availableWidth = rect.width - 8;
      const availableHeight = rect.height - 8;
      const size = Math.min(availableWidth, availableHeight);

      canvas.width = size;
      canvas.height = size;
      setCanvasSize({ width: size, height: size });
    };

    updateSize();
    const observer = new ResizeObserver(updateSize);
    observer.observe(container);
    return () => observer.disconnect();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!cursorPixelData || viewportCenter.x === 0) {
      if (cursorPixelData) {
        setViewportCenter({ x: cursorPixelData.x, y: cursorPixelData.y });
      }
      return;
    }

    const dx = cursorPixelData.x - viewportCenter.x;
    const dy = cursorPixelData.y - viewportCenter.y;
    const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);

    if (distance <= bufferSize) {
      return;
    }

    const overshoot = distance - bufferSize;
    const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);
    const panSpeed = overshoot * (1.0 - damping);

    setViewportCenter({
      x: viewportCenter.x + Math.cos(angle) * panSpeed,
      y: viewportCenter.y + Math.sin(angle) * panSpeed
    });
  }, [cursorPixelData, bufferSize, damping, viewportCenter]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    const mainCanvas = mainCanvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas || !mainCanvas) return;

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    if (!ctx) return;

    ctx.fillStyle = '#000';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    const centerX = viewportCenter.x || cursorPixelData?.x || mainCanvas.width / 2;
    const centerY = viewportCenter.y || cursorPixelData?.y || mainCanvas.height / 2;

    const sourceSize = canvas.width / magnification;
    const sourceX = centerX - sourceSize / 2;
    const sourceY = centerY - sourceSize / 2;

    try {
      ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = false;
      ctx.drawImage(
        mainCanvas,
        sourceX,
        sourceY,
        sourceSize,
        sourceSize,
        0,
        0,
        canvas.width,
        canvas.height
      );
    } catch (e) {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#333';
      ctx.font = '20px monospace';
      ctx.textAlign = 'center';
      ctx.fillText('Load image', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
    }

    if (cursorPixelData) {
      const cursorDisplayX = (cursorPixelData.x - sourceX) * magnification;
      const cursorDisplayY = (cursorPixelData.y - sourceY) * magnification;

      ctx.strokeStyle = '#0F0';
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0F0';
      ctx.lineWidth = 2;

      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(cursorDisplayX, cursorDisplayY, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.stroke();

      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(cursorDisplayX, cursorDisplayY, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();

      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(cursorDisplayX - 12, cursorDisplayY);
      ctx.lineTo(cursorDisplayX + 12, cursorDisplayY);
      ctx.moveTo(cursorDisplayX, cursorDisplayY - 12);
      ctx.lineTo(cursorDisplayX, cursorDisplayY + 12);
      ctx.stroke();

      if (showBufferZone) {
        const bufferDisplaySize = bufferSize * magnification;
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#FF6B00';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.setLineDash([8, 8]);
        ctx.strokeRect(
          cursorDisplayX - bufferDisplaySize,
          cursorDisplayY - bufferDisplaySize,
          bufferDisplaySize * 2,
          bufferDisplaySize * 2
        );
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
      }
    }
  }, [magnification, showBufferZone, bufferSize, viewportCenter, cursorPixelData, canvasSize]);

  const rgbToHex = (r: number, g: number, b: number) => {
    return '#' + [r, g, b].map(x => x.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('');
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full w-full flex flex-col bg-black text-white">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-2 border-b border-gray-800 shrink-0">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Eye className="w-4 h-4 text-cyan-400" />
          <h2 className="text-xs font-semibold">Cursor Zoom</h2>
        </div>
        <button
          onClick={() => setShowSettings(!showSettings)}
          className={`p-1 rounded ${showSettings ? 'bg-cyan-600' : 'hover:bg-gray-800'}`}
        >
          <Settings2 className="w-3 h-3" />
        </button>
      </div>

      {showSettings && (
        <div className="p-2 bg-gray-900 border-b border-gray-800 space-y-2 text-[10px] shrink-0">
          <div>
            <div className="flex justify-between mb-1">
              <span>Magnification</span>
              <span className="font-mono font-bold">{magnification}×</span>
            </div>
            <input
              type="range"
              min="2"
              max="20"
              value={magnification}
              onChange={(e) => setMagnification(parseInt(e.target.value))}
              className="w-full"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <div className="flex justify-between mb-1">
              <span>Buffer (px)</span>
              <span className="font-mono font-bold">{bufferSize}px</span>
            </div>
            <input
              type="range"
              min="2"
              max="20"
              value={bufferSize}
              onChange={(e) => setBufferSize(parseInt(e.target.value))}
              className="w-full"
            />
          </div>

          <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer">
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              checked={showBufferZone}
              onChange={(e) => setShowBufferZone(e.target.checked)}
              className="w-3 h-3"
            />
            <span>Show Buffer Zone</span>
          </label>
        </div>
      )}

      <div ref={containerRef} className="flex-1 bg-black min-h-0 flex items-center justify-center p-1">
        <canvas
          ref={canvasRef}
          className="cursor-none"
          style={{ imageRendering: 'pixelated', display: 'block' }}
          onWheel={(e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            setMagnification(prev => Math.max(2, Math.min(20, prev + (e.deltaY > 0 ? -1 : 1))));
          }}
        />
      </div>

      {cursorPixelData && (
        <div className="p-2 border-t border-gray-800 text-[10px] shrink-0 bg-gray-950 space-y-1">
          <div className="flex justify-between">
            <span className="text-gray-500">Pos:</span>
            <span className="font-mono">({cursorPixelData.x}, {cursorPixelData.y})</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex justify-between">
            <span className="text-gray-500">RGB:</span>
            <span className="font-mono">({cursorPixelData.r}, {cursorPixelData.g}, {cursorPixelData.b})</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
            <span className="text-gray-500">Hex:</span>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
              <span className="font-mono font-bold">
                {rgbToHex(cursorPixelData.r, cursorPixelData.g, cursorPixelData.b).toUpperCase()}
              </span>
              <div
                className="w-4 h-4 rounded border border-gray-700"
                style={{ backgroundColor: rgbToHex(cursorPixelData.r, cursorPixelData.g, cursorPixelData.b) }}
              />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```


### Drawer System


**Category:** UI  
**File:** `components/layout/drawer/DrawerContainer.tsx`


*Drawer container system for side panels*


```typescript
import { useState, createContext, useContext, ReactNode } from 'react';
import { X, Maximize2, Minimize2 } from 'lucide-react';

// ============================================================================
// TYPES
// ============================================================================

export type DrawerHeight = 'full' | 'top-half' | 'bottom-half';
export type DrawerSide = 'left' | 'right';

export interface DrawerState {
  isOpen: boolean;
  height: DrawerHeight;
  drawerId: string | null;
}

export interface DrawerConfig {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  icon: ReactNode;
  content: ReactNode;
  defaultHeight?: DrawerHeight;
  hideHeightControls?: boolean; // For tool settings - only show full height
}

interface SideDrawerState {
  top: DrawerState;
  bottom: DrawerState;
}

interface DrawerContextValue {
  left: SideDrawerState;
  right: SideDrawerState;
  openDrawer: (side: DrawerSide, id: string, position: 'top' | 'bottom', height?: DrawerHeight) => void;
  closeDrawer: (side: DrawerSide, position: 'top' | 'bottom') => void;
  toggleDrawer: (side: DrawerSide, id: string, position: 'top' | 'bottom', height?: DrawerHeight) => void;
  setDrawerHeight: (side: DrawerSide, position: 'top' | 'bottom', height: DrawerHeight) => void;
  closeAllDrawers: (side: DrawerSide) => void;
}

// Legacy interface for backward compatibility
interface LegacyDrawerContextValue {
  topDrawer: DrawerState;
  bottomDrawer: DrawerState;
  openDrawer: (id: string, position: 'top' | 'bottom', height?: DrawerHeight) => void;
  closeDrawer: (position: 'top' | 'bottom') => void;
  toggleDrawer: (id: string, position: 'top' | 'bottom', height?: DrawerHeight) => void;
  setDrawerHeight: (position: 'top' | 'bottom', height: DrawerHeight) => void;
}

// ============================================================================
// CONTEXT
// ============================================================================

const DrawerContext = createContext<DrawerContextValue | null>(null);

export function useDrawerContext() {
  const context = useContext(DrawerContext);
  if (!context) {
    throw new Error('useDrawerContext must be used within DrawerProvider');
  }
  return context;
}

// Legacy hook for backward compatibility - uses the CURRENT side from a local context
const SideContext = createContext<DrawerSide>('left');

export function useDrawer(): LegacyDrawerContextValue {
  const context = useContext(DrawerContext);
  const side = useContext(SideContext);
  
  if (!context) {
    throw new Error('useDrawer must be used within DrawerProvider');
  }

  const sideState = side === 'left' ? context.left : context.right;

  return {
    topDrawer: sideState.top,
    bottomDrawer: sideState.bottom,
    openDrawer: (id, position, height) => context.openDrawer(side, id, position, height),
    closeDrawer: (position) => context.closeDrawer(side, position),
    toggleDrawer: (id, position, height) => context.toggleDrawer(side, id, position, height),
    setDrawerHeight: (position, height) => context.setDrawerHeight(side, position, height),
  };
}

// ============================================================================
// DRAWER PROVIDER
// ============================================================================

interface DrawerProviderProps {
  children: ReactNode;
}

const defaultDrawerState: DrawerState = {
  isOpen: false,
  height: 'full',
  drawerId: null,
};

const defaultSideState: SideDrawerState = {
  top: { ...defaultDrawerState },
  bottom: { ...defaultDrawerState },
};

export function DrawerProvider({ children }: DrawerProviderProps) {
  const [left, setLeft] = useState<SideDrawerState>({ ...defaultSideState });
  const [right, setRight] = useState<SideDrawerState>({ ...defaultSideState });

  const getSetter = (side: DrawerSide) => side === 'left' ? setLeft : setRight;
  const getState = (side: DrawerSide) => side === 'left' ? left : right;

  const openDrawer = (side: DrawerSide, id: string, position: 'top' | 'bottom', height: DrawerHeight = 'full') => {
    const setter = getSetter(side);
    const state = getState(side);
    
    setter(prev => {
      const newState = { ...prev };
      
      if (position === 'top') {
        // If opening top-half and bottom drawer is full, resize bottom to bottom-half
        if (height === 'top-half' && prev.bottom.isOpen && prev.bottom.height === 'full') {
          newState.bottom = { ...prev.bottom, height: 'bottom-half' };
        }
        newState.top = { isOpen: true, height, drawerId: id };
      } else {
        // If opening bottom-half and top drawer is full, resize top to top-half
        if (height === 'bottom-half' && prev.top.isOpen && prev.top.height === 'full') {
          newState.top = { ...prev.top, height: 'top-half' };
        }
        newState.bottom = { isOpen: true, height, drawerId: id };
      }
      
      return newState;
    });
  };

  const closeDrawer = (side: DrawerSide, position: 'top' | 'bottom') => {
    const setter = getSetter(side);
    setter(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      [position]: { isOpen: false, height: 'full', drawerId: null },
    }));
  };

  const toggleDrawer = (side: DrawerSide, id: string, position: 'top' | 'bottom', height: DrawerHeight = 'full') => {
    const state = getState(side);
    const drawer = position === 'top' ? state.top : state.bottom;
    
    if (drawer.isOpen && drawer.drawerId === id) {
      closeDrawer(side, position);
    } else {
      openDrawer(side, id, position, height);
    }
  };

  const setDrawerHeight = (side: DrawerSide, position: 'top' | 'bottom', height: DrawerHeight) => {
    const setter = getSetter(side);
    setter(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      [position]: { ...prev[position], height },
    }));
  };

  const closeAllDrawers = (side: DrawerSide) => {
    const setter = getSetter(side);
    setter({ ...defaultSideState });
  };

  return (
    <DrawerContext.Provider value={{
      left,
      right,
      openDrawer,
      closeDrawer,
      toggleDrawer,
      setDrawerHeight,
      closeAllDrawers,
    }}>
      {children}
    </DrawerContext.Provider>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// SIDE PROVIDER (wraps components to set which side they belong to)
// ============================================================================

interface SideProviderProps {
  side: DrawerSide;
  children: ReactNode;
}

export function SideProvider({ side, children }: SideProviderProps) {
  return (
    <SideContext.Provider value={side}>
      {children}
    </SideContext.Provider>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// DRAWER COMPONENT
// ============================================================================

interface DrawerProps {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  icon?: ReactNode;
  position: 'top' | 'bottom';
  side: DrawerSide;
  children: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
  hideHeightControls?: boolean;
}

export function Drawer({ id, title, icon, position, side, children, className = '', hideHeightControls = false }: DrawerProps) {
  const context = useDrawerContext();
  const sideState = side === 'left' ? context.left : context.right;
  const drawer = position === 'top' ? sideState.top : sideState.bottom;

  if (!drawer.isOpen || drawer.drawerId !== id) {
    return null;
  }

  const getHeightClass = () => {
    if (drawer.height === 'full') return 'h-full';
    if (drawer.height === 'top-half') return 'h-1/2';
    if (drawer.height === 'bottom-half') return 'h-1/2';
    return 'h-full';
  };

  const getPositionClass = () => {
    if (drawer.height === 'top-half') return 'top-0';
    if (drawer.height === 'bottom-half') return 'bottom-0';
    return '';
  };

  return (
    <div 
      className={`
        absolute ${getPositionClass()} left-0 right-0 ${getHeightClass()}
        bg-[#1e1e1e] 
        ${side === 'left' ? 'border-r' : 'border-l'} border-gray-700/50
        flex flex-col
        ${className}
      `}
    >
      {/* Drawer Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 border-b border-gray-700/50 bg-[#1e1e1e]">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          {icon && <span className="text-gray-400">{icon}</span>}
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-200">{title}</span>
        </div>
        
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
          {/* Height Controls - only show if not hidden */}
          {!hideHeightControls && (
            <>
              {drawer.height !== 'top-half' && (
                <button
                  onClick={() => context.setDrawerHeight(side, position, 'top-half')}
                  className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-700/50 rounded text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-200"
                  aria-label="Resize to top half"
                >
                  <Minimize2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5 rotate-180" />
                </button>
              )}
              {drawer.height !== 'bottom-half' && (
                <button
                  onClick={() => context.setDrawerHeight(side, position, 'bottom-half')}
                  className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-700/50 rounded text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-200"
                  aria-label="Resize to bottom half"
                >
                  <Minimize2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                </button>
              )}
              {drawer.height !== 'full' && (
                <button
                  onClick={() => context.setDrawerHeight(side, position, 'full')}
                  className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-700/50 rounded text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-200"
                  aria-label="Resize to full height"
                >
                  <Maximize2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                </button>
              )}
            </>
          )}
          
          {/* Close */}
          <button
            onClick={() => context.closeDrawer(side, position)}
            className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-700/50 rounded text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-200"
            title="Close"
          >
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Drawer Content */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto">
        {children}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// DRAWER CONTAINER
// ============================================================================

interface DrawerContainerProps {
  drawers: DrawerConfig[];
  side: DrawerSide;
  className?: string;
}

export function DrawerContainer({ drawers, side, className = '' }: DrawerContainerProps) {
  const context = useDrawerContext();
  const sideState = side === 'left' ? context.left : context.right;

  // Find active drawers for THIS side only
  const activeTopDrawer = drawers.find(d => d.id === sideState.top.drawerId);
  const activeBottomDrawer = drawers.find(d => d.id === sideState.bottom.drawerId);

  const hasAnyOpen = sideState.top.isOpen || sideState.bottom.isOpen;

  if (!hasAnyOpen) {
    return null;
  }

  return (
    <SideProvider side={side}>
      <div 
        className={`
          relative w-72 bg-[#1e1e1e] 
          ${side === 'left' ? 'border-r' : 'border-l'} border-gray-700/50
          transition-all duration-200
          ${className}
        `}
      >
        {/* Top Drawer */}
        {activeTopDrawer && sideState.top.isOpen && (
          <Drawer
            id={activeTopDrawer.id}
            title={activeTopDrawer.title}
            icon={activeTopDrawer.icon}
            position="top"
            side={side}
            hideHeightControls={activeTopDrawer.hideHeightControls}
          >
            {activeTopDrawer.content}
          </Drawer>
        )}

        {/* Bottom Drawer */}
        {activeBottomDrawer && sideState.bottom.isOpen && (
          <Drawer
            id={activeBottomDrawer.id}
            title={activeBottomDrawer.title}
            icon={activeBottomDrawer.icon}
            position="bottom"
            side={side}
            hideHeightControls={activeBottomDrawer.hideHeightControls}
          >
            {activeBottomDrawer.content}
          </Drawer>
        )}
      </div>
    </SideProvider>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// MINI BAR TYPES & COMPONENT
// ============================================================================

export interface MiniBarItem {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  thumbnailUrl?: string;
  visible?: boolean;
  locked?: boolean;
  status?: 'draft' | 'in-progress' | 'complete';
}

interface MiniBarProps {
  type: 'layers' | 'characters' | 'panels' | 'clips' | 'tracks' | 'shots';
  items: MiniBarItem[];
  selectedId: string | null;
  onSelect: (id: string) => void;
  onVisibilityToggle?: (id: string) => void;
  onLockToggle?: (id: string) => void;
}

export function MiniBar({ type, items, selectedId, onSelect }: MiniBarProps) {
  return (
    <div className="w-14 bg-[#1a1a1a] border-l border-gray-700/50 flex flex-col">
      {/* Items */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto py-1">
        {items.map((item) => (
          <button
            key={item.id}
            onClick={() => onSelect(item.id)}
            className={`
              w-full p-1 transition-all
