              ${selectedId === item.id 
                ? 'bg-purple-600/30 border-l-2 border-purple-500' 
                : 'hover:bg-gray-800/50 border-l-2 border-transparent'
              }
            `}
            title={item.name}
          >
            <div className="w-10 h-10 mx-auto bg-gray-700/50 rounded text-[8px] text-gray-400 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
              {item.thumbnailUrl ? (
                <img src={item.thumbnailUrl} alt={item.name} className="w-full h-full object-contain p-0.5" />
              ) : (
                <span className="truncate px-0.5">{item.name.substring(0, 6)}</span>
              )}
            </div>
            {item.status && (
              <div className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full mx-auto mt-0.5 ${
                item.status === 'complete' ? 'bg-green-500' :
                item.status === 'in-progress' ? 'bg-yellow-500' : 'bg-gray-500'
              }`} />
            )}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
      
      {/* Count */}
      <div className="py-2 text-center border-t border-gray-700/50">
        <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">{items.length}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// EXPORTS
// ============================================================================

export type { DrawerConfig, MiniBarProps };

```


### HoverPreviewRenderer


**Category:** UI  
**File:** `components/image/HoverPreviewRenderer.tsx`


*Hover preview renderer*


```typescript
/**
 * Hover Preview Renderer
 * 
 * Renders the magic wand hover preview overlay with customizable border and fill.
 * Supports multiple patterns, glow effects, and animations.
 */

import React, { useEffect, useRef, useMemo } from 'react';
import type { Rectangle } from '../../types/segmentation';
import type { HoverPreviewSettings } from '../../lib/segmentation/types/MagicWandSettings';

interface HoverPreviewRendererProps {
  mask: Uint8ClampedArray | null;
  bounds: Rectangle | null;
  width: number;  // ImageData width
  height: number; // ImageData height
  canvasWidth: number;  // Canvas width (for transforms)
  canvasHeight: number; // Canvas height (for transforms)
  settings: HoverPreviewSettings;
  canvasTransform: {
    panX: number;
    panY: number;
    zoom: number;
  };
}

export function HoverPreviewRenderer({
  mask,
  bounds,
  width,  // ImageData width
  height, // ImageData height
  canvasWidth,  // Canvas width
  canvasHeight, // Canvas height
  settings,
  canvasTransform,
}: HoverPreviewRendererProps) {
  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
  const animationFrameRef = useRef<number | null>(null);
  const animationTimeRef = useRef<number>(0);

  // Memoize pattern creation
  const fillPattern = useMemo(() => {
    if (!settings.fill.enabled) return null;
    return createFillPattern(settings.fill);
  }, [settings.fill]);

  // Render the preview
  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas || !mask || mask.length === 0) return;

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently: true });
    if (!ctx) return;
    
    // CRITICAL: Ensure overlay canvas matches main canvas's exact internal resolution
    const mainCanvas = document.getElementById('main-canvas') as HTMLCanvasElement;
    if (mainCanvas && (canvas.width !== mainCanvas.width || canvas.height !== mainCanvas.height)) {
      canvas.width = mainCanvas.width;
      canvas.height = mainCanvas.height;
    }

    const render = (timestamp: number) => {
      animationTimeRef.current = timestamp;
      
      // Clear canvas
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

      // CRITICAL: The mask is a full-size array (width x height) representing ImageData
      // ImageData is top-left based (0,0 at top-left of canvas buffer)
      // Canvas rendering uses center-based coords with transforms
      //
      // Main canvas rendering (line 266-267):
      //   1. translate(panX + canvas.width/2, panY + canvas.height/2) - move to center + pan
      //   2. scale(zoom) - apply zoom
      //   3. Then draws at center-based coords (e.g., -400 to +400)
      //
      // For mask rendering, we need the SAME transforms so it moves with canvas:
      //   1. translate(panX + canvas.width/2, panY + canvas.height/2) - same as main canvas
      //   2. scale(zoom) - same as main canvas  
      //   3. translate(-width/2, -height/2) - convert to top-left based (ImageData space)
      //   4. Draw mask at (0,0) - which is ImageData (0,0) = canvas buffer top-left
      //
      ctx.save();
      
      // Apply SAME transforms as main canvas (line 266-267)
      // CRITICAL FIX: Use CANVAS dimensions for pan/center, not ImageData dimensions
      // The main canvas uses canvas.width/2 and canvas.height/2, so we must match that
      ctx.translate(
        canvasTransform.panX + canvasWidth / 2,
        canvasTransform.panY + canvasHeight / 2
      );
      ctx.scale(canvasTransform.zoom, canvasTransform.zoom);
      
      // Convert to ImageData space (top-left based)
      // After this, (0,0) = ImageData (0,0) = canvas buffer top-left
      // Use ImageData dimensions here (width/height are ImageData dimensions)
      ctx.translate(-width / 2, -height / 2);

      // Render fill (mask is full size, use width/height which should match ImageData)
      if (settings.fill.enabled) {
        renderFill(ctx, mask, width, height, settings.fill, timestamp);
      }

      // Render border (mask is full size, use width/height which should match ImageData)
      if (settings.border.enabled) {
        renderBorder(ctx, mask, width, height, settings.border, timestamp);
      }

      // Render edge highlight (mask is full size, use width/height which should match ImageData)
      if (settings.edgeHighlight) {
        renderEdgeHighlight(ctx, mask, width, height);
      }

      ctx.restore();

      // Continue animation if enabled
      if (settings.border.animation.enabled || settings.fill.glow.enabled) {
        animationFrameRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(render);
      }
    };

    animationFrameRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(render);

    return () => {
      if (animationFrameRef.current !== null) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrameRef.current);
      }
    };
  }, [mask, width, height, canvasWidth, canvasHeight, settings, canvasTransform]);

  if (!mask || mask.length === 0) {
    return null;
  }


  return (
    <canvas
      ref={canvasRef}
      width={canvasWidth}
      height={canvasHeight}
      className="w-full h-full"
      style={{
        position: 'absolute',
        top: 0,
        left: 0,
        pointerEvents: 'none',
        zIndex: 1,
      }}
    />
  );
}

/**
 * Render fill inside the masked area
 */
function renderFill(
  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
  mask: Uint8ClampedArray,
  width: number,
  height: number,
  fill: HoverPreviewSettings['fill'],
  timestamp: number
) {
  ctx.save();
  ctx.globalAlpha = fill.opacity;

  // Create temporary canvas for mask
  const maskCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
  maskCanvas.width = width;
  maskCanvas.height = height;
  const maskCtx = maskCanvas.getContext('2d');
  
  if (!maskCtx) {
    ctx.restore();
    return;
  }

  // Draw mask
  const imageData = maskCtx.createImageData(width, height);
  for (let i = 0; i < mask.length; i++) {
    const offset = i * 4;
    imageData.data[offset] = 255;
    imageData.data[offset + 1] = 255;
    imageData.data[offset + 2] = 255;
    imageData.data[offset + 3] = mask[i];
  }
  maskCtx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);

  // Set composite operation to use mask
  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';

  // Apply fill based on type
  switch (fill.type) {
    case 'solid':
      ctx.fillStyle = fill.color;
      break;
      
    case 'diagonal-lines':
      ctx.fillStyle = createDiagonalLinesPattern(
        fill.color,
        fill.pattern.lineSpacing || 8,
        fill.pattern.lineAngle || 45
      );
      break;
      
    case 'grid':
      ctx.fillStyle = createGridPattern(fill.color, fill.pattern.gridSize || 10);
      break;
      
    case 'checkers':
      ctx.fillStyle = createCheckersPattern(fill.color, fill.pattern.checkerSize || 10);
      break;
      
    case 'dots':
      ctx.fillStyle = createDotsPattern(
        fill.color,
        fill.pattern.dotSize || 2,
        fill.pattern.dotSpacing || 8
      );
      break;
      
    case 'crosshatch':
      ctx.fillStyle = createCrosshatchPattern(fill.color, fill.pattern.lineSpacing || 8);
      break;
      
    default:
      ctx.fillStyle = fill.color;
  }

  // Draw mask at (0,0) - after transforms, this is ImageData (0,0) position
  // The transforms have already converted to ImageData space
  ctx.drawImage(maskCanvas, 0, 0, width, height);
  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-in';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);

  // Apply glow if enabled
  if (fill.glow.enabled) {
    ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
    ctx.shadowColor = fill.glow.color;
    ctx.shadowBlur = fill.glow.blur * (1 + 0.3 * Math.sin(timestamp / 500));
    ctx.drawImage(maskCanvas, 0, 0);
  }

  ctx.restore();
}

/**
 * Render border around the masked area
 */
function renderBorder(
  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
  mask: Uint8ClampedArray,
  width: number,
  height: number,
  border: HoverPreviewSettings['border'],
  timestamp: number
) {
  ctx.save();
  ctx.globalAlpha = border.opacity;

  // Find edge pixels
  const edgePixels = findEdgePixels(mask, width, height);

  // Set stroke style
  ctx.strokeStyle = border.color;
  ctx.lineWidth = border.width;

  // Apply dash pattern
  switch (border.pattern) {
    case 'dashed':
      ctx.setLineDash([8, 4]);
      break;
    case 'dotted':
      ctx.setLineDash([2, 4]);
      break;
    case 'dash-dot':
      ctx.setLineDash([8, 4, 2, 4]);
      break;
    case 'dash-dot-dot':
      ctx.setLineDash([8, 4, 2, 4, 2, 4]);
      break;
    default:
      ctx.setLineDash([]);
  }

  // Apply animation offset for marching ants
  if (border.animation.enabled && border.animation.type === 'marching-ants') {
    const offset = (timestamp / 50) * border.animation.speed;
    ctx.lineDashOffset = -offset;
  }

  // Apply glow if enabled
  if (border.glow.enabled) {
    let glowIntensity = 1;
    
    if (border.animation.enabled && border.animation.type === 'glow-pulse') {
      glowIntensity = 0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(timestamp / 500 * border.animation.speed);
    }
    
    ctx.shadowColor = border.glow.color;
    ctx.shadowBlur = border.glow.blur * glowIntensity;
    ctx.shadowOffsetX = 0;
    ctx.shadowOffsetY = 0;
  }

  // Apply pulse animation
  if (border.animation.enabled && border.animation.type === 'pulse') {
    const pulse = 0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(timestamp / 300 * border.animation.speed);
    ctx.globalAlpha = border.opacity * (0.5 + 0.5 * pulse);
    ctx.lineWidth = border.width * (0.8 + 0.4 * pulse);
  }

  // Draw edge pixels as path - NO OFFSET (screen space)
  ctx.beginPath();
  for (const { x, y } of edgePixels) {
    ctx.rect(x - 0.5, y - 0.5, 1, 1);
  }
  ctx.stroke();

  ctx.restore();
}

/**
 * Render edge highlight (brighter border on edge pixels)
 */
function renderEdgeHighlight(
  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
  mask: Uint8ClampedArray,
  width: number,
  height: number
) {
  ctx.save();
  ctx.globalAlpha = 0.5;
  ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';

  const edgePixels = findEdgePixels(mask, width, height);

  // Draw at screen coordinates - NO OFFSET
  for (const { x, y } of edgePixels) {
    ctx.fillRect(x, y, 1, 1);
  }

  ctx.restore();
}

/**
 * Find edge pixels in mask
 */
function findEdgePixels(
  mask: Uint8ClampedArray,
  width: number,
  height: number
): Array<{ x: number; y: number }> {
  const edgePixels: Array<{ x: number; y: number }> = [];

  for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
      const idx = y * width + x;
      
      if (mask[idx] === 0) continue;

      // Check if any neighbor is not selected
      const isEdge = 
        (x === 0 || mask[idx - 1] === 0) ||
        (x === width - 1 || mask[idx + 1] === 0) ||
        (y === 0 || mask[idx - width] === 0) ||
        (y === height - 1 || mask[idx + width] === 0);

      if (isEdge) {
        edgePixels.push({ x, y });
      }
    }
  }

  return edgePixels;
}

/**
 * Create fill pattern based on settings
 */
function createFillPattern(fill: HoverPreviewSettings['fill']): CanvasPattern | null {
  // This could be expanded to cache patterns
  return null;
}

/**
 * Create diagonal lines pattern
 */
function createDiagonalLinesPattern(
  color: string,
  spacing: number,
  angle: number
): CanvasPattern {
  const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
  const size = spacing * 2;
  canvas.width = size;
  canvas.height = size;
  
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  if (!ctx) throw new Error('Failed to get pattern context');

  ctx.strokeStyle = color;
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;

  const rad = (angle * Math.PI) / 180;
  const dx = Math.cos(rad) * size * 2;
  const dy = Math.sin(rad) * size * 2;

  ctx.beginPath();
  for (let i = -size; i < size * 2; i += spacing) {
    ctx.moveTo(i, 0);
    ctx.lineTo(i + dx, dy);
  }
  ctx.stroke();

  return ctx.createPattern(canvas, 'repeat')!;
}

/**
 * Create grid pattern
 */
function createGridPattern(color: string, gridSize: number): CanvasPattern {
  const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
  canvas.width = gridSize;
  canvas.height = gridSize;
  
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  if (!ctx) throw new Error('Failed to get pattern context');

  ctx.strokeStyle = color;
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;

  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(0, 0);
  ctx.lineTo(gridSize, 0);
  ctx.moveTo(0, 0);
  ctx.lineTo(0, gridSize);
  ctx.stroke();

  return ctx.createPattern(canvas, 'repeat')!;
}

/**
 * Create checkers pattern
 */
function createCheckersPattern(color: string, checkerSize: number): CanvasPattern {
  const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
  canvas.width = checkerSize * 2;
  canvas.height = checkerSize * 2;
  
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  if (!ctx) throw new Error('Failed to get pattern context');

  ctx.fillStyle = color;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, checkerSize, checkerSize);
  ctx.fillRect(checkerSize, checkerSize, checkerSize, checkerSize);

  return ctx.createPattern(canvas, 'repeat')!;
}

/**
 * Create dots pattern
 */
function createDotsPattern(
  color: string,
  dotSize: number,
  spacing: number
): CanvasPattern {
  const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
  canvas.width = spacing;
  canvas.height = spacing;
  
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  if (!ctx) throw new Error('Failed to get pattern context');

  ctx.fillStyle = color;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(spacing / 2, spacing / 2, dotSize / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.fill();

  return ctx.createPattern(canvas, 'repeat')!;
}

/**
 * Create crosshatch pattern
 */
function createCrosshatchPattern(color: string, spacing: number): CanvasPattern {
  const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
  canvas.width = spacing;
  canvas.height = spacing;
  
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  if (!ctx) throw new Error('Failed to get pattern context');

  ctx.strokeStyle = color;
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;

  // Diagonal lines both ways
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(0, 0);
  ctx.lineTo(spacing, spacing);
  ctx.moveTo(spacing, 0);
  ctx.lineTo(0, spacing);
  ctx.stroke();

  return ctx.createPattern(canvas, 'repeat')!;
}

export default HoverPreviewRenderer;


```


### IconBar


**Category:** UI  
**File:** `components/layout/drawer/IconBar.tsx`


*Icon bar for drawer navigation*


```typescript
import { ReactNode, useState, useContext, createContext } from 'react';
import { useDrawerContext, type DrawerHeight, type DrawerSide } from './DrawerContainer';
import { Maximize2, ChevronsUp, ChevronsDown } from 'lucide-react';
import { ProgressiveTooltip } from '../../ui/ProgressiveTooltip';
import type { TooltipContent } from '../../ui/ProgressiveTooltip/types';

// ============================================================================
// TYPES
// ============================================================================

interface IconButtonConfig {
  id: string;
  icon: ReactNode;
  label: string;
  drawerPosition?: 'top' | 'bottom';
  defaultHeight?: DrawerHeight;
  onClick?: () => void;
  tooltipContent?: TooltipContent; // Optional progressive tooltip
  type?: 'tool' | 'drawer' | 'custom'; // NEW: Distinguish tool buttons from drawer buttons
}

interface IconBarProps {
  topButtons: IconButtonConfig[];
  bottomButtons: IconButtonConfig[];
  side: DrawerSide;
  className?: string;
  activeToolId?: string; // NEW: For highlighting active tool
}

// ============================================================================
// SPLIT HOVER BUTTON
// ============================================================================

interface SplitHoverButtonProps {
  config: IconButtonConfig;
  side: DrawerSide;
  isActive: boolean;
  onFullClick: () => void;
  onTopHalfClick: () => void;
  onBottomHalfClick: () => void;
}

function SplitHoverButton({ 
  config, 
  side,
  isActive, 
  onFullClick, 
  onTopHalfClick, 
  onBottomHalfClick 
}: SplitHoverButtonProps) {
  const [isHovered, setIsHovered] = useState(false);
  const hasDrawer = !!config.drawerPosition;

  const baseButton = (
    <button
      onClick={hasDrawer ? onFullClick : config.onClick}
      className={`
        w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg
        transition-all duration-150
        ${isActive 
          ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white shadow-lg shadow-purple-500/20' 
          : 'text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700/50 hover:text-gray-200'
        }
        ${isHovered && hasDrawer ? 'opacity-0' : 'opacity-100'}
      `}
      aria-label={config.label}
      title={config.label}
    >
      {config.icon}
    </button>
  );

  return (
    <div 
      className="relative w-10 h-10"
      onMouseEnter={() => setIsHovered(true)}
      onMouseLeave={() => setIsHovered(false)}
    >
      {/* Base Button - with tooltip if provided */}
      {config.tooltipContent ? (
        <ProgressiveTooltip content={config.tooltipContent}>
          {baseButton}
        </ProgressiveTooltip>
      ) : (
        baseButton
      )}

      {/* Hover Split Overlay */}
      {hasDrawer && isHovered && (
        <div className="absolute inset-0 flex rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-gray-600 bg-[#252525] shadow-lg z-10">
          {/* Left Half - Full Drawer */}
          <button
            onClick={onFullClick}
            className={`
              flex-1 flex items-center justify-center
              border-r border-gray-600
              transition-colors
              ${isActive ? 'bg-purple-600/80 text-white' : 'hover:bg-purple-600/50 text-gray-300'}
            `}
            title={`${config.label} - Full Size`}
          >
            <Maximize2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
          </button>

          {/* Right Half - Split into Top/Bottom */}
          <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
            {/* Top Half Button */}
            <button
              onClick={onTopHalfClick}
              className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-gray-600/50 transition-colors border-b border-gray-600"
              title={`${config.label} - Top Half`}
            >
              <ChevronsUp className="w-3 h-3 text-gray-400" />
            </button>
            {/* Bottom Half Button */}
            <button
              onClick={onBottomHalfClick}
              className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-gray-600/50 transition-colors"
              title={`${config.label} - Bottom Half`}
            >
              <ChevronsDown className="w-3 h-3 text-gray-400" />
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// SIMPLE ICON BUTTON (for non-drawer buttons)
// ============================================================================

interface SimpleIconButtonProps {
  config: IconButtonConfig;
  isActive: boolean;
  onClick: () => void;
}

function SimpleIconButton({ config, isActive, onClick }: SimpleIconButtonProps) {
  const button = (
    <button
      onClick={onClick}
      className={`
        w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg
        transition-all duration-150
        ${isActive 
          ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white shadow-lg shadow-purple-500/20' 
          : 'text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700/50 hover:text-gray-200'
        }
      `}
      aria-label={config.label}
      title={config.label}
    >
      {config.icon}
    </button>
  );

  return config.tooltipContent ? (
    <ProgressiveTooltip content={config.tooltipContent}>
      {button}
    </ProgressiveTooltip>
  ) : button;
}

// ============================================================================
// ICON BAR
// ============================================================================

export function IconBar({ topButtons, bottomButtons, side, className = '', activeToolId }: IconBarProps) {
  const context = useDrawerContext();
  const sideState = side === 'left' ? context.left : context.right;

  const handleFullClick = (config: IconButtonConfig) => {
    if (config.drawerPosition) {
      context.toggleDrawer(side, config.id, config.drawerPosition, 'full');
    } else if (config.onClick) {
      config.onClick();
    }
  };

  const handleTopHalfClick = (config: IconButtonConfig) => {
    if (config.drawerPosition) {
      context.openDrawer(side, config.id, 'top', 'top-half');
    }
  };

  const handleBottomHalfClick = (config: IconButtonConfig) => {
    if (config.drawerPosition) {
      context.openDrawer(side, config.id, 'bottom', 'bottom-half');
    }
  };

  const isButtonActive = (config: IconButtonConfig) => {
    // For tool buttons, check if it matches the activeToolId
    if (config.type === 'tool' && activeToolId) {
      return config.id === activeToolId;
    }
    
    // For drawer buttons, check if drawer is open
    return (sideState.top.isOpen && sideState.top.drawerId === config.id) ||
           (sideState.bottom.isOpen && sideState.bottom.drawerId === config.id);
  };

  const renderButton = (config: IconButtonConfig) => {
    if (config.drawerPosition) {
      return (
        <SplitHoverButton
          key={config.id}
          config={config}
          side={side}
          isActive={isButtonActive(config)}
          onFullClick={() => handleFullClick(config)}
          onTopHalfClick={() => handleTopHalfClick(config)}
          onBottomHalfClick={() => handleBottomHalfClick(config)}
        />
      );
    }
    return (
      <SimpleIconButton
        key={config.id}
        config={config}
        isActive={isButtonActive(config)}
        onClick={() => config.onClick?.()}
      />
    );
  };

  return (
    <div 
      className={`
        w-12 bg-[#1a1a1a] 
        ${side === 'left' ? 'border-r' : 'border-l'} border-gray-700/50
        flex flex-col justify-between py-2
        relative z-40
        ${className}
      `}
    >
      {/* Top Section - Page Specific */}
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1 px-1">
        {topButtons.map(renderButton)}
      </div>

      {/* Bottom Section - Consistent */}
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1 px-1">
        {bottomButtons.map(renderButton)}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```


### ImageCanvas


**Category:** UI  
**File:** `components/image/ImageCanvas.tsx`


*Main image canvas component*


```typescript
import { useRef, useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useProject } from '../../contexts/ProjectContext';
import { ImageLoader } from '../../lib/image/ImageLoader';

// ============================================================================
// TYPES
// ============================================================================

interface ImageCanvasProps {
  className?: string;
  style?: React.CSSProperties;
}

// ============================================================================
// CANVAS COMPONENT
// ============================================================================

export function ImageCanvas({ className = '', style }: ImageCanvasProps) {
  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const imageLoadCache = useRef<Map<string, HTMLImageElement>>(new Map());
  const animationFrameRef = useRef<number | null>(null);
  
  const { canvasState, updateCanvasState, layers, activeTool, setLayers, addHistorySnapshot } = useProject();
  
  const [isPanning, setIsPanning] = useState(false);
  const [isDrawing, setIsDrawing] = useState(false);
  const [lastMousePos, setLastMousePos] = useState({ x: 0, y: 0 });
  const [isRightMouseDown, setIsRightMouseDown] = useState(false);
  
  // ============================================================================
  // DRAWING LOGIC
  // ============================================================================
  
  const drawCanvas = useCallback(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently: true });
    if (!ctx) return;
    
    // Clear with background
    ctx.fillStyle = '#252525';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    
    // Apply pan and zoom transforms
    ctx.save();
    ctx.translate(canvasState.panX + canvas.width / 2, canvasState.panY + canvas.height / 2);
    ctx.scale(canvasState.zoom, canvasState.zoom);
    
    // Draw canvas area (white)
    const canvasWidth = 800;
    const canvasHeight = 600;
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
    ctx.fillRect(-canvasWidth / 2, -canvasHeight / 2, canvasWidth, canvasHeight);
    
    // Draw canvas border
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#333333';
    ctx.lineWidth = 2 / canvasState.zoom;
    ctx.strokeRect(-canvasWidth / 2, -canvasHeight / 2, canvasWidth, canvasHeight);
    
    // Draw checkerboard for transparency
    const tileSize = 10;
    for (let y = -canvasHeight / 2; y < canvasHeight / 2; y += tileSize) {
      for (let x = -canvasWidth / 2; x < canvasWidth / 2; x += tileSize) {
        const isLight = ((Math.floor((x + canvasWidth / 2) / tileSize) + Math.floor((y + canvasHeight / 2) / tileSize)) % 2) === 0;
        ctx.fillStyle = isLight ? '#ffffff' : '#e0e0e0';
        ctx.fillRect(x, y, tileSize, tileSize);
      }
    }
    
    // Draw layers
    for (const layer of layers) {
      if (!layer.visible) continue;
      
      ctx.save();
      ctx.globalAlpha = layer.opacity;
      ctx.globalCompositeOperation = getCompositeOperation(layer.blendMode);
      
      const { x, y, width, height } = layer.bounds;
      const { rotation, scaleX, scaleY } = layer.transform;
      
      // Apply layer transform
      ctx.translate(x + width / 2, y + height / 2);
      ctx.rotate((rotation * Math.PI) / 180);
      ctx.scale(scaleX, scaleY);
      ctx.translate(-width / 2, -height / 2);
      
      // Draw layer content
      if (layer.dataUrl) {
        const img = imageLoadCache.current.get(layer.id);
        if (img && img.complete) {
          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
        } else {
          // Load image
          if (!imageLoadCache.current.has(layer.id)) {
            loadLayerImage(layer.id, layer.dataUrl);
          }
          // Draw placeholder
          drawPlaceholder(ctx, layer.id, width, height);
        }
      } else {
        drawPlaceholder(ctx, layer.id, width, height);
      }
      
      ctx.restore();
    }
    
    // Draw guides
    if (canvasState.showGuides) {
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#03A9F4';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1 / canvasState.zoom;
      canvasState.guides.forEach(guide => {
        ctx.beginPath();
        if (guide.type === 'horizontal') {
          ctx.moveTo(-10000, guide.position);
          ctx.lineTo(10000, guide.position);
        } else {
          ctx.moveTo(guide.position, -10000);
          ctx.lineTo(guide.position, 10000);
        }
        ctx.stroke();
      });
    }
    
    ctx.restore();
    
    // Draw rulers (outside of transform)
    if (canvasState.showRulers) {
      drawRulers(ctx, canvas);
    }
  }, [canvasState, layers]);
  
  const loadLayerImage = (layerId: string, dataUrl: string) => {
    const img = new Image();
    img.onload = () => {
      imageLoadCache.current.set(layerId, img);
      requestRedraw();
    };
    img.onerror = (e) => {
      console.error(`Failed to load image for layer ${layerId}`, e);
    };
    imageLoadCache.current.set(layerId, img);
    img.src = dataUrl;
  };
  
  const requestRedraw = useCallback(() => {
    if (animationFrameRef.current === null) {
      animationFrameRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        drawCanvas();
        animationFrameRef.current = null;
      });
    }
  }, [drawCanvas]);
  
  const drawPlaceholder = (ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, id: string, width: number, height: number) => {
    const hash = id.split('').reduce((acc, char) => char.charCodeAt(0) + ((acc << 5) - acc), 0);
    const hue = Math.abs(hash) % 360;
    ctx.fillStyle = `hsl(${hue}, 70%, 60%)`;
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
  };
  
  const getCompositeOperation = (blendMode: string): GlobalCompositeOperation => {
    const modeMap: Record<string, GlobalCompositeOperation> = {
      'normal': 'source-over',
      'multiply': 'multiply',
      'screen': 'screen',
      'overlay': 'overlay',
      'darken': 'darken',
      'lighten': 'lighten',
      'color-dodge': 'color-dodge',
      'color-burn': 'color-burn',
      'hard-light': 'hard-light',
      'soft-light': 'soft-light',
      'difference': 'difference',
      'exclusion': 'exclusion',
    };
    return modeMap[blendMode] || 'source-over';
  };
  
  const drawRulers = (ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, canvas: HTMLCanvasElement) => {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);
    
    const rulerSize = 20;
    
    // Ruler backgrounds
    ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, rulerSize);
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, rulerSize, canvas.height);
    
    // Ruler ticks
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#555';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    ctx.font = '9px monospace';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#888';
    
    const step = 50 * canvasState.zoom;
    const offsetX = (canvasState.panX + canvas.width / 2) % step;
    const offsetY = (canvasState.panY + canvas.height / 2) % step;
    
    // Horizontal ruler
    for (let x = rulerSize + offsetX; x < canvas.width; x += step) {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(x, 0);
      ctx.lineTo(x, rulerSize);
      ctx.stroke();
      
      const worldX = Math.round((x - canvasState.panX - canvas.width / 2) / canvasState.zoom);
      ctx.fillText(`${worldX}`, x + 2, 12);
    }
    
    // Vertical ruler
    for (let y = rulerSize + offsetY; y < canvas.height; y += step) {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(0, y);
      ctx.lineTo(rulerSize, y);
      ctx.stroke();
      
      const worldY = Math.round((y - canvasState.panY - canvas.height / 2) / canvasState.zoom);
      ctx.save();
      ctx.translate(10, y + 2);
      ctx.rotate(-Math.PI / 2);
      ctx.fillText(`${worldY}`, 0, 0);
      ctx.restore();
    }
    
    // Corner
    ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, rulerSize, rulerSize);
    
    ctx.restore();
  };
  
  // ============================================================================
  // RESIZE HANDLING
  // ============================================================================
  
  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    const container = containerRef.current;
    if (!canvas || !container) return;
    
    const resizeCanvas = () => {
      canvas.width = container.clientWidth;
      canvas.height = container.clientHeight;
      requestRedraw();
    };
    
    resizeCanvas();
    window.addEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);
    
    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(resizeCanvas);
    resizeObserver.observe(container);
    
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);
      resizeObserver.disconnect();
      if (animationFrameRef.current !== null) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrameRef.current);
      }
    };
  }, [requestRedraw]);
  
  // Redraw when state changes
  useEffect(() => {
    requestRedraw();
  }, [canvasState, layers, requestRedraw]);
  
  // ============================================================================
  // MOUSE HANDLERS
  // ============================================================================
  
  const handleMouseDown = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    
    // Right-click = pan
    if (e.button === 2) {
      e.preventDefault();
      setIsRightMouseDown(true);
      setIsPanning(true);
      setLastMousePos({ x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY });
      return;
    }
    
    // Left-click tool operations
    if (e.button === 0) {
      const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
      const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
      const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
      const canvasX = (screenX - canvasState.panX - canvas.width / 2) / canvasState.zoom;
      const canvasY = (screenY - canvasState.panY - canvas.height / 2) / canvasState.zoom;
      
      // Tool-specific handling
      if (activeTool === 'brush' || activeTool === 'eraser') {
        setIsDrawing(true);
        // Start brush stroke
      }
      
      if (activeTool === 'zoom') {
        const zoomFactor = e.shiftKey ? 0.8 : 1.25;
        updateCanvasState({ zoom: Math.max(0.1, Math.min(10, canvasState.zoom * zoomFactor)) });
      }
    }
  }, [canvasState, activeTool, updateCanvasState]);
  
  const handleMouseMove = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    
    // Pan with right mouse button
    if (isPanning && isRightMouseDown) {
      const dx = e.clientX - lastMousePos.x;
      const dy = e.clientY - lastMousePos.y;
      
      updateCanvasState({
        panX: canvasState.panX + dx,
        panY: canvasState.panY + dy,
      });
      
      setLastMousePos({ x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY });
    }
  }, [isPanning, isRightMouseDown, lastMousePos, canvasState, updateCanvasState]);
  
  const handleMouseUp = useCallback(() => {
    setIsPanning(false);
    setIsDrawing(false);
    setIsRightMouseDown(false);
  }, []);
  
  // Right-click + scroll = zoom
  const handleWheel = useCallback((e: React.WheelEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    // Only zoom if right mouse is held OR always (as requested)
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    
    // Get mouse position relative to canvas center
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    const mouseX = e.clientX - rect.left;
    const mouseY = e.clientY - rect.top;
    
    // Calculate world position before zoom
    const worldXBefore = (mouseX - canvasState.panX - canvas.width / 2) / canvasState.zoom;
    const worldYBefore = (mouseY - canvasState.panY - canvas.height / 2) / canvasState.zoom;
    
    // Calculate new zoom
    const delta = e.deltaY > 0 ? 0.9 : 1.1;
    const newZoom = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(10, canvasState.zoom * delta));
    
    // Calculate new pan to keep mouse position stable
    const worldXAfter = (mouseX - canvasState.panX - canvas.width / 2) / newZoom;
    const worldYAfter = (mouseY - canvasState.panY - canvas.height / 2) / newZoom;
    
    const panXDelta = (worldXAfter - worldXBefore) * newZoom;
    const panYDelta = (worldYAfter - worldYBefore) * newZoom;
    
    updateCanvasState({
      zoom: newZoom,
      panX: canvasState.panX + panXDelta,
      panY: canvasState.panY + panYDelta,
    });
  }, [canvasState, updateCanvasState]);
  
  const handleContextMenu = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
  }, []);
  
  // ============================================================================
  // FILE DROP
  // ============================================================================
  
  const handleDrop = useCallback(async (e: React.DragEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    
    const files = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files).filter(file => 
      file.type.startsWith('image/')
    );
    
    if (files.length === 0) return;
    
    const imageLoader = new ImageLoader();
    
    try {
      const loadedImages = await imageLoader.loadMultipleFiles(files);
      
      const newLayers = loadedImages.map((img, idx) => {
        const file = files[idx];
        const dataUrl = img.imageData ? imageDataToDataUrl(img.imageData) : '';
        const width = img.metadata.width;
        const height = img.metadata.height;
        
        return {
          id: crypto.randomUUID(),
          projectId: 'default',
          name: file.name.replace(/\.[^/.]+$/, ''),
          type: 'raster' as const,
          visible: true,
          locked: false,
          opacity: 1,
          blendMode: 'normal',
          position: layers.length + idx,
          bounds: {
            x: -width / 2,
            y: -height / 2,
            width,
            height,
          },
          transform: { rotation: 0, scaleX: 1, scaleY: 1 },
          modifierStack: [],
          thumbnailUrl: img.thumbnail,
          dataUrl,
        };
      });
      
      setLayers([...layers, ...newLayers]);
      
      addHistorySnapshot({
        projectId: 'default',
        sequence: 0,
        actionType: 'import',
        actionLabel: `Import ${files.length} image${files.length > 1 ? 's' : ''}`,
        stateDelta: {},
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to load dropped images:', error);
    } finally {
      imageLoader.dispose();
    }
  }, [layers, setLayers, addHistorySnapshot]);
  
  const handleDragOver = useCallback((e: React.DragEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
  }, []);
  
  const imageDataToDataUrl = (imageData: ImageData): string => {
    const tempCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    tempCanvas.width = imageData.width;
    tempCanvas.height = imageData.height;
    const tempCtx = tempCanvas.getContext('2d');
    if (!tempCtx) return '';
    tempCtx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
    return tempCanvas.toDataURL('image/png');
  };
  
  // ============================================================================
  // CURSOR
  // ============================================================================
  
  const getCursor = () => {
    if (isPanning) return 'grabbing';
    if (isDrawing) return 'crosshair';
    if (activeTool === 'brush' || activeTool === 'eraser') return 'crosshair';
    if (activeTool === 'wand') return 'crosshair';
    if (activeTool === 'zoom') return 'zoom-in';
    if (activeTool === 'move' || activeTool === 'select') return 'move';
    return 'default';
  };
  
  return (
    <div
      ref={containerRef}
      className={`relative overflow-hidden bg-[#252525] ${className}`}
      onMouseDown={handleMouseDown}
      onMouseMove={handleMouseMove}
      onMouseUp={handleMouseUp}
      onMouseLeave={handleMouseUp}
      onWheel={handleWheel}
      onContextMenu={handleContextMenu}
      onDrop={handleDrop}
      onDragOver={handleDragOver}
      style={{ cursor: getCursor(), ...style }}
    >
      <canvas ref={canvasRef} className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full" />
      
      {/* Zoom indicator */}
      <div className="absolute bottom-4 right-4 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs text-white font-mono flex items-center gap-2">
        <span>{Math.round(canvasState.zoom * 100)}%</span>
        <div className="w-px h-3 bg-gray-600" />
        <span className="text-gray-400">Scroll: Zoom | Right-drag: Pan</span>
      </div>
      
      {/* Empty state */}
      {layers.length === 0 && (
        <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
          <div className="text-center text-gray-500">
            <p className="text-lg mb-2">Drop images here to get started</p>
            <p className="text-sm">Or use AI Generate in the right panel</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

export default ImageCanvas;


```


### ImageTimeline


**Category:** UI  
**File:** `components/image/ImageTimeline.tsx`


*Image timeline for animation*


```typescript
import { useState, useRef, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';
import {
  Play,
  Pause,
  SkipBack,
  SkipForward,
  Plus,
  Trash2,
  Copy,
  Diamond,
  Circle,
  Square,
  ChevronUp,
  ChevronDown,
  Minimize2,
  Maximize2,
  GripHorizontal,
  ZoomIn,
  ZoomOut,
  Lock,
  Unlock,
  Eye,
  EyeOff,
  Sparkles,
  Move,
  RotateCcw,
  Scale,
  Palette,
  Layers,
  Spline,
  type LucideIcon,
} from 'lucide-react';

// ============================================================================
// TYPES
// ============================================================================

export type TimelineSize = 'mini' | 'medium' | 'large';

export type EasingType = 
  | 'linear'
  | 'ease-in'
  | 'ease-out'
  | 'ease-in-out'
  | 'bounce'
  | 'elastic'
  | 'cubic-bezier';

export type TweenProperty =
  | 'position'
  | 'rotation'
  | 'scale'
  | 'opacity'
  | 'color'
  | 'blur'
  | 'path'      // SVG path animation
  | 'morph'     // Shape morphing
  | 'custom';

export interface Keyframe {
  id: string;
  frame: number;      // Frame number (0-based)
  value: any;         // Property value at this keyframe
  easing: EasingType;
  bezierHandles?: {   // For cubic-bezier
    in: { x: number; y: number };
    out: { x: number; y: number };
  };
}

export interface AnimationTrack {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  layerId: string;    // Which layer this animates
  property: TweenProperty;
  keyframes: Keyframe[];
  color: string;
  muted: boolean;
  locked: boolean;
  visible: boolean;
}

export interface ImageTimelineProps {
  tracks: AnimationTrack[];
  currentFrame: number;
  totalFrames: number;
  fps: number;
  isPlaying: boolean;
  selectedKeyframeId: string | null;
  onPlayPause: () => void;
  onSeek: (frame: number) => void;
  onSelectKeyframe: (id: string | null) => void;
  onAddKeyframe: (trackId: string, frame: number) => void;
  onDeleteKeyframe: (trackId: string, keyframeId: string) => void;
  onTrackToggle: (trackId: string, property: 'muted' | 'locked' | 'visible') => void;
  onKeyframeMove?: (trackId: string, keyframeId: string, newFrame: number) => void;
}

// Easing icons
const EASING_ICONS: Record<EasingType, LucideIcon> = {
  'linear': Square,
  'ease-in': ChevronUp,
  'ease-out': ChevronDown,
  'ease-in-out': Circle,
  'bounce': Sparkles,
  'elastic': Spline,
  'cubic-bezier': Diamond,
};

// Property icons & colors
const PROPERTY_CONFIG: Record<TweenProperty, { icon: LucideIcon; color: string; label: string }> = {
  position: { icon: Move, color: '#3B82F6', label: 'Position' },
  rotation: { icon: RotateCcw, color: '#8B5CF6', label: 'Rotation' },
  scale: { icon: Scale, color: '#10B981', label: 'Scale' },
  opacity: { icon: Eye, color: '#F59E0B', label: 'Opacity' },
  color: { icon: Palette, color: '#EC4899', label: 'Color' },
  blur: { icon: Circle, color: '#6366F1', label: 'Blur' },
  path: { icon: Spline, color: '#14B8A6', label: 'Path' },
  morph: { icon: Sparkles, color: '#F97316', label: 'Morph' },
  custom: { icon: Diamond, color: '#64748B', label: 'Custom' },
};

// ============================================================================
// KEYFRAME COMPONENT
// ============================================================================

interface KeyframeMarkerProps {
  keyframe: Keyframe;
  trackColor: string;
  isSelected: boolean;
  position: number;
  height: number;
  onSelect: () => void;
  onMove?: (newFrame: number) => void;
}

function KeyframeMarker({
  keyframe,
  trackColor,
  isSelected,
  position,
  height,
  onSelect,
  onMove,
}: KeyframeMarkerProps) {
  const EasingIcon = EASING_ICONS[keyframe.easing];
  const size = height > 40 ? 12 : 8;
  
  return (
    <div
      className={`
        absolute cursor-pointer transition-all duration-100 flex items-center justify-center
        ${isSelected ? 'z-20 scale-125' : 'z-10 hover:scale-110'}
      `}
      style={{
        left: position - size / 2,
        top: '50%',
        transform: 'translateY(-50%)',
        width: size,
        height: size,
      }}
      onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); onSelect(); }}
    >
      {/* Diamond shape keyframe */}
      <div
        className={`
          w-full h-full rotate-45 rounded-sm transition-all
          ${isSelected 
            ? 'ring-2 ring-white shadow-lg' 
            : 'hover:brightness-125'
          }
        `}
        style={{ 
          backgroundColor: trackColor,
          boxShadow: isSelected ? `0 0 8px ${trackColor}` : 'none',
        }}
      />
      {/* Easing indicator (large mode) */}
      {height > 40 && (
        <div className="absolute -bottom-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2">
          <EasingIcon className="w-2 h-2 text-gray-500" />
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// TWEEN SPAN COMPONENT (Motion tween visualization)
// ============================================================================

interface TweenSpanProps {
  startFrame: number;
  endFrame: number;
  startKeyframe: Keyframe;
  endKeyframe: Keyframe;
  trackColor: string;
  zoom: number;
  height: number;
}

function TweenSpan({
  startFrame,
  endFrame,
  startKeyframe,
  endKeyframe,
  trackColor,
  zoom,
  height,
}: TweenSpanProps) {
  const width = (endFrame - startFrame) * zoom;
  const left = startFrame * zoom;
  
  // Generate easing curve path
  const generateEasingPath = () => {
    const h = Math.min(height - 8, 20);
    const w = width;
    
    switch (endKeyframe.easing) {
      case 'ease-in':
        return `M 0 ${h} Q ${w * 0.6} ${h} ${w} 0`;
      case 'ease-out':
        return `M 0 ${h} Q ${w * 0.4} 0 ${w} 0`;
      case 'ease-in-out':
        return `M 0 ${h} C ${w * 0.4} ${h} ${w * 0.6} 0 ${w} 0`;
      case 'bounce':
        return `M 0 ${h} Q ${w * 0.2} 0 ${w * 0.4} ${h * 0.5} Q ${w * 0.6} ${h} ${w * 0.8} ${h * 0.3} L ${w} 0`;
      case 'elastic':
        return `M 0 ${h} Q ${w * 0.3} ${h * -0.5} ${w * 0.5} ${h * 0.5} Q ${w * 0.7} ${h * 1.5} ${w} 0`;
      default: // linear
        return `M 0 ${h} L ${w} 0`;
    }
  };
  
  return (
    <div
      className="absolute top-1 bottom-1 pointer-events-none"
      style={{ left, width }}
    >
      {/* Background gradient */}
      <div 
        className="absolute inset-0 rounded opacity-20"
        style={{ 
          background: `linear-gradient(90deg, ${trackColor}00, ${trackColor}40, ${trackColor}00)` 
        }}
      />
      
      {/* Easing curve (large mode) */}
      {height > 30 && (
        <svg className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full overflow-visible">
          <path
            d={generateEasingPath()}
            fill="none"
            stroke={trackColor}
            strokeWidth="1.5"
            strokeDasharray="4 2"
            opacity="0.6"
          />
        </svg>
      )}
      
      {/* Arrow indicator */}
      <div 
        className="absolute right-1 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 opacity-40"
        style={{ color: trackColor }}
      >
        →
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// MAIN TIMELINE COMPONENT
// ============================================================================

export function ImageTimeline({
  tracks,
  currentFrame,
  totalFrames,
  fps,
  isPlaying,
  selectedKeyframeId,
  onPlayPause,
  onSeek,
  onSelectKeyframe,
  onAddKeyframe,
  onDeleteKeyframe,
  onTrackToggle,
  onKeyframeMove,
}: ImageTimelineProps) {
  const [size, setSize] = useState<TimelineSize>('mini'); // Default to mini
  const [zoom, setZoom] = useState(8); // pixels per frame
  const [largeHeight, setLargeHeight] = useState(250);
  const resizeRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const isDraggingRef = useRef(false);
  const timelineRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  // Format frame to timecode
  const formatTimecode = (frame: number) => {
    const totalSeconds = frame / fps;
    const mins = Math.floor(totalSeconds / 60);
    const secs = Math.floor(totalSeconds % 60);
    const frames = frame % fps;
    return `${mins.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${frames.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
  };

  // Handle resize drag
  const handleResizeMouseDown = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    isDraggingRef.current = true;
    const startY = e.clientY;
    const startHeight = largeHeight;

    const handleMouseMove = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (!isDraggingRef.current) return;
      const deltaY = startY - e.clientY;
      setLargeHeight(Math.max(200, Math.min(500, startHeight + deltaY)));
    };

    const handleMouseUp = () => {
      isDraggingRef.current = false;
      document.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
      document.removeEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
    };

    document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
  }, [largeHeight]);

  // Handle seeking
  const handleTimelineClick = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    if (!timelineRef.current) return;
    const rect = timelineRef.current.getBoundingClientRect();
    const headerWidth = size === 'large' ? 180 : size === 'medium' ? 120 : 0;
    const x = e.clientX - rect.left - headerWidth;
    if (x >= 0) {
      const frame = Math.max(0, Math.min(totalFrames - 1, Math.round(x / zoom)));
      onSeek(frame);
    }
  }, [size, zoom, totalFrames, onSeek]);

  // Get height
  const getHeight = () => {
    switch (size) {
      case 'mini': return 40;
      case 'medium': return 120;
      case 'large': return largeHeight;
    }
  };

  const trackHeight = size === 'large' ? 50 : size === 'medium' ? 24 : 16;

  return (
    <div 
      className="bg-[#1a1a1a] border-t border-gray-700/50 flex flex-col flex-shrink-0"
      style={{ height: `${getHeight()}px` }}
    >
      {/* Resize Handle (Large mode) */}
      {size === 'large' && (
        <div
          ref={resizeRef}
          onMouseDown={handleResizeMouseDown}
          className="h-1 bg-gray-700/50 hover:bg-purple-500/50 cursor-ns-resize flex items-center justify-center"
        >
          <GripHorizontal className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Timeline Toolbar */}
      <div className="h-10 bg-[#1e1e1e] border-b border-gray-700/50 flex items-center px-2 gap-2 flex-shrink-0">
        {/* Playback Controls */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-0.5">
          <button onClick={() => onSeek(0)} className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded">
            <SkipBack className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
          </button>
          <button onClick={onPlayPause} className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded">
            {isPlaying ? <Pause className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" /> : <Play className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />}
          </button>
          <button onClick={() => onSeek(totalFrames - 1)} className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded">
            <SkipForward className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Current Frame / Timecode */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-2 border-l border-gray-700">
          <div className="px-2 py-1 bg-gray-800 rounded text-xs text-gray-300 font-mono">
            {formatTimecode(currentFrame)}
          </div>
          <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">F{currentFrame}</span>
        </div>

        {/* Keyframe Tools */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-0.5 px-2 border-l border-gray-700">
          <button 
            className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-yellow-500"
            title="Add Keyframe (K)"
          >
            <Diamond className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
          <button 
            className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-gray-400"
            title="Delete Keyframe"
          >
            <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
          <button 
            className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-gray-400"
            title="Copy Keyframe"
          >
            <Copy className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Mini Timeline Overview (always visible) */}
        <div className="flex-1 mx-4">
          <div className="relative h-6 bg-[#1e1e1e] rounded overflow-hidden border border-gray-700/50">
            {/* Track rows */}
            <div className="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col justify-center py-0.5 px-1">
              {tracks.slice(0, 4).map((track) => (
                <div key={track.id} className="relative h-1 mb-0.5 last:mb-0">
                  <div 
                    className="absolute inset-0 rounded-full opacity-20"
                    style={{ backgroundColor: track.color }}
                  />
                  {/* Keyframes as dots */}
                  {track.keyframes.map(kf => (
                    <div
                      key={kf.id}
                      className="absolute w-1 h-1 rounded-full top-0"
                      style={{
                        left: `${(kf.frame / totalFrames) * 100}%`,
                        backgroundColor: track.color,
                      }}
                    />
                  ))}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
            {/* Playhead */}
            <div 
              className="absolute top-0 bottom-0 w-0.5 bg-red-500 z-10"
              style={{ left: `${(currentFrame / totalFrames) * 100}%` }}
            />
            {/* Click to seek */}
            <div 
              className="absolute inset-0 cursor-pointer"
              onClick={(e) => {
                const rect = e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
                onSeek(Math.round((x / rect.width) * totalFrames));
              }}
            />
            {/* Timeline info overlay (medium/large modes) */}
            {size !== 'mini' && (
              <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
                <div className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm rounded text-[10px] text-gray-400">
                  {fps} fps • {totalFrames} frames • {(totalFrames / fps).toFixed(1)}s
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Zoom Controls */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 border-l border-gray-700 pl-2">
          <button 
            onClick={() => setZoom(Math.max(2, zoom - 2))}
            className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded"
          >
            <ZoomOut className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
          </button>
          <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 w-6 text-center">{zoom}</span>
          <button 
            onClick={() => setZoom(Math.min(20, zoom + 2))}
            className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded"
          >
            <ZoomIn className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Size Toggle */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-0.5 border-l border-gray-700 pl-2">
          {size !== 'mini' && (
            <button onClick={() => setSize('mini')} className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded" title="Mini">
              <Minimize2 className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
            </button>
          )}
          {size !== 'medium' && (
            <button onClick={() => setSize('medium')} className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded" title="Medium">
              <ChevronUp className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
            </button>
          )}
          {size !== 'large' && (
            <button onClick={() => setSize('large')} className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded" title="Large">
              <Maximize2 className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
            </button>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Timeline Content (Medium & Large) */}
      {size !== 'mini' && (
        <div className="flex-1 flex overflow-hidden">
          {/* Track Headers */}
          <div className={`flex-shrink-0 overflow-y-auto bg-[#1a1a1a] ${size === 'large' ? 'w-[180px]' : 'w-[120px]'}`}>
            {tracks.map((track) => {
              const config = PROPERTY_CONFIG[track.property];
              const Icon = config.icon;
              
              return (
                <div 
                  key={track.id}
                  className="flex items-center gap-1 px-2 border-b border-gray-800"
                  style={{ height: trackHeight }}
                >
                  <div 
                    className="w-2 h-2 rounded-sm flex-shrink-0"
                    style={{ backgroundColor: track.color }}
                  />
                  <Icon className="w-3 h-3 flex-shrink-0" style={{ color: track.color }} />
                  <span className={`flex-1 truncate ${size === 'large' ? 'text-sm' : 'text-xs'} text-gray-300`}>
                    {track.name}
                  </span>
                  {size === 'large' && (
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-0.5">
                      <button
                        onClick={() => onTrackToggle(track.id, 'muted')}
                        className={`p-0.5 rounded ${track.muted ? 'bg-red-500/20 text-red-400' : 'text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-700'}`}
                      >
                        M
                      </button>
                      <button
                        onClick={() => onTrackToggle(track.id, 'locked')}
                        className={`p-0.5 rounded ${track.locked ? 'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400' : 'text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-700'}`}
                      >
                        {track.locked ? <Lock className="w-3 h-3" /> : <Unlock className="w-3 h-3" />}
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>

          {/* Timeline Tracks */}
          <div 
            ref={timelineRef}
            className="flex-1 overflow-auto"
            onClick={handleTimelineClick}
          >
            <div style={{ width: `${totalFrames * zoom}px`, minWidth: '100%' }}>
              {/* Frame Ruler */}
              <div className={`bg-[#252525] border-b border-gray-700/50 relative ${size === 'large' ? 'h-6' : 'h-4'}`}>
                {Array.from({ length: Math.ceil(totalFrames / 10) + 1 }).map((_, i) => (
                  <div
                    key={i}
                    className="absolute top-0 bottom-0 border-l border-gray-600/50"
                    style={{ left: `${i * 10 * zoom}px` }}
                  >
                    <span className="text-[9px] text-gray-500 ml-1">
                      {i * 10}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                ))}
                {/* Playhead */}
                <div
                  className="absolute top-0 bottom-0 w-0.5 bg-red-500 z-20"
                  style={{ left: `${currentFrame * zoom}px` }}
                >
                  <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-red-500 -ml-[5px] -mt-0.5 rotate-45" />
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Track Lanes */}
              {tracks.map((track) => {
                const sortedKeyframes = [...track.keyframes].sort((a, b) => a.frame - b.frame);
                
                return (
                  <div
                    key={track.id}
                    className="relative border-b border-gray-800"
                    style={{ 
                      height: trackHeight,
                      opacity: track.visible ? 1 : 0.3,
                    }}
                    onDoubleClick={(e) => {
                      if (track.locked) return;
                      const rect = e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
                      const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
                      const frame = Math.round(x / zoom);
                      onAddKeyframe(track.id, frame);
                    }}
                  >
                    {/* Tween spans between keyframes */}
                    {sortedKeyframes.map((kf, index) => {
                      if (index === sortedKeyframes.length - 1) return null;
                      const nextKf = sortedKeyframes[index + 1];
                      return (
                        <TweenSpan
                          key={`tween-${kf.id}`}
                          startFrame={kf.frame}
                          endFrame={nextKf.frame}
                          startKeyframe={kf}
                          endKeyframe={nextKf}
                          trackColor={track.color}
                          zoom={zoom}
                          height={trackHeight}
                        />
                      );
                    })}
                    
                    {/* Keyframe markers */}
                    {sortedKeyframes.map((kf) => (
                      <KeyframeMarker
                        key={kf.id}
                        keyframe={kf}
                        trackColor={track.color}
                        isSelected={selectedKeyframeId === kf.id}
                        position={kf.frame * zoom}
                        height={trackHeight}
                        onSelect={() => onSelectKeyframe(kf.id)}
                        onMove={onKeyframeMove ? (newFrame) => onKeyframeMove(track.id, kf.id, newFrame) : undefined}
                      />
                    ))}
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

export default ImageTimeline;


```


### LayersPanel


**Category:** UI  
**File:** `components/panels/LayersPanel.tsx`


*Layers management panel*


```typescript
import { Eye, EyeOff, Lock, Unlock, Plus, Trash2, ChevronRight, ChevronDown, Image, Square, Type, Sparkles, Blend, Palette } from 'lucide-react';
import { useProject } from '../../contexts/ProjectContext';
import { useState } from 'react';
import type { Layer, Modifier } from '../../types';

export function LayersPanel() {
  const { layers, selectedLayerId, setSelectedLayerId, setLayers } = useProject();
  const [expandedLayers, setExpandedLayers] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
  const [deleteClickCount, setDeleteClickCount] = useState<{ layerId: string; count: number } | null>(null);
  const [deleteTimeout, setDeleteTimeout] = useState<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);

  const toggleLayerExpanded = (layerId: string) => {
    const newExpanded = new Set(expandedLayers);
    if (newExpanded.has(layerId)) {
      newExpanded.delete(layerId);
    } else {
      newExpanded.add(layerId);
    }
    setExpandedLayers(newExpanded);
  };

  const toggleLayerVisibility = (layerId: string) => {
    setLayers(layers.map(l =>
      l.id === layerId ? { ...l, visible: !l.visible } : l
    ));
  };

  const toggleLayerLock = (layerId: string) => {
    setLayers(layers.map(l =>
      l.id === layerId ? { ...l, locked: !l.locked } : l
    ));
  };

  const handleDeleteClick = (layerId: string) => {
    if (deleteTimeout) {
      clearTimeout(deleteTimeout);
    }

    if (deleteClickCount?.layerId === layerId) {
      if (deleteClickCount.count === 1) {
        setLayers(layers.filter(l => l.id !== layerId));
        setDeleteClickCount(null);
        if (selectedLayerId === layerId) {
          setSelectedLayerId(layers[0]?.id || null);
        }
        return;
      }
    }

    setDeleteClickCount({ layerId, count: 1 });

    const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
      setDeleteClickCount(null);
    }, 500);

    setDeleteTimeout(timeout);
  };

  const addNewLayer = () => {
    const newLayer: Layer = {
      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
      projectId: 'default',
      name: `Layer ${layers.length + 1}`,
      type: 'raster',
      visible: true,
      locked: false,
      opacity: 1,
      blendMode: 'normal',
      position: layers.length,
      bounds: { x: 0, y: 0, width: 1920, height: 1080 },
      transform: { rotation: 0, scaleX: 1, scaleY: 1 },
      modifierStack: [],
    };

    setLayers([...layers, newLayer]);
    setSelectedLayerId(newLayer.id);
  };

  const addModifier = (layerId: string, type: Modifier['type']) => {
    const newModifier: Modifier = {
      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
      type,
      enabled: true,
      parameters: {},
    };

    setLayers(layers.map(l =>
      l.id === layerId
        ? { ...l, modifierStack: [...l.modifierStack, newModifier] }
        : l
    ));

    setExpandedLayers(new Set(expandedLayers).add(layerId));
  };

  const toggleModifier = (layerId: string, modifierId: string) => {
    setLayers(layers.map(l =>
      l.id === layerId
        ? {
            ...l,
            modifierStack: l.modifierStack.map(m =>
              m.id === modifierId ? { ...m, enabled: !m.enabled } : m
            ),
          }
        : l
    ));
  };

  const removeModifier = (layerId: string, modifierId: string) => {
    setLayers(layers.map(l =>
      l.id === layerId
        ? {
            ...l,
            modifierStack: l.modifierStack.filter(m => m.id !== modifierId),
          }
        : l
    ));
  };

  const getModifierIcon = (type: Modifier['type']) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'blur':
        return Sparkles;
      case 'sharpen':
        return Sparkles;
      case 'brightness':
        return Palette;
      case 'contrast':
        return Palette;
      case 'saturation':
        return Palette;
      case 'hue':
        return Palette;
      default:
        return Square;
    }
  };

  const getLayerIcon = (type: Layer['type']) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'raster':
        return Image;
      case 'vector':
        return Square;
      case 'text':
        return Type;
      case 'adjustment':
        return Palette;
      default:
        return Square;
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-[#1a1a1a] border-l border-gray-800">
      <div className="h-12 flex items-center justify-end px-4 border-b border-gray-800">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
          <button
            onClick={addNewLayer}
            className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded transition-colors"
            title="Add Layer"
          >
            <Plus className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => selectedLayerId && handleDeleteClick(selectedLayerId)}
            disabled={!selectedLayerId}
            className="p-1.5 hover:bg-gray-800 disabled:opacity-30 rounded transition-colors"
            title="Delete Layer (Double Click)"
          >
            <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-2 space-y-1">
        {layers.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="text-center text-gray-500 text-sm py-8">
            <p>No layers yet</p>
            <button
              onClick={addNewLayer}
              className="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-[#673AB7] hover:bg-[#7E57C2] text-white text-xs rounded transition-colors"
            >
              Create First Layer
            </button>
          </div>
        ) : (
          [...layers].reverse().map(layer => {
            const LayerIcon = getLayerIcon(layer.type);
            const isExpanded = expandedLayers.has(layer.id);
            const hasModifiers = layer.modifierStack.length > 0;

            return (
              <div key={layer.id} className="space-y-1">
                <div
                  onClick={() => setSelectedLayerId(layer.id)}
                  className={`flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded cursor-pointer transition-colors ${
                    selectedLayerId === layer.id
                      ? 'bg-[#673AB7] text-white'
                      : 'hover:bg-gray-800 text-gray-300'
                  } ${
                    deleteClickCount?.layerId === layer.id
                      ? 'ring-2 ring-red-500'
                      : ''
                  }`}
                >
                  {hasModifiers && (
                    <button
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        toggleLayerExpanded(layer.id);
                      }}
                      className="p-0.5 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded transition-colors"
                    >
                      {isExpanded ? (
                        <ChevronDown className="w-3 h-3" />
                      ) : (
                        <ChevronRight className="w-3 h-3" />
                      )}
                    </button>
                  )}

                  <div className={`w-12 h-12 bg-gray-700 rounded overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0 ${!hasModifiers ? 'ml-5' : ''}`}>
                    {layer.thumbnailUrl ? (
                      <img src={layer.thumbnailUrl} alt={layer.name} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
                    ) : layer.dataUrl ? (
                      <img src={layer.dataUrl} alt={layer.name} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
                    ) : (
                      <div className="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center">
                        <LayerIcon className="w-6 h-6 text-gray-500" />
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                    <div className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{layer.name}</div>
                    <div className="text-xs opacity-75">
                      {layer.type} • {Math.round(layer.opacity * 100)}%
                      {hasModifiers && ` • ${layer.modifierStack.length} modifier${layer.modifierStack.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`}
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                    <button
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        toggleLayerVisibility(layer.id);
                      }}
                      className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded transition-colors"
                      title={layer.visible ? 'Hide' : 'Show'}
                    >
                      {layer.visible ? (
                        <Eye className="w-4 h-4" />
                      ) : (
                        <EyeOff className="w-4 h-4 opacity-50" />
                      )}
                    </button>
                    <button
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        toggleLayerLock(layer.id);
                      }}
                      className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded transition-colors"
                      title={layer.locked ? 'Unlock' : 'Lock'}
                    >
                      {layer.locked ? (
                        <Lock className="w-4 h-4" />
                      ) : (
                        <Unlock className="w-4 h-4 opacity-50" />
                      )}
                    </button>
                    <button
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        handleDeleteClick(layer.id);
                      }}
                      className="p-1 hover:bg-red-900/50 rounded transition-colors"
                      title="Delete (Double Click)"
                    >
                      <Trash2 className={`w-4 h-4 ${
                        deleteClickCount?.layerId === layer.id ? 'text-red-500' : ''
                      }`} />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {isExpanded && hasModifiers && (
                  <div className="ml-8 space-y-1">
                    {layer.modifierStack.map((modifier) => {
                      const ModifierIcon = getModifierIcon(modifier.type);

                      return (
                        <div
                          key={modifier.id}
                          className={`flex items-center gap-2 p-2 pl-4 rounded transition-colors ${
                            modifier.enabled
                              ? 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-300'
                              : 'bg-gray-900 text-gray-500'
                          }`}
                        >
                          <ModifierIcon className="w-3 h-3" />
                          <span className="flex-1 text-xs font-medium capitalize">
                            {modifier.type}
                          </span>

                          <button
                            onClick={() => toggleModifier(layer.id, modifier.id)}
                            className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded transition-colors"
                            title={modifier.enabled ? 'Disable' : 'Enable'}
                          >
                            {modifier.enabled ? (
                              <Eye className="w-3 h-3" />
                            ) : (
                              <EyeOff className="w-3 h-3" />
                            )}
                          </button>

                          <button
                            onClick={() => removeModifier(layer.id, modifier.id)}
                            className="p-1 hover:bg-red-900/50 rounded transition-colors"
                            title="Remove"
                          >
                            <Trash2 className="w-3 h-3" />
                          </button>
                        </div>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            );
          })
        )}
      </div>

      {selectedLayerId && (
        <div className="border-t border-gray-800 p-3">
          <div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mb-2">Add Modifier</div>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-1">
            <button
              onClick={() => addModifier(selectedLayerId, 'blur')}
              className="px-2 py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 text-gray-300 text-xs rounded transition-colors"
            >
              Blur
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => addModifier(selectedLayerId, 'sharpen')}
              className="px-2 py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 text-gray-300 text-xs rounded transition-colors"
            >
              Sharpen
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => addModifier(selectedLayerId, 'brightness')}
              className="px-2 py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 text-gray-300 text-xs rounded transition-colors"
            >
              Bright
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => addModifier(selectedLayerId, 'contrast')}
              className="px-2 py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 text-gray-300 text-xs rounded transition-colors"
            >
              Contrast
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => addModifier(selectedLayerId, 'saturation')}
              className="px-2 py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 text-gray-300 text-xs rounded transition-colors"
            >
              Saturate
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => addModifier(selectedLayerId, 'hue')}
              className="px-2 py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 text-gray-300 text-xs rounded transition-colors"
            >
              Hue
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```


### Main Page


**Category:** UI  
**File:** `pages/versions/images/ImagesPageV2.tsx`


*Main ImagesPageV2 component with Director layout and complete tool system*


```typescript
import { useState, useMemo, useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { 
  Wand2, 
  Brush, 
  Eraser, 
  Move, 
  Square, 
  Circle,
  Scissors,
  Sparkles,
  ImagePlus,
  Users,
  Images,
  Settings,
  MessageSquare,
  FolderOpen,
  BookOpen,
  Search,
  HelpCircle,
  ZoomIn,
  Microscope,
  Palette,
  Star,
  Zap,
  BarChart3,
  Layers,
  PenTool,
  Droplet,
  Stamp,
  Hand,
  Diamond,
  Film,
  Eye,
  EyeOff,
  Trash2,
  Plus,
  ChevronDown,
  Copy,
  RotateCcw,
  Grid3X3,
  List,
  Clock,
  Upload,
  Loader2,
  Sliders,
  Box,
  Target,
  Feather,
  Blend,
  Sun,
  ScanLine,
  Crop,
  Type,
  Triangle,
  Ruler,
  Pipette,
  Minimize2,
  X,
  Waves,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { 
  DrawerProvider, 
  DrawerContainer, 
  IconBar, 
  MiniBar,
  useDrawer,
  type DrawerConfig,
  type MiniBarItem,
} from '../../../components/layout/drawer';
import { ProgressiveTooltip } from '../../../components/ui/ProgressiveTooltip';
import { allToolTooltips, allPanelTooltips } from '../../../data/tooltips';
import { 
  ImageTimeline, 
  type AnimationTrack, 
  type Keyframe 
} from '../../../components/image/ImageTimeline';
import { 
  ToolSettingsMiniBar, 
  ToolbarColorSwatchButton,
