  ToolbarSettingsButton,
  type ToolSettings, 
  type ToolType 
} from '../../../components/image/ToolSettingsMiniBar';
import { Canvas } from '../../../components/Canvas';
import { 
  AssetDragProvider, 
  useAssetDrag, 
  DropZone, 
  DraggableAsset, 
  LayerInsertIndicator,
  type DraggingAsset,
} from '../../../components/image/AssetDragDrop';
import { useProject } from '../../../contexts/ProjectContext';
import { CursorZoomPanel } from '../../../components/panels/CursorZoomPanel';
import { MicroscopePanel } from '../../../components/panels/MicroscopePanel';
import { AIToolsPanel } from '../../../components/panels/AIToolsPanel';
import { PresetLibraryPanel } from '../../../components/panels/PresetLibraryPanel';
import { ICEPanel } from '../../../components/panels/ICEPanel';
import { HandGestureSettingsPanel } from '../../../components/panels/HandGestureSettingsPanel';
import { MotionControlPanel } from '../../../components/panels/MotionControlPanel';
import { LassoSettingsPanel } from '../../../components/panels/LassoSettingsPanel';
import { MagicWandDeveloperConsole } from '../../../components/image/MagicWandDeveloperConsole';
import { voiceControl } from '../../../lib/voice/VoiceControlSystem';
import { ALL_COMMANDS } from '../../../lib/voice/VoiceCommands';
import { EXPANDED_COMMANDS_WITH_ACTIONS } from '../../../lib/voice/VoiceCommandsExpandedActions';
import { MEGA_COMMANDS } from '../../../lib/voice/VoiceCommandsMega';

// ============================================================================
// TOOL CONFIGURATIONS
// ============================================================================

const TOOL_BUTTONS = [
  { id: 'move', icon: <Hand className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Move (V)', shortcut: 'V' },
  { id: 'select', icon: <Target className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Select (M)', shortcut: 'M' },
  { id: 'wand', icon: <Wand2 className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Magic Wand (W)', shortcut: 'W' },
  { id: 'lasso', icon: <Scissors className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Lasso (L)', shortcut: 'L' },
  { id: 'crop', icon: <Crop className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Crop (C)', shortcut: 'C' },
  { id: 'brush', icon: <Brush className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Brush (B)', shortcut: 'B' },
  { id: 'eraser', icon: <Eraser className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Eraser (E)', shortcut: 'E' },
  { id: 'clone', icon: <Stamp className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Clone (S)', shortcut: 'S' },
  { id: 'gradient', icon: <Droplet className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Gradient (G)', shortcut: 'G' },
  { id: 'pen', icon: <PenTool className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Pen (P)', shortcut: 'P' },
  { id: 'text', icon: <Type className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Text (T)', shortcut: 'T' },
  { id: 'shape', icon: <Triangle className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Shape (U)', shortcut: 'U' },
  { id: 'eyedropper', icon: <Pipette className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Eyedropper (I)', shortcut: 'I' },
  { id: 'zoom', icon: <ZoomIn className="w-5 h-5" />, label: 'Zoom (Z)', shortcut: 'Z' },
];

// Default tool settings
const DEFAULT_TOOL_SETTINGS: ToolSettings = {
  size: 32,
  opacity: 100,
  hardness: 50,
  flow: 100,
  spacing: 25,
  tolerance: 32,
  contiguous: true,
  antiAlias: true,
  sampleAllLayers: false,
  colorMode: 'rgb',
  blendMode: 'normal',
  pressure: true,
  smoothing: 50,
  foreground: '#FFFFFF',
  background: '#000000',
  livePreview: true,
  previewPattern: 'diagonal-lines',
  previewLineAngle: 45,
  previewLineSpacing: 4,
  previewBorderWidth: 2,
  // Lasso Settings (Ultimate Lasso System - 8 variants!)
  lassoVariant: 'elastic', // Default to elastic (progressive anchoring)
  lassoSearchRadius: 12,
  lassoEdgeSensitivity: 55,
  lassoCursorInfluence: 0.10,
  lassoAutoAnchor: true,
};

// Mock animation tracks
const MOCK_ANIMATION_TRACKS: AnimationTrack[] = [
  {
    id: 'track-1',
    name: 'Layer 1 Position',
    layerId: 'layer-1',
    property: 'position',
    color: '#3B82F6',
    muted: false,
    locked: false,
    visible: true,
    keyframes: [
      { id: 'kf-1', frame: 0, value: { x: 0, y: 0 }, easing: 'ease-in-out' },
      { id: 'kf-2', frame: 30, value: { x: 100, y: 50 }, easing: 'ease-out' },
      { id: 'kf-3', frame: 60, value: { x: 0, y: 0 }, easing: 'bounce' },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 'track-2',
    name: 'Layer 1 Opacity',
    layerId: 'layer-1',
    property: 'opacity',
    color: '#F59E0B',
    muted: false,
    locked: false,
    visible: true,
    keyframes: [
      { id: 'kf-4', frame: 0, value: 100, easing: 'linear' },
      { id: 'kf-5', frame: 45, value: 50, easing: 'ease-in' },
      { id: 'kf-6', frame: 90, value: 100, easing: 'ease-out' },
    ],
  },
];

// ============================================================================
// DRAWER CONTENTS - TOOL SETTINGS (Dynamic based on active tool)
// ============================================================================

function ActiveToolSettingsDrawer({ tool, settings, onSettingsChange }: {
  tool: ToolType;
  settings: ToolSettings;
  onSettingsChange: (settings: ToolSettings) => void;
}) {
  const updateSetting = <K extends keyof ToolSettings>(key: K, value: ToolSettings[K]) => {
    onSettingsChange({ ...settings, [key]: value });
  };

  const getToolConfig = () => {
    switch (tool) {
      case 'brush':
      case 'eraser':
        return {
          title: tool === 'brush' ? 'Brush Settings' : 'Eraser Settings',
          icon: tool === 'brush' ? <Brush className="w-4 h-4" /> : <Eraser className="w-4 h-4" />,
          showBrushSettings: true,
        };
      case 'magic-wand':
        return {
          title: 'Magic Wand',
          icon: <Wand2 className="w-4 h-4" />,
          showWandSettings: true,
        };
      case 'select':
        return {
          title: 'Selection',
          icon: <Target className="w-4 h-4" />,
          showSelectSettings: true,
        };
      case 'lasso':
        return {
          title: 'Ultimate Lasso',
          icon: <Scissors className="w-4 h-4" />,
          showLassoSettings: true,
        };
      case 'gradient':
        return {
          title: 'Gradient',
          icon: <Droplet className="w-4 h-4" />,
          showGradientSettings: true,
        };
      case 'pen':
        return {
          title: 'Pen Tool',
          icon: <PenTool className="w-4 h-4" />,
          showPenSettings: true,
        };
      case 'move':
        return {
          title: 'Move Tool',
          icon: <Move className="w-4 h-4" />,
          showMoveSettings: true,
        };
      case 'eyedropper':
        return {
          title: 'Eyedropper',
          icon: <Pipette className="w-4 h-4" />,
          showEyedropperSettings: true,
        };
      case 'zoom':
        return {
          title: 'Zoom Tool',
          icon: <ZoomIn className="w-4 h-4" />,
          showZoomSettings: true,
        };
      case 'text':
        return {
          title: 'Text Tool',
          icon: <Type className="w-4 h-4" />,
          showTextSettings: true,
        };
      case 'shape':
        return {
          title: 'Shape Tool',
          icon: <Triangle className="w-4 h-4" />,
          showShapeSettings: true,
        };
      case 'crop':
        return {
          title: 'Crop Tool',
          icon: <Crop className="w-4 h-4" />,
          showCropSettings: true,
        };
      default:
        return {
          title: 'Tool Settings',
          icon: <Settings className="w-4 h-4" />,
          showGenericSettings: true,
        };
    }
  };

  const config = getToolConfig();

  return (
    <div className="p-4 space-y-4">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
        <div className="p-2 bg-purple-600/20 rounded-lg text-purple-400">
          {config.icon}
        </div>
        <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white">{config.title}</h3>
      </div>

      {/* Common size/opacity sliders */}
      <div className="space-y-3">
        <div>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Size</span>
            <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-mono">{settings.size}px</span>
          </div>
          <input
            type="range"
            min="1"
            max="500"
            value={settings.size}
            onChange={(e) => updateSetting('size', parseInt(e.target.value))}
            className="w-full accent-purple-500"
          />
        </div>

        <div>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Opacity</span>
            <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-mono">{settings.opacity}%</span>
          </div>
          <input
            type="range"
            min="0"
            max="100"
            value={settings.opacity}
            onChange={(e) => updateSetting('opacity', parseInt(e.target.value))}
            className="w-full accent-purple-500"
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Brush/Eraser specific */}
      {config.showBrushSettings && (
        <div className="space-y-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-700">
          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Hardness</span>
              <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-mono">{settings.hardness}%</span>
            </div>
            <input
              type="range"
              min="0"
              max="100"
              value={settings.hardness}
              onChange={(e) => updateSetting('hardness', parseInt(e.target.value))}
              className="w-full accent-green-500"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Flow</span>
              <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-mono">{settings.flow}%</span>
            </div>
            <input
              type="range"
              min="1"
              max="100"
              value={settings.flow}
              onChange={(e) => updateSetting('flow', parseInt(e.target.value))}
              className="w-full accent-orange-500"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Smoothing</span>
              <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-mono">{settings.smoothing}%</span>
            </div>
            <input
              type="range"
              min="0"
              max="100"
              value={settings.smoothing}
              onChange={(e) => updateSetting('smoothing', parseInt(e.target.value))}
              className="w-full accent-pink-500"
            />
          </div>

          <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              checked={settings.pressure}
              onChange={(e) => updateSetting('pressure', e.target.checked)}
              className="rounded"
            />
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Pressure Sensitivity</span>
          </label>

          {/* Brush Presets */}
          <div className="pt-3 border-t border-gray-700">
            <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 uppercase mb-2 block">Presets</label>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-1">
              {['Round', 'Soft', 'Hard', 'Airbrush', 'Chalk', 'Ink', 'Pencil', 'Spray'].map((preset) => (
                <button
                  key={preset}
                  className="py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-[10px] text-gray-300"
                >
                  {preset}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Magic Wand specific */}
      {config.showWandSettings && (
        <div className="space-y-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-700">
          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Tolerance</span>
              <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-mono">{settings.tolerance}</span>
            </div>
            <input
              type="range"
              min="0"
              max="255"
              value={settings.tolerance}
              onChange={(e) => updateSetting('tolerance', parseInt(e.target.value))}
              className="w-full accent-blue-500"
            />
          </div>

          <div className="space-y-2">
            <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
              <input
                type="checkbox"
                checked={settings.contiguous}
                onChange={(e) => updateSetting('contiguous', e.target.checked)}
                className="rounded"
              />
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Contiguous</span>
            </label>

            <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
              <input
                type="checkbox"
                checked={settings.antiAlias}
                onChange={(e) => updateSetting('antiAlias', e.target.checked)}
                className="rounded"
              />
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Anti-Alias</span>
            </label>

            <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
              <input
                type="checkbox"
                checked={settings.sampleAllLayers}
                onChange={(e) => updateSetting('sampleAllLayers', e.target.checked)}
                className="rounded"
              />
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Sample All Layers</span>
            </label>
          </div>

          <div>
            <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 uppercase mb-2 block">Color Mode</label>
            <div className="flex gap-1">
              {(['rgb', 'hsv', 'lab'] as const).map((mode) => (
                <button
                  key={mode}
                  onClick={() => updateSetting('colorMode', mode)}
                  className={`flex-1 py-1.5 text-xs rounded uppercase font-medium ${
                    settings.colorMode === mode
                      ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white'
                      : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700'
                  }`}
                >
                  {mode}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Developer Console Button */}
          <div className="pt-3 border-t border-gray-700">
            <button
              onClick={() => setIsDeveloperConsoleOpen(true)}
              className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600/20 to-blue-600/20 border border-purple-500/30 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-purple-300 hover:from-purple-600/30 hover:to-blue-600/30 hover:border-purple-500/50 transition-all"
            >
              <Settings className="w-4 h-4" />
              <span>Developer Console</span>
              <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
            </button>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1.5 text-center">
              Advanced system selection, diagnostics, and hybrid builders
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Lasso specific (Ultimate Lasso System - 8 Variants) */}
      {config.showLassoSettings && (
        <div className="space-y-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-700">
          <div>
            <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 uppercase mb-2 block">Lasso Variant</label>
            <select
              value={settings.lassoVariant}
              onChange={(e) => updateSetting('lassoVariant', e.target.value as any)}
              className="w-full bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded-lg p-2 text-sm text-white"
            >
              <option value="classic">Classic (Cyan) - Manual Dijkstra</option>
              <option value="photoshop">Photoshop (Red) - Auto-anchoring</option>
              <option value="elastic">Elastic (Gold) ⭐ - Progressive rubber-band</option>
              <option value="edge-trail">Edge Trail (Green) - Quality-based</option>
              <option value="predictive">Predictive (Purple) - Direction-aware</option>
              <option value="adaptive">Adaptive (Orange) - Content-aware</option>
              <option value="ai-assisted">AI Assisted (Pink) - LLM detection</option>
              <option value="snake">Snake (Teal) - Active contour</option>
            </select>
            <div 
              className="mt-2 w-full h-1.5 rounded-full"
              style={{ 
                backgroundColor: 
                  settings.lassoVariant === 'classic' ? '#00d9ff' :
                  settings.lassoVariant === 'photoshop' ? '#ff6b6b' :
                  settings.lassoVariant === 'elastic' ? '#ffd700' :
                  settings.lassoVariant === 'edge-trail' ? '#00ff88' :
                  settings.lassoVariant === 'predictive' ? '#a855f7' :
                  settings.lassoVariant === 'adaptive' ? '#f97316' :
                  settings.lassoVariant === 'ai-assisted' ? '#ec4899' : '#22d3ee'
              }}
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Search Radius</span>
              <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-mono">{settings.lassoSearchRadius}px</span>
            </div>
            <input
              type="range"
              min="5"
              max="50"
              value={settings.lassoSearchRadius}
              onChange={(e) => updateSetting('lassoSearchRadius', parseInt(e.target.value))}
              className="w-full accent-cyan-500"
            />
            <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mt-1">Detection area around cursor</p>
          </div>

          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Edge Sensitivity</span>
              <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-mono">{settings.lassoEdgeSensitivity}%</span>
            </div>
            <input
              type="range"
              min="0"
              max="100"
              value={settings.lassoEdgeSensitivity}
              onChange={(e) => updateSetting('lassoEdgeSensitivity', parseInt(e.target.value))}
              className="w-full accent-yellow-500"
            />
            <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mt-1">Higher = snaps to weaker edges</p>
          </div>

          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Cursor Influence</span>
              <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-mono">{Math.round(settings.lassoCursorInfluence * 100)}%</span>
            </div>
            <input
              type="range"
              min="0"
              max="50"
              value={Math.round(settings.lassoCursorInfluence * 100)}
              onChange={(e) => updateSetting('lassoCursorInfluence', parseInt(e.target.value) / 100)}
              className="w-full accent-purple-500"
            />
            <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mt-1">How much cursor direction affects path</p>
          </div>

          <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              checked={settings.lassoAutoAnchor}
              onChange={(e) => updateSetting('lassoAutoAnchor', e.target.checked)}
              className="rounded"
            />
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-300">Auto-Anchor</span>
          </label>

          {/* Quick Presets */}
          <div className="pt-3 border-t border-gray-700">
            <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 uppercase mb-2 block">Quick Presets</label>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-1">
              <button
                onClick={() => {
                  updateSetting('lassoSearchRadius', 15);
                  updateSetting('lassoEdgeSensitivity', 70);
                  updateSetting('lassoCursorInfluence', 0.05);
                }}
                className="py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-[10px] text-gray-300"
              >
                Sharp Edges
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => {
                  updateSetting('lassoSearchRadius', 15);
                  updateSetting('lassoEdgeSensitivity', 30);
                  updateSetting('lassoCursorInfluence', 0.20);
                }}
                className="py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-[10px] text-gray-300"
              >
                Soft Edges
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => {
                  updateSetting('lassoSearchRadius', 8);
                  updateSetting('lassoEdgeSensitivity', 50);
                  updateSetting('lassoCursorInfluence', 0.10);
                }}
                className="py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-[10px] text-gray-300"
              >
                Fast Mode
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => {
                  updateSetting('lassoSearchRadius', 25);
                  updateSetting('lassoEdgeSensitivity', 60);
                  updateSetting('lassoCursorInfluence', 0.03);
                }}
                className="py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-[10px] text-gray-300"
              >
                Precise
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Variant Description */}
          <div className="px-3 py-2 bg-gray-900/30 rounded-lg">
            <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 leading-relaxed">
              {settings.lassoVariant === 'elastic' && '⭐ Progressive rubber-band anchoring with visual gradient - recommended!'}
              {settings.lassoVariant === 'photoshop' && 'Automatic anchoring based on distance and time'}
              {settings.lassoVariant === 'edge-trail' && 'Places anchors when edge quality degrades - golden node appears'}
              {settings.lassoVariant === 'classic' && 'Manual anchoring only - full control over every anchor point'}
              {settings.lassoVariant === 'predictive' && 'Predicts path direction from cursor movement patterns'}
              {settings.lassoVariant === 'adaptive' && 'Adapts to image content and cursor speed dynamically'}
              {settings.lassoVariant === 'ai-assisted' && 'AI detects objects, lasso refines edges precisely'}
              {settings.lassoVariant === 'snake' && 'Energy-minimizing contour that evolves to fit edges'}
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// DRAWER CONTENTS - RIGHT SIDE PANELS
// ============================================================================

function AIGenerationDrawer() {
  return (
    <div className="p-4 space-y-4">
      <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500/10 to-pink-500/10 rounded-lg p-4 border border-purple-500/20">
        <h4 className="text-sm font-medium text-white mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />
          AI Image Generation
        </h4>
        <textarea
          placeholder="Describe the image you want to create..."
          className="w-full h-24 bg-gray-800/50 border border-gray-700 rounded-lg p-2 text-sm text-white placeholder-gray-500 resize-none"
        />
        <button className="w-full mt-3 py-2 bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-500 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-white transition-colors">
          Generate Image
        </button>
      </div>
      
      <div>
        <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 uppercase mb-2 block">Model</label>
        <select className="w-full bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded-lg p-2 text-sm text-white">
          <option>Gemini Flash Image</option>
          <option>DALL-E 3</option>
          <option>Stable Diffusion XL</option>
          <option>Flux</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      
      <div>
        <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 uppercase mb-2 block">Style Presets</label>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-1">
          {['Cinematic', 'Anime', 'Realistic', 'Abstract', 'Vintage', 'Neon'].map((style) => (
            <button
              key={style}
              className="py-1.5 px-2 bg-gray-800/50 hover:bg-gray-700/50 rounded text-xs text-gray-300"
            >
              {style}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function AssetBrowserDrawer() {
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<'grid' | 'list'>('grid');
  const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState<'all' | 'recent'>('all');
  const [assets, setAssets] = useState<DraggingAsset[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [uploading, setUploading] = useState(false);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [storageBackend, setStorageBackend] = useState<'indexeddb' | 'filesystem'>('indexeddb');
  const [requestingAccess, setRequestingAccess] = useState(false);
  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);

  // Initialize storage backend on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    async function initStorage() {
      try {
        const { assetStorageManager } = await import('../../../lib/storage/AssetStorageManager');
        const backend = assetStorageManager.getBackend();
        setStorageBackend(backend);
        
        // If File System was previously selected, check if we still have access
        if (backend === 'filesystem' && !assetStorageManager.hasFileSystemAccess()) {
          // Lost access, fallback to IndexedDB
          assetStorageManager.switchToIndexedDB();
          setStorageBackend('indexeddb');
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Failed to initialize storage:', error);
      }
    }
    initStorage();
  }, []);

  // Load assets from storage
  useEffect(() => {
    loadAssets();
  }, [filterType, storageBackend]);

  async function loadAssets() {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const { assetStorageManager } = await import('../../../lib/storage/AssetStorageManager');
      let loadedAssets;
      
      if (searchQuery.trim()) {
        loadedAssets = await assetStorageManager.searchAssets(searchQuery);
      } else if (filterType === 'recent') {
        const all = await assetStorageManager.getAllAssets();
        loadedAssets = all.slice(0, 20); // Recent 20
      } else {
        loadedAssets = await assetStorageManager.getAllAssets();
      }

      // Convert LocalAsset to DraggingAsset
      const draggingAssets: DraggingAsset[] = loadedAssets.map(asset => ({
        id: asset.id,
        name: asset.name,
        thumbnail: asset.thumbnail,
        url: asset.url,
        width: asset.width,
        height: asset.height,
      }));

      setAssets(draggingAssets);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to load assets:', error);
      setAssets([]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleSwitchToFileSystem() {
    setRequestingAccess(true);
    try {
      const { assetStorageManager } = await import('../../../lib/storage/AssetStorageManager');
      const granted = await assetStorageManager.switchToFileSystem();
      if (granted) {
        setStorageBackend('filesystem');
        await loadAssets();
      } else {
        alert('Permission denied. Please allow folder access to use File System storage.');
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to switch to File System storage:', error);
      alert('Failed to access file system. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setRequestingAccess(false);
    }
  }

  function handleSwitchToIndexedDB() {
    const { assetStorageManager } = require('../../../lib/storage/AssetStorageManager');
    assetStorageManager.switchToIndexedDB();
    setStorageBackend('indexeddb');
    loadAssets();
  }

  async function handleFileUpload(event: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) {
    const files = event.target.files;
    if (!files || files.length === 0) return;

    setUploading(true);
    try {
      const { assetStorageManager } = await import('../../../lib/storage/AssetStorageManager');
      
      for (const file of Array.from(files)) {
        // Only accept image files
        if (!file.type.startsWith('image/')) {
          console.warn(`Skipping non-image file: ${file.name}`);
          continue;
        }

        // Get image dimensions
        const dimensions = await getImageDimensions(file);
        
        // Create asset ID
        const id = `asset-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
        const name = file.name.replace(/\.[^/.]+$/, '');

        const asset = {
          id,
          name,
          thumbnail: '', // Will be set by saveAsset
          url: '', // Will be set by saveAsset
          width: dimensions.width,
          height: dimensions.height,
          createdAt: Date.now(),
          updatedAt: Date.now(),
          tags: [],
        };

        await assetStorageManager.saveAsset(asset, file);
      }

      await loadAssets();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to upload assets:', error);
      alert('Failed to upload assets. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setUploading(false);
      if (fileInputRef.current) {
        fileInputRef.current.value = '';
      }
    }
  }

  async function handleDelete(assetId: string) {
    if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this asset?')) return;

    try {
      const { assetStorageManager } = await import('../../../lib/storage/AssetStorageManager');
      await assetStorageManager.deleteAsset(assetId);
      await loadAssets();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to delete asset:', error);
      alert('Failed to delete asset. Please try again.');
    }
  }

  // Search handler
  useEffect(() => {
    const timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {
      loadAssets();
    }, 300); // Debounce search

    return () => clearTimeout(timeoutId);
  }, [searchQuery]);

  function getImageDimensions(file: File): Promise<{ width: number; height: number }> {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const img = new Image();
      const reader = new FileReader();

      reader.onload = (e) => {
        img.onload = () => {
          resolve({ width: img.width, height: img.height });
        };
        img.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Failed to load image'));
        img.src = e.target?.result as string;
      };
      reader.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Failed to read file'));
      reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    });
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
      <div className="p-3 border-b border-gray-700 space-y-2">
        {/* Storage Method Selector */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs">
          <span className="text-gray-500">Storage:</span>
          <button
            onClick={handleSwitchToIndexedDB}
            disabled={storageBackend === 'indexeddb'}
            className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs ${
              storageBackend === 'indexeddb'
                ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white'
                : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700'
            }`}
            title="Store in browser (IndexedDB)"
          >
            Browser
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={handleSwitchToFileSystem}
            disabled={requestingAccess || storageBackend === 'filesystem'}
            className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs flex items-center gap-1 ${
              storageBackend === 'filesystem'
                ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white'
                : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700'
            } disabled:opacity-50`}
            title="Store in organized folders on your computer"
          >
            {requestingAccess ? (
              <>
                <Loader2 className="w-3 h-3 animate-spin" />
                Requesting...
              </>
            ) : (
              <>
                <FolderOpen className="w-3 h-3" />
                Folders
              </>
            )}
          </button>
        </div>

        <div className="relative">
          <Search className="absolute left-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
          <input
            type="text"
            placeholder="Search assets..."
            value={searchQuery}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
            className="w-full pl-8 pr-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded text-xs text-white"
          />
          <input
            ref={fileInputRef}
            type="file"
            accept="image/*"
            multiple
            onChange={handleFileUpload}
            className="hidden"
          />
        </div>
        
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex gap-1">
            <button
              onClick={() => setFilterType('all')}
              className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded ${filterType === 'all' ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white' : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400'}`}
            >
              All
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => setFilterType('recent')}
              className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded flex items-center gap-1 ${filterType === 'recent' ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white' : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400'}`}
            >
              <Clock className="w-3 h-3" /> Recent
            </button>
          </div>
          
          <div className="flex gap-1">
            <button
              onClick={() => setViewMode('grid')}
              className={`p-1.5 rounded ${viewMode === 'grid' ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white' : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400'}`}
            >
              <Grid3X3 className="w-4 h-4" />
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => setViewMode('list')}
              className={`p-1.5 rounded ${viewMode === 'list' ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white' : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400'}`}
            >
              <List className="w-4 h-4" />
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()}
              disabled={uploading}
              className="p-1.5 rounded bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
              title="Upload images"
            >
              {uploading ? <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" /> : <Upload className="w-4 h-4" />}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-3">
        {/* Drag hint */}
        <div className="mb-2 px-2 py-1.5 bg-purple-500/10 rounded-lg border border-purple-500/20">
          <p className="text-[10px] text-purple-400 text-center">
            Drag assets to canvas or layers • Scroll while dragging to adjust layer position
          </p>
        </div>
        
        {loading ? (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-32">
            <Loader2 className="w-6 h-6 animate-spin text-purple-500" />
          </div>
        ) : assets.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-32 text-gray-500">
            <FolderOpen className="w-8 h-8 mb-2 opacity-50" />
            <p className="text-xs">No assets yet</p>
            <p className="text-[10px] mt-1">Click upload to add images</p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className={viewMode === 'grid' ? 'grid grid-cols-2 gap-2' : 'space-y-2'}>
            {assets.map((asset) => (
              <div
                key={asset.id}
                className={`bg-gray-800 rounded overflow-hidden hover:ring-2 hover:ring-purple-500 relative group ${
                  viewMode === 'list' ? 'flex items-center gap-3 p-2' : ''
                }`}
              >
                <DraggableAsset
                  asset={asset}
                  className="w-full"
                >
                  <img
                    src={asset.thumbnail}
                    alt={asset.name}
                    className={viewMode === 'grid' ? 'w-full aspect-square object-cover' : 'w-12 h-12 rounded object-cover'}
                    draggable={false}
                  />
                  <div className={viewMode === 'grid' ? 'p-2' : ''}>
                    <p className="text-xs font-medium text-white truncate">{asset.name}</p>
                    {viewMode === 'grid' && asset.width && asset.height && (
                      <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">{asset.width}×{asset.height}</p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </DraggableAsset>
                <button
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    handleDelete(asset.id);
                  }}
                  className="absolute top-1 right-1 p-1 bg-red-600/80 hover:bg-red-600 rounded opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity"
                  title="Delete asset"
                >
                  <Trash2 className="w-3 h-3 text-white" />
                </button>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function LayersDrawer() {
  const { layers, setLayers, selectedLayerId, setSelectedLayerId } = useProject();
  const { dragState } = useAssetDrag();

  const toggleVisibility = (layerId: string) => {
    setLayers(layers.map(l => l.id === layerId ? { ...l, visible: !l.visible } : l));
  };

  const toggleLock = (layerId: string) => {
    setLayers(layers.map(l => l.id === layerId ? { ...l, locked: !l.locked } : l));
  };

  // Show layer insert indicator for drag-drop
  const showInsertIndicator = dragState.isDragging && dragState.dropZone === 'layers-drawer';

  return (
    <DropZone zone="layers-drawer" className="flex flex-col h-full relative">
      <div className="p-2 border-b border-gray-700 flex items-center gap-1">
        <button className="flex-1 py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-xs text-gray-300 flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
          <Plus className="w-3 h-3" /> New Layer
        </button>
        <button className="p-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-gray-400">
          <FolderOpen className="w-4 h-4" />
        </button>
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
        {layers.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-gray-500 p-4">
            <Layers className="w-8 h-8 mb-2 opacity-50" />
            <p className="text-xs">No layers yet</p>
            {showInsertIndicator && (
              <div className="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600/20 border border-purple-500 rounded-lg">
                <p className="text-xs text-purple-400">Drop here to create layer</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-0.5 p-1">
            {/* Top insert indicator */}
            {showInsertIndicator && dragState.targetLayerIndex === layers.length && (
              <div className="relative h-1 mx-2 mb-1">
                <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-purple-500 rounded-full" style={{ boxShadow: '0 0 8px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.8)' }}>
                  <div className="absolute left-0 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 top-1/2 w-2 h-2 bg-purple-500 rounded-full border border-white" />
                  <div className="absolute right-0 translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 top-1/2 w-2 h-2 bg-purple-500 rounded-full border border-white" />
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {[...layers].reverse().map((layer, reversedIndex) => {
              const actualIndex = layers.length - 1 - reversedIndex;
              const showAbove = showInsertIndicator && dragState.targetLayerIndex === actualIndex + 1 && actualIndex < layers.length - 1;
              const showBelow = showInsertIndicator && dragState.targetLayerIndex === actualIndex;
              
              return (
                <div key={layer.id} className="relative">
                  {/* Insert indicator above */}
                  {showAbove && (
                    <div className="absolute -top-0.5 left-2 right-2 h-1 bg-purple-500 rounded-full z-10" style={{ boxShadow: '0 0 8px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.8)' }}>
                      <div className="absolute left-0 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 top-1/2 w-2 h-2 bg-purple-500 rounded-full border border-white" />
                      <div className="absolute right-0 translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 top-1/2 w-2 h-2 bg-purple-500 rounded-full border border-white" />
                    </div>
                  )}
                  
                  <div
                    className={`flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded cursor-pointer transition-all ${
                      selectedLayerId === layer.id ? 'bg-purple-600/30 ring-1 ring-purple-500' : 'hover:bg-gray-800'
                    }`}
                    onClick={() => setSelectedLayerId(layer.id)}
                  >
                    <button
                      onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); toggleVisibility(layer.id); }}
                      className={`p-1 rounded ${layer.visible ? 'text-white' : 'text-gray-600'}`}
                    >
                      {layer.visible ? <Eye className="w-3 h-3" /> : <EyeOff className="w-3 h-3" />}
                    </button>
                    
                    <div
                      className="w-8 h-8 rounded bg-gray-700 overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0"
                      style={layer.thumbnailUrl ? { backgroundImage: `url(${layer.thumbnailUrl})`, backgroundSize: 'cover' } : {}}
                    />
                    
                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                      <p className="text-xs font-medium text-white truncate">{layer.name}</p>
                      <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">{layer.blendMode} • {Math.round(layer.opacity * 100)}%</p>
                    </div>

                    <button
                      onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); toggleLock(layer.id); }}
                      className={`p-1 rounded ${layer.locked ? 'text-yellow-500' : 'text-gray-600'}`}
                    >
                      {layer.locked ? '🔒' : '🔓'}
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  
                  {/* Insert indicator below (only for bottom layer) */}
                  {showBelow && actualIndex === 0 && (
                    <div className="absolute -bottom-0.5 left-2 right-2 h-1 bg-purple-500 rounded-full z-10" style={{ boxShadow: '0 0 8px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.8)' }}>
                      <div className="absolute left-0 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 top-1/2 w-2 h-2 bg-purple-500 rounded-full border border-white" />
                      <div className="absolute right-0 translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 top-1/2 w-2 h-2 bg-purple-500 rounded-full border border-white" />
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      <div className="p-2 border-t border-gray-700 flex items-center gap-1">
        <select className="flex-1 bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded px-2 py-1 text-xs text-white">
          <option>Normal</option>
          <option>Multiply</option>
          <option>Screen</option>
          <option>Overlay</option>
        </select>
        <input
          type="range"
          min="0"
          max="100"
          defaultValue="100"
          className="w-16"
        />
      </div>
    </DropZone>
  );
}

function EffectsDrawer() {
  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState('all');
  const categories = ['all', 'blur', 'sharpen', 'noise', 'artistic', 'stylize'];
  const effects = [
    { id: 'blur', name: 'Gaussian Blur', category: 'blur' },
    { id: 'sharpen', name: 'Unsharp Mask', category: 'sharpen' },
    { id: 'noise', name: 'Add Noise', category: 'noise' },
    { id: 'emboss', name: 'Emboss', category: 'stylize' },
    { id: 'posterize', name: 'Posterize', category: 'artistic' },
    { id: 'oil-paint', name: 'Oil Paint', category: 'artistic' },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
      <div className="p-3 border-b border-gray-700">
        <div className="relative mb-3">
          <Search className="absolute left-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
          <input
            type="text"
            placeholder="Search effects..."
            className="w-full pl-8 pr-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded text-xs text-white"
          />
        </div>
        
        <div className="flex gap-1 overflow-x-auto">
          {categories.map((cat) => (
            <button
              key={cat}
              onClick={() => setSelectedCategory(cat)}
              className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded whitespace-nowrap capitalize ${
                selectedCategory === cat ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white' : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400'
              }`}
            >
              {cat}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-3 space-y-2">
        {effects
          .filter(e => selectedCategory === 'all' || e.category === selectedCategory)
          .map((effect) => (
            <button
              key={effect.id}
              className="w-full text-left p-3 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded transition-colors"
            >
              <div className="text-sm font-medium text-white">{effect.name}</div>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 capitalize">{effect.category}</div>
            </button>
          ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function AIChatDrawer() {
  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
      <div className="px-4 py-2 border-b border-gray-700 bg-gray-800/30">
        <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
          <input type="checkbox" className="rounded" />
          <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">Zen Mode (hide UI, voice control)</span>
        </label>
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 p-4 overflow-y-auto">
        <div className="bg-gray-800/50 rounded-xl p-4">
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-300">I can help with:</p>
          <ul className="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2 space-y-1">
            <li>• Image editing with natural language</li>
            <li>• "Make the sky more blue"</li>
            <li>• "Remove the person on the left"</li>
            <li>• "Apply a vintage filter"</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="p-3 border-t border-gray-700">
        <div className="flex gap-2">
          <input
            type="text"
            placeholder="Ask AI to help..."
            className="flex-1 bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm text-white"
          />
          <button className="px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-500 rounded-lg text-sm text-white">
            Send
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function ColorSphereDrawer() {
  const [color, setColor] = useState({ r: 142, g: 87, b: 201 });
  
  return (
    <div className="p-4 space-y-4">
      <div className="aspect-square bg-gray-800 rounded-lg overflow-hidden relative">
        <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
          <div 
            className="w-3/4 h-3/4 rounded-full"
            style={{
              background: 'conic-gradient(from 0deg, red, yellow, lime, aqua, blue, magenta, red)',
              filter: 'blur(20px)',
            }}
          />
        </div>
        <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center text-xs text-gray-400">
          Click to pick color
        </div>
      </div>
      
      <div className="space-y-2">
        {['r', 'g', 'b'].map((channel) => (
          <div key={channel}>
            <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 uppercase block mb-1">
              {channel}: {color[channel as keyof typeof color]}
            </label>
            <input
              type="range"
              min="0"
              max="255"
              value={color[channel as keyof typeof color]}
              onChange={(e) => setColor({ ...color, [channel]: parseInt(e.target.value) })}
              className="w-full"
            />
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
      
      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
        <div
          className="w-12 h-12 rounded border-2 border-gray-700"
          style={{ backgroundColor: `rgb(${color.r}, ${color.g}, ${color.b})` }}
        />
        <div className="text-xs font-mono">
          <div className="text-gray-400">HEX: <span className="text-white">#{color.r.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}{color.g.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}{color.b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}</span></div>
          <div className="text-gray-400">RGB: <span className="text-white">{color.r}, {color.g}, {color.b}</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// Image Properties Drawer - Professional image settings like Photoshop
function ImagePropertiesDrawer() {
  const [imageSize, setImageSize] = useState({ width: 1920, height: 1080 });
  const [resolution, setResolution] = useState(72);
  const [format, setFormat] = useState('png');
  const [colorMode, setColorMode] = useState('rgb');
  const [bitDepth, setBitDepth] = useState(8);
  const [aspectRatioLocked, setAspectRatioLocked] = useState(true);
  const [innerCanvasBg, setInnerCanvasBg] = useState('#353539'); // Slightly lighter grey than outer
  const [outerCanvasBg, setOuterCanvasBg] = useState('#2a2a2e'); // Silky dark grey
  const aspectRatio = imageSize.width / imageSize.height;

  const handleWidthChange = (newWidth: number) => {
    setImageSize({
      width: newWidth,
      height: aspectRatioLocked ? Math.round(newWidth / aspectRatio) : imageSize.height,
    });
  };

  const handleHeightChange = (newHeight: number) => {
    setImageSize({
      width: aspectRatioLocked ? Math.round(newHeight * aspectRatio) : imageSize.width,
      height: newHeight,
    });
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-full overflow-y-auto">
      <div className="p-4 space-y-6">
        {/* Image Size Section */}
        <div className="space-y-3">
          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Box className="w-4 h-4" />
            Image Size
          </h3>
          
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {/* Width */}
            <div>
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 block mb-1">Width</label>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <input
                  type="number"
                  value={imageSize.width}
                  onChange={(e) => handleWidthChange(parseInt(e.target.value) || 0)}
                  className="flex-1 bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded px-3 py-1.5 text-sm text-white"
                />
                <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">px</span>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Height */}
            <div>
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 block mb-1">Height</label>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <input
                  type="number"
                  value={imageSize.height}
                  onChange={(e) => handleHeightChange(parseInt(e.target.value) || 0)}
                  className="flex-1 bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded px-3 py-1.5 text-sm text-white"
                />
                <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">px</span>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Aspect Ratio Lock */}
            <button
              onClick={() => setAspectRatioLocked(!aspectRatioLocked)}
              className={`flex items-center gap-2 text-xs px-3 py-2 rounded transition-colors ${
                aspectRatioLocked
                  ? 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 border border-purple-500/50'
                  : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 border border-gray-700'
              }`}
            >
              {aspectRatioLocked ? '🔒' : '🔓'}
              <span>Constrain Proportions</span>
              <span className="ml-auto text-gray-500">
                {aspectRatio.toFixed(2)}:1
              </span>
            </button>

            {/* Common Presets */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
              <button
                onClick={() => setImageSize({ width: 1920, height: 1080 })}
                className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-xs text-gray-300 border border-gray-700 transition-colors"
              >
                1080p
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => setImageSize({ width: 3840, height: 2160 })}
                className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-xs text-gray-300 border border-gray-700 transition-colors"
              >
                4K
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => setImageSize({ width: 1080, height: 1080 })}
                className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-xs text-gray-300 border border-gray-700 transition-colors"
              >
                Square
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => setImageSize({ width: 1080, height: 1920 })}
                className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-xs text-gray-300 border border-gray-700 transition-colors"
              >
                Portrait
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Resolution */}
        <div className="space-y-3 border-t border-gray-800 pt-4">
          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300">Resolution</h3>
          <div>
            <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 block mb-1">DPI / PPI</label>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <input
                type="number"
                value={resolution}
                onChange={(e) => setResolution(parseInt(e.target.value) || 72)}
                className="flex-1 bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded px-3 py-1.5 text-sm text-white"
              />
              <div className="flex gap-1">
                <button
                  onClick={() => setResolution(72)}
                  className="px-2 py-1 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-xs text-gray-300 border border-gray-700"
                >
                  72
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setResolution(300)}
                  className="px-2 py-1 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-xs text-gray-300 border border-gray-700"
                >
                  300
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">
              {resolution <= 96 ? 'Screen' : 'Print'} resolution
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* File Format */}
        <div className="space-y-3 border-t border-gray-800 pt-4">
          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300">Export Format</h3>
          <select
            value={format}
            onChange={(e) => setFormat(e.target.value)}
            className="w-full bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded px-3 py-2 text-sm text-white"
          >
            <option value="png">PNG - Lossless, transparency</option>
            <option value="jpg">JPEG - Compressed, smaller files</option>
            <option value="webp">WebP - Modern, efficient</option>
            <option value="tiff">TIFF - Professional, uncompressed</option>
            <option value="psd">PSD - Photoshop format</option>
            <option value="svg">SVG - Vector (if applicable)</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        {/* Color Mode */}
        <div className="space-y-3 border-t border-gray-800 pt-4">
          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300">Color Mode</h3>
          <select
            value={colorMode}
            onChange={(e) => setColorMode(e.target.value)}
            className="w-full bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded px-3 py-2 text-sm text-white"
          >
            <option value="rgb">RGB - Standard color</option>
            <option value="cmyk">CMYK - Print color</option>
            <option value="grayscale">Grayscale - Black & white</option>
            <option value="lab">Lab - Perceptual color</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        {/* Bit Depth */}
        <div className="space-y-3 border-t border-gray-800 pt-4">
          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300">Bit Depth</h3>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
            {[8, 16, 32].map((depth) => (
              <button
                key={depth}
                onClick={() => setBitDepth(depth)}
                className={`px-3 py-2 rounded text-xs transition-colors ${
                  bitDepth === depth
                    ? 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 border border-purple-500/50'
                    : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 border border-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-700'
                }`}
              >
                {depth}-bit
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
          <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">
            {bitDepth === 8 && 'Standard quality (256 colors per channel)'}
            {bitDepth === 16 && 'High quality (65,536 colors per channel)'}
            {bitDepth === 32 && 'HDR quality (4.3B colors per channel)'}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Canvas Backgrounds */}
        <div className="space-y-3 border-t border-gray-800 pt-4">
          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300">Canvas Backgrounds</h3>
          
          {/* Inner Canvas (Image Area) */}
          <div className="space-y-2">
            <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 block">Inner Canvas (Image Area)</label>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
              <button 
                onClick={() => setInnerCanvasBg('transparent')}
                className={`px-3 py-2 rounded text-xs transition-colors ${
                  innerCanvasBg === 'transparent'
                    ? 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 border border-purple-500/50'
                    : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-300 border border-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-700'
                }`}
              >
                Transparent
              </button>
              <button 
                onClick={() => setInnerCanvasBg('#353539')}
                className={`px-3 py-2 rounded text-xs transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 ${
                  innerCanvasBg === '#353539'
                    ? 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 border border-purple-500/50'
                    : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-300 border border-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-700'
                }`}
              >
                <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-[#353539] border border-gray-600 rounded" />
                Light Grey
              </button>
              <button 
                onClick={() => setInnerCanvasBg('#ffffff')}
                className={`px-3 py-2 rounded text-xs transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 ${
                  innerCanvasBg === '#ffffff'
                    ? 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 border border-purple-500/50'
                    : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-300 border border-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-700'
                }`}
              >
                <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-white border border-gray-600 rounded" />
                White
              </button>
              <button 
                onClick={() => setInnerCanvasBg('#000000')}
                className={`px-3 py-2 rounded text-xs transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 ${
                  innerCanvasBg === '#000000'
                    ? 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 border border-purple-500/50'
                    : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-300 border border-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-700'
                }`}
              >
                <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-black border border-gray-600 rounded" />
                Black
              </button>
            </div>
            
            {/* Custom color picker */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <input
                type="color"
                value={innerCanvasBg === 'transparent' ? '#353539' : innerCanvasBg}
                onChange={(e) => setInnerCanvasBg(e.target.value)}
                className="w-8 h-8 rounded border border-gray-700 cursor-pointer bg-transparent"
                title="Custom inner canvas color"
              />
              <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">Custom Color</span>
            </div>
            
            {/* Checkerboard pattern option */}
            <button 
              onClick={() => setInnerCanvasBg('checkerboard')}
              className={`w-full px-3 py-2 rounded text-xs transition-colors ${
                innerCanvasBg === 'checkerboard'
                  ? 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 border border-purple-500/50'
                  : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-300 border border-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-700'
              }`}
            >
              📋 Transparency Checkerboard
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Outer Canvas (Workspace) */}
          <div className="space-y-2 pt-3 border-t border-gray-700">
            <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 block">Outer Canvas (Workspace)</label>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
              <button 
                onClick={() => setOuterCanvasBg('#2a2a2e')}
                className={`px-3 py-2 rounded text-xs transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 ${
                  outerCanvasBg === '#2a2a2e'
                    ? 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 border border-purple-500/50'
                    : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-300 border border-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-700'
                }`}
              >
                <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-[#2a2a2e] border border-gray-600 rounded" />
                Silky Grey
              </button>
              <button 
                onClick={() => setOuterCanvasBg('#1a1a1a')}
                className={`px-3 py-2 rounded text-xs transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 ${
                  outerCanvasBg === '#1a1a1a'
                    ? 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 border border-purple-500/50'
                    : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-300 border border-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-700'
                }`}
              >
                <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-[#1a1a1a] border border-gray-600 rounded" />
                Dark Grey
              </button>
              <button 
                onClick={() => setOuterCanvasBg('#0a0a0a')}
                className={`px-3 py-2 rounded text-xs transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 ${
                  outerCanvasBg === '#0a0a0a'
                    ? 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 border border-purple-500/50'
                    : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-300 border border-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-700'
                }`}
              >
                <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-gray-600 rounded" />
                Near Black
              </button>
              <button 
                onClick={() => setOuterCanvasBg('#000000')}
                className={`px-3 py-2 rounded text-xs transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 ${
                  outerCanvasBg === '#000000'
                    ? 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 border border-purple-500/50'
                    : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-300 border border-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-700'
                }`}
              >
                <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-black border border-gray-600 rounded" />
                Pure Black
              </button>
            </div>
            
            {/* Custom color picker */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <input
                type="color"
                value={outerCanvasBg}
                onChange={(e) => setOuterCanvasBg(e.target.value)}
                className="w-8 h-8 rounded border border-gray-700 cursor-pointer bg-transparent"
                title="Custom workspace color"
              />
              <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">Custom Color</span>
            </div>

            {/* Preview */}
            <div className="mt-3">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 block mb-2">Preview</label>
              <div 
                className="w-full h-24 rounded-lg p-4 flex items-center justify-center"
                style={{ backgroundColor: outerCanvasBg }}
              >
                <div 
                  className="w-20 h-16 rounded border-2 border-gray-600/50 flex items-center justify-center"
                  style={{ 
                    backgroundColor: innerCanvasBg === 'transparent' 
                      ? 'transparent'
                      : innerCanvasBg === 'checkerboard'
                      ? '#353539'
                      : innerCanvasBg,
                    backgroundImage: innerCanvasBg === 'checkerboard' 
                      ? 'repeating-conic-gradient(#444 0% 25%, #555 0% 50%) 50% / 10px 10px'
                      : 'none'
                  }}
                >
                  <span className="text-[8px] text-gray-500">Image</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 text-center mt-1">
                Outer: {outerCanvasBg} • Inner: {innerCanvasBg === 'transparent' ? 'Transparent' : innerCanvasBg === 'checkerboard' ? 'Checkerboard' : innerCanvasBg}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Image Stats */}
        <div className="space-y-2 border-t border-gray-800 pt-4">
          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300">File Information</h3>
          <div className="space-y-1 text-xs">
            <div className="flex justify-between text-gray-400">
              <span>Total Pixels:</span>
              <span className="text-white">{(imageSize.width * imageSize.height / 1000000).toFixed(2)}MP</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex justify-between text-gray-400">
              <span>Estimated Size (PNG):</span>
              <span className="text-white">{(imageSize.width * imageSize.height * (bitDepth / 8) * 4 / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(2)}MB</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex justify-between text-gray-400">
              <span>Aspect Ratio:</span>
              <span className="text-white">{aspectRatio.toFixed(3)}:1</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Apply Button */}
        <button className="w-full px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-white transition-colors">
          Apply Changes
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// MAIN CONTENT
// ============================================================================

export function ImagesPageV2Content() {
  const { layers, activeTool, setActiveTool, selectedLayerId, setSelectedLayerId, setLayers } = useProject();
  
  // Tool state
  const [toolSettings, setToolSettings] = useState<ToolSettings>(DEFAULT_TOOL_SETTINGS);
  const [toolSettingsState, setToolSettingsState] = useState<'closed' | 'mini' | 'full'>('mini'); // Default: mini bar shown
  const [isDeveloperConsoleOpen, setIsDeveloperConsoleOpen] = useState(false);
  
  // Voice Control Integration - Register ALL Commands
  useEffect(() => {
    // Removed: console.log('[VoiceControl] Registering all commands...'); - excessive logging
    
    // Register all 80+ commands from library
    ALL_COMMANDS.forEach((cmd) => {
      voiceControl.registerCommand(cmd);
    });
    
    // Register 42 expanded commands
    EXPANDED_COMMANDS_WITH_ACTIONS.forEach((cmd) => {
      voiceControl.registerCommand(cmd);
    });
    
    // Register 107+ MEGA commands
    MEGA_COMMANDS.forEach((cmd) => {
      voiceControl.registerCommand(cmd);
    });
    
    const totalCommands = ALL_COMMANDS.length + EXPANDED_COMMANDS_WITH_ACTIONS.length + MEGA_COMMANDS.length;
    // Removed: All console.log statements - excessive logging (236 commands registered)
  }, []); // Run once on mount
  
  // Voice Control Integration - Register Callbacks
  useEffect(() => {
    // Register tool settings callback
    voiceControl.registerContextCallback('adjustSetting', (params: any) => {
      const { setting, value, delta } = params;
      
      // Removed: console.log('[VoiceControl] Adjust setting:', { setting, value, delta }); - excessive logging
      
      if (setting === 'size') {
        if (delta) {
          // Relative change: "increase size" / "decrease size"
          setToolSettings(prev => ({
            ...prev,
            size: Math.max(1, Math.min(500, prev.size + delta))
          }));
        } else if (value) {
          // Absolute value: "set size to 100"
          setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, size: value }));
        }
      } else if (setting === 'opacity') {
        // Opacity is 0-100 in voice commands, need to convert to 0-100 for display
        setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, opacity: value || 100 }));
      } else if (setting === 'hardness') {
        // Hardness is 0-100 in voice commands
        setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, hardness: value || 50 }));
      } else if (setting === 'flow') {
        // Flow is 0-100 in voice commands
        setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, flow: value || 100 }));
      } else if (setting === 'tolerance') {
        // Tolerance for magic wand
        setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, tolerance: value || 32 }));
      } else if (setting === 'spacing') {
        // Brush spacing
        if (delta) {
          setToolSettings(prev => ({
            ...prev,
            spacing: Math.max(1, Math.min(100, prev.spacing + delta))
          }));
        } else if (value) {
          setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, spacing: value }));
        }
      } else if (setting === 'smoothing') {
        // Brush smoothing
        if (delta) {
          setToolSettings(prev => ({
            ...prev,
            smoothing: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, prev.smoothing + delta))
          }));
        } else if (value) {
          setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, smoothing: value }));
        }
      } else if (setting === 'blendMode') {
        // Blend mode (string value)
        setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, blendMode: value || 'normal' }));
      } else if (setting === 'colorMode') {
        // Color mode (rgb, hsv, lab)
        setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, colorMode: value || 'rgb' }));
      } else if (setting === 'lassoVariant') {
        // Lasso variant
        setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, lassoVariant: value || 'classic' }));
      } else if (setting === 'contiguous') {
        // Boolean toggle
        setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, contiguous: value !== undefined ? value : !prev.contiguous }));
      } else if (setting === 'pressure') {
        setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, pressure: value !== undefined ? value : !prev.pressure }));
      } else if (setting === 'sampleAllLayers') {
        setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, sampleAllLayers: value !== undefined ? value : !prev.sampleAllLayers }));
      } else if (setting === 'antiAlias') {
        setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, antiAlias: value !== undefined ? value : !prev.antiAlias }));
      } else if (setting === 'livePreview') {
        setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, livePreview: value !== undefined ? value : !prev.livePreview }));
      } else if (setting === 'lassoAutoAnchor') {
        setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, lassoAutoAnchor: value !== undefined ? value : !prev.lassoAutoAnchor }));
      }
    });
    
    // Panel opening integration
    const handleOpenDrawer = (event: CustomEvent) => {
      const { drawerId } = event.detail;
      
      // Map voice IDs to actual drawer IDs
      const drawerMap: Record<string, string> = {
        'layers': 'layers',
        'effects': 'effects',
        'ai-tools': 'aiTools',
        'presets': 'aiPresets',
        'ice': 'ice',
        'cursor-zoom': 'cursorZoom',
        'microscope': 'microscope',
        'color': 'colorSphere',
        'ai-chat': 'aiChat',
        'assets': 'assets',
        'settings': 'imageProperties',
      };
      
      const actualDrawerId = drawerMap[drawerId] || drawerId;
      // Removed: console.log('[VoiceControl] Opening drawer:', actualDrawerId); - excessive logging
      
      // Trigger drawer opening via drawer system
      // This will be handled by the DrawerProvider context
      window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('setActiveDrawer', { 
        detail: { drawerId: actualDrawerId } 
      }));
    };
    
    window.addEventListener('openDrawer', handleOpenDrawer as EventListener);
    
    // Color actions
    const handleColorAction = (event: CustomEvent) => {
      const { action, color } = event.detail;
      
      if (action === 'swap') {
        setToolSettings(prev => ({
          ...prev,
          foreground: prev.background,
          background: prev.foreground,
        }));
      } else if (action === 'reset') {
        setToolSettings(prev => ({
          ...prev,
          foreground: '#FFFFFF',
          background: '#000000',
        }));
      } else if (action === 'setForeground') {
        setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, foreground: color }));
      } else if (action === 'setBackground') {
        setToolSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, background: color }));
      }
    };
    
    // Transform actions (will need actual transform logic)
    const handleTransform = (event: CustomEvent) => {
      const { operation, value } = event.detail;
      // Removed: console.log('[VoiceControl] Transform:', operation, value); - excessive logging
      // TODO: Implement transform operations
    };
    
    // Effect actions (will need actual effect logic)
    const handleEffect = (event: CustomEvent) => {
      const { effect } = event.detail;
      // Removed: console.log('[VoiceControl] Effect:', effect); - excessive logging
      // TODO: Implement effect application
    };
    
    window.addEventListener('openDrawer', handleOpenDrawer as EventListener);
    window.addEventListener('voiceColorAction', handleColorAction as EventListener);
    window.addEventListener('voiceTransform', handleTransform as EventListener);
    window.addEventListener('voiceEffect', handleEffect as EventListener);
    
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('openDrawer', handleOpenDrawer as EventListener);
      window.removeEventListener('voiceColorAction', handleColorAction as EventListener);
      window.removeEventListener('voiceTransform', handleTransform as EventListener);
      window.removeEventListener('voiceEffect', handleEffect as EventListener);
    };
  }, [setToolSettings]);
  
  // Animation timeline state
  const [currentFrame, setCurrentFrame] = useState(0);
  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);
  const [selectedKeyframeId, setSelectedKeyframeId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [animationTracks, setAnimationTracks] = useState<AnimationTrack[]>(MOCK_ANIMATION_TRACKS);
  const totalFrames = 120;
  const fps = 24;

  // Map tool ID to ToolType
  const toolIdToType = useCallback((id: string): ToolType => {
    const map: Record<string, ToolType> = {
      'move': 'move',
      'select': 'select',
      'wand': 'magic-wand',
      'lasso': 'lasso', // Use dedicated lasso type for Ultimate Lasso System
      'crop': 'select',
      'brush': 'brush',
      'eraser': 'eraser',
      'clone': 'brush',
      'gradient': 'gradient',
      'pen': 'pen',
      'text': 'select',
      'shape': 'select',
      'eyedropper': 'select',
      'zoom': 'move',
    };
    return map[id] || 'select';
  }, []);

  // Map ToolType back to button ID (for IconBar activeToolId)
  const toolTypeToId = useCallback((toolType: ToolType): string => {
    const map: Record<ToolType, string> = {
      'move': 'move',
      'select': 'select',
      'magic-wand': 'wand',  // ToolType 'magic-wand' → button ID 'wand'
      'lasso': 'lasso',
      'brush': 'brush',
      'eraser': 'eraser',
      'gradient': 'gradient',
      'pen': 'pen',
    };
    return map[toolType] || 'select';
  }, []);

  // Handle tool selection
  const handleToolSelect = useCallback((toolId: string) => {
    const toolType = toolIdToType(toolId);
    setActiveTool(toolType as any);
  }, [toolIdToType, setActiveTool]);

  // Handle color swatch swap
  const handleColorSwap = useCallback(() => {
    setToolSettings(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      foreground: prev.background,
      background: prev.foreground,
    }));
  }, []);

  // Animation handlers
  const handleAddKeyframe = useCallback((trackId: string, frame: number) => {
