```typescript
            z: Math.abs(normal.z)
          };

          let u = 0, v = 0;
          if (absNormal.x > absNormal.y && absNormal.x > absNormal.z) {
            u = (worldPoint.y + 5) / 10;
            v = (worldPoint.z + 5) / 10;
          } else if (absNormal.y > absNormal.x && absNormal.y > absNormal.z) {
            u = (worldPoint.x + 5) / 10;
            v = (worldPoint.z + 5) / 10;
          } else {
            u = (worldPoint.x + 5) / 10;
            v = (worldPoint.y + 5) / 10;
          }

          texX = u * canvas.width;
          texY = v * canvas.height;
          break;

        case 'view-projection':
        case 'decal':
          const u1 = (worldPoint.x + 5) / 10;
          const v1 = (worldPoint.z + 5) / 10;
          texX = u1 * canvas.width;
          texY = v1 * canvas.height;
          break;

        case 'world-space':
          const u2 = (worldPoint.x + 5) / 10;
          const v2 = (worldPoint.y + 5) / 10;
          texX = u2 * canvas.width;
          texY = v2 * canvas.height;
          break;
      }

      ctx.save();
      ctx.globalAlpha = opacity;
      ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';

      const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
        texX, texY, 0,
        texX, texY, brushSize / 2
      );
      gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 1)');
      gradient.addColorStop(0.8, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5)');
      gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)');

      ctx.fillStyle = gradient;

      ctx.save();
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(texX, texY, brushSize / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.clip();

      ctx.drawImage(
        sourceCanvas,
        texX - brushSize / 2,
        texY - brushSize / 2,
        brushSize,
        brushSize,
        texX - brushSize / 2,
        texY - brushSize / 2,
        brushSize,
        brushSize
      );

      ctx.restore();
      ctx.restore();

      updateModelTexture(targetModel, canvas);
    },
    [targetModel, sourceCanvas, brushSize, opacity, projectionMethod, enabled]
  );

  const updateModelTexture = (model: Model3D, canvas: HTMLCanvasElement) => {
    const texture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(canvas);
    texture.needsUpdate = true;
    texture.wrapS = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
    texture.wrapT = THREE.RepeatWrapping;

    model.materials.forEach((material) => {
      if (material.threeMaterial instanceof THREE.MeshStandardMaterial) {
        material.threeMaterial.map = texture;
        material.threeMaterial.needsUpdate = true;
        material.maps.albedo = texture;
      } else if (material.threeMaterial instanceof THREE.MeshBasicMaterial) {
        material.threeMaterial.map = texture;
        material.threeMaterial.needsUpdate = true;
      }
    });
  };

  const startStroke = useCallback(() => {
    isDrawingRef.current = true;
    onStrokeStart?.();
  }, [onStrokeStart]);

  const endStroke = useCallback(() => {
    isDrawingRef.current = false;
    onStrokeEnd?.();
  }, [onStrokeEnd]);

  return null;
};

export const useThreeDPaint = () => {
  const paintToolRef = useRef<{
    paintAtPoint: (
      worldPoint: Point3D,
      normal: Point3D,
      uv: { x: number; y: number } | null
    ) => void;
    startStroke: () => void;
    endStroke: () => void;
  } | null>(null);

  const setPaintTool = useCallback((tool: any) => {
    paintToolRef.current = tool;
  }, []);

  const paint = useCallback(
    (worldPoint: Point3D, normal: Point3D, uv: { x: number; y: number } | null) => {
      paintToolRef.current?.paintAtPoint(worldPoint, normal, uv);
    },
    []
  );

  const startStroke = useCallback(() => {
    paintToolRef.current?.startStroke();
  }, []);

  const endStroke = useCallback(() => {
    paintToolRef.current?.endStroke();
  }, []);

  return { setPaintTool, paint, startStroke, endStroke };
};

```


### TopologyAnalysisDrawer (lucidimage)


**Category:** 3D  
**File:** `lucidimage/project/src/pages/versions/threed/components/drawers/TopologyAnalysisDrawer.tsx`


*Topology analysis drawer for 3D mesh topology visualization and editing*


```typescript
/**
 * Topology Analysis Drawer
 * Displays geometry analysis results - edges, symmetry, curvature
 */

import React, { useMemo, useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import {
  Scan,
  GitBranch,
  Axis3D,
  Triangle,
  Waves,
  Eye,
  EyeOff,
  RefreshCw,
  Info,
  AlertTriangle,
  CheckCircle2,
} from 'lucide-react';
import * as THREE from 'three';
import { analyzeGeometry, GeometryAnalysis } from '../../../../../lib/mesh-editing/algorithms/geometryAnalysis';
import { EdgeImportance, MaterialType } from '../../../../../lib/mesh-editing/types/geometry';

export interface TopologyAnalysisDrawerProps {
  /** Selected mesh to analyze */
  selectedMesh?: THREE.Mesh | null;
  /** Callback to highlight edges */
  onHighlightEdges?: (vertices: THREE.Vector3[][]) => void;
  /** Callback to highlight symmetry plane */
  onHighlightSymmetry?: (plane: THREE.Plane | null) => void;
  /** Callback to show/hide analysis overlays */
  onToggleOverlay?: (type: 'edges' | 'corners' | 'symmetry' | 'curvature', enabled: boolean) => void;
}

// Material type display info
const MATERIAL_INFO: Record<MaterialType, { label: string; color: string; icon: string }> = {
  [MaterialType.FABRIC]: { label: 'Fabric', color: '#ec4899', icon: '🧵' },
  [MaterialType.METAL]: { label: 'Metal', color: '#6b7280', icon: '⚙️' },
  [MaterialType.ORGANIC]: { label: 'Organic', color: '#22c55e', icon: '🌿' },
  [MaterialType.MANUFACTURED]: { label: 'Manufactured', color: '#3b82f6', icon: '🔧' },
  [MaterialType.HYBRID]: { label: 'Hybrid', color: '#8b5cf6', icon: '🔀' },
};

export function TopologyAnalysisDrawer({
  selectedMesh,
  onHighlightEdges,
  onHighlightSymmetry,
  onToggleOverlay,
}: TopologyAnalysisDrawerProps) {
  const [analysis, setAnalysis] = useState<GeometryAnalysis | null>(null);
  const [isAnalyzing, setIsAnalyzing] = useState(false);
  const [overlays, setOverlays] = useState({
    edges: false,
    corners: false,
    symmetry: false,
    curvature: false,
  });
  
  // Run analysis
  const runAnalysis = useCallback(() => {
    if (!selectedMesh?.geometry) return;
    
    setIsAnalyzing(true);
    
    // Run in next frame to allow UI to update
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      try {
        const result = analyzeGeometry(selectedMesh.geometry);
        setAnalysis(result);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Analysis failed:', error);
      } finally {
        setIsAnalyzing(false);
      }
    });
  }, [selectedMesh]);
  
  // Toggle overlay
  const toggleOverlay = useCallback((type: keyof typeof overlays) => {
    const newState = !overlays[type];
    setOverlays(prev => ({ ...prev, [type]: newState }));
    onToggleOverlay?.(type, newState);
    
    // Highlight edges when toggled on
    if (type === 'edges' && newState && analysis) {
      onHighlightEdges?.(analysis.edges.map(e => e.vertices));
    } else if (type === 'edges' && !newState) {
      onHighlightEdges?.([]);
    }
    
    // Highlight symmetry when toggled on
    if (type === 'symmetry' && newState && analysis?.symmetryAxes[0]) {
      onHighlightSymmetry?.(analysis.symmetryAxes[0].plane || null);
    } else if (type === 'symmetry' && !newState) {
      onHighlightSymmetry?.(null);
    }
  }, [overlays, analysis, onHighlightEdges, onHighlightSymmetry, onToggleOverlay]);
  
  // Summary stats
  const stats = useMemo(() => {
    if (!analysis) return null;
    
    const criticalEdges = analysis.edges.filter(e => e.importance === EdgeImportance.CRITICAL).length;
    const importantEdges = analysis.edges.filter(e => e.importance === EdgeImportance.IMPORTANT).length;
    const hasSymmetry = analysis.symmetryAxes.length > 0;
    const strongestSymmetry = analysis.symmetryAxes.reduce(
      (best, s) => (s.confidence > (best?.confidence || 0) ? s : best),
      analysis.symmetryAxes[0]
    );
    
    return {
      totalEdges: analysis.edges.length,
      criticalEdges,
      importantEdges,
      corners: analysis.corners.length,
      structuralCorners: analysis.corners.filter(c => c.isStructural).length,
      hasSymmetry,
      symmetryConfidence: strongestSymmetry?.confidence || 0,
      materialType: analysis.materialType.type,
      materialConfidence: analysis.materialType.confidence,
    };
  }, [analysis]);
  
  return (
    <div className="p-4 text-white space-y-4">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-300 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Scan size={14} />
          Topology Analysis
        </h3>
        <button
          onClick={runAnalysis}
          disabled={!selectedMesh || isAnalyzing}
          className={`
            px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium flex items-center gap-1.5 transition-all
            ${!selectedMesh || isAnalyzing
              ? 'bg-gray-700 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed'
              : 'bg-purple-600/30 hover:bg-purple-600/50 text-purple-300'
            }
          `}
        >
          <RefreshCw size={12} className={isAnalyzing ? 'animate-spin' : ''} />
          {isAnalyzing ? 'Analyzing...' : 'Analyze'}
        </button>
      </div>
      
      {/* No mesh selected */}
      {!selectedMesh && (
        <div className="py-8 text-center">
          <Info size={24} className="mx-auto mb-2 text-gray-500" />
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Select a mesh to analyze</p>
        </div>
      )}
      
      {/* Analysis Results */}
      {analysis && stats && (
        <>
          {/* Material Classification */}
          <div className="bg-gray-800/50 rounded-lg p-3">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
              <span className="text-lg">{MATERIAL_INFO[stats.materialType].icon}</span>
              <span className="text-sm font-medium" style={{ color: MATERIAL_INFO[stats.materialType].color }}>
                {MATERIAL_INFO[stats.materialType].label}
              </span>
              <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 ml-auto">
                {(stats.materialConfidence * 100).toFixed(0)}% confident
              </span>
            </div>
            <div className="h-1 bg-gray-700 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
              <div 
                className="h-full rounded-full transition-all"
                style={{ 
                  width: `${stats.materialConfidence * 100}%`,
                  backgroundColor: MATERIAL_INFO[stats.materialType].color,
                }}
              />
            </div>
          </div>
          
          {/* Statistics Grid */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
            {/* Vertices */}
            <div className="bg-gray-800/30 rounded-lg p-2.5">
              <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Vertices</div>
              <div className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">{analysis.vertexCount.toLocaleString()}</div>
            </div>
            
            {/* Faces */}
            <div className="bg-gray-800/30 rounded-lg p-2.5">
              <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Faces</div>
              <div className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">{analysis.faceCount.toLocaleString()}</div>
            </div>
            
            {/* Edges */}
            <div className="bg-gray-800/30 rounded-lg p-2.5">
              <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Sharp Edges</div>
              <div className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">{stats.totalEdges}</div>
              <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">
                <span className="text-red-400">{stats.criticalEdges}</span> critical, 
                <span className="text-yellow-400 ml-1">{stats.importantEdges}</span> important
              </div>
            </div>
            
            {/* Corners */}
            <div className="bg-gray-800/30 rounded-lg p-2.5">
              <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Corners</div>
              <div className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">{stats.corners}</div>
              <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">
                <span className="text-orange-400">{stats.structuralCorners}</span> structural
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          {/* Symmetry Status */}
          <div className="bg-gray-800/30 rounded-lg p-3">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
              <Axis3D size={14} className="text-cyan-400" />
              <span className="text-xs font-medium">Symmetry Detection</span>
            </div>
            {stats.hasSymmetry ? (
              <div className="space-y-1.5">
                {analysis.symmetryAxes.map((sym, i) => (
                  <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <CheckCircle2 size={12} className="text-green-400" />
                    <span className="text-xs text-gray-300">
                      {sym.plane?.normal.x === 1 ? 'YZ' : sym.plane?.normal.y === 1 ? 'XZ' : 'XY'} Plane
                    </span>
                    <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 ml-auto">
                      {(sym.confidence * 100).toFixed(0)}%
                    </span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-500">
                <AlertTriangle size={12} />
                <span className="text-xs">No strong symmetry detected</span>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
          
          {/* Visualization Toggles */}
          <div className="space-y-2">
            <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Overlays</div>
            
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
              {/* Edges Overlay */}
              <button
                onClick={() => toggleOverlay('edges')}
                className={`
                  flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all
                  ${overlays.edges
                    ? 'bg-red-500/20 text-red-300 ring-1 ring-red-500/30'
                    : 'bg-gray-800/50 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700/50'
                  }
                `}
              >
                {overlays.edges ? <Eye size={14} /> : <EyeOff size={14} />}
                <span>Edges</span>
              </button>
              
              {/* Corners Overlay */}
              <button
                onClick={() => toggleOverlay('corners')}
                className={`
                  flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all
                  ${overlays.corners
                    ? 'bg-orange-500/20 text-orange-300 ring-1 ring-orange-500/30'
                    : 'bg-gray-800/50 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700/50'
                  }
                `}
              >
                {overlays.corners ? <Eye size={14} /> : <EyeOff size={14} />}
                <span>Corners</span>
              </button>
              
              {/* Symmetry Overlay */}
              <button
                onClick={() => toggleOverlay('symmetry')}
                disabled={!stats.hasSymmetry}
                className={`
                  flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all
                  ${overlays.symmetry
                    ? 'bg-cyan-500/20 text-cyan-300 ring-1 ring-cyan-500/30'
                    : stats.hasSymmetry
                      ? 'bg-gray-800/50 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700/50'
                      : 'bg-gray-800/30 text-gray-600 cursor-not-allowed'
                  }
                `}
              >
                {overlays.symmetry ? <Eye size={14} /> : <EyeOff size={14} />}
                <span>Symmetry</span>
              </button>
              
              {/* Curvature Overlay */}
              <button
                onClick={() => toggleOverlay('curvature')}
                className={`
                  flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all
                  ${overlays.curvature
                    ? 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 ring-1 ring-purple-500/30'
                    : 'bg-gray-800/50 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700/50'
                  }
                `}
              >
                {overlays.curvature ? <Eye size={14} /> : <EyeOff size={14} />}
                <span>Curvature</span>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          {/* Analysis Time */}
          <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-600 text-center">
            Analyzed at {new Date(analysis.analyzedAt).toLocaleTimeString()}
          </div>
        </>
      )}
      
      {/* Tips */}
      <div className="pt-4 border-t border-gray-700/30">
        <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 space-y-1">
          <div>💡 <span className="text-gray-400">Click "Analyze" to scan geometry</span></div>
          <div>🔴 <span className="text-gray-400">Red edges = critical features</span></div>
          <div>🔵 <span className="text-gray-400">Symmetry helps with mirroring</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default TopologyAnalysisDrawer;


```


### Viewport3D (lucidimage - topology references)


**Category:** 3D  
**File:** `lucidimage/project/src/pages/versions/threed/components/Viewport3D.tsx`


*Viewport3D component with topology grid and 2D-3D coordinate mapping (large file, includes topology features)*


```typescript
import { useRef, useState, useCallback, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
import { Canvas, useFrame, useThree } from '@react-three/fiber';
import { 
  OrbitControls, 
  Grid, 
  PerspectiveCamera,
  Stars,
  Html,
  Line,
  Stats,
  GizmoHelper,
  GizmoViewport,
  TransformControls,
  useGLTF,
  Center,
} from '@react-three/drei';
import { Suspense } from 'react';
import * as THREE from 'three';
import { Sun, Moon, Grid3X3, Target, Box, Circle, Triangle, Square, Maximize, RotateCcw, Activity, Plus, Trash2, Eye, Magnet } from 'lucide-react';
import { GhostPreviewRenderer } from '../../../../lib/snap-system/components/GhostPreviewRenderer';
import { SnapGuidesRenderer } from '../../../../lib/snap-system/components/SnapGuidesRenderer';
import { QuickSnapToolbar } from '../../../../lib/snap-system/components/QuickSnapToolbar';
import { SnapOption } from '../../../../lib/snap-system/types';
import { EditableMesh } from './mesh-editing/EditableMesh';
import { BrushSettings } from '../../../../lib/mesh-editing/types/brushes';
import { SnapEngine } from '../../../../lib/snap-system/utils/SnapEngine';
import { Ruler3DSystem, ScreenRulers, useGuidePlanes, GuidePlane } from './rulers';
import { ReferencePackManager } from '../modelmaker/reference-pack';

// ============================================================================
// TYPES
// ============================================================================

export interface SceneObject {
  id: string;
  type: 'cube' | 'sphere' | 'cylinder' | 'cone' | 'torus' | 'plane' | 'glb';
  position: [number, number, number];
  rotation: [number, number, number];
  scale: [number, number, number];
  color: string;
  metalness: number;
  roughness: number;
  name: string;
  visible: boolean;
  locked: boolean;
  // Texture painting support
  textureUrl?: string; // Original/base texture URL
  paintCanvas?: HTMLCanvasElement; // Canvas for painting on top
  paintTexture?: THREE.CanvasTexture; // THREE.js texture from paint canvas
  // GLB model support (for Meshy imported models)
  modelUrl?: string; // URL to GLB model file
  thumbnailUrl?: string; // Preview thumbnail URL
}

interface Viewport3DProps {
  lightingMode: 'day' | 'night';
  onLightingModeChange: (mode: 'day' | 'night') => void;
  activeTool: string;
  toolSettings: {
    snapToGrid: boolean;
    gridSize: number;
    cursorEnabled: boolean;
    cursorShowAxisLines: boolean;
    surfacePaintEnabled?: boolean;
    surfacePaintBrushSize?: number;
    surfacePaintColor?: string;
    showRulerPreviewPlanes?: boolean;
  };
  onToolSettingsChange?: (settings: Partial<Viewport3DProps['toolSettings']>) => void;
  selectedObjectId: string | null;
  onSelectObject?: (id: string | null) => void;
  objects: SceneObject[];
  onObjectsChange?: (objects: SceneObject[]) => void;
  onAddObject?: (type: SceneObject['type']) => void;
  onDeleteObject?: (id: string) => void;
  // Cross-canvas painting (2D canvas -> 3D UV painting)
  crossCanvasPaint?: {
    enabled: boolean;
    mode: 'stamp' | 'clone' | 'brush';
    sourceCanvas: HTMLCanvasElement | null;
    anchor: { canvas: { x: number; y: number } } | null;
    brushSize: number; // pixels (relative to source canvas)
    brushOpacity: number; // 0-1
  };
  // Ghost preview for snap system
  ghostPosition?: THREE.Vector3 | null;
  ghostSnapOption?: string | null;
  ghostEnabled?: boolean;
  onSceneReady?: (scene: THREE.Scene) => void;
  // Ruler system
  showRulers?: boolean;
  guidePlanes?: GuidePlane[];
  onAddGuidePlane?: (plane: Omit<GuidePlane, 'id' | 'createdAt'>) => void;
  onUpdateGuidePlane?: (id: string, updates: Partial<GuidePlane>) => void;
  onDeleteGuidePlane?: (id: string) => void;
  showRulerPreviewPlanes?: boolean; // Toggle for in-view hover preview planes
  // View History system
  onCameraReady?: (camera: THREE.Camera) => void;
  onOrbitControlsReady?: (controls: any) => void;
  // ReferencePack system (Modelmaker Phase 1)
  referencePack?: import('../modelmaker/reference-pack').ReferencePack | null;
  // Curve-First Generator system (Modelmaker Phase 1)
  baseMeshGeometry?: THREE.BufferGeometry | null;
  // External control props (for bottom bar)
  cameraPreset?: CameraPreset;
  onCameraPresetChange?: (preset: CameraPreset) => void;
  renderMode?: RenderMode;
  onRenderModeChange?: (mode: RenderMode) => void;
  xrayMode?: boolean;
  onXrayModeChange?: (enabled: boolean) => void;
  showStats?: boolean;
  onToggleStats?: () => void;
  stats?: { fps: number; triangles: number; calls: number };
  onStatsChange?: (stats: { fps: number; triangles: number; calls: number }) => void;
  // Surface cursor state (for bottom bar display)
  onSurfaceCursorStateChange?: (state: {
    isOnSurface: boolean;
    angle: number;
    brushSize: number;
    hitUV: { x: number; y: number } | null;
    surfaceObjectId: string | null;
  } | null) => void;
  // Guide planes exposure (for bottom bar)
  onGuidePlanesChange?: (planes: GuidePlane[]) => void;
  // Expose guide plane operations (for bottom bar dropdown)
  onGuidePlaneOperationsReady?: (operations: {
    deleteGuidePlane: (id: string) => void;
    clearAllGuidePlanes: () => void;
  }) => void;
  // Highlight control (for bottom bar dropdown)
  highlightedPlaneId?: string | null;
}

type CameraPreset = 'perspective' | 'front' | 'back' | 'top' | 'left' | 'right';

// ============================================================================
// CAMERA PRESETS
// ============================================================================

const CAMERA_PRESETS: Record<CameraPreset, { position: [number, number, number]; name: string }> = {
  perspective: { position: [5, 5, 5], name: 'Perspective' },
  front: { position: [0, 0, 10], name: 'Front' },
  back: { position: [0, 0, -10], name: 'Back' },
  top: { position: [0, 10, 0], name: 'Top' },
  left: { position: [-10, 0, 0], name: 'Left' },
  right: { position: [10, 0, 0], name: 'Right' },
};

// ============================================================================
// SKY BACKGROUND (Clean Implementation)
// ============================================================================

function SkyBackground({ mode }: { mode: 'day' | 'night' }) {
  const { scene } = useThree();
  
  // Set background color based on mode
  scene.background = new THREE.Color(mode === 'day' ? '#87CEEB' : '#1a1a2e');
  
  // Only render stars at night
  if (mode === 'night') {
    return <Stars radius={100} depth={50} count={200} factor={4} fade speed={1} />;
  }
  
  return null;
}

// ============================================================================
// LIGHTING (Clean Implementation)
// ============================================================================

function Lighting({ mode }: { mode: 'day' | 'night' }) {
  const intensity = mode === 'day' ? 1.5 : 1.0;
  const ambientIntensity = mode === 'day' ? 0.5 : 0.3;
  
  return (
    <>
      {/* Ambient light */}
      <ambientLight intensity={ambientIntensity} />
      
      {/* Main directional light (sun/moon) */}
      <directionalLight
        position={[10, 10, 5]}
        intensity={intensity}
        castShadow
        shadow-mapSize={[1024, 1024]}
        shadow-camera-far={50}
        shadow-camera-left={-10}
        shadow-camera-right={10}
        shadow-camera-top={10}
        shadow-camera-bottom={-10}
      />
      
      {/* Fill light */}
      <directionalLight
        position={[-5, 5, -5]}
        intensity={mode === 'day' ? 0.3 : 0.2}
        color={mode === 'day' ? '#ffd700' : '#4f46e5'}
      />
      
      {/* Point light for highlights */}
      <pointLight
        position={[0, 5, 0]}
        intensity={mode === 'day' ? 0.2 : 0.1}
        color={mode === 'day' ? '#ffffff' : '#8b5cf6'}
      />
    </>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// GRID SYSTEM (Using drei - proven library)
// ============================================================================

function GridSystem({ visible, size }: { visible: boolean; size: number }) {
  if (!visible) return null;
  
  return (
    <Grid
      position={[0, -0.01, 0]}
      args={[100, 100]}
      cellSize={size}
      cellThickness={0.5}
      sectionSize={size * 5}
      sectionThickness={1}
      sectionColor="#8b5cf6"
      cellColor="#444444"
      fadeDistance={50}
      fadeStrength={1}
      infiniteGrid
    />
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// 3D CURSOR (Clean rebuild of Lumin concept)
// ============================================================================

function Cursor3D({ 
  enabled, 
  showAxisLines,
  snapToGrid,
  gridSize,
}: { 
  enabled: boolean; 
  showAxisLines: boolean;
  snapToGrid: boolean;
  gridSize: number;
}) {
  const [position, setPosition] = useState<[number, number, number]>([0, 0, 0]);
  const { raycaster, camera, pointer } = useThree();
  
  useFrame(() => {
    if (!enabled) return;
    
    // Raycast to ground plane
    raycaster.setFromCamera(pointer, camera);
    const groundPlane = new THREE.Plane(new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0), 0);
    const intersection = new THREE.Vector3();
    raycaster.ray.intersectPlane(groundPlane, intersection);
    
    if (intersection) {
      let x = intersection.x;
      let z = intersection.z;
      
      // Snap to grid if enabled
      if (snapToGrid) {
        x = Math.round(x / gridSize) * gridSize;
        z = Math.round(z / gridSize) * gridSize;
      }
      
      setPosition([x, 0, z]);
    }
  });
  
  if (!enabled) return null;
  
  const lineLength = 1.5;
  
  return (
    <group position={position}>
      {/* Center sphere */}
      <mesh>
        <sphereGeometry args={[0.05, 16, 16]} />
        <meshBasicMaterial color="#ffffff" transparent opacity={0.8} />
      </mesh>
      
      {/* Axis lines */}
      {showAxisLines && (
        <>
          {/* X axis (Red) */}
          <Line
            points={[[-lineLength, 0, 0], [lineLength, 0, 0]]}
            color="#ef4444"
            lineWidth={2}
          />
          {/* Y axis (Green) */}
          <Line
            points={[[0, 0, 0], [0, lineLength, 0]]}
            color="#22c55e"
            lineWidth={2}
          />
          {/* Z axis (Blue) */}
          <Line
            points={[[0, 0, -lineLength], [0, 0, lineLength]]}
            color="#3b82f6"
            lineWidth={2}
          />
        </>
      )}
      
      {/* Position label */}
      <Html position={[0.5, 0.3, 0]} style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }}>
        <div className="bg-gray-900/90 text-white text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono whitespace-nowrap">
          {position[0].toFixed(1)}, {position[1].toFixed(1)}, {position[2].toFixed(1)}
        </div>
      </Html>
    </group>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// SURFACE CURSOR - Sticks to object surfaces for 3D painting
// ============================================================================

function SurfaceCursor({ 
  enabled,
  brushSize,
  onBrushSizeChange,
  objects,
  angle,
  onAngleChange,
  lockObjectId,
  preview,
  onStateChange,
}: { 
  enabled: boolean;
  brushSize: number;
  onBrushSizeChange: (size: number) => void;
  objects: SceneObject[];
  angle: number; // External angle state
  onAngleChange: (angle: number) => void; // Callback to update angle
  /** When set, the cursor raycasts ONLY against this object (reduces jitter while painting). */
  lockObjectId?: string | null;
  /** Optional 2D preview shown inside the cursor ring (useful for cross-canvas stamping). */
  preview?: {
    sourceCanvas: HTMLCanvasElement;
    sourcePoint: { x: number; y: number };
    brushSizePx: number;
  } | null;
  /** Callback to expose cursor state for bottom bar display */
  onStateChange?: (state: {
    isOnSurface: boolean;
    angle: number;
    brushSize: number;
    hitUV: { x: number; y: number } | null;
    surfaceObjectId: string | null;
  }) => void;
}) {
  const [position, setPosition] = useState<[number, number, number]>([0, 0, 0]);
  const [normal, setNormal] = useState<[number, number, number]>([0, 1, 0]);
  const angleDeg = angle; // Use external angle state
  const [isOnSurface, setIsOnSurface] = useState(false);
  const [surfaceObjectId, setSurfaceObjectId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [hitUV, setHitUV] = useState<{x: number, y: number} | null>(null);
  const { raycaster, camera, pointer, scene, gl, controls } = useThree();
  const groupRef = useRef<THREE.Group>(null);
  const smoothedPosRef = useRef<THREE.Vector3>(new THREE.Vector3());
  const smoothedNormalRef = useRef<THREE.Vector3>(new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0));
  const hasSmoothingRef = useRef<boolean>(false);
  const targetNormalRef = useRef<THREE.Vector3>(new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0));
  const committedNormalRef = useRef<THREE.Vector3>(new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0));
  const lastRawPosRef = useRef<THREE.Vector3>(new THREE.Vector3());
  const lastHitPosRef = useRef<THREE.Vector3>(new THREE.Vector3());
  const lastHitNormalRef = useRef<THREE.Vector3>(new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0));
  const lastHitObjectIdRef = useRef<string | null>(null);
  const surfaceTimerRef = useRef<number>(0);
  const offSurfaceTimerRef = useRef<number>(0);
  const normalCommitTimerRef = useRef<number>(0);
  const isRightClickHeldRef = useRef<boolean>(false);
  const previewCanvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement | null>(null);
  const previewTextureRef = useRef<THREE.CanvasTexture | null>(null);
  const [previewTexture, setPreviewTexture] = useState<THREE.CanvasTexture | null>(null);

  // Build a small circular preview texture from the 2D source (used for cross-canvas stamping)
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!preview?.sourceCanvas) {
      if (previewTextureRef.current) {
        previewTextureRef.current.dispose();
        previewTextureRef.current = null;
      }
      previewCanvasRef.current = null;
      setPreviewTexture(null);
      return;
    }

    const PREVIEW_SIZE = 256;

    if (!previewCanvasRef.current) {
      const c = document.createElement('canvas');
      c.width = PREVIEW_SIZE;
      c.height = PREVIEW_SIZE;
      previewCanvasRef.current = c;
    }

    const c = previewCanvasRef.current;
    const ctx = c.getContext('2d');
    if (!ctx) return;

    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, PREVIEW_SIZE, PREVIEW_SIZE);
    ctx.save();
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(PREVIEW_SIZE / 2, PREVIEW_SIZE / 2, PREVIEW_SIZE / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.clip();

    const sourceCanvas = preview.sourceCanvas;
    const halfSrc = preview.brushSizePx / 2;
    let sx = Math.round(preview.sourcePoint.x - halfSrc);
    let sy = Math.round(preview.sourcePoint.y - halfSrc);
    let sw = Math.round(preview.brushSizePx);
    let sh = Math.round(preview.brushSizePx);

    if (sx < 0) { sw += sx; sx = 0; }
    if (sy < 0) { sh += sy; sy = 0; }
    if (sx + sw > sourceCanvas.width) sw = sourceCanvas.width - sx;
    if (sy + sh > sourceCanvas.height) sh = sourceCanvas.height - sy;

    if (sw > 0 && sh > 0) {
      ctx.drawImage(sourceCanvas, sx, sy, sw, sh, 0, 0, PREVIEW_SIZE, PREVIEW_SIZE);
    }

    ctx.restore();

    if (!previewTextureRef.current) {
      const tex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(c);
      tex.needsUpdate = true;
      previewTextureRef.current = tex;
      setPreviewTexture(tex);
    } else {
      previewTextureRef.current.needsUpdate = true;
      // Force rerender if needed
      setPreviewTexture(previewTextureRef.current);
    }
  }, [preview?.sourceCanvas, preview?.sourcePoint.x, preview?.sourcePoint.y, preview?.brushSizePx]);

  const getWorldNormalFromHit = useCallback((hit: THREE.Intersection): THREE.Vector3 => {
    const mesh = hit.object as THREE.Mesh;
    const face = hit.face;
    const geom = mesh.geometry as THREE.BufferGeometry | undefined;

    // Default to face normal (local)
    let n = (face?.normal ? face.normal.clone() : new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0));

    // If available, compute interpolated normal for smoother cursor orientation (reduces triangle jitter)
    try {
      if (geom && face) {
        const posAttr = geom.getAttribute('position') as THREE.BufferAttribute | undefined;
        const nAttr = geom.getAttribute('normal') as THREE.BufferAttribute | undefined;
        if (posAttr && nAttr) {
          const a = face.a;
          const b = face.b;
          const c = face.c;

          const vA = new THREE.Vector3(posAttr.getX(a), posAttr.getY(a), posAttr.getZ(a));
          const vB = new THREE.Vector3(posAttr.getX(b), posAttr.getY(b), posAttr.getZ(b));
          const vC = new THREE.Vector3(posAttr.getX(c), posAttr.getY(c), posAttr.getZ(c));

          const localPoint = mesh.worldToLocal(hit.point.clone());
          const bary = new THREE.Vector3();
          THREE.Triangle.getBarycoord(localPoint, vA, vB, vC, bary);

          const nA = new THREE.Vector3(nAttr.getX(a), nAttr.getY(a), nAttr.getZ(a));
          const nB = new THREE.Vector3(nAttr.getX(b), nAttr.getY(b), nAttr.getZ(b));
          const nC = new THREE.Vector3(nAttr.getX(c), nAttr.getY(c), nAttr.getZ(c));

          n = nA.multiplyScalar(bary.x)
            .add(nB.multiplyScalar(bary.y))
            .add(nC.multiplyScalar(bary.z))
            .normalize();
        }
      }
    } catch {
      // fall back to face normal
    }

    // Transform to world space (use normal matrix for correct scaling behavior)
    try {
      const normalMatrix = new THREE.Matrix3().getNormalMatrix(mesh.matrixWorld);
      n.applyMatrix3(normalMatrix).normalize();
    } catch {
      // fallback (should be rare)
      n.normalize();
    }
    return n;
  }, []);
  
  // Handle scroll to adjust brush angle (15° increments like 2D stamp)
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!enabled) return;
    
    const dom = gl.domElement;

    const handleMouseDown = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (e.button === 2) {
        isRightClickHeldRef.current = true;
      }
    };

    const handleMouseUp = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (e.button === 2) {
        isRightClickHeldRef.current = false;
      }
    };

    const handleContextMenu = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      // Prevent the browser context menu inside the viewport
      e.preventDefault();
    };

    const handleWheel = (e: WheelEvent) => {
      // Right-click + scroll = zoom via OrbitControls
      if (isRightClickHeldRef.current) {
        e.preventDefault();
        // Manually trigger OrbitControls zoom (dolly)
        if (controls && 'dolly' in controls) {
          const zoomSpeed = 0.1;
          const delta = e.deltaY > 0 ? -zoomSpeed : zoomSpeed;
          (controls as any).dolly(delta, false);
          (controls as any).update();
        }
        return;
      }

      // Regular scroll (no right-click) = brush angle/size
      e.preventDefault();
      // Shift + scroll = change brush size, otherwise change angle
      if (e.shiftKey) {
        const newSize = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(5, brushSize + e.deltaY * -0.002));
        onBrushSizeChange(newSize);
      } else {
        // 15° increments like the 2D stamp app
        const delta = e.deltaY > 0 ? 15 : -15;
        let newAngle = angleDeg + delta;
        if (newAngle < 0) newAngle += 360;
        if (newAngle >= 360) newAngle -= 360;
        onAngleChange(newAngle);
      }
    };
    
    dom.addEventListener('mousedown', handleMouseDown);
    dom.addEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
    window.addEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp); // catch mouseup outside canvas
    dom.addEventListener('contextmenu', handleContextMenu);
    dom.addEventListener('wheel', handleWheel, { passive: false });
    return () => {
      dom.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleMouseDown);
      dom.removeEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
      window.removeEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
      dom.removeEventListener('contextmenu', handleContextMenu);
      dom.removeEventListener('wheel', handleWheel as any);
    };
  }, [enabled, gl, brushSize, onBrushSizeChange, angleDeg, onAngleChange]);
  
  useFrame((_, delta) => {
    if (!enabled) return;
    
    // Tuned based on the reference app (3d-canvas-studio) to feel "magnetic" and stable.
    const SURFACE_HOLD_TIME = 0.15;        // seconds to hold last hit when briefly losing contact
    const MIN_SURFACE_CONFIDENCE = 0.03;   // seconds on surface before confirming "on surface"
    const VELOCITY_THRESHOLD = 0.15;       // world units/frame threshold for fast vs slow smoothing
    const POSITION_LERP_MIN = 0.25;        // lerp when moving fast (lower = more lag)
    const POSITION_LERP_MAX = 0.65;        // lerp when moving slow (higher = snappier)
    const NORMAL_LERP_MIN = 0.22;
    const NORMAL_LERP_MAX = 0.55;
    const NORMAL_COMMIT_DELAY = 0.05;      // seconds to commit to a new stable normal
    const MAX_NORMAL_CHANGE_RATE = 45;     // degrees per frame @ 60fps (edge handling)
    const SURFACE_OFFSET = 0.01;           // units to offset cursor above surface (prevents z-fighting, increased for floor visibility)
    const GROUND_PLANE_Y = -0.01;          // Y position of ground plane (matches Grid position)

    // Determine raycast targets: locked object (while painting) OR all paintable meshes
    let targets: THREE.Object3D[] = [];
    if (lockObjectId) {
      const locked = scene.getObjectByName(lockObjectId);
      if (locked) targets = [locked];
    }

    if (targets.length === 0) {
      // Prefer known paintable objects by id (avoids intersecting helpers/overlays)
      const resolved: THREE.Object3D[] = [];
      for (const obj of objects) {
        const found = scene.getObjectByName(obj.id);
        if (found) resolved.push(found);
      }
      targets = resolved;

      // Fallback: traverse scene if nothing resolved (should be rare)
      if (targets.length === 0) {
        const meshes: THREE.Mesh[] = [];
        scene.traverse((child) => {
          if (!(child instanceof THREE.Mesh)) return;
          if (child.userData.isSurfaceCursor === true) return;
          const lucidId = child.userData?.lucidObjectId ?? child.name;
          if (typeof lucidId === 'string' && lucidId.length > 0) {
            meshes.push(child);
          }
        });
        targets = meshes;
      }
    }

    // NOTE: We MUST keep the cursor visually aligned with the mouse pointer.
    // Multi-ray sampling (offset rays) can cause the cursor to appear "off" by several pixels
    // and jump between offsets, so we always use the center ray and rely on smoothing/hold-time
    // for stability.
    raycaster.setFromCamera(pointer, camera);
    const intersects = raycaster.intersectObjects(targets, true);
    const bestHit: THREE.Intersection | null = intersects.length > 0 ? intersects[0] : null;
    
    // Also check ground plane for grid magnetism (always available, even when no mesh hit)
    const groundPlane = new THREE.Plane(new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0), -GROUND_PLANE_Y);
    const groundIntersection = new THREE.Vector3();
    const hasGroundHit = raycaster.ray.intersectPlane(groundPlane, groundIntersection);
    
    let hitSurface = false;
    const rawPos = new THREE.Vector3();
    const rawNormal = new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0);
    let nextHitUV: { x: number; y: number } | null = null;
    let nextObjectId: string | null = null;

    if (bestHit) {
      // Mesh hit takes priority
      hitSurface = true;
      rawPos.copy(bestHit.point);
      rawNormal.copy(getWorldNormalFromHit(bestHit));

      // Timers
      surfaceTimerRef.current += delta;
      offSurfaceTimerRef.current = 0;

      // Track last hit for "hold" behavior
      lastHitPosRef.current.copy(bestHit.point);
      lastHitNormalRef.current.copy(rawNormal);

      // UV readout (debug)
      if (bestHit.uv) {
        nextHitUV = { x: bestHit.uv.x, y: bestHit.uv.y };
      }

      // Resolve object id (stable)
      const rawId = lockObjectId ?? (bestHit.object as any).userData?.lucidObjectId ?? bestHit.object.name ?? null;
      nextObjectId = rawId && objects.some(o => o.id === rawId) ? rawId : null;
      lastHitObjectIdRef.current = nextObjectId;
    } else if (hasGroundHit) {
      // No mesh hit, but ground plane hit (grid magnetism)
      hitSurface = true; // Treat ground as a valid surface
      rawPos.copy(groundIntersection);
      rawNormal.set(0, 1, 0); // Ground always has up normal

      // Timers
      surfaceTimerRef.current += delta;
      offSurfaceTimerRef.current = 0;

      // Track last hit for "hold" behavior
      lastHitPosRef.current.copy(groundIntersection);
      lastHitNormalRef.current.copy(rawNormal);

      // Ground has no UV or object ID
      nextHitUV = null;
      nextObjectId = null; // Ground is not a paintable object
      lastHitObjectIdRef.current = null;
    } else {
      // Lost surface contact (no mesh, no ground)
      surfaceTimerRef.current = 0;
      offSurfaceTimerRef.current += delta;
      normalCommitTimerRef.current = 0;

      if (offSurfaceTimerRef.current < SURFACE_HOLD_TIME && hasSmoothingRef.current) {
        // Hold last known surface point briefly (reduces edge flicker)
        rawPos.copy(lastHitPosRef.current);
        rawNormal.copy(lastHitNormalRef.current);
        nextObjectId = lastHitObjectIdRef.current;
      } else {
        // No valid surface, keep cursor at last smoothed position
        if (hasSmoothingRef.current) {
          rawPos.copy(smoothedPosRef.current);
        }
        rawNormal.copy(committedNormalRef.current);
        nextObjectId = null;
      }
    }

    // Velocity-based smoothing (fast moves get more smoothing)
    const velMag = rawPos.clone().sub(lastRawPosRef.current).length();
    lastRawPosRef.current.copy(rawPos);
    const velocityFactor = Math.min(velMag / VELOCITY_THRESHOLD, 1);
    const positionLerp = THREE.MathUtils.lerp(POSITION_LERP_MAX, POSITION_LERP_MIN, velocityFactor);
    const normalLerp = THREE.MathUtils.lerp(NORMAL_LERP_MAX, NORMAL_LERP_MIN, velocityFactor);

    // Initialize on first valid frame
    if (!hasSmoothingRef.current) {
      smoothedPosRef.current.copy(rawPos);
      smoothedNormalRef.current.copy(rawNormal);
      targetNormalRef.current.copy(rawNormal);
      committedNormalRef.current.copy(rawNormal);
      hasSmoothingRef.current = true;
    } else {
      smoothedPosRef.current.lerp(rawPos, positionLerp);
    }

    // Normal target + edge rate limiting + commit delay
    if (hitSurface && surfaceTimerRef.current > MIN_SURFACE_CONFIDENCE) {
      const dot = THREE.MathUtils.clamp(targetNormalRef.current.dot(rawNormal), -1, 1);
      const angleDiff = Math.acos(dot) * (180 / Math.PI);
      const maxChange = MAX_NORMAL_CHANGE_RATE * delta * 60;
      if (angleDiff <= maxChange) {
        targetNormalRef.current.copy(rawNormal);
      } else {
        const t = maxChange / Math.max(1e-6, angleDiff);
        targetNormalRef.current.lerp(rawNormal, t).normalize();
      }

      normalCommitTimerRef.current += delta;
      if (normalCommitTimerRef.current > NORMAL_COMMIT_DELAY) {
        committedNormalRef.current.copy(targetNormalRef.current);
      }
    } else if (!hitSurface) {
      // Off surface: hold last normal briefly, otherwise keep committed
      if (offSurfaceTimerRef.current < SURFACE_HOLD_TIME) {
        targetNormalRef.current.copy(lastHitNormalRef.current);
      } else {
        targetNormalRef.current.copy(committedNormalRef.current);
      }
    }

    smoothedNormalRef.current.lerp(targetNormalRef.current, normalLerp).normalize();

    // Apply surface offset to prevent z-fighting (cursor floats slightly above surface)
    // Use larger offset for floor to ensure visibility above grid
    const isOnFloor = nextObjectId === null && !hitSurface ? false : (nextObjectId === null);
    const effectiveOffset = isOnFloor ? SURFACE_OFFSET * 2 : SURFACE_OFFSET;
    const offsetPos = smoothedPosRef.current.clone().add(
      smoothedNormalRef.current.clone().multiplyScalar(effectiveOffset)
    );

    setPosition([offsetPos.x, offsetPos.y, offsetPos.z]);
    setNormal([smoothedNormalRef.current.x, smoothedNormalRef.current.y, smoothedNormalRef.current.z]);
    setIsOnSurface(hitSurface && surfaceTimerRef.current > MIN_SURFACE_CONFIDENCE);
    setHitUV(nextHitUV);
    setSurfaceObjectId(nextObjectId);
  });

  // Expose state to parent for bottom bar display
  useEffect(() => {
    if (onStateChange) {
      onStateChange({
        isOnSurface: isOnSurface,
        angle: angleDeg,
        brushSize: brushSize,
        hitUV: hitUV,
        surfaceObjectId: surfaceObjectId,
      });
    }
  }, [isOnSurface, angleDeg, brushSize, hitUV, surfaceObjectId, onStateChange]);
  
  // Calculate rotation to align with surface normal + user angle
  const quaternion = useMemo(() => {
    const up = new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0);
    const normalVec = new THREE.Vector3(...normal);
    const quat = new THREE.Quaternion().setFromUnitVectors(up, normalVec);
    
    // Apply user angle rotation around the normal (convert degrees to radians)
    const angleRad = (angleDeg * Math.PI) / 180;
    const angleQuat = new THREE.Quaternion().setFromAxisAngle(normalVec, angleRad);
    quat.premultiply(angleQuat);
    
    return quat;
  }, [normal, angleDeg]);
  
  if (!enabled) return null;
  
  const ringColor = isOnSurface ? '#22c55e' : '#8b5cf6'; // Green on surface, purple on ground
  const indicatorLength = brushSize * 0.9;
  
  return (
    <group ref={groupRef} position={position} quaternion={quaternion} renderOrder={1000}>
      {/* Outer brush ring */}
      <mesh rotation={[-Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]} userData={{ isSurfaceCursor: true }} renderOrder={1000}>
        <ringGeometry args={[brushSize * 0.85, brushSize, 48]} />
        <meshBasicMaterial 
          color={ringColor} 
          transparent 
          opacity={0.7} 
          side={THREE.DoubleSide}
          depthTest={true}
          depthWrite={false}
        />
      </mesh>
      
      {/* Inner brush ring (for hardness preview) */}
      <mesh rotation={[-Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]} userData={{ isSurfaceCursor: true }} renderOrder={1000}>
        <ringGeometry args={[brushSize * 0.4, brushSize * 0.5, 32]} />
        <meshBasicMaterial 
          color={ringColor} 
          transparent 
          opacity={0.3} 
          side={THREE.DoubleSide}
          depthTest={true}
          depthWrite={false}
        />
      </mesh>
      
      {/* Filled center (soft brush preview) */}
      <mesh rotation={[-Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]} userData={{ isSurfaceCursor: true }} renderOrder={1000}>
        <circleGeometry args={[brushSize * 0.4, 32]} />
        <meshBasicMaterial 
          color={ringColor} 
          transparent 
          opacity={0.15} 
          side={THREE.DoubleSide}
          depthTest={true}
          depthWrite={false}
        />
      </mesh>

      {/* Optional 2D source preview (for cross-canvas stamp/clone) */}
      {previewTexture && (
        <mesh rotation={[-Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]} position={[0, 0.002, 0]} userData={{ isSurfaceCursor: true }} renderOrder={1001}>
          <circleGeometry args={[brushSize * 0.75, 48]} />
          <meshBasicMaterial
            map={previewTexture}
            transparent
            opacity={0.45}
            side={THREE.DoubleSide}
            depthTest={false}
            depthWrite={false}
          />
        </mesh>
      )}
      
      {/* Center dot */}
      <mesh userData={{ isSurfaceCursor: true }} renderOrder={1000}>
        <sphereGeometry args={[0.02, 16, 16]} />
        <meshBasicMaterial 
          color="#ffffff" 
          side={THREE.DoubleSide}
          depthTest={true}
          depthWrite={false}
        />
      </mesh>
      
      {/* Reference angle indicator (0° - white semi-transparent, like 2D stamp) */}
      <Line
        points={[[brushSize * 0.5, 0.02, 0], [indicatorLength, 0.02, 0]]}
        color="#ffffff"
        lineWidth={2}
        transparent
        opacity={0.4}
      />
      
      {/* Current angle indicator (cyan like 2D stamp) */}
      <group rotation={[0, (angleDeg * Math.PI) / 180, 0]}>
        <Line
          points={[[brushSize * 0.5, 0.02, 0], [indicatorLength, 0.02, 0]]}
          color="#00d4ff"
          lineWidth={3}
        />
        {/* Arrow head */}
        <mesh position={[indicatorLength - 0.05, 0.02, 0]} rotation={[0, 0, -Math.PI / 2]} userData={{ isSurfaceCursor: true }}>
          <coneGeometry args={[0.03, 0.08, 8]} />
          <meshBasicMaterial color="#00d4ff" />
        </mesh>
      </group>
      
      {/* Normal indicator (shows surface direction) */}
      <Line
        points={[[0, 0, 0], [0, brushSize * 0.4, 0]]}
        color={ringColor}
        lineWidth={1}
        transparent
        opacity={0.3}
      />
      
      {/* Cross-hair lines */}
      <Line
        points={[[-brushSize * 0.15, 0.01, 0], [brushSize * 0.15, 0.01, 0]]}
        color="#ffffff"
        lineWidth={1}
        transparent
        opacity={0.5}
      />
      <Line
        points={[[0, 0.01, -brushSize * 0.15], [0, 0.01, brushSize * 0.15]]}
        color="#ffffff"
        lineWidth={1}
        transparent
        opacity={0.5}
      />
      
      {/* Info label removed - now shown in bottom bar for better performance */}
    </group>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// TEXTURE PAINT SYSTEM - Paint on 3D objects with existing texture support
// ============================================================================

const TEXTURE_SIZE = 1024; // 1024x1024 texture resolution

interface TexturePaintState {
  objectId: string;
  canvas: HTMLCanvasElement;
  context: CanvasRenderingContext2D;
  texture: THREE.CanvasTexture;
  baseImage?: HTMLImageElement; // Original texture if any
  isDirty: boolean;
}

// Global store for paint canvases (persists across renders)
const texturePaintStore = new Map<string, TexturePaintState>();

function useTexturePaint() {
  // Initialize paint canvas for an object
  const initPaintCanvas = useCallback((objectId: string, baseTextureUrl?: string): TexturePaintState => {
    // Check if already exists
    if (texturePaintStore.has(objectId)) {
      return texturePaintStore.get(objectId)!;
    }
    
    // Create new canvas
    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    canvas.width = TEXTURE_SIZE;
    canvas.height = TEXTURE_SIZE;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')!;
    
    // Fill with base color (white/gray checkerboard for visibility)
    const tileSize = 64;
    for (let y = 0; y < TEXTURE_SIZE; y += tileSize) {
      for (let x = 0; x < TEXTURE_SIZE; x += tileSize) {
        ctx.fillStyle = ((x + y) / tileSize) % 2 === 0 ? '#e0e0e0' : '#ffffff';
        ctx.fillRect(x, y, tileSize, tileSize);
      }
    }
    
    // Create THREE.js texture
    const texture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(canvas);
    texture.wrapS = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
    texture.wrapT = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
    texture.needsUpdate = true;
    
    const state: TexturePaintState = {
      objectId,
      canvas,
      context: ctx,
      texture,
      isDirty: false,
    };
    
    // Load base texture if provided
    if (baseTextureUrl) {
      const img = new Image();
      img.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';
      img.onload = () => {
        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, TEXTURE_SIZE, TEXTURE_SIZE);
        state.baseImage = img;
        texture.needsUpdate = true;
      };
      img.src = baseTextureUrl;
    }
    
    texturePaintStore.set(objectId, state);
    return state;
  }, []);
  
  // Paint at UV coordinates
  const paintAtUV = useCallback((
    objectId: string,
    uv: { x: number; y: number },
    color: string,
    brushSize: number,
    opacity: number,
    angleDeg: number
  ) => {
    const state = texturePaintStore.get(objectId);
    if (!state) return;
    
    const { canvas, context, texture } = state;
    const ctx = context;
    
    // Convert UV (0-1) to pixel coordinates
    // Note: UV y is typically flipped in 3D
    const texX = uv.x * TEXTURE_SIZE;
    const texY = (1 - uv.y) * TEXTURE_SIZE;
    
    // Calculate brush size in pixels
    const brushRadius = (brushSize / 2) * TEXTURE_SIZE * 0.1; // Scale appropriately
    
    ctx.save();
    ctx.globalAlpha = opacity;
    ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
    
    // Create circular brush with rotation
    ctx.translate(texX, texY);
    ctx.rotate((angleDeg * Math.PI) / 180);
    
    // Create radial gradient for soft brush
    const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(0, 0, 0, 0, 0, brushRadius);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, color);
    gradient.addColorStop(0.7, color);
    gradient.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
    
    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(0, 0, brushRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    
    ctx.restore();
    
    // Mark texture as needing update
    texture.needsUpdate = true;
    state.isDirty = true;
  }, []);
  
  // Interpolate paint strokes between two UV points
  const paintStroke = useCallback((
    objectId: string,
    fromUV: { x: number; y: number },
    toUV: { x: number; y: number },
    color: string,
    brushSize: number,
    opacity: number,
    angleDeg: number,
    spacing: number = 0.25 // Spacing as fraction of brush size
  ) => {
    const dx = toUV.x - fromUV.x;
    const dy = toUV.y - fromUV.y;
    const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    
    // Spacing in UV coordinates
    const step = (brushSize * spacing) / TEXTURE_SIZE * 0.1;
    const steps = Math.max(1, Math.floor(distance / step));
    
    for (let i = 0; i <= steps; i++) {
      const t = i / steps;
      const uv = {
        x: fromUV.x + dx * t,
        y: fromUV.y + dy * t,
      };
      paintAtUV(objectId, uv, color, brushSize, opacity * 0.5, angleDeg); // Lower opacity for smooth strokes
    }
  }, [paintAtUV]);

  // Stamp pixels from a 2D source canvas onto the 3D paint canvas at UV coordinates.
  // Used by the split-view 2D→3D cross-canvas painting workflow.
  const stampFromCanvasAtUV = useCallback((
    objectId: string,
    uv: { x: number; y: number },
    sourceCanvas: HTMLCanvasElement,
    sourcePoint: { x: number; y: number },
    brushSizePx: number,
    opacity: number,
    angleDeg: number,
    mask: 'square' | 'circle' = 'square'
  ) => {
    // Ensure paint canvas exists
    if (!texturePaintStore.has(objectId)) {
      initPaintCanvas(objectId);
    }
    const state = texturePaintStore.get(objectId);
    if (!state) return;

    const { context: ctx, texture } = state;

    // Convert UV to target pixel coordinates
    const texX = uv.x * TEXTURE_SIZE;
    const texY = (1 - uv.y) * TEXTURE_SIZE;

    // Map brush size from source canvas pixels to target texture pixels (keep relative size)
    const scale = TEXTURE_SIZE / Math.max(1, Math.max(sourceCanvas.width, sourceCanvas.height));
    const targetSize = Math.max(1, Math.round(brushSizePx * scale));
    const halfTarget = targetSize / 2;

    // Source crop rect (centered at anchor)
    const halfSrc = brushSizePx / 2;
    let sx = Math.round(sourcePoint.x - halfSrc);
    let sy = Math.round(sourcePoint.y - halfSrc);
    let sw = Math.round(brushSizePx);
    let sh = Math.round(brushSizePx);

    // Clamp source rect to source canvas bounds
    if (sx < 0) {
      sw += sx;
      sx = 0;
    }
    if (sy < 0) {
      sh += sy;
      sy = 0;
    }
    if (sx + sw > sourceCanvas.width) sw = sourceCanvas.width - sx;
    if (sy + sh > sourceCanvas.height) sh = sourceCanvas.height - sy;
    if (sw <= 0 || sh <= 0) return;

    ctx.save();
    ctx.globalAlpha = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, opacity));
    ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';

    // Rotate stamp around the UV center
    ctx.translate(texX, texY);
    ctx.rotate((angleDeg * Math.PI) / 180);

    if (mask === 'circle') {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(0, 0, halfTarget, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.clip();
    }

    ctx.drawImage(
      sourceCanvas,
      sx, sy, sw, sh,
      -halfTarget, -halfTarget, targetSize, targetSize
    );

    ctx.restore();

    texture.needsUpdate = true;
    state.isDirty = true;
  }, [initPaintCanvas]);

  // Stroke helper for cross-canvas stamping
  const stampFromCanvasStroke = useCallback((
    objectId: string,
    fromUV: { x: number; y: number },
    toUV: { x: number; y: number },
    sourceCanvas: HTMLCanvasElement,
    sourcePoint: { x: number; y: number },
    brushSizePx: number,
    opacity: number,
    angleDeg: number,
    mask: 'square' | 'circle' = 'square',
    spacing: number = 0.35
  ) => {
    const dx = toUV.x - fromUV.x;
    const dy = toUV.y - fromUV.y;
    const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);

    const approxBrushUv = Math.max(1e-4, brushSizePx / Math.max(1, sourceCanvas.width));
    const step = Math.max(1e-4, approxBrushUv * spacing);
    const steps = Math.max(1, Math.floor(distance / step));

    for (let i = 0; i <= steps; i++) {
      const t = i / steps;
      stampFromCanvasAtUV(
        objectId,
        { x: fromUV.x + dx * t, y: fromUV.y + dy * t },
        sourceCanvas,
        sourcePoint,
        brushSizePx,
        opacity,
        angleDeg,
        mask
      );
    }
  }, [stampFromCanvasAtUV]);

  // Clone-stamp stroke: sample point moves across the source canvas based on UV delta since stroke start.
  const stampFromCanvasCloneStroke = useCallback((
    objectId: string,
    fromUV: { x: number; y: number },
    toUV: { x: number; y: number },
    sourceCanvas: HTMLCanvasElement,
    sourceAnchor: { x: number; y: number },
    startUV: { x: number; y: number },
    brushSizePx: number,
    opacity: number,
    angleDeg: number,
    mask: 'square' | 'circle' = 'square',
    spacing: number = 0.35
  ) => {
    const dx = toUV.x - fromUV.x;
    const dy = toUV.y - fromUV.y;
    const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);

    const approxBrushUv = Math.max(1e-4, brushSizePx / Math.max(1, sourceCanvas.width));
    const step = Math.max(1e-4, approxBrushUv * spacing);
    const steps = Math.max(1, Math.floor(distance / step));

    for (let i = 0; i <= steps; i++) {
      const t = i / steps;
      const uv = { x: fromUV.x + dx * t, y: fromUV.y + dy * t };
      const samplePoint = {
        x: sourceAnchor.x + (uv.x - startUV.x) * sourceCanvas.width,
        // UV increases upward; canvas Y increases downward
        y: sourceAnchor.y - (uv.y - startUV.y) * sourceCanvas.height,
      };
      stampFromCanvasAtUV(
        objectId,
        uv,
        sourceCanvas,
        samplePoint,
        brushSizePx,
        opacity,
        angleDeg,
        mask
      );
    }
  }, [stampFromCanvasAtUV]);
  
  // Get texture for an object (creates if doesn't exist)
  const getTexture = useCallback((objectId: string): THREE.CanvasTexture | null => {
    const state = texturePaintStore.get(objectId);
    return state?.texture || null;
  }, []);
  
  // Clear paint canvas (restore to base or checkerboard)
  const clearPaint = useCallback((objectId: string) => {
    const state = texturePaintStore.get(objectId);
    if (!state) return;
    
    const { canvas, context, texture, baseImage } = state;
    
    if (baseImage) {
      context.drawImage(baseImage, 0, 0, TEXTURE_SIZE, TEXTURE_SIZE);
    } else {
      // Restore checkerboard
      const tileSize = 64;
      for (let y = 0; y < TEXTURE_SIZE; y += tileSize) {
        for (let x = 0; x < TEXTURE_SIZE; x += tileSize) {
          context.fillStyle = ((x + y) / tileSize) % 2 === 0 ? '#e0e0e0' : '#ffffff';
          context.fillRect(x, y, tileSize, tileSize);
        }
      }
    }
    
    texture.needsUpdate = true;
    state.isDirty = false;
  }, []);
  
  // Export painted texture as data URL
  const exportTexture = useCallback((objectId: string): string | null => {
    const state = texturePaintStore.get(objectId);
    if (!state) return null;
    return state.canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
  }, []);
  
  return {
    initPaintCanvas,
    paintAtUV,
    paintStroke,
    stampFromCanvasAtUV,
    stampFromCanvasStroke,
    stampFromCanvasCloneStroke,
    getTexture,
    clearPaint,
    exportTexture,
  };
}

// ============================================================================
// PAINTABLE SCENE OBJECT - Extends SceneObject3D with painting capability
// ============================================================================

function PaintableSceneObject3D({ 
  object, 
  isSelected, 
  onClick,
  activeTool,
  crossCanvasPaint,
  onTransformChange,
  orbitControlsRef,
  onTransformStart,
  onTransformEnd,
  renderMode,
  xrayMode,
  paintColor,
  paintBrushSize,
  paintOpacity,
  paintAngle,
  onPaintStart,
  onPaintEnd,
}: { 
  object: SceneObject; 
  isSelected: boolean;
  onClick: () => void;
  activeTool: string;
  crossCanvasPaint?: Viewport3DProps['crossCanvasPaint'];
  onTransformChange: (id: string, position: [number, number, number], rotation: [number, number, number], scale: [number, number, number]) => void;
  orbitControlsRef: React.RefObject<any>;
  onTransformStart: () => void;
  onTransformEnd: () => void;
  renderMode: RenderMode;
  xrayMode: boolean;
  paintColor: string;
  paintBrushSize: number;
  paintOpacity: number;
  paintAngle: number;
  onPaintStart?: (objectId: string) => void;
  onPaintEnd?: () => void;
}) {
  const meshRef = useRef<THREE.Mesh>(null);
  const transformRef = useRef<any>(null);
  const [hovered, setHovered] = useState(false);
  const [lastPaintUV, setLastPaintUV] = useState<{x: number, y: number} | null>(null);
  const isPaintingRef = useRef(false);
  const cloneStartUVRef = useRef<{ x: number; y: number } | null>(null);
  
  const {
    initPaintCanvas,
    paintAtUV,
    paintStroke,
    stampFromCanvasAtUV,
    stampFromCanvasStroke,
    stampFromCanvasCloneStroke,
    getTexture,
  } = useTexturePaint();
  
  // Initialize paint canvas when object is created or texture changes
  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTool === 'surfacePaint' || (activeTool === 'paint' && crossCanvasPaint?.enabled)) {
      initPaintCanvas(object.id, object.textureUrl);
    }
  }, [object.id, object.textureUrl, activeTool, crossCanvasPaint?.enabled, initPaintCanvas]);
  
  // Get paint texture
  const paintTexture = useMemo(() => {
    if (activeTool === 'surfacePaint' || (activeTool === 'paint' && crossCanvasPaint?.enabled)) {
      return getTexture(object.id);
    }
    return null;
  }, [object.id, activeTool, crossCanvasPaint?.enabled, getTexture]);

  // Load base texture (AI-applied or user-provided) when NOT actively painting.
  const baseTextureRef = useRef<THREE.Texture | null>(null);
  const [baseTexture, setBaseTexture] = useState<THREE.Texture | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    let cancelled = false;

    // Dispose any previous texture on URL change.
    if (baseTextureRef.current) {
      baseTextureRef.current.dispose();
      baseTextureRef.current = null;
    }
    setBaseTexture(null);

    if (!object.textureUrl) {
      return () => {
        cancelled = true;
      };
    }

    const loader = new THREE.TextureLoader();
    loader.load(
      object.textureUrl,
      (tex) => {
        if (cancelled) {
          tex.dispose();
          return;
        }
        tex.wrapS = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
        tex.wrapT = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
        // three@0.180 uses colorSpace (not encoding)
        try {
          (tex as any).colorSpace = THREE.SRGBColorSpace;
        } catch {
          // ignore
        }
        baseTextureRef.current = tex;
        setBaseTexture(tex);
      },
      undefined,
      () => {
        if (!cancelled) {
          setBaseTexture(null);
        }
      }
    );

    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, [object.textureUrl]);
  
  // Get transform mode from active tool
  const getTransformMode = (): 'translate' | 'rotate' | 'scale' | undefined => {
    switch (activeTool) {
      case 'move': return 'translate';
      case 'rotate': return 'rotate';
      case 'scale': return 'scale';
      default: return undefined;
    }
  };
  
  const transformMode = getTransformMode();
  
  // Disable orbit controls while transforming
  useEffect(() => {
    if (transformRef.current) {
      const controls = transformRef.current;
      const callback = (event: any) => {
        if (event.value) {
          onTransformStart();
        } else {
          onTransformEnd();
        }
      };
      controls.addEventListener('dragging-changed', callback);
      return () => controls.removeEventListener('dragging-changed', callback);
    }
  }, [onTransformStart, onTransformEnd]);
  
  // Handle transform end
  const handleTransformEnd = () => {
    if (meshRef.current) {
      const pos = meshRef.current.position;
      const rot = meshRef.current.rotation;
      const scl = meshRef.current.scale;
      onTransformChange(
        object.id,
        [pos.x, pos.y, pos.z],
        [rot.x, rot.y, rot.z],
        [scl.x, scl.y, scl.z]
      );
    }
  };
  
  // Handle painting
  const handlePointerDown = (e: any) => {
    if (activeTool === 'surfacePaint' && e.uv) {
      e.stopPropagation();
      if (!isSelected) onClick();
      isPaintingRef.current = true;
      setLastPaintUV({ x: e.uv.x, y: e.uv.y });
      paintAtUV(object.id, { x: e.uv.x, y: e.uv.y }, paintColor, paintBrushSize, paintOpacity, paintAngle);
      onPaintStart?.(object.id);
    } else if (activeTool === 'paint' && crossCanvasPaint?.enabled && e.uv && crossCanvasPaint.sourceCanvas && crossCanvasPaint.anchor) {
      // Cross-canvas painting (2D canvas -> 3D UV)
      e.stopPropagation();
      if (!isSelected) onClick();
      isPaintingRef.current = true;
      setLastPaintUV({ x: e.uv.x, y: e.uv.y });
      cloneStartUVRef.current = crossCanvasPaint.mode === 'clone' ? { x: e.uv.x, y: e.uv.y } : null;

      const mask: 'square' | 'circle' = crossCanvasPaint.mode === 'brush' ? 'circle' : 'square';
      const sourcePoint = crossCanvasPaint.anchor.canvas;
      stampFromCanvasAtUV(
        object.id,
        { x: e.uv.x, y: e.uv.y },
        crossCanvasPaint.sourceCanvas,
        sourcePoint,
        crossCanvasPaint.brushSize,
        crossCanvasPaint.brushOpacity,
        paintAngle,
        mask
      );
      onPaintStart?.(object.id);
    } else {
      onClick();
    }
  };
  
  const handlePointerMove = (e: any) => {
    if (activeTool === 'surfacePaint' && isPaintingRef.current && e.uv && lastPaintUV) {
      e.stopPropagation();
      paintStroke(object.id, lastPaintUV, { x: e.uv.x, y: e.uv.y }, paintColor, paintBrushSize, paintOpacity, paintAngle);
      setLastPaintUV({ x: e.uv.x, y: e.uv.y });
    } else if (
      activeTool === 'paint' &&
      crossCanvasPaint?.enabled &&
      isPaintingRef.current &&
      e.uv &&
      lastPaintUV &&
      crossCanvasPaint.sourceCanvas &&
      crossCanvasPaint.anchor
    ) {
      e.stopPropagation();
      const nextUV = { x: e.uv.x, y: e.uv.y };
      const mask: 'square' | 'circle' = crossCanvasPaint.mode === 'brush' ? 'circle' : 'square';

      if (crossCanvasPaint.mode === 'clone' && cloneStartUVRef.current) {
        stampFromCanvasCloneStroke(
          object.id,
          lastPaintUV,
          nextUV,
          crossCanvasPaint.sourceCanvas,
          crossCanvasPaint.anchor.canvas,
          cloneStartUVRef.current,
          crossCanvasPaint.brushSize,
          crossCanvasPaint.brushOpacity,
          paintAngle,
          mask
        );
      } else {
        stampFromCanvasStroke(
          object.id,
          lastPaintUV,
          nextUV,
          crossCanvasPaint.sourceCanvas,
          crossCanvasPaint.anchor.canvas,
          crossCanvasPaint.brushSize,
          crossCanvasPaint.brushOpacity,
          paintAngle,
          mask
        );
      }
      setLastPaintUV({ x: e.uv.x, y: e.uv.y });
    }
  };
  
  const handlePointerUp = () => {
    if (isPaintingRef.current) {
      isPaintingRef.current = false;
      setLastPaintUV(null);
      cloneStartUVRef.current = null;
      onPaintEnd?.();
    }
  };
  
  if (!object.visible) return null;
  
  const selectedColor = new THREE.Color(object.color).lerp(new THREE.Color('#ffffff'), 0.3).getHexString();
  const isXrayTarget = xrayMode && isSelected;
  const isWireframe = renderMode === 'wireframe';
  const isXrayAll = renderMode === 'xray';
  const isPoints = renderMode === 'points';
  const isFlat = renderMode === 'flat';
  const isNormal = renderMode === 'normal';
  
  // For points mode, render as point cloud
  if (isPoints) {
    return (
      <points
        position={object.position}
        rotation={object.rotation}
        scale={object.scale}
        onClick={(e: any) => { e.stopPropagation(); onClick(); }}
      >
        {getGeometry(object.type)}
        <pointsMaterial 
          color={isSelected ? `#${selectedColor}` : object.color}
          size={0.05}
          sizeAttenuation
        />
      </points>
    );
  }
  
  return (
    <group>
      <mesh 
        ref={meshRef}
        name={object.id}
        userData={{ lucidObjectId: object.id }}
        position={object.position}
        rotation={object.rotation}
        scale={object.scale}
        castShadow={!isWireframe && !isXrayAll && !isFlat && !isNormal}
        receiveShadow={!isWireframe && !isXrayAll && !isFlat && !isNormal}
        onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); onClick(); }}
        onPointerDown={handlePointerDown}
        onPointerMove={handlePointerMove}
        onPointerUp={handlePointerUp}
        onPointerLeave={handlePointerUp}
        onPointerOver={() => setHovered(true)}
        onPointerOut={() => setHovered(false)}
      >
        {getGeometry(object.type)}
        {isWireframe ? (
          <meshBasicMaterial 
            color={isSelected ? `#${selectedColor}` : object.color}
            wireframe
          />
        ) : isFlat ? (
          <meshLambertMaterial 
            color={isSelected ? `#${selectedColor}` : object.color}
            flatShading
          />
        ) : isNormal ? (
          <meshNormalMaterial />
        ) : paintTexture && (activeTool === 'surfacePaint' || (activeTool === 'paint' && crossCanvasPaint?.enabled)) ? (
          // Use paint texture when painting (surface paint or cross-canvas paint)
          <meshStandardMaterial 
            map={paintTexture}
            metalness={object.metalness}
            roughness={object.roughness}
            transparent={isXrayTarget || isXrayAll}
            opacity={isXrayTarget ? 0.25 : (isXrayAll ? 0.6 : 1)}
          />
        ) : baseTexture ? (
          // Use base texture when available (AI textures, imported textures, etc.)
          <meshStandardMaterial
            map={baseTexture}
            color="#ffffff"
            metalness={object.metalness}
            roughness={object.roughness}
            transparent={isXrayTarget || isXrayAll}
            opacity={isXrayTarget ? 0.25 : (isXrayAll ? 0.6 : 1)}
          />
        ) : (
          <meshStandardMaterial 
            color={isSelected ? `#${selectedColor}` : object.color} 
            metalness={object.metalness}
            roughness={object.roughness}
            emissive={hovered ? object.color : '#000000'}
            emissiveIntensity={hovered ? 0.15 : 0}
            transparent={isXrayTarget || isXrayAll}
            opacity={isXrayTarget ? 0.25 : (isXrayAll ? 0.6 : 1)}
          />
        )}
      </mesh>
      
      {/* Selection wireframe */}
      {isSelected && (
        <mesh 
          position={object.position}
          rotation={object.rotation}
          scale={object.scale.map(s => s * 1.02) as [number, number, number]}
        >
          {getGeometry(object.type)}
          <meshBasicMaterial color="#ffffff" wireframe transparent opacity={0.5} />
        </mesh>
      )}
      
      {/* Selection ring on ground */}
      {isSelected && (
        <mesh rotation={[-Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]} position={[object.position[0], 0.01, object.position[2]]}>
          <ringGeometry args={[0.8, 1, 32]} />
          <meshBasicMaterial color="#8b5cf6" transparent opacity={0.4} side={THREE.DoubleSide} />
        </mesh>
      )}
      
      {/* Transform Controls */}
      {isSelected && transformMode && !object.locked && meshRef.current && (
        <TransformControls
          ref={transformRef}
          object={meshRef.current}
          mode={transformMode}
          onMouseUp={handleTransformEnd}
          size={0.75}
        />
      )}
    </group>
  );
}

// ============================================================================
// SCENE OBJECTS (More shapes!)
// ============================================================================

// Get geometry based on object type
function getGeometry(type: SceneObject['type']) {
  switch (type) {
    case 'cube': return <boxGeometry args={[1, 1, 1]} />;
    case 'sphere': return <sphereGeometry args={[0.5, 32, 32]} />;
    case 'cylinder': return <cylinderGeometry args={[0.4, 0.4, 1, 32]} />;
    case 'cone': return <coneGeometry args={[0.5, 1, 32]} />;
    case 'torus': return <torusGeometry args={[0.4, 0.15, 16, 48]} />;
    case 'plane': return <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />;
    case 'glb': return <boxGeometry args={[0.5, 0.5, 0.5]} />; // Fallback for GLB
    default: return <boxGeometry args={[1, 1, 1]} />;
  }
}

// GLB Model Loader Component with Transform Controls
function GLBModel({ 
  url, 
  position, 
  rotation, 
  scale,
  isSelected,
  onClick,
  activeTool,
  onTransformChange,
  objectId,
  orbitControlsRef,
  onTransformStart,
  onTransformEnd,
  locked,
}: { 
  url: string;
  position: [number, number, number];
  rotation: [number, number, number];
  scale: [number, number, number];
  isSelected: boolean;
  onClick: () => void;
  activeTool: string;
  onTransformChange: (id: string, position: [number, number, number], rotation: [number, number, number], scale: [number, number, number]) => void;
  objectId: string;
  orbitControlsRef: React.RefObject<any>;
  onTransformStart: () => void;
  onTransformEnd: () => void;
  locked: boolean;
}) {
  const { scene } = useGLTF(url);
  const groupRef = useRef<THREE.Group>(null);
  const transformRef = useRef<any>(null);
  const [loadError, setLoadError] = useState(false);
  
  // Get transform mode from active tool
  const getTransformMode = (): 'translate' | 'rotate' | 'scale' | undefined => {
    switch (activeTool) {
      case 'move': return 'translate';
      case 'rotate': return 'rotate';
      case 'scale': return 'scale';
      default: return undefined;
    }
  };
  
  const transformMode = getTransformMode();
  
  // Disable orbit controls while transforming
  useEffect(() => {
    if (transformRef.current) {
      const controls = transformRef.current;
      const callback = (event: any) => {
        if (event.value) {
          onTransformStart();
        } else {
          onTransformEnd();
        }
      };
      controls.addEventListener('dragging-changed', callback);
      return () => controls.removeEventListener('dragging-changed', callback);
    }
  }, [onTransformStart, onTransformEnd]);
  
  // Handle transform end
  const handleTransformEnd = () => {
    if (groupRef.current) {
      const pos = groupRef.current.position;
      const rot = groupRef.current.rotation;
      const scl = groupRef.current.scale;
      onTransformChange(
        objectId,
        [pos.x, pos.y, pos.z],
        [rot.x, rot.y, rot.z],
        [scl.x, scl.y, scl.z]
      );
    }
  };
  
  // Clone the scene to avoid sharing materials
  const clonedScene = useMemo(() => {
    try {
      const clone = scene.clone();
      clone.traverse((obj) => {
        if (obj instanceof THREE.Mesh) {
          obj.castShadow = true;
          obj.receiveShadow = true;
        }
      });
      return clone;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('Failed to clone GLB scene:', e);
      setLoadError(true);
      return null;
    }
  }, [scene]);
  
  if (loadError || !clonedScene) {
    // Fallback to a placeholder box with transform controls
    return (
      <group>
        <mesh
```
